title: Dual Progressive Transformations for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督语义分割的双重渐进变换
abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), which aims to mine the object regions by merely using class-level labels, is a challenging task in computer vision. The current state-of-the-art CNN-based methods usually adopt Class-Activation-Maps (CAMs) to highlight the potential areas of the object, however, they may suffer from the part-activated issues. To this end, we try an early attempt to explore the global feature attention mechanism of vision transformer in WSSS task. However, since the transformer lacks the inductive bias as in CNN models, it can not boost the performance directly and may yield the over-activated problems. To tackle these drawbacks, we propose a Convolutional Neural Networks Refined Transformer (CRT) to mine a globally complete and locally accurate class activation maps in this paper. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2012 and CUB-200-2011 datasets. Experimental evaluations show that our proposed CRT achieves the new state-of-the-art performance on both the weakly supervised semantic segmentation task the weakly supervised object localization task, which outperform others by a large margin.
summary: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), which aims to mine the object regions by merely using class-level labels, is a challenging task in computer vision. The current state-of-the-art CNN-based methods usually adopt Class-Activation-Maps (CAMs) to highlight the potential areas of the object, however, they may suffer from the part-activated issues. To this end, we try an early attempt to explore the global feature attention mechanism of vision transformer in WSSS task. However, since the transformer lacks the inductive bias as in CNN models, it can not boost the performance directly and may yield the over-activated problems. To tackle these drawbacks, we propose a Convolutional Neural Networks Refined Transformer (CRT) to mine a globally complete and locally accurate class activation maps in this paper. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2012 and CUB-200-2011 datasets. Experimental evaluations show that our proposed CRT achieves the new state-of-the-art performance on both the weakly supervised semantic segmentation task the weakly supervised object localization task, which outperform others by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 弱监督语义分割（WSSS）旨在仅使用类级别标签来挖掘对象区域，是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务。目前最先进的基于 CNN 的方法通常采用类激活图（CAM）来突出显示对象的潜在区域，然而，它们可能会遇到部分激活的问题。为此，我们尝试在 WSSS 任务中探索视觉 Transformer 的全局特征注意力机制。然而，由于变压器缺乏 CNN 模型中的感应偏置，因此它不能直接提升性能，并且可能会产生过度激活的问题。为了解决这些缺点，我们在本文中提出了一种卷积神经网络精炼变压器（CRT）来挖掘全局完整且局部准确的类激活图。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 CUB-200-2011 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验评估表明，我们提出的 CRT 在弱监督语义分割任务和弱监督对象定位任务上都实现了新的最先进性能，大大优于其他任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于弱监督语义分割的新方法，旨在通过仅使用类别级标签来挖掘目标区域。
AI.motivation: 当前基于CNN的方法在弱监督语义分割任务中存在部分激活的问题，而基于视觉Transformer的方法由于缺乏CNN的归纳偏置，可能产生过度激活的问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种卷积神经网络优化的Transformer（CRT），以挖掘全局完整且局部精确的类别激活图。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和CUB-200-2011数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，CRT在弱监督语义分割和弱监督目标定位任务中均取得了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CRT方法在弱监督语义分割任务中表现出色，有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

search_text: Dual Progressive Transformations for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation 弱监督语义分割的双重渐进变换 Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS), which aims to mine the object regions by merely using class-level labels, is a challenging task in computer vision. The current state-of-the-art CNN-based methods usually adopt Class-Activation-Maps (CAMs) to highlight the potential areas of the object, however, they may suffer from the part-activated issues. To this end, we try an early attempt to explore the global feature attention mechanism of vision transformer in WSSS task. However, since the transformer lacks the inductive bias as in CNN models, it can not boost the performance directly and may yield the over-activated problems. To tackle these drawbacks, we propose a Convolutional Neural Networks Refined Transformer (CRT) to mine a globally complete and locally accurate class activation maps in this paper. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on PASCAL VOC 2012 and CUB-200-2011 datasets. Experimental evaluations show that our proposed CRT achieves the new state-of-the-art performance on both the weakly supervised semantic segmentation task the weakly supervised object localization task, which outperform others by a large margin. 弱监督语义分割（WSSS）旨在仅使用类级别标签来挖掘对象区域，是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务。目前最先进的基于 CNN 的方法通常采用类激活图（CAM）来突出显示对象的潜在区域，然而，它们可能会遇到部分激活的问题。为此，我们尝试在 WSSS 任务中探索视觉 Transformer 的全局特征注意力机制。然而，由于变压器缺乏 CNN 模型中的感应偏置，因此它不能直接提升性能，并且可能会产生过度激活的问题。为了解决这些缺点，我们在本文中提出了一种卷积神经网络精炼变压器（CRT）来挖掘全局完整且局部准确的类激活图。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 CUB-200-2011 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。实验评估表明，我们提出的 CRT 在弱监督语义分割任务和弱监督对象定位任务上都实现了新的最先进性能，大大优于其他任务。 本文提出了一种用于弱监督语义分割的新方法，旨在通过仅使用类别级标签来挖掘目标区域。 Dongjian Huo,Yukun Su,Qingyao Wu cs.CV

title: Multi-Prompt Alignment for Multi-Source Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 多源无监督域适应的多提示对齐
abstract: Most existing methods for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) rely on a shared network to extract domain-invariant features. However, when facing multiple source domains, optimizing such a network involves updating the parameters of the entire network, making it both computationally expensive and challenging, particularly when coupled with min-max objectives. Inspired by recent advances in prompt learning that adapts high-capacity models for downstream tasks in a computationally economic way, we introduce Multi-Prompt Alignment (MPA), a simple yet efficient framework for multi-source UDA. Given a source and target domain pair, MPA first trains an individual prompt to minimize the domain gap through a contrastive loss. Then, MPA denoises the learned prompts through an auto-encoding process and aligns them by maximizing the agreement of all the reconstructed prompts. Moreover, we show that the resulting subspace acquired from the auto-encoding process can easily generalize to a streamlined set of target domains, making our method more efficient for practical usage. Extensive experiments show that MPA achieves state-of-the-art results on three popular datasets with an impressive average accuracy of 54.1% on DomainNet.
summary: Most existing methods for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) rely on a shared network to extract domain-invariant features. However, when facing multiple source domains, optimizing such a network involves updating the parameters of the entire network, making it both computationally expensive and challenging, particularly when coupled with min-max objectives. Inspired by recent advances in prompt learning that adapts high-capacity models for downstream tasks in a computationally economic way, we introduce Multi-Prompt Alignment (MPA), a simple yet efficient framework for multi-source UDA. Given a source and target domain pair, MPA first trains an individual prompt to minimize the domain gap through a contrastive loss. Then, MPA denoises the learned prompts through an auto-encoding process and aligns them by maximizing the agreement of all the reconstructed prompts. Moreover, we show that the resulting subspace acquired from the auto-encoding process can easily generalize to a streamlined set of target domains, making our method more efficient for practical usage. Extensive experiments show that MPA achieves state-of-the-art results on three popular datasets with an impressive average accuracy of 54.1% on DomainNet.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的无监督域适应（UDA）方法依赖于共享网络来提取域不变特征。然而，当面对多个源域时，优化此类网络涉及更新整个网络的参数，这使得计算成本昂贵且具有挑战性，特别是在与最小-最大目标结合时。受到即时学习最新进展的启发，即时学习以计算经济的方式适应下游任务的高容量模型，我们引入了多提示对齐（MPA），这是一种简单而高效的多源 UDA 框架。给定源域和目标域对，MPA 首先训练单个提示，通过对比损失最小化域差距。然后，MPA 通过自动编码过程对学习到的提示进行去噪，并通过最大化所有重构提示的一致性来对齐它们。此外，我们表明，从自动编码过程中获得的子空间可以很容易地推广到一组精简的目标域，使我们的方法在实际使用中更加有效。大量实验表明，MPA 在三个流行数据集上取得了最先进的结果，在 DomainNet 上的平均准确率高达 54.1%，令人印象深刻。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为多提示对齐（MPA）的框架，用于解决多源无监督域适应（UDA）问题，通过优化提示学习降低计算成本并提升适应效果。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法依赖共享网络提取域不变特征，但面对多源域时参数更新成本高且优化困难。受提示学习高效适应下游任务的启发，本文旨在设计一种更高效的多源UDA框架。
AI.method: MPA首先为每个源-目标域对训练独立提示以最小化域差距（对比损失），再通过自编码过程去噪并最大化所有重构提示的一致性，最终利用自编码子空间泛化到多个目标域。
AI.result: 在DomainNet等三个数据集上，MPA达到最先进的平均准确率54.1%，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MPA通过提示对齐和自编码优化，实现了比传统共享网络更高效、更优的多源UDA性能，具有实际应用价值。

However, when facing multiple source domains, optimizing such a network involves updating the parameters of the entire network, making it both computationally expensive and challenging, particularly when coupled with min-max objectives. Inspired by recent advances in prompt learning that adapts high-capacity models for downstream tasks in a computationally economic way, we introduce Multi-Prompt Alignment (MPA), a simple yet efficient framework for multi-source UDA. Given a source and target domain pair, MPA first trains an individual prompt to minimize the domain gap through a contrastive loss. Moreover, we show that the resulting subspace acquired from the auto-encoding process can easily generalize to a streamlined set of target domains, making our method more efficient for practical usage. title: Scale-invariant Bayesian Neural Networks with Connectivity Tangent Kernel
title_zh: 具有连接切线内核的尺度不变贝叶斯神经网络
abstract: Explaining generalizations and preventing over-confident predictions are central goals of studies on the loss landscape of neural networks. Flatness, defined as loss invariability on perturbations of a pre-trained solution, is widely accepted as a predictor of generalization in this context. However, the problem that flatness and generalization bounds can be changed arbitrarily according to the scale of a parameter was pointed out, and previous studies partially solved the problem with restrictions: Counter-intuitively, their generalization bounds were still variant for the function-preserving parameter scaling transformation or limited only to an impractical network structure. As a more fundamental solution, we propose new prior and posterior distributions invariant to scaling transformations by \textit{decomposing} the scale and connectivity of parameters, thereby allowing the resulting generalization bound to describe the generalizability of a broad class of networks with the more practical class of transformations such as weight decay with batch normalization. We also show that the above issue adversely affects the uncertainty calibration of Laplace approximation and propose a solution using our invariant posterior. We empirically demonstrate our posterior provides effective flatness and calibration measures with low complexity in such a practical parameter transformation case, supporting its practical effectiveness in line with our rationale.
summary: Explaining generalizations and preventing over-confident predictions are central goals of studies on the loss landscape of neural networks. Flatness, defined as loss invariability on perturbations of a pre-trained solution, is widely accepted as a predictor of generalization in this context. However, the problem that flatness and generalization bounds can be changed arbitrarily according to the scale of a parameter was pointed out, and previous studies partially solved the problem with restrictions: Counter-intuitively, their generalization bounds were still variant for the function-preserving parameter scaling transformation or limited only to an impractical network structure. As a more fundamental solution, we propose new prior and posterior distributions invariant to scaling transformations by \textit{decomposing} the scale and connectivity of parameters, thereby allowing the resulting generalization bound to describe the generalizability of a broad class of networks with the more practical class of transformations such as weight decay with batch normalization. We also show that the above issue adversely affects the uncertainty calibration of Laplace approximation and propose a solution using our invariant posterior. We empirically demonstrate our posterior provides effective flatness and calibration measures with low complexity in such a practical parameter transformation case, supporting its practical effectiveness in line with our rationale.
abstract_zh: 解释概括和防止过度自信的预测是神经网络损失景观研究的核心目标。平坦度被定义为预训练解决方案扰动时的损失不变性，在这种情况下被广泛接受为泛化的预测因子。然而，指出了平坦度和泛化边界可以根据参数的尺度任意改变的问题，并且先前的研究部分地解决了有限制的问题：与直觉相反，它们的泛化边界对于保留功能的参数缩放变换仍然是变化的，或者仅限于不切实际的网络结构。作为一个更基本的解决方案，我们通过 \textit{分解} 参数的尺度和连通性，提出了对尺度变换不变的新的先验分布和后验分布，从而允许所得到的泛化范围能够描述具有更实用的变换类别的广泛网络的泛化性，例如批量归一化的权重衰减。我们还表明上述问题对拉普拉斯近似的不确定性校准产生不利影响，并提出了使用不变后验的解决方案。我们凭经验证明，在这种实际的参数转换案例中，我们的后验提供了有效的平坦度和低复杂性的校准措施，支持其实际有效性符合我们的基本原理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于尺度不变性贝叶斯神经网络的方法，通过分解参数的尺度和连接性，解决参数缩放对泛化能力的影响问题，并改进不确定性校准。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现，神经网络的平坦性（flatness）作为泛化能力的指标会因参数尺度变化而波动，且传统方法在函数保持变换下仍存在泛化界变化或仅适用于不实际的网络结构的问题。
AI.method: 通过分解参数的尺度与连接性，构建尺度不变的先验和后验分布，使泛化界对实际参数变换（如带批量归一化的权重衰减）具有鲁棒性，并基于该不变后验改进拉普拉斯近似的不确定性校准。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提后验在实际参数变换场景下能有效提供低复杂度的平坦性与校准度量，验证了其理论合理性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法从更根本的尺度不变性角度解决了泛化界与不确定性校准问题，为广泛网络结构提供了实用的理论支持与计算方案。

search_text: Scale-invariant Bayesian Neural Networks with Connectivity Tangent Kernel 具有连接切线内核的尺度不变贝叶斯神经网络 Explaining generalizations and preventing over-confident predictions are central goals of studies on the loss landscape of neural networks. Flatness, defined as loss invariability on perturbations of a pre-trained solution, is widely accepted as a predictor of generalization in this context. However, the problem that flatness and generalization bounds can be changed arbitrarily according to the scale of a parameter was pointed out, and previous studies partially solved the problem with restrictions: Counter-intuitively, their generalization bounds were still variant for the function-preserving parameter scaling transformation or limited only to an impractical network structure. As a more fundamental solution, we propose new prior and posterior distributions invariant to scaling transformations by \textit{decomposing} the scale and connectivity of parameters, thereby allowing the resulting generalization bound to describe the generalizability of a broad class of networks with the more practical class of transformations such as weight decay with batch normalization. We also show that the above issue adversely affects the uncertainty calibration of Laplace approximation and propose a solution using our invariant posterior. We empirically demonstrate our posterior provides effective flatness and calibration measures with low complexity in such a practical parameter transformation case, supporting its practical effectiveness in line with our rationale. 解释概括和防止过度自信的预测是神经网络损失景观研究的核心目标。平坦度被定义为预训练解决方案扰动时的损失不变性，在这种情况下被广泛接受为泛化的预测因子。然而，指出了平坦度和泛化边界可以根据参数的尺度任意改变的问题，并且先前的研究部分地解决了有限制的问题：与直觉相反，它们的泛化边界对于保留功能的参数缩放变换仍然是变化的，或者仅限于不切实际的网络结构。作为一个更基本的解决方案，我们通过 \textit{分解} 参数的尺度和连通性，提出了对尺度变换不变的新的先验分布和后验分布，从而允许所得到的泛化范围能够描述具有更实用的变换类别的广泛网络的泛化性，例如批量归一化的权重衰减。我们还表明上述问题对拉普拉斯近似的不确定性校准产生不利影响，并提出了使用不变后验的解决方案。我们凭经验证明，在这种实际的参数转换案例中，我们的后验提供了有效的平坦度和低复杂性的校准措施，支持其实际有效性符合我们的基本原理。 本文提出了一种基于尺度不变性贝叶斯神经网络的方法，通过分解参数的尺度和连接性，解决参数缩放对泛化能力的影响问题，并改进不确定性校准。 SungYub Kim,Sihwan Park,Kyungsu Kim,Eunho Yang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Mixture of experts models for multilevel data: modelling framework and approximation theory
title_zh: 多级数据的混合专家模型：建模框架和近似理论
abstract: Multilevel data are prevalent in many real-world applications. However, it remains an open research problem to identify and justify a class of models that flexibly capture a wide range of multilevel data. Motivated by the versatility of the mixture of experts (MoE) models in fitting regression data, in this article we extend upon the MoE and study a class of mixed MoE (MMoE) models for multilevel data. Under some regularity conditions, we prove that the MMoE is dense in the space of any continuous mixed effects models in the sense of weak convergence. As a result, the MMoE has a potential to accurately resemble almost all characteristics inherited in multilevel data, including the marginal distributions, dependence structures, regression links, random intercepts and random slopes. In a particular case where the multilevel data is hierarchical, we further show that a nested version of the MMoE universally approximates a broad range of dependence structures of the random effects among different factor levels.
summary: Multilevel data are prevalent in many real-world applications. However, it remains an open research problem to identify and justify a class of models that flexibly capture a wide range of multilevel data. Motivated by the versatility of the mixture of experts (MoE) models in fitting regression data, in this article we extend upon the MoE and study a class of mixed MoE (MMoE) models for multilevel data. Under some regularity conditions, we prove that the MMoE is dense in the space of any continuous mixed effects models in the sense of weak convergence. As a result, the MMoE has a potential to accurately resemble almost all characteristics inherited in multilevel data, including the marginal distributions, dependence structures, regression links, random intercepts and random slopes. In a particular case where the multilevel data is hierarchical, we further show that a nested version of the MMoE universally approximates a broad range of dependence structures of the random effects among different factor levels.
abstract_zh: 多级数据在许多实际应用中普遍存在。然而，识别和证明一类能够灵活捕获各种多级数据的模型仍然是一个开放的研究问题。受专家混合 (MoE) 模型在拟合回归数据方面的多功能性的启发，在本文中，我们扩展了 MoE 并研究了一类用于多级数据的混合 MoE (MMoE) 模型。在一定的规律性条件下，我们证明了MMoE在任意连续混合效应模型的空间中在弱收敛意义上是稠密的。因此，MMoE 有可能准确地模拟多级数据中继承的几乎所有特征，包括边缘分布、依赖结构、回归链接、随机截距和随机斜率。在多级数据是分层的特定情况下，我们进一步表明，MMoE 的嵌套版本普遍近似不同因子水平之间随机效应的广泛依赖结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合专家模型（MMoE）以处理多层次数据，并证明其在连续混合效应模型空间中具有逼近能力。
AI.motivation: 多层次数据在实际应用中很常见，但目前尚缺乏能够灵活捕捉多层次数据特性的模型。混合专家模型（MoE）在回归数据拟合方面表现出色，因此本文旨在扩展MoE以处理多层次数据。
AI.method: 本文扩展了混合专家模型，提出了一种混合混合专家模型（MMoE），并在一定正则条件下证明其在连续混合效应模型空间中具有逼近能力。
AI.result: MMoE模型在连续混合效应模型空间中具有逼近能力，能够准确捕捉多层次数据的边际分布、依赖结构、回归关系、随机截距和随机斜率等特征。
AI.conclusion: MMoE模型为多层次数据建模提供了一种灵活而强大的工具，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Jinghui Lu,Dongsheng Zhu,Weidong Han,Rui Zhao,Brian Mac Namee,Fei Tan
title: What Makes Pre-trained Language Models Better Zero-shot Learners?
title_zh: 是什么让预训练的语言模型成为更好的零样本学习者？
abstract: Current methods for prompt learning in zeroshot scenarios widely rely on a development set with sufficient human-annotated data to select the best-performing prompt template a posteriori. This is not ideal because in a realworld zero-shot scenario of practical relevance, no labelled data is available. Thus, we propose a simple yet effective method for screening reasonable prompt templates in zero-shot text classification: Perplexity Selection (Perplection). We hypothesize that language discrepancy can be used to measure the efficacy of prompt templates, and thereby develop a substantiated perplexity-based scheme allowing for forecasting the performance of prompt templates in advance. Experiments show that our method leads to improved prediction performance in a realistic zero-shot setting, eliminating the need for any labelled examples.
summary: Current methods for prompt learning in zeroshot scenarios widely rely on a development set with sufficient human-annotated data to select the best-performing prompt template a posteriori. This is not ideal because in a realworld zero-shot scenario of practical relevance, no labelled data is available. Thus, we propose a simple yet effective method for screening reasonable prompt templates in zero-shot text classification: Perplexity Selection (Perplection). We hypothesize that language discrepancy can be used to measure the efficacy of prompt templates, and thereby develop a substantiated perplexity-based scheme allowing for forecasting the performance of prompt templates in advance. Experiments show that our method leads to improved prediction performance in a realistic zero-shot setting, eliminating the need for any labelled examples.
abstract_zh: 目前零样本场景中的提示学习方法广泛依赖于具有足够人工注释数据的开发集来事后选择性能最佳的提示模板。这并不理想，因为在具有实际意义的现实世界零样本场景中，没有可用的标记数据。因此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来在零样本文本分类中筛选合理的提示模板：困惑选择（Perpletion）。我们假设语言差异可以用来衡量提示模板的有效性，从而开发出一种经过证实的基于困惑度的方案，允许提前预测提示模板的性能。实验表明，我们的方法可以在现实的零样本设置中提高预测性能，从而消除了对任何标记示例的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何在零样本文本分类中筛选有效的提示模板，以提高模型的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标注数据选择提示模板，但实际零样本场景缺乏标注数据，需提出无需标注数据的筛选方法。
AI.method: 提出基于困惑度（Perplexity）的筛选方法，通过语言差异度衡量提示模板有效性，提前预测其性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在真实零样本设置中提升预测性能，无需标注示例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升零样本学习效果，为无需标注数据的提示模板选择提供新思路。

Experiments show that our method leads to improved prediction performance in a realistic zero-shot setting, eliminating the need for any labelled examples. 目前零样本场景中的提示学习方法广泛依赖于具有足够人工注释数据的开发集来事后选择性能最佳的提示模板。这并不理想，因为在具有实际意义的现实世界零样本场景中，没有可用的标记数据。因此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来在零样本文本分类中筛选合理的提示模板：困惑选择（Perpletion）。我们假设语言差异可以用来衡量提示模板的有效性，从而开发出一种经过证实的基于困惑度的方案，允许提前预测提示模板的性能。实验表明，我们的方法可以在现实的零样本设置中提高预测性能，从而消除了对任何标记示例的需要。 本文主要研究如何在零样本文本分类中筛选有效的提示模板，以提高模型的预测性能。 Jinghui Lu,Dongsheng Zhu,Weidong Han,Rui Zhao,Brian Mac Namee,Fei Tan cs.CL,cs.AI

title: ASPiRe:Adaptive Skill Priors for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: ASPiRe：强化学习的自适应技能先验
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: We introduce ASPiRe (Adaptive Skill Prior for RL), a new approach that leverages prior experience to accelerate reinforcement learning. Unlike existing methods that learn a single skill prior from a large and diverse dataset, our framework learns a library of different distinction skill priors (i.e., behavior priors) from a collection of specialized datasets, and learns how to combine them to solve a new task. This formulation allows the algorithm to acquire a set of specialized skill priors that are more reusable for downstream tasks; however, it also brings up additional challenges of how to effectively combine these unstructured sets of skill priors to form a new prior for new tasks. Specifically, it requires the agent not only to identify which skill prior(s) to use but also how to combine them (either sequentially or concurrently) to form a new prior. To achieve this goal, ASPiRe includes Adaptive Weight Module (AWM) that learns to infer an adaptive weight assignment between different skill priors and uses them to guide policy learning for downstream tasks via weighted Kullback-Leibler divergences. Our experiments demonstrate that ASPiRe can significantly accelerate the learning of new downstream tasks in the presence of multiple priors and show improvement on competitive baselines.
summary: We introduce ASPiRe (Adaptive Skill Prior for RL), a new approach that leverages prior experience to accelerate reinforcement learning. Unlike existing methods that learn a single skill prior from a large and diverse dataset, our framework learns a library of different distinction skill priors (i.e., behavior priors) from a collection of specialized datasets, and learns how to combine them to solve a new task. This formulation allows the algorithm to acquire a set of specialized skill priors that are more reusable for downstream tasks; however, it also brings up additional challenges of how to effectively combine these unstructured sets of skill priors to form a new prior for new tasks. Specifically, it requires the agent not only to identify which skill prior(s) to use but also how to combine them (either sequentially or concurrently) to form a new prior. To achieve this goal, ASPiRe includes Adaptive Weight Module (AWM) that learns to infer an adaptive weight assignment between different skill priors and uses them to guide policy learning for downstream tasks via weighted Kullback-Leibler divergences. Our experiments demonstrate that ASPiRe can significantly accelerate the learning of new downstream tasks in the presence of multiple priors and show improvement on competitive baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 ASPiRe（强化学习自适应技能先验），这是一种利用先前经验来加速强化学习的新方法。与从大型且多样化的数据集中学习单一技能先验的现有方法不同，我们的框架从专门数据集的集合中学习不同区分技能先验（即行为先验）的库，并学习如何组合它们来解决新任务。这种公式允许算法获得一组更可重复用于下游任务的专业技能先验；然而，它也带来了额外的挑战，即如何有效地将这些非结构化的先验技能组合起来，形成新任务的新先验。具体来说，它要求智能体不仅要确定要使用哪些先验技能，还要确定如何将它们组合（顺序或同时）以形成新的先验。为了实现这一目标，ASPiRe 包含自适应权重模块 (AWM)，该模块学习推断不同技能先验之间的自适应权重分配，并使用它们通过加权 Kullback-Leibler 散度来指导下游任务的策略学习。我们的实验表明，ASPiRe 可以在存在多个先验的情况下显着加速新下游任务的学习，并显示出在竞争基线上的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASPiRe方法，通过自适应组合多个技能先验来加速强化学习过程。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅学习单一技能先验，难以有效复用；而多任务场景下需要灵活组合不同技能先验以提高学习效率。
AI.method: 从专用数据集中学习多样化技能先验库，并设计自适应权重模块（AWM）通过加权KL散度动态组合先验指导策略学习。
AI.result: 实验表明ASPiRe在多个基准任务中显著加速新任务学习，优于现有竞争方法。
AI.conclusion: ASPiRe通过自适应技能先验组合机制有效提升了强化学习的跨任务迁移能力与学习效率。

title: Synonym Detection Using Syntactic Dependency And Neural Embeddings
title_zh: 使用句法依赖和神经嵌入的同义词检测
comment: ef:IADIS International Journal on WWW/Internet Vol. 20, No. 1, pp. 16-32 (2022)
comments: ef:IADIS International Journal on WWW/Internet Vol. 20, No. 1, pp. 16-32 (2022)
abstract: Recent advances on the Vector Space Model have significantly improved some NLP applications such as neural machine translation and natural language generation. Although word co-occurrences in context have been widely used in counting-/predicting-based distributional models, the role of syntactic dependencies in deriving distributional semantics has not yet been thoroughly investigated. By comparing various Vector Space Models in detecting synonyms in TOEFL, we systematically study the salience of syntactic dependencies in accounting for distributional similarity. We separate syntactic dependencies into different groups according to their various grammatical roles and then use context-counting to construct their corresponding raw and SVD-compressed matrices. Moreover, using the same training hyperparameters and corpora, we study typical neural embeddings in the evaluation. We further study the effectiveness of injecting human-compiled semantic knowledge into neural embeddings on computing distributional similarity. Our results show that the syntactically conditioned contexts can interpret lexical semantics better than the unconditioned ones, whereas retrofitting neural embeddings with semantic knowledge can significantly improve synonym detection.
summary: Recent advances on the Vector Space Model have significantly improved some NLP applications such as neural machine translation and natural language generation. Although word co-occurrences in context have been widely used in counting-/predicting-based distributional models, the role of syntactic dependencies in deriving distributional semantics has not yet been thoroughly investigated. By comparing various Vector Space Models in detecting synonyms in TOEFL, we systematically study the salience of syntactic dependencies in accounting for distributional similarity. We separate syntactic dependencies into different groups according to their various grammatical roles and then use context-counting to construct their corresponding raw and SVD-compressed matrices. Moreover, using the same training hyperparameters and corpora, we study typical neural embeddings in the evaluation. We further study the effectiveness of injecting human-compiled semantic knowledge into neural embeddings on computing distributional similarity. Our results show that the syntactically conditioned contexts can interpret lexical semantics better than the unconditioned ones, whereas retrofitting neural embeddings with semantic knowledge can significantly improve synonym detection.
abstract_zh: 向量空间模型的最新进展显着改进了一些 NLP 应用，例如神经机器翻译和自然语言生成。尽管上下文中的单词共现已广泛应用于基于计数/预测的分布模型，但句法依赖性在派生分布语义中的作用尚未得到彻底研究。通过比较托福考试中检测同义词的各种向量空间模型，我们系统地研究了句法依赖性在考虑分布相似性方面的显着性。我们根据不同的语法角色将句法依赖分为不同的组，然后使用上下文计数来构造其相应的原始矩阵和 SVD 压缩矩阵。此外，使用相同的训练超参数和语料库，我们在评估中研究典型的神经嵌入。我们进一步研究将人类编译的语义知识注入神经嵌入中计算分布相似性的有效性。我们的结果表明，句法条件上下文可以比无条件上下文更好地解释词汇语义，而用语义知识改造神经嵌入可以显着改善同义词检测。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何结合句法依赖和神经嵌入技术提升同义词检测效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管词共现模型在NLP中广泛应用，但句法依赖对分布语义的影响尚未被充分探索，且人工语义知识与神经嵌入的结合效果需验证。
AI.method: 通过比较多种向量空间模型在TOEFL数据集上的表现，将句法依赖按语法角色分组并构建矩阵，结合SVD压缩与神经嵌入方法，同时注入人工语义知识进行评估。
AI.result: 句法条件化上下文比无条件模型更优，而融合语义知识的神经嵌入显著提升同义词检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 句法依赖的条件化建模与语义知识注入可有效增强分布语义表示，从而改进同义词检测性能。

title: An efficient encoder-decoder architecture with top-down attention for speech separation
title_zh: 一种高效的编码器-解码器架构，具有自上而下的语音分离注意力
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023; Code & Demos: https://cslikai.cn/project/TDANet/
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023; Code & Demos: https://cslikai.cn/project/TDANet/
abstract: Deep neural networks have shown excellent prospects in speech separation tasks. However, obtaining good results while keeping a low model complexity remains challenging in real-world applications. In this paper, we provide a bio-inspired efficient encoder-decoder architecture by mimicking the brain's top-down attention, called TDANet, with decreased model complexity without sacrificing performance. The top-down attention in TDANet is extracted by the global attention (GA) module and the cascaded local attention (LA) layers. The GA module takes multi-scale acoustic features as input to extract global attention signal, which then modulates features of different scales by direct top-down connections. The LA layers use features of adjacent layers as input to extract the local attention signal, which is used to modulate the lateral input in a top-down manner. On three benchmark datasets, TDANet consistently achieved competitive separation performance to previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods with higher efficiency. Specifically, TDANet's multiply-accumulate operations (MACs) are only 5\% of Sepformer, one of the previous SOTA models, and CPU inference time is only 10\% of Sepformer. In addition, a large-size version of TDANet obtained SOTA results on three datasets, with MACs still only 10\% of Sepformer and the CPU inference time only 24\% of Sepformer.

On three benchmark datasets, TDANet consistently achieved competitive separation performance to previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods with higher efficiency. Specifically, TDANet's multiply-accumulate operations (MACs) are only 5\% of Sepformer, one of the previous SOTA models, and CPU inference time is only 10\% of Sepformer. In addition, a large-size version of TDANet obtained SOTA results on three datasets, with MACs still only 10\% of Sepformer and the CPU inference time only 24\% of Sepformer.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在语音分离任务中展现出了良好的前景。然而，在实际应用中，在保持较低模型复杂性的同时获得良好结果仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过模仿大脑自上而下的注意力提供了一种受生物启发的高效编码器-解码器架构，称为 TDANet，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低了模型复杂性。 TDANet 中自上而下的注意力由全局注意力（GA）模块和级联的局部注意力（LA）层提取。 GA模块以多尺度声学特征为输入，提取全局注意力信号，然后通过直接自上而下的连接来调制不同尺度的特征。 LA层使用相邻层的特征作为输入来提取局部注意力信号，该信号用于以自上而下的方式调制横向输入。在三个基准数据集上，TDANet 始终以更高的效率实现了与之前最先进 (SOTA) 方法相比具有竞争力的分离性能。具体来说，TDANet 的乘法累加运算（MAC）仅为之前 SOTA 模型之一 Sepformer 的 5%，CPU 推理时间仅为 Sepformer 的 10%。此外，TDANet 的大型版本在三个数据集上获得了 SOTA 结果，MAC 仍仅为 Sepformer 的 10%，CPU 推理时间仅为 Sepformer 的 24%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于顶向下注意力机制的高效编码器-解码器架构TDANet，用于语音分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在语音分离中难以兼顾性能与模型复杂度，需设计更高效的架构以适应实际应用。
AI.method: 通过模仿大脑顶向下注意力机制，设计全局注意力（GA）模块与级联局部注意力（LA）层，利用多尺度声学特征提取全局信号并进行顶向下调制，同时通过相邻层特征提取局部信号实现侧向调制。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，TDANet的MAC操作量仅为Sepformer的5%，CPU推理时间仅为10%；大尺寸版本MAC为Sepformer的10%，推理时间24%，同时达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: TDANet通过生物启发的注意力机制，在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度，适用于实际语音分离场景。

search_text: An efficient encoder-decoder architecture with top-down attention for speech separation 一种高效的编码器-解码器架构，具有自上而下的语音分离注意力 Deep neural networks have shown excellent prospects in speech separation tasks. However, obtaining good results while keeping a low model complexity remains challenging in real-world applications. In this paper, we provide a bio-inspired efficient encoder-decoder architecture by mimicking the brain's top-down attention, called TDANet, with decreased model complexity without sacrificing performance. The top-down attention in TDANet is extracted by the global attention (GA) module and the cascaded local attention (LA) layers. The GA module takes multi-scale acoustic features as input to extract global attention signal, which then modulates features of different scales by direct top-down connections. The LA layers use features of adjacent layers as input to extract the local attention signal, which is used to modulate the lateral input in a top-down manner. On three benchmark datasets, TDANet consistently achieved competitive separation performance to previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods with higher efficiency. Specifically, TDANet's multiply-accumulate operations (MACs) are only 5\% of Sepformer, one of the previous SOTA models, and CPU inference time is only 10\% of Sepformer. In addition, a large-size version of TDANet obtained SOTA results on three datasets, with MACs still only 10\% of Sepformer and the CPU inference time only 24\% of Sepformer. 深度神经网络在语音分离任务中展现出了良好的前景。然而，在实际应用中，在保持较低模型复杂性的同时获得良好结果仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过模仿大脑自上而下的注意力提供了一种受生物启发的高效编码器-解码器架构，称为 TDANet，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低了模型复杂性。 TDANet 中自上而下的注意力由全局注意力（GA）模块和级联的局部注意力（LA）层提取。 GA模块以多尺度声学特征为输入，提取全局注意力信号，然后通过直接自上而下的连接来调制不同尺度的特征。 LA层使用相邻层的特征作为输入来提取局部注意力信号，该信号用于以自上而下的方式调制横向输入。在三个基准数据集上，TDANet 始终以更高的效率实现了与之前最先进 (SOTA) 方法相比具有竞争力的分离性能。具体来说，TDANet 的乘法累加运算（MAC）仅为之前 SOTA 模型之一 Sepformer 的 5%，CPU 推理时间仅为 Sepformer 的 10%。此外，TDANet 的大型版本在三个数据集上获得了 SOTA 结果，MAC 仍仅为 Sepformer 的 10%，CPU 推理时间仅为 Sepformer 的 24%。 本文提出一种基于顶向下注意力机制的高效编码器-解码器架构TDANet，用于语音分离任务。 Kai Li,Runxuan Yang,Xiaolin Hu cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Evaluation of taxonomic and neural embedding methods for calculating semantic similarity
title_zh: 用于计算语义相似度的分类学和神经嵌入方法的评估
abstract: Modelling semantic similarity plays a fundamental role in lexical semantic applications. A natural way of calculating semantic similarity is to access handcrafted semantic networks, but similarity prediction can also be anticipated in a distributional vector space. Similarity calculation continues to be a challenging task, even with the latest breakthroughs in deep neural language models. We first examined popular methodologies in measuring taxonomic similarity, including edge-counting that solely employs semantic relations in a taxonomy, as well as the complex methods that estimate concept specificity. We further extrapolated three weighting factors in modelling taxonomic similarity. To study the distinct mechanisms between taxonomic and distributional similarity measures, we ran head-to-head comparisons of each measure with human similarity judgements from the perspectives of word frequency, polysemy degree and similarity intensity. Our findings suggest that without fine-tuning the uniform distance, taxonomic similarity measures can depend on the shortest path length as a prime factor to predict semantic similarity; in contrast to distributional semantics, edge-counting is free from sense distribution bias in use and can measure word similarity both literally and metaphorically; the synergy of retrofitting neural embeddings with concept relations in similarity prediction may indicate a new trend to leverage knowledge bases on transfer learning. It appears that a large gap still exists on computing semantic similarity among different ranges of word frequency, polysemous degree and similarity intensity.
summary: Modelling semantic similarity plays a fundamental role in lexical semantic applications. A natural way of calculating semantic similarity is to access handcrafted semantic networks, but similarity prediction can also be anticipated in a distributional vector space. Similarity calculation continues to be a challenging task, even with the latest breakthroughs in deep neural language models. We first examined popular methodologies in measuring taxonomic similarity, including edge-counting that solely employs semantic relations in a taxonomy, as well as the complex methods that estimate concept specificity. We further extrapolated three weighting factors in modelling taxonomic similarity. To study the distinct mechanisms between taxonomic and distributional similarity measures, we ran head-to-head comparisons of each measure with human similarity judgements from the perspectives of word frequency, polysemy degree and similarity intensity. Our findings suggest that without fine-tuning the uniform distance, taxonomic similarity measures can depend on the shortest path length as a prime factor to predict semantic similarity; in contrast to distributional semantics, edge-counting is free from sense distribution bias in use and can measure word similarity both literally and metaphorically; the synergy of retrofitting neural embeddings with concept relations in similarity prediction may indicate a new trend to leverage knowledge bases on transfer learning. It appears that a large gap still exists on computing semantic similarity among different ranges of word frequency, polysemous degree and similarity intensity.
abstract_zh: 语义相似性建模在词汇语义应用中起着基础作用。计算语义相似度的一种自然方法是访问手工制作的语义网络，但相似度预测也可以在分布向量空间中进行预测。即使深度神经语言模型取得了最新突破，相似性计算仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们首先研究了测量分类相似性的流行方法，包括仅采用分类中语义关系的边缘计数，以及估计概念特异性的复杂方法。我们进一步推断了分类相似性建模中的三个权重因子。为了研究分类相似性度量和分布相似性度量之间的不同机制，我们从词频、多义度和相似强度的角度将每个度量与人类相似性判断进行了头对头比较。我们的研究结果表明，在不微调统一距离的情况下，分类相似性度量可以依赖最短路径长度作为预测语义相似性的主要因素；与分布语义相反，边缘计数在使用中不受语义分布偏差的影响，并且可以从字面和隐喻上测量单词相似度；在相似性预测中改造神经嵌入与概念关系的协同作用可能表明利用迁移学习知识库的新趋势。可见，不同范围的词频、多义程度和相似强度之间的语义相似度计算仍存在较大差距。

AI.tldr: 评估分类学方法与神经嵌入方法在计算语义相似度中的效果
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经语言模型取得进展，语义相似度计算仍是挑战，需比较传统分类学方法与分布语义方法的优劣
AI.method: 对比分析分类学相似度测量方法（如边计数、概念特异性）与分布语义模型，通过人类判断数据从词频、多义性程度和相似强度角度进行头对头实验
AI.result: 分类学方法依赖最短路径长度预测相似度，边计数法不受词义分布偏差影响，神经嵌入与知识库结合可能成为新趋势，但不同词频/多义性程度下仍存在显著差距
AI.conclusion: 需进一步探索融合知识库与神经模型的方法以提升跨词频、多义性场景的语义相似度计算效果

title: Continuous Gaze Tracking With Implicit Saliency-Aware Calibration on Mobile Devices
title_zh: 在移动设备上通过隐式显着性感知校准进行连续注视跟踪
abstract: Gaze tracking is a useful human-to-computer interface, which plays an increasingly important role in a range of mobile applications. Gaze calibration is an indispensable component of gaze tracking, which transforms the eye coordinates to the screen coordinates. The existing approaches of gaze tracking either have limited accuracy or require the user's cooperation in calibration and in turn hurt the quality of experience. We in this paper propose vGaze, continuous gaze tracking with implicit saliency-aware calibration on mobile devices. The design of vGaze stems from our insight on the temporal and spatial dependent relation between the visual saliency and the user's gaze. vGaze is implemented as a light-weight software that identifies video frames with "useful" saliency information, sensing the user's head movement, performs opportunistic calibration using only those "useful" frames, and leverages historical information for accelerating saliency detection. We implement vGaze on a commercial mobile device and evaluate its performance in various scenarios. The results show that vGaze can work at real time with video playback applications. The average error of gaze tracking is 1.51 cm (2.884 degree) which decreases to 0.99 cm (1.891 degree) with historical information and 0.57 cm (1.089 degree) with an indicator.
summary: Gaze tracking is a useful human-to-computer interface, which plays an increasingly important role in a range of mobile applications. Gaze calibration is an indispensable component of gaze tracking, which transforms the eye coordinates to the screen coordinates. The existing approaches of gaze tracking either have limited accuracy or require the user's cooperation in calibration and in turn hurt the quality of experience. We in this paper propose vGaze, continuous gaze tracking with implicit saliency-aware calibration on mobile devices. The design of vGaze stems from our insight on the temporal and spatial dependent relation between the visual saliency and the user's gaze. vGaze is implemented as a light-weight software that identifies video frames with "useful" saliency information, sensing the user's head movement, performs opportunistic calibration using only those "useful" frames, and leverages historical information for accelerating saliency detection. We implement vGaze on a commercial mobile device and evaluate its performance in various scenarios. The results show that vGaze can work at real time with video playback applications. The average error of gaze tracking is 1.51 cm (2.884 degree) which decreases to 0.99 cm (1.891 degree) with historical information and 0.57 cm (1.089 degree) with an indicator.
abstract_zh: 视线跟踪是一种有用的人机界面，在一系列移动应用程序中发挥着越来越重要的作用。凝视校准是凝视跟踪不可或缺的组成部分，它将眼睛坐标转换为屏幕坐标。现有的视线跟踪方法要么精度有限，要么需要用户配合校准，从而损害体验质量。我们在本文中提出了 vGaze，即在移动设备上具有隐式显着性感知校准的连续注视跟踪。 vGaze 的设计源于我们对视觉显着性与用户注视之间的时间和空间依赖关系的洞察。 vGaze 是一款轻量级软件，可识别具有“有用”显着性信息的视频帧、感测用户的头部运动、仅使用那些“有用”帧执行机会校准，并利用历史信息来加速显着性检测。我们在商用移动设备上实现 vGaze，并评估其在各种场景中的性能。结果表明，vGaze 可以与视频播放应用程序实时配合工作。注视跟踪的平均误差为 1.51 厘米（2.884 度），使用历史信息时可降至 0.99 厘米（1.891 度），使用指示器时可降至 0.57 厘米（1.089 度）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为vGaze的轻量级软件，用于在移动设备上实现无需显式校准的连续注视追踪，通过隐式利用视觉显著性信息优化校准过程。
AI.motivation: 现有注视追踪方法要么精度有限，要么需要用户配合校准，影响使用体验。作者旨在开发一种无需用户主动参与、能实时工作的校准方法。
AI.method: 基于视觉显著性与用户注视的时空依赖关系，vGaze通过识别包含有效显著性信息的视频帧、感知头部运动、利用历史信息加速显著性检测，并仅在必要时进行机会主义校准。
AI.result: vGaze在商业移动设备上实现实时视频播放场景下的注视追踪，平均误差为1.51厘米（2.884度），结合历史信息后降至0.57厘米（1.089度）。
AI.conclusion: vGaze通过隐式显著性感知校准和历史信息优化，在保证精度的同时提升了移动设备注视追踪的用户体验。

search_text: Continuous Gaze Tracking With Implicit Saliency-Aware Calibration on Mobile Devices 在移动设备上通过隐式显着性感知校准进行连续注视跟踪 Gaze tracking is a useful human-to-computer interface, which plays an increasingly important role in a range of mobile applications. Gaze calibration is an indispensable component of gaze tracking, which transforms the eye coordinates to the screen coordinates. The existing approaches of gaze tracking either have limited accuracy or require the user's cooperation in calibration and in turn hurt the quality of experience. We in this paper propose vGaze, continuous gaze tracking with implicit saliency-aware calibration on mobile devices. The design of vGaze stems from our insight on the temporal and spatial dependent relation between the visual saliency and the user's gaze. vGaze is implemented as a light-weight software that identifies video frames with "useful" saliency information, sensing the user's head movement, performs opportunistic calibration using only those "useful" frames, and leverages historical information for accelerating saliency detection. We implement vGaze on a commercial mobile device and evaluate its performance in various scenarios. The results show that vGaze can work at real time with video playback applications. The average error of gaze tracking is 1.51 cm (2.884 degree) which decreases to 0.99 cm (1.891 degree) with historical information and 0.57 cm (1.089 degree) with an indicator. 视线跟踪是一种有用的人机界面，在一系列移动应用程序中发挥着越来越重要的作用。凝视校准是凝视跟踪不可或缺的组成部分，它将眼睛坐标转换为屏幕坐标。现有的视线跟踪方法要么精度有限，要么需要用户配合校准，从而损害体验质量。我们在本文中提出了 vGaze，即在移动设备上具有隐式显着性感知校准的连续注视跟踪。 vGaze 的设计源于我们对视觉显着性与用户注视之间的时间和空间依赖关系的洞察。 vGaze 是一款轻量级软件，可识别具有“有用”显着性信息的视频帧、感测用户的头部运动、仅使用那些“有用”帧执行机会校准，并利用历史信息来加速显着性检测。我们在商用移动设备上实现 vGaze，并评估其在各种场景中的性能。结果表明，vGaze 可以与视频播放应用程序实时配合工作。注视跟踪的平均误差为 1.51 厘米（2.884 度），使用历史信息时可降至 0.99 厘米（1.891 度），使用指示器时可降至 0.57 厘米（1.089 度）。 本文提出了一种名为vGaze的轻量级软件，用于在移动设备上实现无需显式校准的连续注视追踪，通过隐式利用视觉显著性信息优化校准过程。 Songzhou Yang,Meng Jin,Yuan He cs.HC,cs.NI

title: Quantum Fourier Addition, Simplified to Toffoli Addition
title_zh: 量子傅里叶加法，简化为 Toffoli 加法
abstract: Quantum addition circuits are considered being of two types: 1) Toffolli-adder circuits which use only classical reversible gates (CNOT and Toffoli), and 2) QFT-adder circuits based on the quantum Fourier transformation. We present the first systematic translation of the QFT-addition circuit into a Toffoli-based adder. This result shows that QFT-addition has fundamentally the same fault-tolerance cost (e.g. T-count) as the most cost-efficient Toffoli-adder: instead of using approximate decompositions of the gates from the QFT circuit, it is more efficient to merge gates. In order to achieve this, we formulated novel circuit identities for multi-controlled gates and apply the identities algorithmically. The employed techniques can be used to automate quantum circuit optimisation heuristics.
summary: Quantum addition circuits are considered being of two types: 1) Toffolli-adder circuits which use only classical reversible gates (CNOT and Toffoli), and 2) QFT-adder circuits based on the quantum Fourier transformation. We present the first systematic translation of the QFT-addition circuit into a Toffoli-based adder. This result shows that QFT-addition has fundamentally the same fault-tolerance cost (e.g. T-count) as the most cost-efficient Toffoli-adder: instead of using approximate decompositions of the gates from the QFT circuit, it is more efficient to merge gates. In order to achieve this, we formulated novel circuit identities for multi-controlled gates and apply the identities algorithmically. The employed techniques can be used to automate quantum circuit optimisation heuristics.
abstract_zh: 量子加法电路被认为有两种类型：1）仅使用经典可逆门（CNOT 和 Toffoli）的 Toffolli 加法器电路，以及 2）基于量子傅里叶变换的 QFT 加法器电路。我们首次将 QFT 加法电路系统地转换为基于 Toffoli 的加法器。该结果表明，QFT 加法与最具成本效益的 Toffoli 加法器具有基本相同的容错成本（例如 T 计数）：与使用 QFT 电路中的门的近似分解不同，合并门的效率更高。为了实现这一目标，我们为多控制门制定了新颖的电路恒等式，并通过算法应用这些恒等式。所采用的技术可用于自动化量子电路优化启发式。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将基于量子傅里叶变换的加法器电路转化为基于Toffoli门的加法器的方法。
AI.motivation: 量子加法器通常分为两类：基于Toffoli门的加法器和基于量子傅里叶变换（QFT）的加法器。本文旨在证明QFT加法器在容错成本上与最高效的Toffoli加法器相当，并提供一种更高效的转换方法。
AI.method: 通过提出新的多控门电路恒等式，并算法化地应用这些恒等式，将QFT加法器转换为基于Toffoli门的加法器。
AI.result: 成功地将QFT加法器转换为Toffoli加法器，证明了其在容错成本上与最高效的Toffoli加法器相当，并为量子电路优化提供了自动化方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了QFT加法器与Toffoli加法器在容错成本上的等效性，并提供了一种更高效的电路转换方法，可用于自动化量子电路优化。

title: Learning by Distilling Context
title_zh: 通过提炼上下文来学习
abstract: Language models significantly benefit from context tokens, such as prompts or scratchpads. They perform better when prompted with informative instructions, and they acquire new reasoning capabilities by generating a scratch-pad before predicting the final answers. However, they do not \textit{internalize} these performance gains, which disappear when the context tokens are gone. Our work proposes to apply context distillation so that a language model can improve itself by internalizing these gains. Concretely, given a synthetic unlabeled input for the target task, we condition the model on ``[instructions] + [task-input]'' to predict ``[scratch-pad] + [final answer]''; then we fine-tune the same model to predict its own ``[final answer]'' conditioned on the ``[task-input]'', without seeing the ``[instructions]'' or using the ``[scratch-pad]''. We show that context distillation is a general method to train language models, and it can effectively internalize 3 types of training signals. First, it can internalize abstract task instructions and explanations, so we can iteratively update the model parameters with new instructions and overwrite old ones. Second, it can internalize step-by-step reasoning for complex tasks (e.g., 8-digit addition), and such a newly acquired capability proves to be useful for other downstream tasks. Finally, it can internalize concrete training examples, and it outperforms directly learning with gradient descent by 9\% on the SPIDER Text-to-SQL dataset; furthermore, combining context distillation operations can internalize more training examples than the context window size allows.
summary: Language models significantly benefit from context tokens, such as prompts or scratchpads. They perform better when prompted with informative instructions, and they acquire new reasoning capabilities by generating a scratch-pad before predicting the final answers. However, they do not \textit{internalize} these performance gains, which disappear when the context tokens are gone. Our work proposes to apply context distillation so that a language model can improve itself by internalizing these gains. Concretely, given a synthetic unlabeled input for the target task, we condition the model on ``[instructions] + [task-input]'' to predict ``[scratch-pad] + [final answer]''; then we fine-tune the same model to predict its own ``[final answer]'' conditioned on the ``[task-input]'', without seeing the ``[instructions]'' or using the ``[scratch-pad]''. We show that context distillation is a general method to train language models, and it can effectively internalize 3 types of training signals. First, it can internalize abstract task instructions and explanations, so we can iteratively update the model parameters with new instructions and overwrite old ones. Second, it can internalize step-by-step reasoning for complex tasks (e.g., 8-digit addition), and such a newly acquired capability proves to be useful for other downstream tasks. Finally, it can internalize concrete training examples, and it outperforms directly learning with gradient descent by 9\% on the SPIDER Text-to-SQL dataset; furthermore, combining context distillation operations can internalize more training examples than the context window size allows.
abstract_zh: 语言模型显着受益于上下文标记，例如提示或便签本。当提供信息丰富的指令时，他们会表现得更好，并且在预测最终答案之前，他们会通过生成草稿本来获得新的推理能力。然而，它们并没有\textit{internalize}这些性能提升，当上下文标记消失时，这些性能提升就会消失。我们的工作建议应用上下文蒸馏，以便语言模型可以通过内化这些收益来改进自身。具体来说，给定目标任务的合成未标记输入，我们以“[指令] + [任务输入]”为模型条件来预测“[暂存器] + [最终答案]”；然后我们微调相同的模型，以根据“[任务输入]”来预测其自己的“[最终答案]”，而无需查看“[指令]”或使用“[便签本]”。我们证明上下文蒸馏是训练语言模型的通用方法，它可以有效地内化 3 种类型的训练信号。首先，它可以内化抽象任务指令和解释，因此我们可以用新指令迭代更新模型参数并覆盖旧指令。其次，它可以内化复杂任务（例如，8位加法）的逐步推理，并且这种新获得的能力被证明对其他下游任务很有用。最后，它可以内化具体的训练示例，并且在 SPIDER Text-to-SQL 数据集上比直接使用梯度下降学习的性能高出 9%；此外，组合上下文蒸馏操作可以内化比上下文窗口大小允许的更多的训练示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为上下文蒸馏的方法，使语言模型能够通过内部化上下文提示（如指令、推理步骤和训练示例）来提升性能，而无需依赖外部上下文。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在使用提示或草稿等上下文信息时表现更好，但这些性能增益无法保留，当移除上下文时效果会消失，因此需要一种方法让模型内部化这些增益。
AI.method: 通过合成未标记输入，让模型根据[指令+任务输入]生成[草稿+最终答案]，随后微调模型仅根据[任务输入]直接预测[最终答案]，从而内部化上下文信息。
AI.result: 该方法在SPIDER Text-to-SQL数据集上优于梯度下降训练9%，可内部化抽象指令、复杂任务推理步骤及具体训练示例，并能结合多个蒸馏操作处理超出上下文窗口的训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 上下文蒸馏是一种通用的模型训练方法，能够有效内部化多种训练信号，提升模型在无外部上下文时的性能表现。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为上下文蒸馏的方法，使语言模型能够通过内部化上下文提示（如指令、推理步骤和训练示例）来提升性能，而无需依赖外部上下文。
ai_content.motivation: 语言模型在使用提示或草稿等上下文信息时表现更好，但这些性能增益无法保留，当移除上下文时效果会消失，因此需要一种方法让模型内部化这些增益。
ai_content.method: 通过合成未标记输入，让模型根据[指令+任务输入]生成[草稿+最终答案]，随后微调模型仅根据[任务输入]直接预测[最终答案]，从而内部化上下文信息。
ai_content.result: 该方法在SPIDER Text-to-SQL数据集上优于梯度下降训练9%，可内部化抽象指令、复杂任务推理步骤及具体训练示例，并能结合多个蒸馏操作处理超出上下文窗口的训练数据。
ai_content.conclusion: 上下文蒸馏是一种通用的模型训练方法，能够有效内部化多种训练信号，提升模型在无外部上下文时的性能表现。

search_text: Learning by Distilling Context 通过提炼上下文来学习 Language models significantly benefit from context tokens, such as prompts or scratchpads. They perform better when prompted with informative instructions, and they acquire new reasoning capabilities by generating a scratch-pad before predicting the final answers. However, they do not \textit{internalize} these performance gains, which disappear when the context tokens are gone. Our work proposes to apply context distillation so that a language model can improve itself by internalizing these gains. Concretely, given a synthetic unlabeled input for the target task, we condition the model on ``[instructions] + [task-input]'' to predict ``[scratch-pad] + [final answer]''; then we fine-tune the same model to predict its own ``[final answer]'' conditioned on the ``[task-input]'', without seeing the ``[instructions]'' or using the ``[scratch-pad]''. We show that context distillation is a general method to train language models, and it can effectively internalize 3 types of training signals. First, it can internalize abstract task instructions and explanations, so we can iteratively update the model parameters with new instructions and overwrite old ones. Second, it can internalize step-by-step reasoning for complex tasks (e.g., 8-digit addition), and such a newly acquired capability proves to be useful for other downstream tasks. Finally, it can internalize concrete training examples, and it outperforms directly learning with gradient descent by 9\% on the SPIDER Text-to-SQL dataset; furthermore, combining context distillation operations can internalize more training examples than the context window size allows. 语言模型显着受益于上下文标记，例如提示或便签本。当提供信息丰富的指令时，他们会表现得更好，并且在预测最终答案之前，他们会通过生成草稿本来获得新的推理能力。然而，它们并没有\textit{internalize}这些性能提升，当上下文标记消失时，这些性能提升就会消失。我们的工作建议应用上下文蒸馏，以便语言模型可以通过内化这些收益来改进自身。具体来说，给定目标任务的合成未标记输入，我们以“[指令] + [任务输入]”为模型条件来预测“[暂存器] + [最终答案]”；然后我们微调相同的模型，以根据“[任务输入]”来预测其自己的“[最终答案]”，而无需查看“[指令]”或使用“[便签本]”。我们证明上下文蒸馏是训练语言模型的通用方法，它可以有效地内化 3 种类型的训练信号。首先，它可以内化抽象任务指令和解释，因此我们可以用新指令迭代更新模型参数并覆盖旧指令。其次，它可以内化复杂任务（例如，8位加法）的逐步推理，并且这种新获得的能力被证明对其他下游任务很有用。最后，它可以内化具体的训练示例，并且在 SPIDER Text-to-SQL 数据集上比直接使用梯度下降学习的性能高出 9%；此外，组合上下文蒸馏操作可以内化比上下文窗口大小允许的更多的训练示例。 本文提出一种名为上下文蒸馏的方法，使语言模型能够通过内部化上下文提示（如指令、推理步骤和训练示例）来提升性能，而无需依赖外部上下文。 Charlie Snell,Dan Klein,Ruiqi Zhong cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Kezhou Yang,Dhuruva Priyan G M,Abhronil Sengupta
title: Leveraging Probabilistic Switching in Superparamagnets for Temporal Information Encoding in Neuromorphic Systems
title_zh: 利用超顺磁体中的概率切换进行神经形态系统中的时间信息编码
abstract: Brain-inspired computing - leveraging neuroscientific principles underpinning the unparalleled efficiency of the brain in solving cognitive tasks - is emerging to be a promising pathway to solve several algorithmic and computational challenges faced by deep learning today. Nonetheless, current research in neuromorphic computing is driven by our well-developed notions of running deep learning algorithms on computing platforms that perform deterministic operations. In this article, we argue that taking a different route of performing temporal information encoding in probabilistic neuromorphic systems may help solve some of the current challenges in the field. The article considers superparamagnetic tunnel junctions as a potential pathway to enable a new generation of brain-inspired computing that combines the facets and associated advantages of two complementary insights from computational neuroscience -- how information is encoded and how computing occurs in the brain. Hardware-algorithm co-design analysis demonstrates $97.41\%$ accuracy of a state-compressed 3-layer spintronics enabled stochastic spiking network on the MNIST dataset with high spiking sparsity due to temporal information encoding.
summary: Brain-inspired computing - leveraging neuroscientific principles underpinning the unparalleled efficiency of the brain in solving cognitive tasks - is emerging to be a promising pathway to solve several algorithmic and computational challenges faced by deep learning today. Nonetheless, current research in neuromorphic computing is driven by our well-developed notions of running deep learning algorithms on computing platforms that perform deterministic operations. In this article, we argue that taking a different route of performing temporal information encoding in probabilistic neuromorphic systems may help solve some of the current challenges in the field. The article considers superparamagnetic tunnel junctions as a potential pathway to enable a new generation of brain-inspired computing that combines the facets and associated advantages of two complementary insights from computational neuroscience -- how information is encoded and how computing occurs in the brain. Hardware-algorithm co-design analysis demonstrates $97.41\%$ accuracy of a state-compressed 3-layer spintronics enabled stochastic spiking network on the MNIST dataset with high spiking sparsity due to temporal information encoding.
abstract_zh: 类脑计算——利用神经科学原理支撑大脑在解决认知任务方面无与伦比的效率——正在成为解决当今深度学习面临的一些算法和计算挑战的有前途的途径。尽管如此，当前神经形态计算的研究是由我们在执行确定性操作的计算平台上运行深度学习算法的成熟概念推动的。在本文中，我们认为在概率神经形态系统中采取不同的途径执行时间信息编码可能有助于解决该领域当前的一些挑战。该文章认为超顺磁隧道结是实现新一代类脑计算的潜在途径，该计算结合了计算神经科学的两个互补见解的方面和相关优势——信息如何编码以及计算如何在大脑中发生。硬件算法协同设计分析表明，状态压缩 3 层自旋电子学启用的随机尖峰网络在 MNIST 数据集上的准确度为 97.41\%$，由于时间信息编码而具有高尖峰稀疏性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用超顺磁隧道结的随机开关特性，在神经形态系统中实现时间信息编码，以提升类脑计算效率。
AI.motivation: 当前神经形态计算依赖确定性操作，难以解决深度学习的算法与计算挑战。通过借鉴脑科学中信息编码与计算机制的双重原理，探索概率性系统可能突破现有瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计基于超顺磁隧道结的硬件-算法协同架构，利用时间信息编码实现稀疏脉冲神经网络，结合自旋电子学技术压缩网络状态。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上，压缩后的3层随机脉冲网络达到97.41%的准确率，验证了时间编码与概率硬件结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合神经科学原理与概率性硬件，为神经形态系统提供了高效且准确的类脑计算新范式。

authors_text: Ruiqi Wang,Wonse Jo,Dezhong Zhao,Weizheng Wang,Baijian Yang,Guohua Chen,Byung-Cheol Min
title: Husformer: A Multi-Modal Transformer for Multi-Modal Human State Recognition
title_zh: Husformer：用于多模态人类状态识别的多模态 Transformer
abstract: Human state recognition is a critical topic with pervasive and important applications in human-machine systems. Multi-modal fusion, the combination of metrics from multiple data sources, has been shown as a sound method for improving the recognition performance. However, while promising results have been reported by recent multi-modal-based models, they generally fail to leverage the sophisticated fusion strategies that would model sufficient cross-modal interactions when producing the fusion representation; instead, current methods rely on lengthy and inconsistent data preprocessing and feature crafting. To address this limitation, we propose an end-to-end multi-modal transformer framework for multi-modal human state recognition called Husformer. Specifically, we propose to use cross-modal transformers, which inspire one modality to reinforce itself through directly attending to latent relevance revealed in other modalities, to fuse different modalities while ensuring sufficient awareness of the cross-modal interactions introduced. Subsequently, we utilize a self-attention transformer to further prioritize contextual information in the fusion representation. Using two such attention mechanisms enables effective and adaptive adjustments to noise and interruptions in multi-modal signals during the fusion process and in relation to high-level features. Extensive experiments on two human emotion corpora (DEAP and WESAD) and two cognitive workload datasets (MOCAS and CogLoad) demonstrate that in the recognition of human state, our Husformer outperforms both state-of-the-art multi-modal baselines and the use of a single modality by a large margin, especially when dealing with raw multi-modal signals. We also conducted an ablation study to show the benefits of each component in Husformer.
summary: Human state recognition is a critical topic with pervasive and important applications in human-machine systems. Multi-modal fusion, the combination of metrics from multiple data sources, has been shown as a sound method for improving the recognition performance. However, while promising results have been reported by recent multi-modal-based models, they generally fail to leverage the sophisticated fusion strategies that would model sufficient cross-modal interactions when producing the fusion representation; instead, current methods rely on lengthy and inconsistent data preprocessing and feature crafting. To address this limitation, we propose an end-to-end multi-modal transformer framework for multi-modal human state recognition called Husformer. Specifically, we propose to use cross-modal transformers, which inspire one modality to reinforce itself through directly attending to latent relevance revealed in other modalities, to fuse different modalities while ensuring sufficient awareness of the cross-modal interactions introduced. Subsequently, we utilize a self-attention transformer to further prioritize contextual information in the fusion representation. Using two such attention mechanisms enables effective and adaptive adjustments to noise and interruptions in multi-modal signals during the fusion process and in relation to high-level features. Extensive experiments on two human emotion corpora (DEAP and WESAD) and two cognitive workload datasets (MOCAS and CogLoad) demonstrate that in the recognition of human state, our Husformer outperforms both state-of-the-art multi-modal baselines and the use of a single modality by a large margin, especially when dealing with raw multi-modal signals. We also conducted an ablation study to show the benefits of each component in Husformer.
abstract_zh: 人类状态识别是一个在人机系统中具有普遍且重要应用的关键主题。多模态融合，即来自多个数据源的度量的组合，已被证明是提高识别性能的有效方法。然而，虽然最近基于多模态的模型报告了有希望的结果，但它们通常无法利用复杂的融合策略来在生成融合表示时对足够的跨模态交互进行建模；相反，当前的方法依赖于冗长且不一致的数据预处理和特征制作。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种用于多模态人类状态识别的端到端多模态变压器框架，称为 Husformer。具体来说，我们建议使用跨模态转换器，它通过直接关注其他模态中揭示的潜在相关性来激发一种模态强化自身，以融合不同的模态，同时确保对所引入的跨模态交互有足够的认识。随后，我们利用自注意力转换器进一步优先考虑融合表示中的上下文信息。使用两种这样的注意力机制可以在融合过程中以及与高级特征相关的情况下对多模态信号中的噪声和中断进行有效和自适应的调整。对两个人类情感语料库（DEAP 和 WESAD）和两个认知工作量数据集（MOCAS 和 CogLoad）的大量实验表明，在识别人类状态方面，我们的 Husformer 的表现远远优于最先进的多模态基线和单一模态的使用，特别是在处理原始多模态信号时。我们还进行了一项消融研究，以展示 Husformer 中每个组件的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Husformer的多模态Transformer框架，用于多模态人类状态识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态融合中未能有效建模跨模态交互，依赖繁琐的预处理和特征工程，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计跨模态Transformer捕捉模态间关联，结合自注意力机制强化融合表示，通过端到端框架处理原始多模态信号。
AI.result: 在DEAP、WESAD等数据集上显著优于现有单模态和多模态基线方法，尤其在处理原始信号时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: Husformer通过有效融合跨模态交互和上下文信息，为多模态人类状态识别提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Husformer: A Multi-Modal Transformer for Multi-Modal Human State Recognition Husformer：用于多模态人类状态识别的多模态 Transformer Human state recognition is a critical topic with pervasive and important applications in human-machine systems. Multi-modal fusion, the combination of metrics from multiple data sources, has been shown as a sound method for improving the recognition performance. However, while promising results have been reported by recent multi-modal-based models, they generally fail to leverage the sophisticated fusion strategies that would model sufficient cross-modal interactions when producing the fusion representation; instead, current methods rely on lengthy and inconsistent data preprocessing and feature crafting. To address this limitation, we propose an end-to-end multi-modal transformer framework for multi-modal human state recognition called Husformer. Specifically, we propose to use cross-modal transformers, which inspire one modality to reinforce itself through directly attending to latent relevance revealed in other modalities, to fuse different modalities while ensuring sufficient awareness of the cross-modal interactions introduced. Subsequently, we utilize a self-attention transformer to further prioritize contextual information in the fusion representation. Using two such attention mechanisms enables effective and adaptive adjustments to noise and interruptions in multi-modal signals during the fusion process and in relation to high-level features. Extensive experiments on two human emotion corpora (DEAP and WESAD) and two cognitive workload datasets (MOCAS and CogLoad) demonstrate that in the recognition of human state, our Husformer outperforms both state-of-the-art multi-modal baselines and the use of a single modality by a large margin, especially when dealing with raw multi-modal signals. We also conducted an ablation study to show the benefits of each component in Husformer. 人类状态识别是一个在人机系统中具有普遍且重要应用的关键主题。多模态融合，即来自多个数据源的度量的组合，已被证明是提高识别性能的有效方法。然而，虽然最近基于多模态的模型报告了有希望的结果，但它们通常无法利用复杂的融合策略来在生成融合表示时对足够的跨模态交互进行建模；相反，当前的方法依赖于冗长且不一致的数据预处理和特征制作。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种用于多模态人类状态识别的端到端多模态变压器框架，称为 Husformer。具体来说，我们建议使用跨模态转换器，它通过直接关注其他模态中揭示的潜在相关性来激发一种模态强化自身，以融合不同的模态，同时确保对所引入的跨模态交互有足够的认识。随后，我们利用自注意力转换器进一步优先考虑融合表示中的上下文信息。使用两种这样的注意力机制可以在融合过程中以及与高级特征相关的情况下对多模态信号中的噪声和中断进行有效和自适应的调整。对两个人类情感语料库（DEAP 和 WESAD）和两个认知工作量数据集（MOCAS 和 CogLoad）的大量实验表明，在识别人类状态方面，我们的 Husformer 的表现远远优于最先进的多模态基线和单一模态的使用，特别是在处理原始多模态信号时。我们还进行了一项消融研究，以展示 Husformer 中每个组件的好处。 本文提出一种名为Husformer的多模态Transformer框架，用于多模态人类状态识别任务。 Ruiqi Wang,Wonse Jo,Dezhong Zhao,Weizheng Wang,Baijian Yang,Guohua Chen,Byung-Cheol Min cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Wen Wang,Jianzong Wang,Shijing Si,Zhangcheng Huang,Jing Xiao
title: RL-MD: A Novel Reinforcement Learning Approach for DNA Motif Discovery
title_zh: RL-MD：一种用于 DNA 基序发现的新型强化学习方法
comment: This paper is accepted by DSAA2022. The 9th IEEE International Conference on Data Science and Advanced Analytics
comments: This paper is accepted by DSAA2022. The 9th IEEE International Conference on Data Science and Advanced Analytics
abstract: The extraction of sequence patterns from a collection of functionally linked unlabeled DNA sequences is known as DNA motif discovery, and it is a key task in computational biology. Several deep learning-based techniques have recently been introduced to address this issue. However, these algorithms can not be used in real-world situations because of the need for labeled data. Here, we presented RL-MD, a novel reinforcement learning based approach for DNA motif discovery task. RL-MD takes unlabelled data as input, employs a relative information-based method to evaluate each proposed motif, and utilizes these continuous evaluation results as the reward. The experiments show that RL-MD can identify high-quality motifs in real-world data.
summary: The extraction of sequence patterns from a collection of functionally linked unlabeled DNA sequences is known as DNA motif discovery, and it is a key task in computational biology. Several deep learning-based techniques have recently been introduced to address this issue. However, these algorithms can not be used in real-world situations because of the need for labeled data. Here, we presented RL-MD, a novel reinforcement learning based approach for DNA motif discovery task. RL-MD takes unlabelled data as input, employs a relative information-based method to evaluate each proposed motif, and utilizes these continuous evaluation results as the reward. The experiments show that RL-MD can identify high-quality motifs in real-world data.
abstract_zh: 从功能上相连的未标记 DNA 序列集合中提取序列模式被称为 DNA 基序发现，它是计算生物学中的一项关键任务。最近引入了几种基于深度学习的技术来解决这个问题。然而，由于需要标记数据，这些算法不能用于现实情况。在这里，我们提出了 RL-MD，一种基于强化学习的新型 DNA 基序发现任务方法。 RL-MD以未标记的数据作为输入，采用基于相对信息的方法来评估每个提出的主题，并利用这些连续的评估结果作为奖励。实验表明，RL-MD 可以识别现实数据中的高质量主题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的新方法RL-MD，用于解决无需标注数据的DNA motif发现任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖标注数据，在实际应用中受限，需开发无需标注数据的DNA motif发现技术。
AI.method: 采用相对信息评估方法持续评价候选motif，将评估结果作为强化学习的奖励信号进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明RL-MD能在真实世界数据中有效识别高质量DNA motif。
AI.conclusion: RL-MD通过强化学习框架成功实现了无监督DNA motif发现，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Runzhao Yang,Tingxiong Xiao,Yuxiao Cheng,Qianni Cao,Jinyuan Qu,Jinli Suo,Qionghai Dai
title: SCI: A Spectrum Concentrated Implicit Neural Compression for Biomedical Data
title_zh: SCI：生物医学数据的频谱集中隐式神经压缩
abstract: Massive collection and explosive growth of biomedical data, demands effective compression for efficient storage, transmission and sharing. Readily available visual data compression techniques have been studied extensively but tailored for natural images/videos, and thus show limited performance on biomedical data which are of different features and larger diversity. Emerging implicit neural representation (INR) is gaining momentum and demonstrates high promise for fitting diverse visual data in target-data-specific manner, but a general compression scheme covering diverse biomedical data is so far absent. To address this issue, we firstly derive a mathematical explanation for INR's spectrum concentration property and an analytical insight on the design of INR based compressor. Further, we propose a Spectrum Concentrated Implicit neural compression (SCI) which adaptively partitions the complex biomedical data into blocks matching INR's concentrated spectrum envelop, and design a funnel shaped neural network capable of representing each block with a small number of parameters. Based on this design, we conduct compression via optimization under given budget and allocate the available parameters with high representation accuracy. The experiments show SCI's superior performance to state-of-the-art methods including commercial compressors, data-driven ones, and INR based counterparts on diverse biomedical data. The source code can be found at https://github.com/RichealYoung/ImplicitNeuralCompression.git.
summary: Massive collection and explosive growth of biomedical data, demands effective compression for efficient storage, transmission and sharing. Readily available visual data compression techniques have been studied extensively but tailored for natural images/videos, and thus show limited performance on biomedical data which are of different features and larger diversity. Emerging implicit neural representation (INR) is gaining momentum and demonstrates high promise for fitting diverse visual data in target-data-specific manner, but a general compression scheme covering diverse biomedical data is so far absent. To address this issue, we firstly derive a mathematical explanation for INR's spectrum concentration property and an analytical insight on the design of INR based compressor. Further, we propose a Spectrum Concentrated Implicit neural compression (SCI) which adaptively partitions the complex biomedical data into blocks matching INR's concentrated spectrum envelop, and design a funnel shaped neural network capable of representing each block with a small number of parameters. Based on this design, we conduct compression via optimization under given budget and allocate the available parameters with high representation accuracy. The experiments show SCI's superior performance to state-of-the-art methods including commercial compressors, data-driven ones, and INR based counterparts on diverse biomedical data. The source code can be found at https://github.com/RichealYoung/ImplicitNeuralCompression.git.
abstract_zh: 生物医学数据的海量采集和爆炸式增长，需要有效压缩以实现高效存储、传输和共享。现有的视觉数据压缩技术已被广泛研究，但针对自然图像/视频而定制，因此在具有不同特征和更大多样性的生物医学数据上表现出有限的性能。新兴的隐式神经表示（INR）正在获得动力，并展示了以特定于目标数据的方式拟合各种视觉数据的良好前景，但迄今为止还缺乏涵盖各种生物医学数据的通用压缩方案。为了解决这个问题，我们首先对 INR 的频谱集中特性进行数学解释，并对基于 INR 的压缩机的设计进行分析。此外，我们提出了一种频谱集中隐式神经压缩（SCI），它自适应地将复杂的生物医学数据划分为与 INR 集中频谱包络相匹配的块，并设计了一个漏斗形神经网络，能够用少量参数表示每个块。基于此设计，我们在给定预算下通过优化进行压缩，并以高表示精度分配可用参数。实验表明 SCI 的性能优于最先进的方法，包括商业压缩机、数据驱动的方法以及基于不同生物医学数据的 INR 对应方法。源代码可以在 https://github.com/RichealYoung/ImplicitNeuralCompression.git 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱集中隐式神经表示（SCI）的压缩方法，专门用于生物医学数据的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉数据压缩技术针对自然图像/视频优化，难以处理生物医学数据的多样性和特殊性，而隐式神经表示（INR）缺乏通用的压缩方案。
AI.method: 通过数学分析INR的谱集中特性，设计谱集中隐式神经压缩（SCI），将生物医学数据分块匹配INR谱包络，并采用漏斗形神经网络以少量参数高效表征数据块。
AI.result: 实验表明SCI在多种生物医学数据上优于现有商业压缩器、数据驱动方法及INR基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SCI通过谱集中分块与参数优化分配，实现了对生物医学数据的高效压缩，为该领域提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Hui Wei,Hao Tang,Xuemei Jia,Zhixiang Wang,Hanxun Yu,Zhubo Li,Shin'ichi Satoh,Luc Van Gool,Zheng Wang
title: Physical Adversarial Attack meets Computer Vision: A Decade Survey
title_zh: 物理对抗攻击与计算机视觉的结合：十年调查
abstract: Despite the impressive achievements of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in computer vision, their vulnerability to adversarial attacks remains a critical concern. Extensive research has demonstrated that incorporating sophisticated perturbations into input images can lead to a catastrophic degradation in DNNs' performance. This perplexing phenomenon not only exists in the digital space but also in the physical world. Consequently, it becomes imperative to evaluate the security of DNNs-based systems to ensure their safe deployment in real-world scenarios, particularly in security-sensitive applications. To facilitate a profound understanding of this topic, this paper presents a comprehensive overview of physical adversarial attacks. Firstly, we distill four general steps for launching physical adversarial attacks. Building upon this foundation, we uncover the pervasive role of artifacts carrying adversarial perturbations in the physical world. These artifacts influence each step. To denote them, we introduce a new term: adversarial medium. Then, we take the first step to systematically evaluate the performance of physical adversarial attacks, taking the adversarial medium as a first attempt. Our proposed evaluation metric, hiPAA, comprises six perspectives: Effectiveness, Stealthiness, Robustness, Practicability, Aesthetics, and Economics. We also provide comparative results across task categories, together with insightful observations and suggestions for future research directions.
summary: Despite the impressive achievements of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in computer vision, their vulnerability to adversarial attacks remains a critical concern. Extensive research has demonstrated that incorporating sophisticated perturbations into input images can lead to a catastrophic degradation in DNNs' performance. This perplexing phenomenon not only exists in the digital space but also in the physical world. Consequently, it becomes imperative to evaluate the security of DNNs-based systems to ensure their safe deployment in real-world scenarios, particularly in security-sensitive applications. To facilitate a profound understanding of this topic, this paper presents a comprehensive overview of physical adversarial attacks. Firstly, we distill four general steps for launching physical adversarial attacks. Building upon this foundation, we uncover the pervasive role of artifacts carrying adversarial perturbations in the physical world. These artifacts influence each step. To denote them, we introduce a new term: adversarial medium. Then, we take the first step to systematically evaluate the performance of physical adversarial attacks, taking the adversarial medium as a first attempt. Our proposed evaluation metric, hiPAA, comprises six perspectives: Effectiveness, Stealthiness, Robustness, Practicability, Aesthetics, and Economics. We also provide comparative results across task categories, together with insightful observations and suggestions for future research directions.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉领域取得了令人印象深刻的成就，但它们面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性仍然是一个严重问题。广泛的研究表明，将复杂的扰动纳入输入图像可能会导致 DNN 性能的灾难性下降。这种令人困惑的现象不仅存在于数字空间中，也存在于物理世界中。因此，必须评估基于 DNN 的系统的安全性，以确保其在现实场景中的安全部署，特别是在安全敏感的应用程序中。为了促进对这一主题的深刻理解，本文对物理对抗攻击进行了全面的概述。首先，我们提炼出发起物理对抗攻击的四个一般步骤。在此基础上，我们揭示了在物理世界中携带对抗性扰动的文物的普遍作用。这些工件会影响每个步骤。为了表示它们，我们引入了一个新术语：对抗性媒介。然后，我们采取第一步系统地评估物理对抗性攻击的性能，将对抗性媒介作为首次尝试。我们提出的评估指标 hiPAA 包含六个方面：有效性、隐秘性、稳健性、实用性、美观性和经济性。我们还提供跨任务类别的比较结果，以及对未来研究方向的深刻观察和建议。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了过去十年物理对抗攻击在计算机视觉领域的研究进展，并提出评估框架hiPAA。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在现实场景中的安全性面临物理对抗攻击威胁，需建立系统性评估方法以保障安全部署。
AI.method: 提出物理对抗攻击四步流程，定义'对抗媒介'概念，设计包含六个维度的hiPAA评估指标体系进行跨任务比较分析。
AI.result: 通过hiPAA指标对不同任务类别进行评估，揭示了物理攻击效果、隐蔽性等关键特性差异，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了物理对抗攻击的系统性分析框架，为计算机视觉系统的安全评估提供了理论依据和实践指导。

search_text: Physical Adversarial Attack meets Computer Vision: A Decade Survey 物理对抗攻击与计算机视觉的结合：十年调查 Despite the impressive achievements of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in computer vision, their vulnerability to adversarial attacks remains a critical concern. Extensive research has demonstrated that incorporating sophisticated perturbations into input images can lead to a catastrophic degradation in DNNs' performance. This perplexing phenomenon not only exists in the digital space but also in the physical world. Consequently, it becomes imperative to evaluate the security of DNNs-based systems to ensure their safe deployment in real-world scenarios, particularly in security-sensitive applications. To facilitate a profound understanding of this topic, this paper presents a comprehensive overview of physical adversarial attacks. Firstly, we distill four general steps for launching physical adversarial attacks. Building upon this foundation, we uncover the pervasive role of artifacts carrying adversarial perturbations in the physical world. These artifacts influence each step. To denote them, we introduce a new term: adversarial medium. Then, we take the first step to systematically evaluate the performance of physical adversarial attacks, taking the adversarial medium as a first attempt. Our proposed evaluation metric, hiPAA, comprises six perspectives: Effectiveness, Stealthiness, Robustness, Practicability, Aesthetics, and Economics. We also provide comparative results across task categories, together with insightful observations and suggestions for future research directions. 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在计算机视觉领域取得了令人印象深刻的成就，但它们面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性仍然是一个严重问题。广泛的研究表明，将复杂的扰动纳入输入图像可能会导致 DNN 性能的灾难性下降。这种令人困惑的现象不仅存在于数字空间中，也存在于物理世界中。因此，必须评估基于 DNN 的系统的安全性，以确保其在现实场景中的安全部署，特别是在安全敏感的应用程序中。为了促进对这一主题的深刻理解，本文对物理对抗攻击进行了全面的概述。首先，我们提炼出发起物理对抗攻击的四个一般步骤。在此基础上，我们揭示了在物理世界中携带对抗性扰动的文物的普遍作用。这些工件会影响每个步骤。为了表示它们，我们引入了一个新术语：对抗性媒介。然后，我们采取第一步系统地评估物理对抗性攻击的性能，将对抗性媒介作为首次尝试。我们提出的评估指标 hiPAA 包含六个方面：有效性、隐秘性、稳健性、实用性、美观性和经济性。我们还提供跨任务类别的比较结果，以及对未来研究方向的深刻观察和建议。 本文系统综述了过去十年物理对抗攻击在计算机视觉领域的研究进展，并提出评估框架hiPAA。 Hui Wei,Hao Tang,Xuemei Jia,Zhixiang Wang,Hanxun Yu,Zhubo Li,Shin'ichi Satoh,Luc Van Gool,Zheng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Chendong Zhao,Jianzong Wang,Wen qi Wei,Xiaoyang Qu,Haoqian Wang,Jing Xiao
title: Adaptive Sparse and Monotonic Attention for Transformer-based Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的自动语音识别的自适应稀疏和单调注意
abstract: The Transformer architecture model, based on self-attention and multi-head attention, has achieved remarkable success in offline end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). However, self-attention and multi-head attention cannot be easily applied for streaming or online ASR. For self-attention in Transformer ASR, the softmax normalization function-based attention mechanism makes it impossible to highlight important speech information. For multi-head attention in Transformer ASR, it is not easy to model monotonic alignments in different heads. To overcome these two limits, we integrate sparse attention and monotonic attention into Transformer-based ASR. The sparse mechanism introduces a learned sparsity scheme to enable each self-attention structure to fit the corresponding head better. The monotonic attention deploys regularization to prune redundant heads for the multi-head attention structure. The experiments show that our method can effectively improve the attention mechanism on widely used benchmarks of speech recognition.
summary: The Transformer architecture model, based on self-attention and multi-head attention, has achieved remarkable success in offline end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). However, self-attention and multi-head attention cannot be easily applied for streaming or online ASR. For self-attention in Transformer ASR, the softmax normalization function-based attention mechanism makes it impossible to highlight important speech information. For multi-head attention in Transformer ASR, it is not easy to model monotonic alignments in different heads. To overcome these two limits, we integrate sparse attention and monotonic attention into Transformer-based ASR. The sparse mechanism introduces a learned sparsity scheme to enable each self-attention structure to fit the corresponding head better. The monotonic attention deploys regularization to prune redundant heads for the multi-head attention structure. The experiments show that our method can effectively improve the attention mechanism on widely used benchmarks of speech recognition.
abstract_zh: 基于自注意力和多头注意力的 Transformer 架构模型在离线端到端自动语音识别（ASR）方面取得了显着的成功。然而，自注意力和多头注意力不能轻易应用于流媒体或在线 ASR。对于Transformer ASR中的自注意力来说，基于softmax归一化函数的注意力机制使得无法突出重要的语音信息。对于 Transformer ASR 中的多头注意力来说，对不同头中的单调对齐进行建模并不容易。为了克服这两个限制，我们将稀疏注意力和单调注意力集成到基于 Transformer 的 ASR 中。稀疏机制引入了学习的稀疏方案，使每个自注意力结构能够更好地拟合相应的头。单调注意力部署正则化来修剪多头注意力结构的冗余头。实验表明，我们的方法可以有效地改进广泛使用的语音识别基准的注意力机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合稀疏注意力和单调注意力机制的改进型Transformer模型，以提升流式自动语音识别（ASR）的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer中的自注意力和多头注意力机制在流式ASR中存在局限性，例如无法有效突出关键语音信息及难以建模单调对齐关系。
AI.method: 引入稀疏注意力机制通过学习稀疏性方案优化自注意力结构，并采用单调注意力通过正则化剪枝冗余头，以增强多头注意力的单调对齐能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在主流语音识别基准测试中有效提升了注意力机制的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合稀疏与单调注意力的Transformer模型能够有效解决流式ASR中的关键问题，为实时语音识别提供了更优的解决方案。
