title: Music Source Separation with Band-split RNN
title_zh: 使用频带分割 RNN 进行音乐源分离
abstract: The performance of music source separation (MSS) models has been greatly improved in recent years thanks to the development of novel neural network architectures and training pipelines. However, recent model designs for MSS were mainly motivated by other audio processing tasks or other research fields, while the intrinsic characteristics and patterns of the music signals were not fully discovered. In this paper, we propose band-split RNN (BSRNN), a frequency-domain model that explictly splits the spectrogram of the mixture into subbands and perform interleaved band-level and sequence-level modeling. The choices of the bandwidths of the subbands can be determined by a priori knowledge or expert knowledge on the characteristics of the target source in order to optimize the performance on a certain type of target musical instrument. To better make use of unlabeled data, we also describe a semi-supervised model finetuning pipeline that can further improve the performance of the model. Experiment results show that BSRNN trained only on MUSDB18-HQ dataset significantly outperforms several top-ranking models in Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge 2021, and the semi-supervised finetuning stage further improves the performance on all four instrument tracks.
summary: The performance of music source separation (MSS) models has been greatly improved in recent years thanks to the development of novel neural network architectures and training pipelines. However, recent model designs for MSS were mainly motivated by other audio processing tasks or other research fields, while the intrinsic characteristics and patterns of the music signals were not fully discovered. In this paper, we propose band-split RNN (BSRNN), a frequency-domain model that explictly splits the spectrogram of the mixture into subbands and perform interleaved band-level and sequence-level modeling. The choices of the bandwidths of the subbands can be determined by a priori knowledge or expert knowledge on the characteristics of the target source in order to optimize the performance on a certain type of target musical instrument. To better make use of unlabeled data, we also describe a semi-supervised model finetuning pipeline that can further improve the performance of the model. Experiment results show that BSRNN trained only on MUSDB18-HQ dataset significantly outperforms several top-ranking models in Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge 2021, and the semi-supervised finetuning stage further improves the performance on all four instrument tracks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于新颖的神经网络架构和训练管道的发展，音乐源分离（MSS）模型的性能得到了极大的提高。然而，最近的 MSS 模型设计主要是受其他音频处理任务或其他研究领域的启发，而音乐信号的内在特征和模式尚未完全发现。在本文中，我们提出了带分割 RNN（BSRNN），这是一种频域模型，它将混合物的频谱图显式地分割为子带，并执行交错的带级和序列级建模。子带带宽的选择可以通过关于目标源的特性的先验知识或专家知识来确定，以便优化在特定类型的目标乐器上的性能。为了更好地利用未标记数据，我们还描述了一种半监督模型微调管道，可以进一步提高模型的性能。实验结果表明，仅在 MUSDB18-HQ 数据集上训练的 BSRNN 显着优于 2021 年音乐解混（MDX）挑战赛中的几个顶级模型，并且半监督微调阶段进一步提高了所有四个乐器轨道上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频带分割的循环神经网络（BSRNN）模型，用于改进音乐源分离任务，并结合半监督微调方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐源分离模型多借鉴其他音频任务设计，未充分挖掘音乐信号的内在特性，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: BSRNN在频域中将混合信号的频谱分割为子带，进行子带级与序列级联合建模；通过先验知识选择子带宽度以优化特定乐器分离，并引入半监督微调流程利用未标记数据。
AI.result: 仅使用MUSDB18-HQ数据集训练的BSRNN在MDX2021挑战赛中超越多类SOTA模型，半监督微调进一步提升了四类乐器的分离效果。
AI.conclusion: 针对音乐信号特性的频带分割建模结合半监督学习，能有效提升音乐源分离性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: Music Source Separation with Band-split RNN 使用频带分割 RNN 进行音乐源分离 The performance of music source separation (MSS) models has been greatly improved in recent years thanks to the development of novel neural network architectures and training pipelines. However, recent model designs for MSS were mainly motivated by other audio processing tasks or other research fields, while the intrinsic characteristics and patterns of the music signals were not fully discovered. In this paper, we propose band-split RNN (BSRNN), a frequency-domain model that explictly splits the spectrogram of the mixture into subbands and perform interleaved band-level and sequence-level modeling. The choices of the bandwidths of the subbands can be determined by a priori knowledge or expert knowledge on the characteristics of the target source in order to optimize the performance on a certain type of target musical instrument. To better make use of unlabeled data, we also describe a semi-supervised model finetuning pipeline that can further improve the performance of the model. Experiment results show that BSRNN trained only on MUSDB18-HQ dataset significantly outperforms several top-ranking models in Music Demixing (MDX) Challenge 2021, and the semi-supervised finetuning stage further improves the performance on all four instrument tracks. 近年来，由于新颖的神经网络架构和训练管道的发展，音乐源分离（MSS）模型的性能得到了极大的提高。然而，最近的 MSS 模型设计主要是受其他音频处理任务或其他研究领域的启发，而音乐信号的内在特征和模式尚未完全发现。在本文中，我们提出了带分割 RNN（BSRNN），这是一种频域模型，它将混合物的频谱图显式地分割为子带，并执行交错的带级和序列级建模。子带带宽的选择可以通过关于目标源的特性的先验知识或专家知识来确定，以便优化在特定类型的目标乐器上的性能。为了更好地利用未标记数据，我们还描述了一种半监督模型微调管道，可以进一步提高模型的性能。实验结果表明，仅在 MUSDB18-HQ 数据集上训练的 BSRNN 显着优于 2021 年音乐解混（MDX）挑战赛中的几个顶级模型，并且半监督微调阶段进一步提高了所有四个乐器轨道上的性能。 本文提出了一种基于频带分割的循环神经网络（BSRNN）模型，用于改进音乐源分离任务，并结合半监督微调方法提升性能。 Yi Luo,Jianwei Yu eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.SP

title: Understanding Pure CLIP Guidance for Voxel Grid NeRF Models
title_zh: 了解体素网格 NeRF 模型的纯 CLIP 指南
abstract: We explore the task of text to 3D object generation using CLIP. Specifically, we use CLIP for guidance without access to any datasets, a setting we refer to as pure CLIP guidance. While prior work has adopted this setting, there is no systematic study of mechanics for preventing adversarial generations within CLIP. We illustrate how different image-based augmentations prevent the adversarial generation problem, and how the generated results are impacted. We test different CLIP model architectures and show that ensembling different models for guidance can prevent adversarial generations within bigger models and generate sharper results. Furthermore, we implement an implicit voxel grid model to show how neural networks provide an additional layer of regularization, resulting in better geometrical structure and coherency of generated objects. Compared to prior work, we achieve more coherent results with higher memory efficiency and faster training speeds.
summary: We explore the task of text to 3D object generation using CLIP. Specifically, we use CLIP for guidance without access to any datasets, a setting we refer to as pure CLIP guidance. While prior work has adopted this setting, there is no systematic study of mechanics for preventing adversarial generations within CLIP. We illustrate how different image-based augmentations prevent the adversarial generation problem, and how the generated results are impacted. We test different CLIP model architectures and show that ensembling different models for guidance can prevent adversarial generations within bigger models and generate sharper results. Furthermore, we implement an implicit voxel grid model to show how neural networks provide an additional layer of regularization, resulting in better geometrical structure and coherency of generated objects. Compared to prior work, we achieve more coherent results with higher memory efficiency and faster training speeds.
abstract_zh: 我们探索使用 CLIP 生成文本到 3D 对象的任务。具体来说，我们使用 CLIP 进行指导，而无需访问任何数据集，我们将这种设置称为纯 CLIP 指导。虽然之前的工作已经采用了这种设置，但还没有对 CLIP 内防止对抗生成的机制进行系统的研究。我们说明了不同的基于图像的增强如何防止对抗性生成问题，以及生成的结果如何受到影响。我们测试了不同的 CLIP 模型架构，并表明集成不同的模型作为指导可以防止更大模型中的对抗性生成并产生更清晰的结果。此外，我们实现了隐式体素网格模型，以展示神经网络如何提供额外的正则化层，从而产生更好的几何结构和生成对象的一致性。与之前的工作相比，我们通过更高的内存效率和更快的训练速度获得了更一致的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无数据集情况下利用CLIP进行文本到3D物体生成的纯CLIP引导方法。
AI.motivation: 现有工作虽采用纯CLIP引导，但缺乏系统性研究以防止CLIP中的对抗性生成问题，且需提升生成结果的几何结构和效率。
AI.method: 通过图像增强防止对抗生成，测试不同CLIP模型架构并采用模型集成，结合隐式体素网格模型增加正则化约束。
AI.result: 生成结果更连贯，内存效率更高，训练更快，几何结构更优。
AI.conclusion: 模型集成与体素网格结合有效提升生成质量与效率，为纯CLIP引导提供新方法。

title: Handle Anywhere: A Mobile Robot Arm for Providing Bodily Support to Elderly Persons
title_zh: 随时随地处理：为老年人提供身体支撑的移动机械臂
abstract: Age-related loss of mobility and increased risk of falling remain important obstacles toward facilitating aging-in-place. Many elderly people lack the coordination and strength necessary to perform common movements around their home, such as getting out of bed or stepping into a bathtub. The traditional solution has been to install grab bars on various surfaces; however, these are often not placed in optimal locations due to feasibility constraints in room layout. In this paper, we present a mobile robot that provides an older adult with a handle anywhere in space - "handle anywhere". The robot consists of an omnidirectional mobile base attached to a repositionable handle. We analyze the postural changes in four activities of daily living and determine, in each, the body pose that requires the maximal muscle effort. Using a simple model of the human body, we develop a methodology to optimally place the handle to provide the maximum support for the elderly person at the point of most effort. Our model is validated with experimental trials. We discuss how the robotic device could be used to enhance patient mobility and reduce the incidence of falls.
summary: Age-related loss of mobility and increased risk of falling remain important obstacles toward facilitating aging-in-place. Many elderly people lack the coordination and strength necessary to perform common movements around their home, such as getting out of bed or stepping into a bathtub. The traditional solution has been to install grab bars on various surfaces; however, these are often not placed in optimal locations due to feasibility constraints in room layout. In this paper, we present a mobile robot that provides an older adult with a handle anywhere in space - "handle anywhere". The robot consists of an omnidirectional mobile base attached to a repositionable handle. We analyze the postural changes in four activities of daily living and determine, in each, the body pose that requires the maximal muscle effort. Using a simple model of the human body, we develop a methodology to optimally place the handle to provide the maximum support for the elderly person at the point of most effort. Our model is validated with experimental trials. We discuss how the robotic device could be used to enhance patient mobility and reduce the incidence of falls.
abstract_zh: 与年龄相关的行动能力丧失和跌倒风险增加仍然是促进居家养老的重要障碍。许多老年人缺乏在家中进行常见动作（例如起床或进入浴缸）所需的协调性和力量。传统的解决方案是在各种表面上安装扶手。然而，由于房间布局的可行性限制，这些通常没有放置在最佳位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种移动机器人，它可以为老年人提供空间中任何地方的手柄——“handle Anywhere”。该机器人由一个全向移动底座组成，该底座连接到一个可重新定位的手柄上。我们分析四种日常生活活动中的姿势变化，并确定每种活动中需要最大肌肉力量的身体姿势。使用简单的人体模型，我们开发了一种方法来优化手柄的放置位置，以便在老年人最用力的时候为老年人提供最大的支撑。我们的模型通过实验验证。我们讨论如何使用机器人设备来增强患者的活动能力并减少跌倒的发生率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种移动机器人，通过可重新定位的把手为老年人提供空间任意位置的身体支持，以协助完成日常活动。
AI.motivation: 老年人因行动能力下降和跌倒风险难以独立完成日常活动，传统固定式扶手因布局限制无法提供最优支持。
AI.method: 基于人体模型分析四类日常活动的姿势变化，确定最大肌肉用力时刻的体态，建立优化算法计算最佳把手位置并实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型能有效增强老年人移动能力，降低跌倒风险，验证了机器人提供动态支持的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人系统可作为居家养老服务的技术方案，通过动态适应性支持提升老年人生活自主性与安全性。

authors_text: Heinrich Dinkel,Zhiyong Yan,Yongqing Wang,Junbo Zhang,Yujun Wang
title: An empirical study of weakly supervised audio tagging embeddings for general audio representations
title_zh: 一般音频表示的弱监督音频标记嵌入的实证研究
abstract: We study the usability of pre-trained weakly supervised audio tagging (AT) models as feature extractors for general audio representations. We mainly analyze the feasibility of transferring those embeddings to other tasks within the speech and sound domains. Specifically, we benchmark weakly supervised pre-trained models (MobileNetV2 and EfficientNet-B0) against modern self-supervised learning methods (BYOL-A) as feature extractors. Fourteen downstream tasks are used for evaluation ranging from music instrument classification to language classification. Our results indicate that AT pre-trained models are an excellent transfer learning choice for music, event, and emotion recognition tasks. Further, finetuning AT models can also benefit speech-related tasks such as keyword spotting and intent classification.
summary: We study the usability of pre-trained weakly supervised audio tagging (AT) models as feature extractors for general audio representations. We mainly analyze the feasibility of transferring those embeddings to other tasks within the speech and sound domains. Specifically, we benchmark weakly supervised pre-trained models (MobileNetV2 and EfficientNet-B0) against modern self-supervised learning methods (BYOL-A) as feature extractors. Fourteen downstream tasks are used for evaluation ranging from music instrument classification to language classification. Our results indicate that AT pre-trained models are an excellent transfer learning choice for music, event, and emotion recognition tasks. Further, finetuning AT models can also benefit speech-related tasks such as keyword spotting and intent classification.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了预训练的弱监督音频标记（AT）模型作为一般音频表示的特征提取器的可用性。我们主要分析将这些嵌入转移到语音和声音领域其他任务的可行性。具体来说，我们将弱监督预训练模型（MobileNetV2 和 EfficientNet-B0）与现代自监督学习方法（BYOL-A）作为特征提取器进行基准测试。十四个下游任务用于评估，范围从乐器分类到语言分类。我们的结果表明，AT 预训练模型是音乐、事件和情感识别任务的绝佳迁移学习选择。此外，微调 AT 模型还可以有益于语音相关任务，例如关键词识别和意图分类。

AI.method: 对比弱监督预训练模型与自监督学习方法在14个下游任务中的表现，评估其作为特征提取器的效果
AI.result: AT预训练模型在音乐、事件及情感识别任务中表现优异，微调后对语音任务如关键词识别和意图分类也有提升
AI.conclusion: 弱监督音频标签模型是有效的迁移学习工具，尤其在非语音任务中，微调可增强其在语音相关任务中的表现

search_text: An empirical study of weakly supervised audio tagging embeddings for general audio representations 一般音频表示的弱监督音频标记嵌入的实证研究 We study the usability of pre-trained weakly supervised audio tagging (AT) models as feature extractors for general audio representations. We mainly analyze the feasibility of transferring those embeddings to other tasks within the speech and sound domains. Specifically, we benchmark weakly supervised pre-trained models (MobileNetV2 and EfficientNet-B0) against modern self-supervised learning methods (BYOL-A) as feature extractors. Fourteen downstream tasks are used for evaluation ranging from music instrument classification to language classification. Our results indicate that AT pre-trained models are an excellent transfer learning choice for music, event, and emotion recognition tasks. Further, finetuning AT models can also benefit speech-related tasks such as keyword spotting and intent classification. 我们研究了预训练的弱监督音频标记（AT）模型作为一般音频表示的特征提取器的可用性。我们主要分析将这些嵌入转移到语音和声音领域其他任务的可行性。具体来说，我们将弱监督预训练模型（MobileNetV2 和 EfficientNet-B0）与现代自监督学习方法（BYOL-A）作为特征提取器进行基准测试。十四个下游任务用于评估，范围从乐器分类到语言分类。我们的结果表明，AT 预训练模型是音乐、事件和情感识别任务的绝佳迁移学习选择。此外，微调 AT 模型还可以有益于语音相关任务，例如关键词识别和意图分类。 评估弱监督音频标签模型作为通用音频表示特征提取器的迁移效果 Heinrich Dinkel,Zhiyong Yan,Yongqing Wang,Junbo Zhang,Yujun Wang cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Konstantina Christakopoulou,Can Xu,Sai Zhang,Sriraj Badam,Trevor Potter,Daniel Li,Hao Wan,Xinyang Yi,Ya Le,Chris Berg,Eric Bencomo Dixon,Ed H. Chi,Minmin Chen
title: Reward Shaping for User Satisfaction in a REINFORCE Recommender
title_zh: REINFORCE 推荐器中用户满意度的奖励塑造
comment: Accepted in Reinforcement Learning for Real Life (RL4RealLife) Workshop in the 38th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2021
comments: Accepted in Reinforcement Learning for Real Life (RL4RealLife) Workshop in the 38th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2021
abstract: How might we design Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based recommenders that encourage aligning user trajectories with the underlying user satisfaction? Three research questions are key: (1) measuring user satisfaction, (2) combatting sparsity of satisfaction signals, and (3) adapting the training of the recommender agent to maximize satisfaction. For measurement, it has been found that surveys explicitly asking users to rate their experience with consumed items can provide valuable orthogonal information to the engagement/interaction data, acting as a proxy to the underlying user satisfaction. For sparsity, i.e, only being able to observe how satisfied users are with a tiny fraction of user-item interactions, imputation models can be useful in predicting satisfaction level for all items users have consumed. For learning satisfying recommender policies, we postulate that reward shaping in RL recommender agents is powerful for driving satisfying user experiences. Putting everything together, we propose to jointly learn a policy network and a satisfaction imputation network: The role of the imputation network is to learn which actions are satisfying to the user; while the policy network, built on top of REINFORCE, decides which items to recommend, with the reward utilizing the imputed satisfaction. We use both offline analysis and live experiments in an industrial large-scale recommendation platform to demonstrate the promise of our approach for satisfying user experiences.
summary: How might we design Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based recommenders that encourage aligning user trajectories with the underlying user satisfaction? Three research questions are key: (1) measuring user satisfaction, (2) combatting sparsity of satisfaction signals, and (3) adapting the training of the recommender agent to maximize satisfaction. For measurement, it has been found that surveys explicitly asking users to rate their experience with consumed items can provide valuable orthogonal information to the engagement/interaction data, acting as a proxy to the underlying user satisfaction. For sparsity, i.e, only being able to observe how satisfied users are with a tiny fraction of user-item interactions, imputation models can be useful in predicting satisfaction level for all items users have consumed. For learning satisfying recommender policies, we postulate that reward shaping in RL recommender agents is powerful for driving satisfying user experiences. Putting everything together, we propose to jointly learn a policy network and a satisfaction imputation network: The role of the imputation network is to learn which actions are satisfying to the user; while the policy network, built on top of REINFORCE, decides which items to recommend, with the reward utilizing the imputed satisfaction. We use both offline analysis and live experiments in an industrial large-scale recommendation platform to demonstrate the promise of our approach for satisfying user experiences.
abstract_zh: 我们如何设计基于强化学习（RL）的推荐系统，鼓励将用户轨迹与潜在的用户满意度保持一致？三个研究问题是关键：（1）测量用户满意度，（2）解决满意度信号的稀疏性，（3）调整推荐代理的训练以最大化满意度。为了进行测量，我们发现，明确要求用户对消费物品的体验进行评分的调查可以为参与/交互数据提供有价值的正交信息，充当潜在用户满意度的代理。对于稀疏性，即只能观察用户对一小部分用户-项目交互的满意度，插补模型可用于预测用户消费的所有项目的满意度。为了学习令人满意的推荐策略，我们假设 RL 推荐代理中的奖励塑造对于推动令人满意的用户体验非常有用。综上所述，我们建议共同学习策略网络和满意度插补网络：插补网络的作用是了解哪些操作令用户满意；而建立在 REINFORCE 之上的政策网络则决定推荐哪些项目，并利用估算的满意度进行奖励。我们在工业大规模推荐平台中使用离线分析和现场实验来证明我们的方法在满足用户体验方面的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于REINFORCE算法的推荐系统框架，通过奖励塑造和满意度预测网络联合学习，提升用户满意度。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统难以准确捕捉用户满意度信号且存在数据稀疏性问题，需设计能有效对齐用户轨迹与满意度的强化学习框架。
AI.method: 结合用户调研数据构建满意度预测网络，利用其预测结果作为奖励信号训练REINFORCE推荐策略网络，通过联合优化解决数据稀疏性问题。
AI.result: 在工业级推荐平台的离线分析和在线实验中，该方法显著提升了用户满意度指标，验证了奖励塑造与满意度预测联合学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将满意度预测与推荐策略联合训练，可有效提升推荐系统的用户满意度，为稀疏反馈场景下的强化学习推荐提供新思路。

title: Distilling Style from Image Pairs for Global Forward and Inverse Tone Mapping
title_zh: 从图像对中提取样式以进行全局正向和反向色调映射
comment: Published in European Conference on Visual Media Production (CVMP '22)
comments: Published in European Conference on Visual Media Production (CVMP '22)
abstract: Many image enhancement or editing operations, such as forward and inverse tone mapping or color grading, do not have a unique solution, but instead a range of solutions, each representing a different style. Despite this, existing learning-based methods attempt to learn a unique mapping, disregarding this style. In this work, we show that information about the style can be distilled from collections of image pairs and encoded into a 2- or 3-dimensional vector. This gives us not only an efficient representation but also an interpretable latent space for editing the image style. We represent the global color mapping between a pair of images as a custom normalizing flow, conditioned on a polynomial basis of the pixel color. We show that such a network is more effective than PCA or VAE at encoding image style in low-dimensional space and lets us obtain an accuracy close to 40 dB, which is about 7-10 dB improvement over the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Many image enhancement or editing operations, such as forward and inverse tone mapping or color grading, do not have a unique solution, but instead a range of solutions, each representing a different style. Despite this, existing learning-based methods attempt to learn a unique mapping, disregarding this style. In this work, we show that information about the style can be distilled from collections of image pairs and encoded into a 2- or 3-dimensional vector. This gives us not only an efficient representation but also an interpretable latent space for editing the image style. We represent the global color mapping between a pair of images as a custom normalizing flow, conditioned on a polynomial basis of the pixel color. We show that such a network is more effective than PCA or VAE at encoding image style in low-dimensional space and lets us obtain an accuracy close to 40 dB, which is about 7-10 dB improvement over the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 许多图像增强或编辑操作，例如正向和反向色调映射或颜色分级，没有唯一的解决方案，而是一系列解决方案，每种解决方案代表不同的风格。尽管如此，现有的基于学习的方法试图学习独特的映射，而忽略了这种风格。在这项工作中，我们展示了可以从图像对集合中提取有关风格的信息并将其编码为 2 维或 3 维向量。这不仅为我们提供了有效的表示，而且为编辑图像样式提供了可解释的潜在空间。我们将一对图像之间的全局颜色映射表示为自定义标准化流程，以像素颜色的多项式为基础。我们证明，这样的网络在低维空间中编码图像风格时比 PCA 或 VAE 更有效，并且使我们获得接近 40 dB 的精度，比最先进的方法大约提高了 7-10 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从图像对中蒸馏风格信息，用于全局前向和逆向色调映射，通过低维向量表示实现高效且可解释的图像风格编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在图像增强或编辑任务中仅学习唯一映射，忽略了不同风格的多样性，导致无法有效表示和编辑图像风格。
AI.method: 通过图像对集合蒸馏风格信息，将其编码为2-3维向量，并采用基于像素颜色多项式基的自定义归一化流建模全局颜色映射。
AI.result: 该方法在低维空间中编码图像风格的准确性达到约40 dB，较现有方法提升7-10 dB，优于PCA或VAE方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉图像风格的低维表示，为图像编辑提供了高效且可解释的解决方案，显著提升了色调映射任务的性能。

search_text: Distilling Style from Image Pairs for Global Forward and Inverse Tone Mapping 从图像对中提取样式以进行全局正向和反向色调映射 Many image enhancement or editing operations, such as forward and inverse tone mapping or color grading, do not have a unique solution, but instead a range of solutions, each representing a different style. Despite this, existing learning-based methods attempt to learn a unique mapping, disregarding this style. In this work, we show that information about the style can be distilled from collections of image pairs and encoded into a 2- or 3-dimensional vector. This gives us not only an efficient representation but also an interpretable latent space for editing the image style. We represent the global color mapping between a pair of images as a custom normalizing flow, conditioned on a polynomial basis of the pixel color. We show that such a network is more effective than PCA or VAE at encoding image style in low-dimensional space and lets us obtain an accuracy close to 40 dB, which is about 7-10 dB improvement over the state-of-the-art methods. 许多图像增强或编辑操作，例如正向和反向色调映射或颜色分级，没有唯一的解决方案，而是一系列解决方案，每种解决方案代表不同的风格。尽管如此，现有的基于学习的方法试图学习独特的映射，而忽略了这种风格。在这项工作中，我们展示了可以从图像对集合中提取有关风格的信息并将其编码为 2 维或 3 维向量。这不仅为我们提供了有效的表示，而且为编辑图像样式提供了可解释的潜在空间。我们将一对图像之间的全局颜色映射表示为自定义标准化流程，以像素颜色的多项式为基础。我们证明，这样的网络在低维空间中编码图像风格时比 PCA 或 VAE 更有效，并且使我们获得接近 40 dB 的精度，比最先进的方法大约提高了 7-10 dB。 本文提出从图像对中蒸馏风格信息，用于全局前向和逆向色调映射，通过低维向量表示实现高效且可解释的图像风格编辑。 Aamir Mustafa,Param Hanji,Rafal K. Mantiuk cs.CV

authors_text: Denghao Li,Yuqiao Zeng,Jianzong Wang,Lingwei Kong,Zhangcheng Huang,Ning Cheng,Xiaoyang Qu,Jing Xiao
title: Blur the Linguistic Boundary: Interpreting Chinese Buddhist Sutra in English via Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 模糊语言界限：神经机器翻译英译中国佛经
comment: This paper is accepted by ICTAI 2022. The 34th IEEE International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence (ICTAI)
comments: This paper is accepted by ICTAI 2022. The 34th IEEE International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence (ICTAI)
abstract: Buddhism is an influential religion with a long-standing history and profound philosophy. Nowadays, more and more people worldwide aspire to learn the essence of Buddhism, attaching importance to Buddhism dissemination. However, Buddhist scriptures written in classical Chinese are obscure to most people and machine translation applications. For instance, general Chinese-English neural machine translation (NMT) fails in this domain. In this paper, we proposed a novel approach to building a practical NMT model for Buddhist scriptures. The performance of our translation pipeline acquired highly promising results in ablation experiments under three criteria.
summary: Buddhism is an influential religion with a long-standing history and profound philosophy. Nowadays, more and more people worldwide aspire to learn the essence of Buddhism, attaching importance to Buddhism dissemination. However, Buddhist scriptures written in classical Chinese are obscure to most people and machine translation applications. For instance, general Chinese-English neural machine translation (NMT) fails in this domain. In this paper, we proposed a novel approach to building a practical NMT model for Buddhist scriptures. The performance of our translation pipeline acquired highly promising results in ablation experiments under three criteria.
abstract_zh: 佛教是一个历史悠久、哲学深邃、影响深远的宗教。如今，世界上越来越多的人渴望学习佛教的精髓，重视佛教的传播。然而，用文言文写成的佛经对于大多数人和机器翻译应用程序来说都是晦涩难懂的。例如，一般的中英神经机器翻译（NMT）在这个领域就失败了。在本文中，我们提出了一种为佛教经典构建实用 NMT 模型的新方法。我们的翻译管道的性能在三个标准下的消融实验中获得了非常有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 构建针对佛教经典的实用神经机器翻译模型，以提高中文佛经到英文的翻译准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于佛教经典使用古典汉语，导致常规神经机器翻译在该领域效果不佳，需要专门的模型来提升翻译质量。
AI.method: 提出一种新的神经机器翻译方法，通过领域自适应和优化模型结构来处理古典汉语的佛教文本。
AI.result: 在三个评估标准下，翻译流水线的性能表现出高度有希望的结果，显示出改进的翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了佛教经典的翻译质量，证明了针对特定领域优化神经机器翻译模型的重要性。

title: MobileViTv3: Mobile-Friendly Vision Transformer with Simple and Effective Fusion of Local, Global and Input Features
title_zh: MobileViTv3：移动友好的视觉转换器，简单有效地融合本地、全局和输入特征
abstract: MobileViT (MobileViTv1) combines convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and vision transformers (ViTs) to create light-weight models for mobile vision tasks. Though the main MobileViTv1-block helps to achieve competitive state-of-the-art results, the fusion block inside MobileViTv1-block, creates scaling challenges and has a complex learning task. We propose changes to the fusion block that are simple and effective to create MobileViTv3-block, which addresses the scaling and simplifies the learning task. Our proposed MobileViTv3-block used to create MobileViTv3-XXS, XS and S models outperform MobileViTv1 on ImageNet-1k, ADE20K, COCO and PascalVOC2012 datasets. On ImageNet-1K, MobileViTv3-XXS and MobileViTv3-XS surpasses MobileViTv1-XXS and MobileViTv1-XS by 2% and 1.9% respectively. Recently published MobileViTv2 architecture removes fusion block and uses linear complexity transformers to perform better than MobileViTv1. We add our proposed fusion block to MobileViTv2 to create MobileViTv3-0.5, 0.75 and 1.0 models. These new models give better accuracy numbers on ImageNet-1k, ADE20K, COCO and PascalVOC2012 datasets as compared to MobileViTv2. MobileViTv3-0.5 and MobileViTv3-0.75 outperforms MobileViTv2-0.5 and MobileViTv2-0.75 by 2.1% and 1.0% respectively on ImageNet-1K dataset. For segmentation task, MobileViTv3-1.0 achieves 2.07% and 1.1% better mIOU compared to MobileViTv2-1.0 on ADE20K dataset and PascalVOC2012 dataset respectively. Our code and the trained models are available at: https://github.com/micronDLA/MobileViTv3
summary: MobileViT (MobileViTv1) combines convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and vision transformers (ViTs) to create light-weight models for mobile vision tasks. Though the main MobileViTv1-block helps to achieve competitive state-of-the-art results, the fusion block inside MobileViTv1-block, creates scaling challenges and has a complex learning task. We propose changes to the fusion block that are simple and effective to create MobileViTv3-block, which addresses the scaling and simplifies the learning task. Our proposed MobileViTv3-block used to create MobileViTv3-XXS, XS and S models outperform MobileViTv1 on ImageNet-1k, ADE20K, COCO and PascalVOC2012 datasets. On ImageNet-1K, MobileViTv3-XXS and MobileViTv3-XS surpasses MobileViTv1-XXS and MobileViTv1-XS by 2% and 1.9% respectively. Recently published MobileViTv2 architecture removes fusion block and uses linear complexity transformers to perform better than MobileViTv1. We add our proposed fusion block to MobileViTv2 to create MobileViTv3-0.5, 0.75 and 1.0 models. These new models give better accuracy numbers on ImageNet-1k, ADE20K, COCO and PascalVOC2012 datasets as compared to MobileViTv2. MobileViTv3-0.5 and MobileViTv3-0.75 outperforms MobileViTv2-0.5 and MobileViTv2-0.75 by 2.1% and 1.0% respectively on ImageNet-1K dataset. For segmentation task, MobileViTv3-1.0 achieves 2.07% and 1.1% better mIOU compared to MobileViTv2-1.0 on ADE20K dataset and PascalVOC2012 dataset respectively. Our code and the trained models are available at: https://github.com/micronDLA/MobileViTv3
abstract_zh: MobileViT (MobileViTv1) 结合了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和视觉转换器 (ViT)，为移动视觉任务创建轻量级模型。尽管主要的 MobileViTv1 块有助于实现有竞争力的最先进结果，但 MobileViTv1 块内部的融合块带来了扩展挑战，并且具有复杂的学习任务。我们建议对融合块进行简单有效的更改，以创建 MobileViTv3 块，从而解决扩展问题并简化学习任务。我们提出的用于创建 MobileViTv3-XXS、XS 和 S 模型的 MobileViTv3 块在 ImageNet-1k、ADE20K、COCO 和 PascalVOC2012 数据集上优于 MobileViTv1。在 ImageNet-1K 上，MobileViTv3-XXS 和 MobileViTv3-XS 分别超过 MobileViTv1-XXS 和 MobileViTv1-XS 2% 和 1.9%。最近发布的 MobileViTv2 架构删除了融合块并使用线性复杂度转换器，其性能比 MobileViTv1 更好。我们将建议的融合块添加到 MobileViTv2 中以创建 MobileViTv3-0.5、0.75 和 1.0 模型。与 MobileViTv2 相比，这些新模型在 ImageNet-1k、ADE20K、COCO 和 PascalVOC2012 数据集上提供了更好的准确率。在 ImageNet-1K 数据集上，MobileViTv3-0.5 和 MobileViTv3-0.75 的性能分别优于 MobileViTv2-0.5 和 MobileViTv2-0.75 2.1% 和 1.0%。对于分割任务，与 MobileViTv2-1.0 相比，MobileViTv3-1.0 在 ADE20K 数据集和 PascalVOC2012 数据集上的 mIOU 分别提高了 2.07% 和 1.1%。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/micronDLA/MobileViTv3

AI.tldr: 本文提出MobileViTv3，通过改进融合模块，结合局部、全局和输入特征，提升移动端视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: MobileViTv1的融合模块存在扩展性差和学习复杂的问题，需简化结构并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计更简洁有效的融合模块（MobileViTv3-block），并将其集成到MobileViTv2架构中，形成多种模型变体。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K等数据集上，MobileViTv3-XXS/XS较MobileViTv1提升2%/1.9%，MobileViTv3-0.5/0.75较MobileViTv2提升2.1%/1.0%；分割任务中mIOU提升2.07%和1.1%。
AI.conclusion: MobileViTv3通过优化融合机制，在保持轻量化的同时提升了准确率，适用于移动端视觉任务。

MobileViTv3-0.5 and MobileViTv3-0.75 outperforms MobileViTv2-0.5 and MobileViTv2-0.75 by 2.1% and 1.0% respectively on ImageNet-1K dataset. For segmentation task, MobileViTv3-1.0 achieves 2.07% and 1.1% better mIOU compared to MobileViTv2-1.0 on ADE20K dataset and PascalVOC2012 dataset respectively. Our code and the trained models are available at: https://github.com/micronDLA/MobileViTv3 MobileViT (MobileViTv1) 结合了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和视觉转换器 (ViT)，为移动视觉任务创建轻量级模型。尽管主要的 MobileViTv1 块有助于实现有竞争力的最先进结果，但 MobileViTv1 块内部的融合块带来了扩展挑战，并且具有复杂的学习任务。我们建议对融合块进行简单有效的更改，以创建 MobileViTv3 块，从而解决扩展问题并简化学习任务。我们提出的用于创建 MobileViTv3-XXS、XS 和 S 模型的 MobileViTv3 块在 ImageNet-1k、ADE20K、COCO 和 PascalVOC2012 数据集上优于 MobileViTv1。在 ImageNet-1K 上，MobileViTv3-XXS 和 MobileViTv3-XS 分别超过 MobileViTv1-XXS 和 MobileViTv1-XS 2% 和 1.9%。最近发布的 MobileViTv2 架构删除了融合块并使用线性复杂度转换器，其性能比 MobileViTv1 更好。我们将建议的融合块添加到 MobileViTv2 中以创建 MobileViTv3-0.5、0.75 和 1.0 模型。与 MobileViTv2 相比，这些新模型在 ImageNet-1k、ADE20K、COCO 和 PascalVOC2012 数据集上提供了更好的准确率。在 ImageNet-1K 数据集上，MobileViTv3-0.5 和 MobileViTv3-0.75 的性能分别优于 MobileViTv2-0.5 和 MobileViTv2-0.75 2.1% 和 1.0%。对于分割任务，与 MobileViTv2-1.0 相比，MobileViTv3-1.0 在 ADE20K 数据集和 PascalVOC2012 数据集上的 mIOU 分别提高了 2.07% 和 1.1%。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/micronDLA/MobileViTv3 本文提出MobileViTv3，通过改进融合模块，结合局部、全局和输入特征，提升移动端视觉任务的性能。 Shakti N. Wadekar,Abhishek Chaurasia cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Burcu Sayin,Jie Yang,Xinyue Chen,Andrea Passerini,Fabio Casati
title: Rethinking and Recomputing the Value of Machine Learning Models
title_zh: 重新思考和重新计算机器学习模型的价值
comment: Accepted at the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Review
comments: Accepted at the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Review
abstract: In this paper, we argue that the prevailing approach to training and evaluating machine learning models often fails to consider their real-world application within organizational or societal contexts, where they are intended to create beneficial value for people. We propose a shift in perspective, redefining model assessment and selection to emphasize integration into workflows that combine machine predictions with human expertise, particularly in scenarios requiring human intervention for low-confidence predictions. Traditional metrics like accuracy and f-score fail to capture the beneficial value of models in such hybrid settings. To address this, we introduce a simple yet theoretically sound "value" metric that incorporates task-specific costs for correct predictions, errors, and rejections, offering a practical framework for real-world evaluation. Through extensive experiments, we show that existing metrics fail to capture real-world needs, often leading to suboptimal choices in terms of value when used to rank classifiers. Furthermore, we emphasize the critical role of calibration in determining model value, showing that simple, well-calibrated models can often outperform more complex models that are challenging to calibrate.
summary: In this paper, we argue that the prevailing approach to training and evaluating machine learning models often fails to consider their real-world application within organizational or societal contexts, where they are intended to create beneficial value for people. We propose a shift in perspective, redefining model assessment and selection to emphasize integration into workflows that combine machine predictions with human expertise, particularly in scenarios requiring human intervention for low-confidence predictions. Traditional metrics like accuracy and f-score fail to capture the beneficial value of models in such hybrid settings. To address this, we introduce a simple yet theoretically sound "value" metric that incorporates task-specific costs for correct predictions, errors, and rejections, offering a practical framework for real-world evaluation. Through extensive experiments, we show that existing metrics fail to capture real-world needs, often leading to suboptimal choices in terms of value when used to rank classifiers. Furthermore, we emphasize the critical role of calibration in determining model value, showing that simple, well-calibrated models can often outperform more complex models that are challenging to calibrate.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们认为，训练和评估机器学习模型的主流方法往往无法考虑它们在组织或社会环境中的实际应用，而它们的目的是为人们创造有益的价值。我们建议转变视角，重新定义模型评估和选择，强调集成到将机器预测与人类专业知识相结合的工作流程中，特别是在需要人工干预进行低置信度预测的情况下。准确性和 f 分数等传统指标无法捕捉此类混合环境中模型的有益价值。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个简单但理论上合理的“价值”指标，其中包含了正确预测、错误和拒绝的特定任务成本，为现实世界的评估提供了一个实用的框架。通过大量的实验，我们表明现有的指标无法捕捉现实世界的需求，在用于对分类器进行排名时，通常会导致在价值方面做出次优的选择。此外，我们强调校准在确定模型值中的关键作用，表明简单、校准良好的模型通常可以胜过难以校准的更复杂的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的机器学习模型评估方法，强调在实际应用场景中结合人类专业知识的混合工作流程，并引入了基于任务成本的'价值'度量指标。
AI.motivation: 传统评估指标（如准确率和F值）无法反映模型在需要人类干预的现实场景中的实际价值，导致模型选择可能偏离实际需求。
AI.method: 设计包含任务特定成本参数的'价值'度量框架，综合考虑正确预测、错误和拒绝的代价，并通过实验验证传统指标与新指标在实际需求匹配上的差异。
AI.result: 实验表明传统指标常导致价值导向的次优选择，而校准良好的简单模型在实际价值评估中可能优于复杂模型。
AI.conclusion: 模型评估应超越传统指标，结合实际应用场景的成本结构和人类协作需求，校准能力对模型实际价值具有关键影响。

search_text: Rethinking and Recomputing the Value of Machine Learning Models 重新思考和重新计算机器学习模型的价值 In this paper, we argue that the prevailing approach to training and evaluating machine learning models often fails to consider their real-world application within organizational or societal contexts, where they are intended to create beneficial value for people. We propose a shift in perspective, redefining model assessment and selection to emphasize integration into workflows that combine machine predictions with human expertise, particularly in scenarios requiring human intervention for low-confidence predictions. Traditional metrics like accuracy and f-score fail to capture the beneficial value of models in such hybrid settings. To address this, we introduce a simple yet theoretically sound "value" metric that incorporates task-specific costs for correct predictions, errors, and rejections, offering a practical framework for real-world evaluation. Through extensive experiments, we show that existing metrics fail to capture real-world needs, often leading to suboptimal choices in terms of value when used to rank classifiers. Furthermore, we emphasize the critical role of calibration in determining model value, showing that simple, well-calibrated models can often outperform more complex models that are challenging to calibrate. 在本文中，我们认为，训练和评估机器学习模型的主流方法往往无法考虑它们在组织或社会环境中的实际应用，而它们的目的是为人们创造有益的价值。我们建议转变视角，重新定义模型评估和选择，强调集成到将机器预测与人类专业知识相结合的工作流程中，特别是在需要人工干预进行低置信度预测的情况下。准确性和 f 分数等传统指标无法捕捉此类混合环境中模型的有益价值。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个简单但理论上合理的“价值”指标，其中包含了正确预测、错误和拒绝的特定任务成本，为现实世界的评估提供了一个实用的框架。通过大量的实验，我们表明现有的指标无法捕捉现实世界的需求，在用于对分类器进行排名时，通常会导致在价值方面做出次优的选择。此外，我们强调校准在确定模型值中的关键作用，表明简单、校准良好的模型通常可以胜过难以校准的更复杂的模型。 本文提出了一种新的机器学习模型评估方法，强调在实际应用场景中结合人类专业知识的混合工作流程，并引入了基于任务成本的'价值'度量指标。 Burcu Sayin,Jie Yang,Xinyue Chen,Andrea Passerini,Fabio Casati cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zi-Xin Zou,Shi-Sheng Huang,Yan-Pei Cao,Tai-Jiang Mu,Ying Shan,Hongbo Fu
title: MonoNeuralFusion: Online Monocular Neural 3D Reconstruction with Geometric Priors
title_zh: MonoNeuralFusion：利用几何先验进行在线单目神经 3D 重建
abstract: High-fidelity 3D scene reconstruction from monocular videos continues to be challenging, especially for complete and fine-grained geometry reconstruction. The previous 3D reconstruction approaches with neural implicit representations have shown a promising ability for complete scene reconstruction, while their results are often over-smooth and lack enough geometric details. This paper introduces a novel neural implicit scene representation with volume rendering for high-fidelity online 3D scene reconstruction from monocular videos. For fine-grained reconstruction, our key insight is to incorporate geometric priors into both the neural implicit scene representation and neural volume rendering, thus leading to an effective geometry learning mechanism based on volume rendering optimization. Benefiting from this, we present MonoNeuralFusion to perform the online neural 3D reconstruction from monocular videos, by which the 3D scene geometry is efficiently generated and optimized during the on-the-fly 3D monocular scanning. The extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art approaches show that our MonoNeuralFusion consistently generates much better complete and fine-grained reconstruction results, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: High-fidelity 3D scene reconstruction from monocular videos continues to be challenging, especially for complete and fine-grained geometry reconstruction. The previous 3D reconstruction approaches with neural implicit representations have shown a promising ability for complete scene reconstruction, while their results are often over-smooth and lack enough geometric details. This paper introduces a novel neural implicit scene representation with volume rendering for high-fidelity online 3D scene reconstruction from monocular videos. For fine-grained reconstruction, our key insight is to incorporate geometric priors into both the neural implicit scene representation and neural volume rendering, thus leading to an effective geometry learning mechanism based on volume rendering optimization. Benefiting from this, we present MonoNeuralFusion to perform the online neural 3D reconstruction from monocular videos, by which the 3D scene geometry is efficiently generated and optimized during the on-the-fly 3D monocular scanning. The extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art approaches show that our MonoNeuralFusion consistently generates much better complete and fine-grained reconstruction results, both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 从单目视频中进行高保真 3D 场景重建仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于完整且细粒度的几何重建。之前使用神经隐式表示的 3D 重建方法已显示出完整场景重建的良好能力，但其结果往往过于平滑且缺乏足够的几何细节。本文介绍了一种新颖的神经隐式场景表示和体积渲染，用于单目视频的高保真在线 3D 场景重建。对于细粒度重建，我们的关键见解是将几何先验纳入神经隐式场景表示和神经体渲染中，从而形成基于体渲染优化的有效几何学习机制。受益于此，我们提出了 MonoNeuralFusion，可以从单目视频执行在线神经 3D 重建，从而在动态 3D 单目扫描期间有效生成和优化 3D 场景几何形状。与最先进方法的广泛比较表明，我们的 MonoNeuralFusion 在定量和定性方面始终能够产生更好的完整且细粒度的重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合几何先验的在线单目神经三维重建方法MonoNeuralFusion，解决细粒度几何重建难题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式重建方法虽能完成整体重建，但结果过度平滑且缺乏几何细节，难以满足高保真需求。
AI.method: 设计融合几何先验的神经隐式表示与体积渲染机制，通过在线体积渲染优化实现动态三维重建。
AI.result: 在定量与定性评估中均优于现有方法，显著提升重建完整性和细节数量级。
AI.conclusion: 几何先验与体积渲染优化的结合有效解决了单目视频三维重建的细节缺失问题。

authors_text: Srujan Deolasee,Qin Lin,Jialun Li,John M. Dolan
title: Spatio-temporal Motion Planning for Autonomous Vehicles with Trapezoidal Prism Corridors and Bézier Curves
title_zh: 具有梯形棱镜走廊和贝塞尔曲线的自动驾驶车辆时空运动规划
abstract: Safety-guaranteed motion planning is critical for self-driving cars to generate collision-free trajectories. A layered motion planning approach with decoupled path and speed planning is widely used for this purpose. This approach is prone to be suboptimal in the presence of dynamic obstacles. Spatial-temporal approaches deal with path planning and speed planning simultaneously; however, the existing methods only support simple-shaped corridors like cuboids, which restrict the search space for optimization in complex scenarios. We propose to use trapezoidal prism-shaped corridors for optimization, which significantly enlarges the solution space compared to the existing cuboidal corridors-based method. Finally, a piecewise Bézier curve optimization is conducted in our proposed corridors. This formulation theoretically guarantees the safety of the continuous-time trajectory. We validate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed approach in numerical and CommonRoad simulations.
summary: Safety-guaranteed motion planning is critical for self-driving cars to generate collision-free trajectories. A layered motion planning approach with decoupled path and speed planning is widely used for this purpose. This approach is prone to be suboptimal in the presence of dynamic obstacles. Spatial-temporal approaches deal with path planning and speed planning simultaneously; however, the existing methods only support simple-shaped corridors like cuboids, which restrict the search space for optimization in complex scenarios. We propose to use trapezoidal prism-shaped corridors for optimization, which significantly enlarges the solution space compared to the existing cuboidal corridors-based method. Finally, a piecewise Bézier curve optimization is conducted in our proposed corridors. This formulation theoretically guarantees the safety of the continuous-time trajectory. We validate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed approach in numerical and CommonRoad simulations.
abstract_zh: 有安全保证的运动规划对于自动驾驶汽车生成无碰撞轨迹至关重要。具有解耦路径和速度规划的分层运动规划方法被广泛用于此目的。在存在动态障碍的情况下，这种方法很容易达不到最佳效果。时空方法同时处理路径规划和速度规划；然而，现有的方法仅支持长方体等简单形状的走廊，这限制了复杂场景下优化的搜索空间。我们建议使用梯形棱柱形走廊进行优化，与现有的基于立方形走廊的方法相比，这显着扩大了解决方案空间。最后，在我们提出的走廊中进行分段贝塞尔曲线优化。该公式从理论上保证了连续时间轨迹的安全性。我们在数值和 CommonRoad 模拟中验证了所提出方法的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合梯形棱柱走廊和贝塞尔曲线的时空运动规划方法，用于自动驾驶车辆的安全轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 现有分层规划方法在动态障碍物场景下易产生次优解，而时空联合规划方法因仅支持简单立方体走廊而限制了复杂场景的优化空间。
AI.method: 采用梯形棱柱走廊扩大解空间，并通过分段贝塞尔曲线优化轨迹，理论保证连续时间轨迹安全性。
AI.result: 在数值实验和CommonRoad仿真中验证了方法的效率与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 梯形棱柱走廊与贝塞尔曲线结合的规划方法相较传统立方体走廊方案，在复杂动态场景中展现出更优的轨迹规划能力。

search_text: Spatio-temporal Motion Planning for Autonomous Vehicles with Trapezoidal Prism Corridors and Bézier Curves 具有梯形棱镜走廊和贝塞尔曲线的自动驾驶车辆时空运动规划 Safety-guaranteed motion planning is critical for self-driving cars to generate collision-free trajectories. A layered motion planning approach with decoupled path and speed planning is widely used for this purpose. This approach is prone to be suboptimal in the presence of dynamic obstacles. Spatial-temporal approaches deal with path planning and speed planning simultaneously; however, the existing methods only support simple-shaped corridors like cuboids, which restrict the search space for optimization in complex scenarios. We propose to use trapezoidal prism-shaped corridors for optimization, which significantly enlarges the solution space compared to the existing cuboidal corridors-based method. Finally, a piecewise Bézier curve optimization is conducted in our proposed corridors. This formulation theoretically guarantees the safety of the continuous-time trajectory. We validate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed approach in numerical and CommonRoad simulations. 有安全保证的运动规划对于自动驾驶汽车生成无碰撞轨迹至关重要。具有解耦路径和速度规划的分层运动规划方法被广泛用于此目的。在存在动态障碍的情况下，这种方法很容易达不到最佳效果。时空方法同时处理路径规划和速度规划；然而，现有的方法仅支持长方体等简单形状的走廊，这限制了复杂场景下优化的搜索空间。我们建议使用梯形棱柱形走廊进行优化，与现有的基于立方形走廊的方法相比，这显着扩大了解决方案空间。最后，在我们提出的走廊中进行分段贝塞尔曲线优化。该公式从理论上保证了连续时间轨迹的安全性。我们在数值和 CommonRoad 模拟中验证了所提出方法的效率和有效性。 本文提出一种结合梯形棱柱走廊和贝塞尔曲线的时空运动规划方法，用于自动驾驶车辆的安全轨迹生成。 Srujan Deolasee,Qin Lin,Jialun Li,John M. Dolan cs.RO

title: Embedded System Performance Analysis for Implementing a Portable Drowsiness Detection System for Drivers
title_zh: 用于实现驾驶员便携式睡意检测系统的嵌入式系统性能分析
abstract: Drowsiness on the road is a widespread problem with fatal consequences; thus, a multitude of systems and techniques have been proposed. Among existing methods, Ghoddoosian et al. utilized temporal blinking patterns to detect early signs of drowsiness, but their algorithm was tested only on a powerful desktop computer, which is not practical to apply in a moving vehicle setting. In this paper, we propose an efficient platform to run Ghoddosian's algorithm, detail the performance tests we ran to determine this platform, and explain our threshold optimization logic. After considering the Jetson Nano and Beelink (Mini PC), we concluded that the Mini PC is the most efficient and practical to run our embedded system in a vehicle. To determine this, we ran communication speed tests and evaluated total processing times for inference operations. Based on our experiments, the average total processing time to run the drowsiness detection model was 94.27 ms for Jetson Nano and 22.73 ms for the Beelink (Mini PC). Considering the portability and power efficiency of each device, along with the processing time results, the Beelink (Mini PC) was determined to be most suitable. Also, we propose a threshold optimization algorithm, which determines whether the driver is drowsy or alert based on the trade-off between the sensitivity and specificity of the drowsiness detection model. Our study will serve as a crucial next step for drowsiness detection research and its application in vehicles. Through our experiment, we have determinend a favorable platform that can run drowsiness detection algorithms in real-time and can be used as a foundation to further advance drowsiness detection research. In doing so, we have bridged the gap between an existing embedded system and its actual implementation in vehicles to bring drowsiness technology a step closer to prevalent real-life implementation.
summary: Drowsiness on the road is a widespread problem with fatal consequences; thus, a multitude of systems and techniques have been proposed. Among existing methods, Ghoddoosian et al. utilized temporal blinking patterns to detect early signs of drowsiness, but their algorithm was tested only on a powerful desktop computer, which is not practical to apply in a moving vehicle setting. In this paper, we propose an efficient platform to run Ghoddosian's algorithm, detail the performance tests we ran to determine this platform, and explain our threshold optimization logic. After considering the Jetson Nano and Beelink (Mini PC), we concluded that the Mini PC is the most efficient and practical to run our embedded system in a vehicle. To determine this, we ran communication speed tests and evaluated total processing times for inference operations. Based on our experiments, the average total processing time to run the drowsiness detection model was 94.27 ms for Jetson Nano and 22.73 ms for the Beelink (Mini PC). Considering the portability and power efficiency of each device, along with the processing time results, the Beelink (Mini PC) was determined to be most suitable. Also, we propose a threshold optimization algorithm, which determines whether the driver is drowsy or alert based on the trade-off between the sensitivity and specificity of the drowsiness detection model. Our study will serve as a crucial next step for drowsiness detection research and its application in vehicles. Through our experiment, we have determinend a favorable platform that can run drowsiness detection algorithms in real-time and can be used as a foundation to further advance drowsiness detection research. In doing so, we have bridged the gap between an existing embedded system and its actual implementation in vehicles to bring drowsiness technology a step closer to prevalent real-life implementation.
abstract_zh: 路上打瞌睡是一个普遍存在的问题，会带来致命的后果。因此，已经提出了多种系统和技术。在现有的方法中，Ghoddoosian 等人。利用时间眨眼模式来检测困倦的早期迹象，但他们的算法仅在功能强大的台式计算机上进行了测试，这不适用于移动的车辆环境。在本文中，我们提出了一个运行 Ghoddosian 算法的高效平台，详细介绍了我们为确定该平台而进行的性能测试，并解释了我们的阈值优化逻辑。在考虑了 Jetson Nano 和 Beelink（迷你 PC）之后，我们得出的结论是，迷你 PC 是在车辆中运行我们的嵌入式系统最高效、最实用的选择。为了确定这一点，我们进行了通信速度测试并评估了推理操作的总处理时间。根据我们的实验，Jetson Nano 运行睡意检测模型的平均总处理时间为 94.27 毫秒，Beelink（迷你 PC）为 22.73 毫秒。考虑到每个设备的便携性和功效以及处理时间结果，Beelink（迷你 PC）被确定为最合适的。此外，我们提出了一种阈值优化算法，该算法根据困倦检测模型的灵敏度和特异性之间的权衡来确定驾驶员是困倦还是警觉。我们的研究将成为困倦检测研究及其在车辆中应用的关键下一步。通过我们的实验，我们确定了一个可以实时运行睡意检测算法的有利平台，可以作为进一步推进睡意检测研究的基础。通过这样做，我们弥合了现有嵌入式系统与其在车辆中实际实施之间的差距，使困倦技术更接近于现实生活中的普遍实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的嵌入式平台，用于在车辆中实时运行驾驶员疲劳检测算法，并优化检测阈值。
AI.motivation: 现有疲劳检测算法多基于高性能桌面计算机，难以满足车载嵌入式系统对便携性、实时性和功耗的要求。
AI.method: 对比测试Jetson Nano与Beelink Mini PC的通信速度与模型推理处理时间，结合设备便携性与功耗特性选择最优平台；提出基于灵敏度与特异度权衡的阈值优化算法。
AI.result: Beelink Mini PC的平均处理时间为22.73ms（Jetson Nano为94.27ms），被确定为最优车载平台；阈值优化算法提升了检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 确定了适用于车载环境的实时疲劳检测平台，为疲劳检测技术在车辆中的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Optimizing towards the best insertion-based error-tolerating joints
title_zh: 优化基于插入的最佳容错接头
abstract: We present an optimization-based design process that can generate the best insertion-based joints with respect to different errors, including manipulation error, manufacturing error, and sensing error. We separate the analysis into two stages, the insertion and the after-insertion stability. Each sub-process is discretized into different modes of contacts. The transitions among the contact modes form a directed graph and the connectivity of the graph is achieved and maintained through the manipulation of the socket edge-angle and peg contact-point locations. The analysis starts in 2D with the assumption of point-edge contacts. During the optimization, the edges of the socket are rotated and the points on the peg are moved along the edges to ensure the successful insertion and the stability after insertion. We show in simulation that our proposed method can generate insertion-based joints that are tolerant to the given errors. and we present a few simple 3D projections to show that the analysis is still effective beyond 2D cases.
summary: We present an optimization-based design process that can generate the best insertion-based joints with respect to different errors, including manipulation error, manufacturing error, and sensing error. We separate the analysis into two stages, the insertion and the after-insertion stability. Each sub-process is discretized into different modes of contacts. The transitions among the contact modes form a directed graph and the connectivity of the graph is achieved and maintained through the manipulation of the socket edge-angle and peg contact-point locations. The analysis starts in 2D with the assumption of point-edge contacts. During the optimization, the edges of the socket are rotated and the points on the peg are moved along the edges to ensure the successful insertion and the stability after insertion. We show in simulation that our proposed method can generate insertion-based joints that are tolerant to the given errors. and we present a few simple 3D projections to show that the analysis is still effective beyond 2D cases.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于优化的设计过程，可以针对不同的误差（包括操作误差、制造误差和传感误差）生成最佳的基于插入的接头。我们将分析分为两个阶段：插入阶段和插入后稳定性。每个子过程被离散成不同的接触模式。接触模式之间的转变形成有向图，并且通过操纵插座边缘角度和销钉接触点位置来实现和维持该图的连接性。分析以点边接触的假设从二维开始。优化过程中，插座的边缘会旋转，挂钉上的点会沿着边缘移动，以确保插入成功以及插入后的稳定性。我们在模拟中表明，我们提出的方法可以生成能够容忍给定误差的基于插入的关节。我们提出了一些简单的 3D 投影，以表明该分析在 2D 情况之外仍然有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化的设计方法，旨在生成对插入误差具有鲁棒性的关节结构。
AI.motivation: 现有机械关节在制造、操作和感知误差下容易失效，需设计具有容错能力的插入式关节以提高可靠性。
AI.method: 将分析分为插入阶段和插入后稳定性阶段，通过离散接触模式构建有向图，并优化插座边缘角度和插头接触点位置以维持图连通性。
AI.result: 仿真验证了方法生成的关节可有效容忍指定误差，且3D投影显示该方法在三维场景中仍具有效性。

search_text: Optimizing towards the best insertion-based error-tolerating joints 优化基于插入的最佳容错接头 We present an optimization-based design process that can generate the best insertion-based joints with respect to different errors, including manipulation error, manufacturing error, and sensing error. We separate the analysis into two stages, the insertion and the after-insertion stability. Each sub-process is discretized into different modes of contacts. The transitions among the contact modes form a directed graph and the connectivity of the graph is achieved and maintained through the manipulation of the socket edge-angle and peg contact-point locations. The analysis starts in 2D with the assumption of point-edge contacts. During the optimization, the edges of the socket are rotated and the points on the peg are moved along the edges to ensure the successful insertion and the stability after insertion. We show in simulation that our proposed method can generate insertion-based joints that are tolerant to the given errors. and we present a few simple 3D projections to show that the analysis is still effective beyond 2D cases. 我们提出了一种基于优化的设计过程，可以针对不同的误差（包括操作误差、制造误差和传感误差）生成最佳的基于插入的接头。我们将分析分为两个阶段：插入阶段和插入后稳定性。每个子过程被离散成不同的接触模式。接触模式之间的转变形成有向图，并且通过操纵插座边缘角度和销钉接触点位置来实现和维持该图的连接性。分析以点边接触的假设从二维开始。优化过程中，插座的边缘会旋转，挂钉上的点会沿着边缘移动，以确保插入成功以及插入后的稳定性。我们在模拟中表明，我们提出的方法可以生成能够容忍给定误差的基于插入的关节。我们提出了一些简单的 3D 投影，以表明该分析在 2D 情况之外仍然有效。 本文提出一种基于优化的设计方法，旨在生成对插入误差具有鲁棒性的关节结构。 Zhibin Zou cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Gideon Vos,Kelly Trinh,Zoltan Sarnyai,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
title: Ensemble Machine Learning Model Trained on a New Synthesized Dataset Generalizes Well for Stress Prediction Using Wearable Devices
title_zh: 在新的综合数据集上训练的集成机器学习模型可以很好地推广使用可穿戴设备进行压力预测
abstract: Introduction. We investigate the generalization ability of models built on datasets containing a small number of subjects, recorded in single study protocols. Next, we propose and evaluate methods combining these datasets into a single, large dataset. Finally, we propose and evaluate the use of ensemble techniques by combining gradient boosting with an artificial neural network to measure predictive power on new, unseen data. Methods. Sensor biomarker data from six public datasets were utilized in this study. To test model generalization, we developed a gradient boosting model trained on one dataset (SWELL), and tested its predictive power on two datasets previously used in other studies (WESAD, NEURO). Next, we merged four small datasets, i.e. (SWELL, NEURO, WESAD, UBFC-Phys), to provide a combined total of 99 subjects,. In addition, we utilized random sampling combined with another dataset (EXAM) to build a larger training dataset consisting of 200 synthesized subjects,. Finally, we developed an ensemble model that combines our gradient boosting model with an artificial neural network, and tested it on two additional, unseen publicly available stress datasets (WESAD and Toadstool). Results. Our method delivers a robust stress measurement system capable of achieving 85% predictive accuracy on new, unseen validation data, achieving a 25% performance improvement over single models trained on small datasets. Conclusion. Models trained on small, single study protocol datasets do not generalize well for use on new, unseen data and lack statistical power. Ma-chine learning models trained on a dataset containing a larger number of varied study subjects capture physiological variance better, resulting in more robust stress detection.
summary: Introduction. We investigate the generalization ability of models built on datasets containing a small number of subjects, recorded in single study protocols. Next, we propose and evaluate methods combining these datasets into a single, large dataset. Finally, we propose and evaluate the use of ensemble techniques by combining gradient boosting with an artificial neural network to measure predictive power on new, unseen data. Methods. Sensor biomarker data from six public datasets were utilized in this study. To test model generalization, we developed a gradient boosting model trained on one dataset (SWELL), and tested its predictive power on two datasets previously used in other studies (WESAD, NEURO). Next, we merged four small datasets, i.e. (SWELL, NEURO, WESAD, UBFC-Phys), to provide a combined total of 99 subjects,. In addition, we utilized random sampling combined with another dataset (EXAM) to build a larger training dataset consisting of 200 synthesized subjects,. Finally, we developed an ensemble model that combines our gradient boosting model with an artificial neural network, and tested it on two additional, unseen publicly available stress datasets (WESAD and Toadstool). Results. Our method delivers a robust stress measurement system capable of achieving 85% predictive accuracy on new, unseen validation data, achieving a 25% performance improvement over single models trained on small datasets. Conclusion. Models trained on small, single study protocol datasets do not generalize well for use on new, unseen data and lack statistical power. Ma-chine learning models trained on a dataset containing a larger number of varied study subjects capture physiological variance better, resulting in more robust stress detection.
abstract_zh: 介绍。我们研究了在包含少量受试者的数据集上构建的模型的泛化能力，这些受试者记录在单个研究方案中。接下来，我们提出并评估将这些数据集组合成单个大型数据集的方法。最后，我们提出并评估了集成技术的使用，将梯度增强与人工神经网络相结合，以测量对新的、未见过的数据的预测能力。方法。本研究使用了来自六个公共数据集的传感器生物标记数据。为了测试模型的泛化性，我们开发了一种在一个数据集 (SWELL) 上训练的梯度增强模型，并在其他研究中使用的两个数据集 (WESAD、NEURO) 上测试了其预测能力。接下来，我们合并了四个小数据集，即（SWELL、NEURO、WESAD、UBFC-Phys），总共提供了 99 个受试者。此外，我们利用随机抽样与另一个数据集 (EXAM) 相结合来构建一个包含 200 个合成受试者的更大的训练数据集。最后，我们开发了一个集成模型，将梯度提升模型与人工神经网络相结合，并在另外两个未公开的公开压力数据集（WESAD 和 Toadstool）上对其进行了测试。结果。我们的方法提供了一个强大的压力测量系统，能够对新的、看不见的验证数据实现 85% 的预测准确性，与在小数据集上训练的单个模型相比，性能提高 25%。结论。在小型、单一研究方案数据集上训练的模型不能很好地推广到新的、未见过的数据，并且缺乏统计能力。在包含大量不同研究对象的数据集上训练的机器学习模型可以更好地捕获生理差异，从而实现更稳健的压力检测。

AI.tldr: 开发基于合成数据集的集成机器学习模型，以提升使用可穿戴设备进行压力预测的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 小数据集训练的模型泛化能力差，需通过合成数据集提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 合并多数据集生成合成数据集，结合梯度提升和神经网络的集成方法进行训练和验证。
AI.result: 模型在新数据集上达到85%准确率，较单一模型提升25%。
AI.conclusion: 小数据集模型泛化性差，大而多样化的数据集能更有效捕捉生理变化，提高压力检测的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xihang Yu,Sangli Teng,Theodor Chakhachiro,Wenzhe Tong,Tingjun Li,Tzu-Yuan Lin,Sarah Koehler,Manuel Ahumada,Jeffrey M. Walls,Maani Ghaffari
title: Fully Proprioceptive Slip-Velocity-Aware State Estimation for Mobile Robots via Invariant Kalman Filtering and Disturbance Observer
title_zh: 通过不变卡尔曼滤波和干扰观测器对移动机器人进行完全本体感受滑移速度感知状态估计
comment: The work will be presented in IROS2023. github repository at https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/slip_detection_DOB. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1805.10410 by other authors
comments: The work will be presented in IROS2023. github repository at https://github.com/UMich-CURLY/slip_detection_DOB. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1805.10410 by other authors
abstract: This paper develops a novel slip estimator using the invariant observer design theory and Disturbance Observer (DOB). The proposed state estimator for mobile robots is fully proprioceptive and combines data from an inertial measurement unit and body velocity within a Right Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (RI-EKF). By embedding the slip velocity into $\mathrm{SE}_3(3)$ matrix Lie group, the developed DOB-based RI-EKF provides real-time velocity and slip velocity estimates on different terrains. Experimental results using a Husky wheeled robot confirm the mathematical derivations and effectiveness of the proposed method in estimating the observable state variables. Open-source software is available for download and reproducing the presented results.
summary: This paper develops a novel slip estimator using the invariant observer design theory and Disturbance Observer (DOB). The proposed state estimator for mobile robots is fully proprioceptive and combines data from an inertial measurement unit and body velocity within a Right Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (RI-EKF). By embedding the slip velocity into $\mathrm{SE}_3(3)$ matrix Lie group, the developed DOB-based RI-EKF provides real-time velocity and slip velocity estimates on different terrains. Experimental results using a Husky wheeled robot confirm the mathematical derivations and effectiveness of the proposed method in estimating the observable state variables. Open-source software is available for download and reproducing the presented results.
abstract_zh: 本文利用不变观测器设计理论和干扰观测器（DOB）开发了一种新型滑移估计器。所提出的移动机器人状态估计器是完全本体感觉的，并将来自惯性测量单元的数据和右不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（RI-EKF）内的车身速度相结合。通过将滑移速度嵌入到 $\mathrm{SE}_3(3)$ 矩阵李群中，开发的基于 DOB 的 RI-EKF 提供了不同地形上的实时速度和滑移速度估计。使用哈士奇轮式机器人的实验结果证实了所提出的方法在估计可观测状态变量方面的数学推导和有效性。开源软件可供下载并重现所呈现的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不变卡尔曼滤波和扰动观测器的全自感滑移速度感知移动机器人状态估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在复杂地形下难以准确估计机器人滑移速度，影响运动控制精度，需开发更鲁棒的实时估计方案。
AI.method: 结合不变观测器理论与扰动观测器，将滑移速度嵌入SE3(3)李群，通过右不变扩展卡尔曼滤波融合IMU与机体速度数据。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在Husky轮式机器人上的有效性，实现不同地形下的实时速度与滑移速度估计，开源代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过李群框架与DOB结合，提升了复杂环境下移动机器人的状态估计精度与实时性，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Fully Proprioceptive Slip-Velocity-Aware State Estimation for Mobile Robots via Invariant Kalman Filtering and Disturbance Observer 通过不变卡尔曼滤波和干扰观测器对移动机器人进行完全本体感受滑移速度感知状态估计 This paper develops a novel slip estimator using the invariant observer design theory and Disturbance Observer (DOB). The proposed state estimator for mobile robots is fully proprioceptive and combines data from an inertial measurement unit and body velocity within a Right Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (RI-EKF). By embedding the slip velocity into $\mathrm{SE}_3(3)$ matrix Lie group, the developed DOB-based RI-EKF provides real-time velocity and slip velocity estimates on different terrains. Experimental results using a Husky wheeled robot confirm the mathematical derivations and effectiveness of the proposed method in estimating the observable state variables. Open-source software is available for download and reproducing the presented results. 本文利用不变观测器设计理论和干扰观测器（DOB）开发了一种新型滑移估计器。所提出的移动机器人状态估计器是完全本体感觉的，并将来自惯性测量单元的数据和右不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（RI-EKF）内的车身速度相结合。通过将滑移速度嵌入到 $\mathrm{SE}_3(3)$ 矩阵李群中，开发的基于 DOB 的 RI-EKF 提供了不同地形上的实时速度和滑移速度估计。使用哈士奇轮式机器人的实验结果证实了所提出的方法在估计可观测状态变量方面的数学推导和有效性。开源软件可供下载并重现所呈现的结果。 本文提出一种基于不变卡尔曼滤波和扰动观测器的全自感滑移速度感知移动机器人状态估计方法。 Xihang Yu,Sangli Teng,Theodor Chakhachiro,Wenzhe Tong,Tingjun Li,Tzu-Yuan Lin,Sarah Koehler,Manuel Ahumada,Jeffrey M. Walls,Maani Ghaffari cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Gideon Vos,Kelly Trinh,Zoltan Sarnyai,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
title: Generalizable machine learning for stress monitoring from wearable devices: A systematic literature review
title_zh: 用于可穿戴设备压力监测的通用机器学习：系统文献综述
abstract: Introduction. The stress response has both subjective, psychological and objectively measurable, biological components. Both of them can be expressed differently from person to person, complicating the development of a generic stress measurement model. This is further compounded by the lack of large, labeled datasets that can be utilized to build machine learning models for accurately detecting periods and levels of stress. The aim of this review is to provide an overview of the current state of stress detection and monitoring using wearable devices, and where applicable, machine learning techniques utilized. Methods. This study reviewed published works contributing and/or using datasets designed for detecting stress and their associated machine learning methods, with a systematic review and meta-analysis of those that utilized wearable sensor data as stress biomarkers. The electronic databases of Google Scholar, Crossref, DOAJ and PubMed were searched for relevant articles and a total of 24 articles were identified and included in the final analysis. The reviewed works were synthesized into three categories of publicly available stress datasets, machine learning, and future research directions. Results. A wide variety of study-specific test and measurement protocols were noted in the literature. A number of public datasets were identified that are labeled for stress detection. In addition, we discuss that previous works show shortcomings in areas such as their labeling protocols, lack of statistical power, validity of stress biomarkers, and generalization ability. Conclusion. Generalization of existing machine learning models still require further study, and research in this area will continue to provide improvements as newer and more substantial datasets become available for study.

abstract_zh: 介绍。压力反应既有主观的心理成分，也有客观可测量的生物成分。两者的表达方式因人而异，使得通用压力测量模型的开发变得复杂。由于缺乏可用于构建机器学习模型以准确检测压力的时期和水平的大型标记数据集，这进一步加剧了这一问题。本次审查的目的是概述使用可穿戴设备进行压力检测和监测的当前状态，以及在适用的情况下使用的机器学习技术。方法。这项研究回顾了贡献和/或使用旨在检测压力及其相关机器学习方法的数据集的已发表作品，并对利用可穿戴传感器数据作为压力生物标记的那些进行了系统回顾和荟萃分析。检索Google Scholar、Crossref、DOAJ、PubMed电子数据库中相关文章，共识别出24篇文章纳入最终分析。所审查的作品被综合为公开可用的压力数据集、机器学习和未来研究方向三类。结果。文献中提到了各种特定于研究的测试和测量方案。确定了许多标记为压力检测的公共数据集。此外，我们还讨论了以前的工作在标记方案、缺乏统计能力、压力生物标志物的有效性和泛化能力等方面存在的缺陷。结论。现有机器学习模型的推广仍需要进一步研究，随着更新和更丰富的数据集可供研究，该领域的研究将继续提供改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文系统综述了利用可穿戴设备进行压力监测的机器学习方法，并分析了现有研究的不足。
AI.motivation: 压力具有主观和客观差异性，且缺乏大规模标注数据集，导致通用压力检测模型开发困难，需梳理现有研究并指明改进方向。
AI.method: 通过系统性文献回顾和元分析，筛选24篇相关论文，从公开数据集、机器学习方法及未来研究方向三个维度进行分类总结。
AI.result: 发现现有研究存在标注协议不统一、统计效力不足、生物标志物有效性及模型泛化能力差等问题，但部分公开数据集可为后续研究提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 现有机器学习模型的泛化能力需进一步研究，随着更多高质量数据集的出现，该领域将持续优化改进。

title: Low-Dose CT Using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model for 20$\times$ Speedup
title_zh: 使用去噪扩散概率模型的低剂量 CT 可实现 20$\times$ 加速
abstract: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) is an important topic in the field of radiology over the past decades. LDCT reduces ionizing radiation-induced patient health risks but it also results in a low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and a potential compromise in the diagnostic performance. In this paper, to improve the LDCT denoising performance, we introduce the conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) and show encouraging results with a high computational efficiency. Specifically, given the high sampling cost of the original DDPM model, we adapt the fast ordinary differential equation (ODE) solver for a much-improved sampling efficiency. The experiments show that the accelerated DDPM can achieve 20x speedup without compromising image quality.
summary: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) is an important topic in the field of radiology over the past decades. LDCT reduces ionizing radiation-induced patient health risks but it also results in a low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and a potential compromise in the diagnostic performance. In this paper, to improve the LDCT denoising performance, we introduce the conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) and show encouraging results with a high computational efficiency. Specifically, given the high sampling cost of the original DDPM model, we adapt the fast ordinary differential equation (ODE) solver for a much-improved sampling efficiency. The experiments show that the accelerated DDPM can achieve 20x speedup without compromising image quality.
abstract_zh: 低剂量计算机断层扫描（LDCT）是过去几十年来放射学领域的一个重要课题。 LDCT 可降低电离辐射引起的患者健康风险，但也会导致信噪比 (SNR) 较低，并可能影响诊断性能。在本文中，为了提高LDCT去噪性能，我们引入了条件去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），并以高计算效率显示了令人鼓舞的结果。具体来说，考虑到原始 DDPM 模型的采样成本较高，我们采用快速常微分方程 (ODE) 求解器来大大提高采样效率。实验表明，加速的DDPM可以在不影响图像质量的情况下实现20倍的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）的低剂量CT图像重建方法，实现了20倍的加速效果。
AI.motivation: 低剂量CT（LDCT）虽能降低辐射风险，但图像信噪比低且诊断性能可能下降，亟需高效且高质量的图像去噪方法。
AI.method: 采用条件去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），并结合快速常微分方程（ODE）求解器优化采样效率，降低计算成本。
AI.result: 加速后的DDPM在保持图像质量的同时，相较原始模型实现了20倍的计算速度提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化DDPM采样流程，在保证图像诊断质量的前提下显著提升了低剂量CT的重建效率，具有临床应用潜力。

title: Learning an Efficient Terrain Representation for Haptic Localization of a Legged Robot
title_zh: 学习腿式机器人触觉定位的有效地形表示
comment: Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Although haptic sensing has recently been used for legged robot localization in extreme environments where a camera or LiDAR might fail, the problem of efficiently representing the haptic signatures in a learned prior map is still open. This paper introduces an approach to terrain representation for haptic localization inspired by recent trends in machine learning. It combines this approach with the proven Monte Carlo algorithm to obtain an accurate, computation-efficient, and practical method for localizing legged robots under adversarial environmental conditions. We apply the triplet loss concept to learn highly descriptive embeddings in a transformer-based neural network. As the training haptic data are not labeled, the positive and negative examples are discriminated by their geometric locations discovered while training. We demonstrate experimentally that the proposed approach outperforms by a large margin the previous solutions to haptic localization of legged robots concerning the accuracy, inference time, and the amount of data stored in the map. As far as we know, this is the first approach that completely removes the need to use a dense terrain map for accurate haptic localization, thus paving the way to practical applications.
summary: Although haptic sensing has recently been used for legged robot localization in extreme environments where a camera or LiDAR might fail, the problem of efficiently representing the haptic signatures in a learned prior map is still open. This paper introduces an approach to terrain representation for haptic localization inspired by recent trends in machine learning. It combines this approach with the proven Monte Carlo algorithm to obtain an accurate, computation-efficient, and practical method for localizing legged robots under adversarial environmental conditions. We apply the triplet loss concept to learn highly descriptive embeddings in a transformer-based neural network. As the training haptic data are not labeled, the positive and negative examples are discriminated by their geometric locations discovered while training. We demonstrate experimentally that the proposed approach outperforms by a large margin the previous solutions to haptic localization of legged robots concerning the accuracy, inference time, and the amount of data stored in the map. As far as we know, this is the first approach that completely removes the need to use a dense terrain map for accurate haptic localization, thus paving the way to practical applications.
abstract_zh: 尽管触觉传感最近已用于相机或激光雷达可能出现故障的极端环境中的腿式机器人定位，但在学习的先验地图中有效表示触觉签名的问题仍然悬而未决。本文介绍了一种受机器学习最新趋势启发的触觉定位地形表示方法。它将这种方法与经过验证的蒙特卡罗算法相结合，以获得一种准确、计算高效且实用的方法，用于在敌对环境条件下定位腿式机器人。我们应用三重态损失概念来学习基于变压器的神经网络中的高度描述性嵌入。由于训练触觉数据没有标记，因此可以通过训练时发现的几何位置来区分正例和负例。我们通过实验证明，在准确性、推理时间和地图中存储的数据量方面，所提出的方法大大优于以前的腿式机器人触觉定位解决方案。据我们所知，这是第一种完全不需要使用密集地形图来进行精确触觉定位的方法，从而为实际应用铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的触觉地形表示方法，用于足式机器人在极端环境下的定位，无需依赖传统密集地形图。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉定位方法在极端环境下依赖摄像头或LiDAR可能失效，而高效表示触觉特征的学习先验地图仍存在技术挑战。
AI.method: 结合Transformer神经网络与三元组损失学习地形嵌入，利用几何位置区分正负样本，并整合蒙特卡洛算法实现高效定位。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定位精度、推理速度及地图存储效率上显著优于现有方案，且首次实现无需密集地形图的触觉定位。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为足式机器人在复杂环境中的实用化触觉定位提供了高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: Learning an Efficient Terrain Representation for Haptic Localization of a Legged Robot 学习腿式机器人触觉定位的有效地形表示 Although haptic sensing has recently been used for legged robot localization in extreme environments where a camera or LiDAR might fail, the problem of efficiently representing the haptic signatures in a learned prior map is still open. This paper introduces an approach to terrain representation for haptic localization inspired by recent trends in machine learning. It combines this approach with the proven Monte Carlo algorithm to obtain an accurate, computation-efficient, and practical method for localizing legged robots under adversarial environmental conditions. We apply the triplet loss concept to learn highly descriptive embeddings in a transformer-based neural network. As the training haptic data are not labeled, the positive and negative examples are discriminated by their geometric locations discovered while training. We demonstrate experimentally that the proposed approach outperforms by a large margin the previous solutions to haptic localization of legged robots concerning the accuracy, inference time, and the amount of data stored in the map. As far as we know, this is the first approach that completely removes the need to use a dense terrain map for accurate haptic localization, thus paving the way to practical applications. 尽管触觉传感最近已用于相机或激光雷达可能出现故障的极端环境中的腿式机器人定位，但在学习的先验地图中有效表示触觉签名的问题仍然悬而未决。本文介绍了一种受机器学习最新趋势启发的触觉定位地形表示方法。它将这种方法与经过验证的蒙特卡罗算法相结合，以获得一种准确、计算高效且实用的方法，用于在敌对环境条件下定位腿式机器人。我们应用三重态损失概念来学习基于变压器的神经网络中的高度描述性嵌入。由于训练触觉数据没有标记，因此可以通过训练时发现的几何位置来区分正例和负例。我们通过实验证明，在准确性、推理时间和地图中存储的数据量方面，所提出的方法大大优于以前的腿式机器人触觉定位解决方案。据我们所知，这是第一种完全不需要使用密集地形图来进行精确触觉定位的方法，从而为实际应用铺平了道路。 本文提出一种高效的触觉地形表示方法，用于足式机器人在极端环境下的定位，无需依赖传统密集地形图。 Damian Sójka,Michał R. Nowicki,Piotr Skrzypczyński cs.RO

title: Modeling driver's evasive behavior during safety-critical lane changes:Two-dimensional time-to-collision and deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: 在安全关键的变道过程中对驾驶员的规避行为进行建模：二维碰撞时间和深度强化学习
abstract: Lane changes are complex driving behaviors and frequently involve safety-critical situations. This study aims to develop a lane-change-related evasive behavior model, which can facilitate the development of safety-aware traffic simulations and predictive collision avoidance systems. Large-scale connected vehicle data from the Safety Pilot Model Deployment (SPMD) program were used for this study. A new surrogate safety measure, two-dimensional time-to-collision (2D-TTC), was proposed to identify the safety-critical situations during lane changes. The validity of 2D-TTC was confirmed by showing a high correlation between the detected conflict risks and the archived crashes. A deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm, which could learn the sequential decision-making process over continuous action spaces, was used to model the evasive behaviors in the identified safety-critical situations. The results showed the superiority of the proposed model in replicating both the longitudinal and lateral evasive behaviors.
summary: Lane changes are complex driving behaviors and frequently involve safety-critical situations. This study aims to develop a lane-change-related evasive behavior model, which can facilitate the development of safety-aware traffic simulations and predictive collision avoidance systems. Large-scale connected vehicle data from the Safety Pilot Model Deployment (SPMD) program were used for this study. A new surrogate safety measure, two-dimensional time-to-collision (2D-TTC), was proposed to identify the safety-critical situations during lane changes. The validity of 2D-TTC was confirmed by showing a high correlation between the detected conflict risks and the archived crashes. A deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) algorithm, which could learn the sequential decision-making process over continuous action spaces, was used to model the evasive behaviors in the identified safety-critical situations. The results showed the superiority of the proposed model in replicating both the longitudinal and lateral evasive behaviors.
abstract_zh: 变道是复杂的驾驶行为，并且经常涉及安全关键情况。本研究旨在开发一种与变道相关的规避行为模型，该模型可以促进安全意识交通模拟和预测防撞系统的开发。本研究使用了安全试点模型部署 (SPMD) 计划的大规模联网车辆数据。提出了一种新的替代安全措施，即二维碰撞时间（2D-TTC），以识别变道期间的安全关键情况。通过显示检测到的冲突风险与存档的崩溃之间的高度相关性，证实了 2D-TTC 的有效性。深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法可以学习连续行动空间上的顺序决策过程，用于对已识别的安全关键情况下的规避行为进行建模。结果表明，所提出的模型在复制纵向和横向规避行为方面具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过二维时间到碰撞（2D-TTC）指标和深度强化学习方法，建模驾驶员在安全关键性变道中的规避行为，以提升交通仿真和碰撞预警系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 变道行为复杂且常伴随安全风险，现有模型难以准确捕捉驾驶员规避行为，需开发更精准的模型以支持安全交通仿真和预测性防撞系统。
AI.method: 基于大规模联网车辆数据，提出2D-TTC指标识别安全关键场景，并采用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法建模连续动作空间中的规避决策过程。
AI.result: 模型在纵向和横向规避行为的复现上表现优于现有方法，且2D-TTC与实际碰撞数据具有高度相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效捕捉了安全关键变道中的规避行为特征，可为智能交通系统提供更可靠的仿真与预警支持。
