title: Dynamic Inference on Graphs using Structured Transition Models
title_zh: 使用结构化转换模型对图进行动态推理
abstract: Enabling robots to perform complex dynamic tasks such as picking up an object in one sweeping motion or pushing off a wall to quickly turn a corner is a challenging problem. The dynamic interactions implicit in these tasks are critical towards the successful execution of such tasks. Graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a principled way of learning the dynamics of interactive systems but can suffer from scaling issues as the number of interactions increases. Furthermore, the problem of using learned GNN-based models for optimal control is insufficiently explored. In this work, we present a method for efficiently learning the dynamics of interacting systems by simultaneously learning a dynamic graph structure and a stable and locally linear forward model of the system. The dynamic graph structure encodes evolving contact modes along a trajectory by making probabilistic predictions over the edges of the graph. Additionally, we introduce a temporal dependence in the learned graph structure which allows us to incorporate contact measurement updates during execution thus enabling more accurate forward predictions. The learned stable and locally linear dynamics enable the use of optimal control algorithms such as iLQR for long-horizon planning and control for complex interactive tasks. Through experiments in simulation and in the real world, we evaluate the performance of our method by using the learned interaction dynamics for control and demonstrate generalization to more objects and interactions not seen during training. We introduce a control scheme that takes advantage of contact measurement updates and hence is robust to prediction inaccuracies during execution.
summary: Enabling robots to perform complex dynamic tasks such as picking up an object in one sweeping motion or pushing off a wall to quickly turn a corner is a challenging problem. The dynamic interactions implicit in these tasks are critical towards the successful execution of such tasks. Graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a principled way of learning the dynamics of interactive systems but can suffer from scaling issues as the number of interactions increases. Furthermore, the problem of using learned GNN-based models for optimal control is insufficiently explored. In this work, we present a method for efficiently learning the dynamics of interacting systems by simultaneously learning a dynamic graph structure and a stable and locally linear forward model of the system. The dynamic graph structure encodes evolving contact modes along a trajectory by making probabilistic predictions over the edges of the graph. Additionally, we introduce a temporal dependence in the learned graph structure which allows us to incorporate contact measurement updates during execution thus enabling more accurate forward predictions. The learned stable and locally linear dynamics enable the use of optimal control algorithms such as iLQR for long-horizon planning and control for complex interactive tasks. Through experiments in simulation and in the real world, we evaluate the performance of our method by using the learned interaction dynamics for control and demonstrate generalization to more objects and interactions not seen during training. We introduce a control scheme that takes advantage of contact measurement updates and hence is robust to prediction inaccuracies during execution.
abstract_zh: 让机器人能够执行复杂的动态任务，例如以扫过的动作拾起物体或推开墙壁快速转弯，是一个具有挑战性的问题。这些任务中隐含的动态交互对于成功执行此类任务至关重要。图神经网络（GNN）提供了一种学习交互系统动态的原则性方法，但随着交互数量的增加，可能会遇到扩展问题。此外，使用基于学习的 GNN 模型进行最优控制的问题尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过同时学习系统的动态图结构和稳定且局部线性的前向模型来有效学习交互系统动力学的方法。动态图结构通过对图的边缘进行概率预测来编码沿轨迹演变的接触模式。此外，我们在学习的图结构中引入了时间依赖性，这使我们能够在执行期间合并接触测量更新，从而实现更准确的前向预测。学习到的稳定和局部线性动力学使得能够使用 iLQR 等最优控制算法来进行复杂交互任务的长期规划和控制。通过模拟和现实世界中的实验，我们通过使用学习到的交互动力学进行控制来评估我们方法的性能，并演示对训练期间未见过的更多对象和交互的泛化。我们引入了一种控制方案，该方案利用接触测量更新，因此对执行期间的预测不准确具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，通过同时学习动态图结构和稳定局部线性动力学模型，以提高机器人复杂交互任务的控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在处理复杂动态交互时存在扩展性问题，且基于GNN的最优控制研究不足，需更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 联合学习动态图结构（通过概率预测边编码接触模式）与局部线性动力学模型，引入时间依赖性以融合执行中的接触测量更新，并应用iLQR等算法实现长期规划。
AI.result: 仿真与实物实验验证了方法有效性，展示了对未训练物体和交互的泛化能力，控制方案对预测误差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态交互任务的建模与控制难题，为复杂机器人操作提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: Dynamic Inference on Graphs using Structured Transition Models 使用结构化转换模型对图进行动态推理 Enabling robots to perform complex dynamic tasks such as picking up an object in one sweeping motion or pushing off a wall to quickly turn a corner is a challenging problem. The dynamic interactions implicit in these tasks are critical towards the successful execution of such tasks. Graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a principled way of learning the dynamics of interactive systems but can suffer from scaling issues as the number of interactions increases. Furthermore, the problem of using learned GNN-based models for optimal control is insufficiently explored. In this work, we present a method for efficiently learning the dynamics of interacting systems by simultaneously learning a dynamic graph structure and a stable and locally linear forward model of the system. The dynamic graph structure encodes evolving contact modes along a trajectory by making probabilistic predictions over the edges of the graph. Additionally, we introduce a temporal dependence in the learned graph structure which allows us to incorporate contact measurement updates during execution thus enabling more accurate forward predictions. The learned stable and locally linear dynamics enable the use of optimal control algorithms such as iLQR for long-horizon planning and control for complex interactive tasks. Through experiments in simulation and in the real world, we evaluate the performance of our method by using the learned interaction dynamics for control and demonstrate generalization to more objects and interactions not seen during training. We introduce a control scheme that takes advantage of contact measurement updates and hence is robust to prediction inaccuracies during execution. 让机器人能够执行复杂的动态任务，例如以扫过的动作拾起物体或推开墙壁快速转弯，是一个具有挑战性的问题。这些任务中隐含的动态交互对于成功执行此类任务至关重要。图神经网络（GNN）提供了一种学习交互系统动态的原则性方法，但随着交互数量的增加，可能会遇到扩展问题。此外，使用基于学习的 GNN 模型进行最优控制的问题尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过同时学习系统的动态图结构和稳定且局部线性的前向模型来有效学习交互系统动力学的方法。动态图结构通过对图的边缘进行概率预测来编码沿轨迹演变的接触模式。此外，我们在学习的图结构中引入了时间依赖性，这使我们能够在执行期间合并接触测量更新，从而实现更准确的前向预测。学习到的稳定和局部线性动力学使得能够使用 iLQR 等最优控制算法来进行复杂交互任务的长期规划和控制。通过模拟和现实世界中的实验，我们通过使用学习到的交互动力学进行控制来评估我们方法的性能，并演示对训练期间未见过的更多对象和交互的泛化。我们引入了一种控制方案，该方案利用接触测量更新，因此对执行期间的预测不准确具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种方法，通过同时学习动态图结构和稳定局部线性动力学模型，以提高机器人复杂交互任务的控制能力。 Saumya Saxena,Oliver Kroemer cs.RO

authors_text: Youssef Nashed,Ariana Peck,Julien Martel,Axel Levy,Bongjin Koo,Gordon Wetzstein,Nina Miolane,Daniel Ratner,Frédéric Poitevin
title: Heterogeneous reconstruction of deformable atomic models in Cryo-EM
title_zh: 冷冻电镜中可变形原子模型的异质重建
abstract: Cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM) provides a unique opportunity to study the structural heterogeneity of biomolecules. Being able to explain this heterogeneity with atomic models would help our understanding of their functional mechanisms but the size and ruggedness of the structural space (the space of atomic 3D cartesian coordinates) presents an immense challenge. Here, we describe a heterogeneous reconstruction method based on an atomistic representation whose deformation is reduced to a handful of collective motions through normal mode analysis. Our implementation uses an autoencoder. The encoder jointly estimates the amplitude of motion along the normal modes and the 2D shift between the center of the image and the center of the molecule . The physics-based decoder aggregates a representation of the heterogeneity readily interpretable at the atomic level. We illustrate our method on 3 synthetic datasets corresponding to different distributions along a simulated trajectory of adenylate kinase transitioning from its open to its closed structures. We show for each distribution that our approach is able to recapitulate the intermediate atomic models with atomic-level accuracy.
summary: Cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM) provides a unique opportunity to study the structural heterogeneity of biomolecules. Being able to explain this heterogeneity with atomic models would help our understanding of their functional mechanisms but the size and ruggedness of the structural space (the space of atomic 3D cartesian coordinates) presents an immense challenge. Here, we describe a heterogeneous reconstruction method based on an atomistic representation whose deformation is reduced to a handful of collective motions through normal mode analysis. Our implementation uses an autoencoder. The encoder jointly estimates the amplitude of motion along the normal modes and the 2D shift between the center of the image and the center of the molecule . The physics-based decoder aggregates a representation of the heterogeneity readily interpretable at the atomic level. We illustrate our method on 3 synthetic datasets corresponding to different distributions along a simulated trajectory of adenylate kinase transitioning from its open to its closed structures. We show for each distribution that our approach is able to recapitulate the intermediate atomic models with atomic-level accuracy.
abstract_zh: 低温电子显微镜（cryo-EM）为研究生物分子的结构异质性提供了独特的机会。能够用原子模型解释这种异质性将有助于我们理解它们的功能机制，但结构空间（原子 3D 笛卡尔坐标空间）的大小和坚固性提出了巨大的挑战。在这里，我们描述了一种基于原子表示的异构重建方法，其变形通过正常模式分析减少为少数集体运动。我们的实现使用自动编码器。编码器联合估计沿正常模式的运动幅度以及图像中心和分子中心之间的二维偏移。基于物理的解码器聚合了在原子水平上易于解释的异质性表示。我们在 3 个合成数据集上说明了我们的方法，这些数据集对应于沿着腺苷酸激酶从开放结构过渡到封闭结构的模拟轨迹的不同分布。我们针对每个分布表明，我们的方法能够以原子级的精度概括中间原子模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于原子表示的冷冻电镜异质性重建方法，通过正常模式分析和自编码器实现可变形原子模型的重构。
AI.motivation: 冷冻电镜可研究生物分子结构异质性，但原子模型解释面临结构空间庞大且复杂带来的挑战，需开发有效方法解析异质性。
AI.method: 采用原子级表示结合正常模式分析，将变形简化为集体运动；使用自编码器，编码器联合估计正常模式运动幅度和图像位移，物理解码器生成可解释的原子级异质性表示。
AI.result: 在三个合成数据集验证中，方法能准确重建腺苷酸激酶从开放到闭合结构转变过程中的中间原子模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了冷冻电镜下异质性原子模型的重建，为解析生物分子功能机制提供了新工具。

title: Quantifying Harm
title_zh: 量化危害
abstract: In earlier work we defined a qualitative notion of harm: either harm is caused, or it is not. For practical applications, we often need to quantify harm; for example, we may want to choose the least harmful of a set of possible interventions. In this work, which is an expanded version of an earlier conference paper, we develop a quantitative notion of harm. We first present a quantitative definition of harm in a deterministic context involving a single individual, then we consider the issues involved in dealing with uncertainty regarding the context and going from a notion of harm for a single individual to a notion of "societal harm", which involves aggregating the harm to individuals. We show that the "obvious" way of doing this (just taking the expected harm for an individual and then summing the expected harm over all individuals) can lead to counterintuitive or inappropriate answers, and discuss alternatives, drawing on work from the decision-theory literature. Finally, we connect our work to a recent debate over harm within the context of precision medicine.
summary: In earlier work we defined a qualitative notion of harm: either harm is caused, or it is not. For practical applications, we often need to quantify harm; for example, we may want to choose the least harmful of a set of possible interventions. In this work, which is an expanded version of an earlier conference paper, we develop a quantitative notion of harm. We first present a quantitative definition of harm in a deterministic context involving a single individual, then we consider the issues involved in dealing with uncertainty regarding the context and going from a notion of harm for a single individual to a notion of "societal harm", which involves aggregating the harm to individuals. We show that the "obvious" way of doing this (just taking the expected harm for an individual and then summing the expected harm over all individuals) can lead to counterintuitive or inappropriate answers, and discuss alternatives, drawing on work from the decision-theory literature. Finally, we connect our work to a recent debate over harm within the context of precision medicine.
abstract_zh: 在早期的工作中，我们定义了伤害的定性概念：要么造成伤害，要么不造成伤害。在实际应用中，我们常常需要量化危害；例如，我们可能想选择一组可能的干预措施中危害最小的一个。这项工作是早期会议论文的扩展版本，在这项工作中，我们提出了伤害的定量概念。我们首先在涉及单个个体的确定性背景下提出伤害的定量定义，然后我们考虑处理背景不确定性所涉及的问题，并从单个个体的伤害概念转变为“社会伤害”的概念，其中涉及汇总对个人的伤害。我们证明，这样做的“明显”方式（仅考虑对个人的预期伤害，然后对所有个人的预期伤害进行求和）可能会导致违反直觉或不适当的答案，并借鉴决策理论文献中的工作讨论替代方案。最后，我们将我们的工作与最近关于精准医学背景下的危害的争论联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量化伤害的框架，解决从个体伤害到社会伤害的聚合问题，并探讨了在不确定性下的合理计算方法。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中需要量化伤害以选择最优干预措施，但传统简单加总个体预期伤害的方法可能产生不合理结果，需更严谨的量化方法。
AI.method: 首先定义确定性环境下的个体伤害，再引入不确定性处理及社会伤害聚合方法，结合决策理论分析替代方案。
AI.result: 指出简单预期伤害加总存在缺陷，提出基于决策理论的改进方法，并连接至精准医学中的伤害评估争议。
AI.conclusion: 量化伤害需考虑不确定性与聚合方式，传统方法不足，新框架为精准医学中的伤害评估提供理论支持。

We first present a quantitative definition of harm in a deterministic context involving a single individual, then we consider the issues involved in dealing with uncertainty regarding the context and going from a notion of harm for a single individual to a notion of "societal harm", which involves aggregating the harm to individuals. Finally, we connect our work to a recent debate over harm within the context of precision medicine. 在早期的工作中，我们定义了伤害的定性概念：要么造成伤害，要么不造成伤害。在实际应用中，我们常常需要量化危害；例如，我们可能想选择一组可能的干预措施中危害最小的一个。这项工作是早期会议论文的扩展版本，在这项工作中，我们提出了伤害的定量概念。我们首先在涉及单个个体的确定性背景下提出伤害的定量定义，然后我们考虑处理背景不确定性所涉及的问题，并从单个个体的伤害概念转变为“社会伤害”的概念，其中涉及汇总对个人的伤害。我们证明，这样做的“明显”方式（仅考虑对个人的预期伤害，然后对所有个人的预期伤害进行求和）可能会导致违反直觉或不适当的答案，并借鉴决策理论文献中的工作讨论替代方案。最后，我们将我们的工作与最近关于精准医学背景下的危害的争论联系起来。 本文提出了一种量化伤害的框架，解决从个体伤害到社会伤害的聚合问题，并探讨了在不确定性下的合理计算方法。 Sander Beckers,Hana Chockler,Joseph Y. Halpern cs.AI

title: How to tackle an emerging topic? Combining strong and weak labels for Covid news NER
title_zh: 如何应对一个新兴话题？结合 Covid 新闻的强标签和弱标签 NER
abstract: Being able to train Named Entity Recognition (NER) models for emerging topics is crucial for many real-world applications especially in the medical domain where new topics are continuously evolving out of the scope of existing models and datasets. For a realistic evaluation setup, we introduce a novel COVID-19 news NER dataset (COVIDNEWS-NER) and release 3000 entries of hand annotated strongly labelled sentences and 13000 auto-generated weakly labelled sentences. Besides the dataset, we propose CONTROSTER, a recipe to strategically combine weak and strong labels in improving NER in an emerging topic through transfer learning. We show the effectiveness of CONTROSTER on COVIDNEWS-NER while providing analysis on combining weak and strong labels for training. Our key findings are: (1) Using weak data to formulate an initial backbone before tuning on strong data outperforms methods trained on only strong or weak data. (2) A combination of out-of-domain and in-domain weak label training is crucial and can overcome saturation when being training on weak labels from a single source.
summary: Being able to train Named Entity Recognition (NER) models for emerging topics is crucial for many real-world applications especially in the medical domain where new topics are continuously evolving out of the scope of existing models and datasets. For a realistic evaluation setup, we introduce a novel COVID-19 news NER dataset (COVIDNEWS-NER) and release 3000 entries of hand annotated strongly labelled sentences and 13000 auto-generated weakly labelled sentences. Besides the dataset, we propose CONTROSTER, a recipe to strategically combine weak and strong labels in improving NER in an emerging topic through transfer learning. We show the effectiveness of CONTROSTER on COVIDNEWS-NER while providing analysis on combining weak and strong labels for training. Our key findings are: (1) Using weak data to formulate an initial backbone before tuning on strong data outperforms methods trained on only strong or weak data. (2) A combination of out-of-domain and in-domain weak label training is crucial and can overcome saturation when being training on weak labels from a single source.
abstract_zh: 能够针对新兴主题训练命名实体识别（NER）模型对于许多现实世界的应用程序至关重要，尤其是在医学领域，因为新主题不断发展超出现有模型和数据集的范围。为了实现现实的评估设置，我们引入了一个新颖的 COVID-19 新闻 NER 数据集 (COVIDNEWS-NER)，并发布了 3000 个手动注释的强标记句子条目和 13000 个自动生成的弱标记句子。除了数据集之外，我们还提出了 CONTROSTER，这是一种策略性地结合弱标签和强标签的方法，通过迁移学习改进新兴主题中的 NER。我们展示了 CONTROSTER 在 COVIDNEWS-NER 上的有效性，同时提供了结合弱标签和强标签进行训练的分析。我们的主要发现是：（1）在调整强数据之前使用弱数据制定初始主干优于仅在强数据或弱数据上训练的方法。 (2) 域外和域内弱标签训练的结合至关重要，并且可以在对单一来源的弱标签进行训练时克服饱和度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合强标注和弱标注数据的方法CONTROSTER，用于改进新兴主题（如新冠疫情）的命名实体识别（NER）模型。
AI.motivation: 现有NER模型难以适应快速演变的新兴领域（如医疗领域新冠疫情），需利用有限的强标注数据与大量弱标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 构建包含3000条强标注和13000条弱标注的COVIDNEWS-NER数据集，提出CONTROSTER框架：先用弱标注数据预训练模型，再通过强标注数据微调，并结合领域内外弱标注数据避免过拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明，先弱后强的训练策略优于单一数据源；结合跨领域弱标注数据可有效提升模型性能，解决弱标注数据饱和问题。
AI.conclusion: 融合强弱标注数据（尤其跨领域弱标注）能显著提升新兴主题NER效果，CONTROSTER方法为动态领域模型训练提供有效解决方案。

title: OAK4XAI: Model towards Out-Of-Box eXplainable Artificial Intelligence for Digital Agriculture
title_zh: OAK4XAI：数字农业开箱即用的可解释人工智能模型
comment: AI-2022 Forty-second SGAI International Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: AI-2022 Forty-second SGAI International Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Recent machine learning approaches have been effective in Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications. They produce robust results with a high level of accuracy. However, most of these techniques do not provide human-understandable explanations for supporting their results and decisions. They usually act as black boxes, and it is not easy to understand how decisions have been made. Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), which has received much interest recently, tries to provide human-understandable explanations for decision-making and trained AI models. For instance, in digital agriculture, related domains often present peculiar or input features with no link to background knowledge. The application of the data mining process on agricultural data leads to results (knowledge), which are difficult to explain. In this paper, we propose a knowledge map model and an ontology design as an XAI framework (OAK4XAI) to deal with this issue. The framework does not only consider the data analysis part of the process, but it takes into account the semantics aspect of the domain knowledge via an ontology and a knowledge map model, provided as modules of the framework. Many ongoing XAI studies aim to provide accurate and verbalizable accounts for how given feature values contribute to model decisions. The proposed approach, however, focuses on providing consistent information and definitions of concepts, algorithms, and values involved in the data mining models. We built an Agriculture Computing Ontology (AgriComO) to explain the knowledge mined in agriculture. AgriComO has a well-designed structure and includes a wide range of concepts and transformations suitable for agriculture and computing domains.
summary: Recent machine learning approaches have been effective in Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications. They produce robust results with a high level of accuracy. However, most of these techniques do not provide human-understandable explanations for supporting their results and decisions. They usually act as black boxes, and it is not easy to understand how decisions have been made. Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), which has received much interest recently, tries to provide human-understandable explanations for decision-making and trained AI models. For instance, in digital agriculture, related domains often present peculiar or input features with no link to background knowledge. The application of the data mining process on agricultural data leads to results (knowledge), which are difficult to explain. In this paper, we propose a knowledge map model and an ontology design as an XAI framework (OAK4XAI) to deal with this issue. The framework does not only consider the data analysis part of the process, but it takes into account the semantics aspect of the domain knowledge via an ontology and a knowledge map model, provided as modules of the framework. Many ongoing XAI studies aim to provide accurate and verbalizable accounts for how given feature values contribute to model decisions. The proposed approach, however, focuses on providing consistent information and definitions of concepts, algorithms, and values involved in the data mining models. We built an Agriculture Computing Ontology (AgriComO) to explain the knowledge mined in agriculture. AgriComO has a well-designed structure and includes a wide range of concepts and transformations suitable for agriculture and computing domains.
abstract_zh: 最近的机器学习方法在人工智能（AI）应用中非常有效。它们可以产生高精度的可靠结果。然而，这些技术中的大多数并没有提供人类可以理解的解释来支持其结果和决策。它们通常充当黑匣子，很难理解决策是如何做出的。最近引起广泛关注的可解释人工智能（XAI）试图为决策和训练的人工智能模型提供人类可理解的解释。例如，在数字农业中，相关领域通常呈现与背景知识无关的特殊或输入特征。将数据挖掘过程应用于农业数据会产生难以解释的结果（知识）。在本文中，我们提出了知识图模型和本体设计作为 XAI 框架（OAK4XAI）来解决这个问题。该框架不仅考虑了过程的数据分析部分，而且还通过作为框架模块提供的本体和知识图模型考虑了领域知识的语义方面。许多正在进行的 XAI 研究旨在为给定的特征值如何影响模型决策提供准确且可描述的说明。然而，所提出的方法侧重于提供数据挖掘模型中涉及的概念、算法和值的一致信息和定义。我们建立了农业计算本体（AgriComO）来解释农业中挖掘的知识。 AgriComO 具有精心设计的结构，包括适合农业和计算领域的广泛概念和转换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OAK4XAI框架，通过知识地图模型和本体设计解决数字农业中机器学习模型可解释性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在农业等领域的应用存在黑箱问题，数据挖掘结果难以用人类可理解的方式解释，需构建具备领域语义的可解释AI框架。
AI.method: 设计知识地图模型与农业计算本体（AgriComO），将领域知识语义整合至XAI框架，通过本体定义概念、算法及值的关联关系。
AI.result: 构建了涵盖农业与计算领域的AgriComO本体，实现数据挖掘知识的结构化解释，提升模型决策的可理解性。
AI.conclusion: OAK4XAI通过本体驱动的语义建模，为农业领域提供了可复用的XAI解决方案，增强了AI决策过程的透明度与可信度。

title: AICCA: AI-driven Cloud Classification Atlas
title_zh: AICCA：人工智能驱动的云分类图谱
comment: 27 pages, 11 figures, MDPI Remote Sensing Special Issue "AI for Marine, Ocean and Climate Change Monitoring"
comments: 27 pages, 11 figures, MDPI Remote Sensing Special Issue "AI for Marine, Ocean and Climate Change Monitoring"
abstract: Clouds play an important role in the Earth's energy budget and their behavior is one of the largest uncertainties in future climate projections. Satellite observations should help in understanding cloud responses, but decades and petabytes of multispectral cloud imagery have to date received only limited use. This study reduces the dimensionality of satellite cloud observations by grouping them via a novel automated, unsupervised cloud classification technique by using a convolutional neural network. Our technique combines a rotation-invariant autoencoder with hierarchical agglomerative clustering to generate cloud clusters that capture meaningful distinctions among cloud textures, using only raw multispectral imagery as input. Thus, cloud classes are defined without reliance on location, time/season, derived physical properties, or pre-designated class definitions. We use this approach to generate a unique new cloud dataset, the AI-driven cloud classification atlas (AICCA), which clusters 22 years of ocean images from the Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer (MODIS) on NASA's Aqua and Terra instruments - 800 TB of data or 198 million patches roughly 100 km x 100 km (128 x 128 pixels) - into 42 AI-generated cloud classes. We show that AICCA classes involve meaningful distinctions that employ spatial information and result in distinct geographic distributions, capturing, for example, stratocumulus decks along the West coasts of North and South America. AICCA delivers the information in multi-spectral images in a compact form, enables data-driven diagnosis of patterns of cloud organization, provides insight into cloud evolution on timescales of hours to decades, and helps democratize climate research by facilitating access to core data.

abstract_zh: 云在地球的能源预算中发挥着重要作用，其行为是未来气候预测中最大的不确定性之一。卫星观测应该有助于了解云的响应，但数十年和 PB 的多光谱云图像迄今为止仅得到有限的使用。这项研究通过使用卷积神经网络，通过一种新颖的自动化、无监督的云分类技术对卫星云观测进行分组，从而降低了卫星云观测的维度。我们的技术将旋转不变自动编码器与分层凝聚聚类相结合，生成云簇，仅使用原始多光谱图像作为输入，捕获云纹理之间有意义的区别。因此，云类别的定义不依赖于位置、时间/季节、导出的物理属性或预先指定的类别定义。我们使用这种方法生成一个独特的新云数据集，即人工智能驱动的云分类图集 (AICCA)，它将来自 NASA 的 Aqua 和 Terra 仪器上的中分辨率成像光谱辐射计 (MODIS) 的 22 年海洋图像（800 TB 数据或大约 100 km x 100 km（128 x 128 像素）的 1.98 亿个补丁）聚集成 42 个 AI 生成的云类。我们表明，AICCA 类别涉及有意义的区别，这些区别利用空间信息并产生不同的地理分布，例如捕获北美和南美西海岸沿线的层积云甲板。 AICCA 以紧凑的形式提供多光谱图像信息，实现对云组织模式的数据驱动诊断，提供对数小时到数十年时间尺度上的云演化的洞察，并通过促进对核心数据的访问来帮助实现气候研究的民主化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工智能的云分类方法，利用卫星多光谱云图像生成AI驱动的云分类图集（AICCA），以提升气候研究中的云数据分析能力。
AI.motivation: 云对地球能量平衡至关重要，但现有卫星云数据因体量庞大且未充分挖掘，导致气候预测中云行为的不确定性较高，亟需自动化分类方法。
AI.method: 结合旋转不变自编码器与层次聚类算法，仅依赖原始多光谱影像输入，通过卷积神经网络实现无监督云纹理聚类，生成无需预设类别的42类云集群。
AI.result: 基于22年MODIS海洋影像数据（800TB），生成包含地理分布特征的AICCA数据集，如南北美西海岸层积云带，支持跨小时至十年尺度的云演化分析。
AI.conclusion: AICCA通过数据驱动方式揭示云组织模式，为气候研究提供紧凑型多光谱信息，促进核心数据的可及性与气候模型改进。

title: Open-source tool for Airway Segmentation in Computed Tomography using 2.5D Modified EfficientDet: Contribution to the ATM22 Challenge
title_zh: 使用 2.5D Modified EfficientDet 在计算机断层扫描中进行气道分割的开源工具：对 ATM22 挑战赛的贡献
comment: Open source code, graphical user interface, and a pip package for predictions with our model and trained weights are in https://github.com/MICLab-Unicamp/medseg
comments: Open source code, graphical user interface, and a pip package for predictions with our model and trained weights are in https://github.com/MICLab-Unicamp/medseg
abstract: Airway segmentation in computed tomography images can be used to analyze pulmonary diseases, however, manual segmentation is labor intensive and relies on expert knowledge. This manuscript details our contribution to MICCAI's 2022 Airway Tree Modelling challenge, a competition of fully automated methods for airway segmentation. We employed a previously developed deep learning architecture based on a modified EfficientDet (MEDSeg), training from scratch for binary airway segmentation using the provided annotations. Our method achieved 90.72 Dice in internal validation, 95.52 Dice on external validation, and 93.49 Dice in the final test phase, while not being specifically designed or tuned for airway segmentation. Open source code and a pip package for predictions with our model and trained weights are in https://github.com/MICLab-Unicamp/medseg.
summary: Airway segmentation in computed tomography images can be used to analyze pulmonary diseases, however, manual segmentation is labor intensive and relies on expert knowledge. This manuscript details our contribution to MICCAI's 2022 Airway Tree Modelling challenge, a competition of fully automated methods for airway segmentation. We employed a previously developed deep learning architecture based on a modified EfficientDet (MEDSeg), training from scratch for binary airway segmentation using the provided annotations. Our method achieved 90.72 Dice in internal validation, 95.52 Dice on external validation, and 93.49 Dice in the final test phase, while not being specifically designed or tuned for airway segmentation. Open source code and a pip package for predictions with our model and trained weights are in https://github.com/MICLab-Unicamp/medseg.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描图像中的气道分割可用于分析肺部疾病，然而，手动分割是劳动密集型的，并且依赖于专家知识。本手稿详细介绍了我们对 MICCAI 2022 年气道树建模挑战赛的贡献，该挑战赛是一项全自动气道分割方法竞赛。我们采用了之前开发的基于改进的 EfficientDet (MEDSeg) 的深度学习架构，使用提供的注释从头开始训练二元气道分割。我们的方法在内部验证中获得了 90.72 Dice，在外部验证中获得了 95.52 Dice，在最终测试阶段获得了 93.49 Dice，但并未针对气道分割进行专门设计或调整。使用我们的模型和训练权重进行预测的开源代码和 pip 包位于 https://github.com/MICLab-Unicamp/medseg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进EfficientDet模型的开源工具，用于计算机断层扫描（CT）图像中的气道分割，并参与了MICCAI 2022气道树建模挑战赛。
AI.motivation: 手动分割CT图像中的气道耗时且依赖专家知识，亟需自动化方法提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用改进的EfficientDet架构（MEDSeg），从零开始训练二值气道分割模型，利用提供的标注数据进行训练和验证。
AI.result: 内部验证Dice系数为90.72，外部验证为95.52，最终测试阶段达到93.49，并开源了代码和预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在未专门优化气道分割的情况下表现优异，为气道分割提供了高效且可复现的开源解决方案。

authors_text: Taylor W. Webb,Shuhao Fu,Trevor Bihl,Keith J. Holyoak,Hongjing Lu
title: Zero-shot visual reasoning through probabilistic analogical mapping
title_zh: 通过概率类比映射进行零样本视觉推理
abstract: Human reasoning is grounded in an ability to identify highly abstract commonalities governing superficially dissimilar visual inputs. Recent efforts to develop algorithms with this capacity have largely focused on approaches that require extensive direct training on visual reasoning tasks, and yield limited generalization to problems with novel content. In contrast, a long tradition of research in cognitive science has focused on elucidating the computational principles underlying human analogical reasoning; however, this work has generally relied on manually constructed representations. Here we present visiPAM (visual Probabilistic Analogical Mapping), a model of visual reasoning that synthesizes these two approaches. VisiPAM employs learned representations derived directly from naturalistic visual inputs, coupled with a similarity-based mapping operation derived from cognitive theories of human reasoning. We show that without any direct training, visiPAM outperforms a state-of-the-art deep learning model on an analogical mapping task. In addition, visiPAM closely matches the pattern of human performance on a novel task involving mapping of 3D objects across disparate categories.
summary: Human reasoning is grounded in an ability to identify highly abstract commonalities governing superficially dissimilar visual inputs. Recent efforts to develop algorithms with this capacity have largely focused on approaches that require extensive direct training on visual reasoning tasks, and yield limited generalization to problems with novel content. In contrast, a long tradition of research in cognitive science has focused on elucidating the computational principles underlying human analogical reasoning; however, this work has generally relied on manually constructed representations. Here we present visiPAM (visual Probabilistic Analogical Mapping), a model of visual reasoning that synthesizes these two approaches. VisiPAM employs learned representations derived directly from naturalistic visual inputs, coupled with a similarity-based mapping operation derived from cognitive theories of human reasoning. We show that without any direct training, visiPAM outperforms a state-of-the-art deep learning model on an analogical mapping task. In addition, visiPAM closely matches the pattern of human performance on a novel task involving mapping of 3D objects across disparate categories.
abstract_zh: 人类推理的基础是识别管理表面上不同的视觉输入的高度抽象的共性的能力。最近开发具有这种能力的算法的努力主要集中在需要对视觉推理任务进行大量直接训练的方法上，并且对具有新颖内容的问题产生有限的泛化能力。相比之下，认知科学研究的悠久传统一直侧重于阐明人类类比推理背后的计算原理。然而，这项工作通常依赖于手动构建的表示。在这里，我们提出了 visiPAM（视觉概率类比映射），这是一种综合了这两种方法的视觉推理模型。 VisiPAM 采用直接源自自然视觉输入的学习表示，以及源自人类推理认知理论的基于相似性的映射操作。我们证明，在没有任何直接训练的情况下，visiPAM 在类比映射任务上的表现优于最先进的深度学习模型。此外，visiPAM 与人类在涉及跨不同类别的 3D 对象映射的新任务中的表现模式非常匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为visiPAM的视觉推理模型，通过概率类比映射实现零样本视觉推理。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉推理算法依赖大量直接训练数据且泛化能力有限，而认知科学中的类比推理理论多依赖人工构建表示，缺乏与自然视觉输入的结合。
AI.method: visiPAM结合从自然视觉输入中学习的表示与基于相似性的映射操作，借鉴人类类比推理的认知理论，无需直接训练即可完成任务。
AI.result: visiPAM在类比映射任务中超越了最先进的深度学习模型，并在跨类别3D物体映射任务中表现出与人类相近的性能。
AI.conclusion: visiPAM通过融合学习表示与认知原理，为零样本视觉推理提供了新方法，同时揭示了人类类比推理机制的计算潜力。

search_text: Zero-shot visual reasoning through probabilistic analogical mapping 通过概率类比映射进行零样本视觉推理 Human reasoning is grounded in an ability to identify highly abstract commonalities governing superficially dissimilar visual inputs. Recent efforts to develop algorithms with this capacity have largely focused on approaches that require extensive direct training on visual reasoning tasks, and yield limited generalization to problems with novel content. In contrast, a long tradition of research in cognitive science has focused on elucidating the computational principles underlying human analogical reasoning; however, this work has generally relied on manually constructed representations. Here we present visiPAM (visual Probabilistic Analogical Mapping), a model of visual reasoning that synthesizes these two approaches. VisiPAM employs learned representations derived directly from naturalistic visual inputs, coupled with a similarity-based mapping operation derived from cognitive theories of human reasoning. We show that without any direct training, visiPAM outperforms a state-of-the-art deep learning model on an analogical mapping task. In addition, visiPAM closely matches the pattern of human performance on a novel task involving mapping of 3D objects across disparate categories. 人类推理的基础是识别管理表面上不同的视觉输入的高度抽象的共性的能力。最近开发具有这种能力的算法的努力主要集中在需要对视觉推理任务进行大量直接训练的方法上，并且对具有新颖内容的问题产生有限的泛化能力。相比之下，认知科学研究的悠久传统一直侧重于阐明人类类比推理背后的计算原理。然而，这项工作通常依赖于手动构建的表示。在这里，我们提出了 visiPAM（视觉概率类比映射），这是一种综合了这两种方法的视觉推理模型。 VisiPAM 采用直接源自自然视觉输入的学习表示，以及源自人类推理认知理论的基于相似性的映射操作。我们证明，在没有任何直接训练的情况下，visiPAM 在类比映射任务上的表现优于最先进的深度学习模型。此外，visiPAM 与人类在涉及跨不同类别的 3D 对象映射的新任务中的表现模式非常匹配。 本文提出了一种名为visiPAM的视觉推理模型，通过概率类比映射实现零样本视觉推理。 Taylor W. authors_text: Insaf Ashrapov,Dmitriy Malakhov,Anton Marchenkov,Anton Lulin,Dani El-Ayyass
title: Automatic satellite building construction monitoring
title_zh: 自动卫星建筑施工监测
abstract: One of the promising applications of satellite images is building construction monitoring. It allows to control the construction progress around the world even in the locations that are hard to reach. One of the main hurdles of this approach is the interpretation of the image data. In this paper, we have employed several novel deep learning techniques to tackle the problem. Various image segmentation and object detection networks were combined into a unified pipeline, which was then used to determine the building construction progress.
summary: One of the promising applications of satellite images is building construction monitoring. It allows to control the construction progress around the world even in the locations that are hard to reach. One of the main hurdles of this approach is the interpretation of the image data. In this paper, we have employed several novel deep learning techniques to tackle the problem. Various image segmentation and object detection networks were combined into a unified pipeline, which was then used to determine the building construction progress.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像最有前景的应用之一是建筑施工监控。即使在难以到达的地点，它也可以控制世界各地的施工进度。这种方法的主要障碍之一是图像数据的解释。在本文中，我们采用了几种新颖的深度学习技术来解决这个问题。各种图像分割和对象检测网络被组合成一个统一的管道，然后用于确定建筑物的施工进度。

AI.tldr: 利用卫星图像和深度学习技术自动监测建筑施工进度
AI.motivation: 卫星图像能监测全球施工进度，但图像数据解释困难，需深度学习解决
AI.method: 结合多种深度学习图像分割和目标检测网络，构建统一处理流程以确定施工进度
AI.result: 提高监测准确性与效率，有效跟踪施工进展
AI.conclusion: 统一深度学习方法有效解决卫星图像施工监测难题，为全球应用提供可行方案

title: Online Weighted Q-Ensembles for Reduced Hyperparameter Tuning in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于减少强化学习中超参数调整的在线加权 Q 集成
abstract: Reinforcement learning is a promising paradigm for learning robot control, allowing complex control policies to be learned without requiring a dynamics model. However, even state of the art algorithms can be difficult to tune for optimum performance. We propose employing an ensemble of multiple reinforcement learning agents, each with a different set of hyperparameters, along with a mechanism for choosing the best performing set(s) on-line. In the literature, the ensemble technique is used to improve performance in general, but the current work specifically addresses decreasing the hyperparameter tuning effort. Furthermore, our approach targets on-line learning on a single robotic system, and does not require running multiple simulators in parallel. Although the idea is generic, the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient was the model chosen, being a representative deep learning actor-critic method with good performance in continuous action settings but known high variance. We compare our online weighted q-ensemble approach to q-average ensemble strategies addressed in literature using alternate policy training, as well as online training, demonstrating the advantage of the new approach in eliminating hyperparameter tuning. The applicability to real-world systems was validated in common robotic benchmark environments: the bipedal robot half cheetah and the swimmer. Online Weighted Q-Ensemble presented overall lower variance and superior results when compared with q-average ensembles using randomized parameterizations.
summary: Reinforcement learning is a promising paradigm for learning robot control, allowing complex control policies to be learned without requiring a dynamics model. However, even state of the art algorithms can be difficult to tune for optimum performance. We propose employing an ensemble of multiple reinforcement learning agents, each with a different set of hyperparameters, along with a mechanism for choosing the best performing set(s) on-line. In the literature, the ensemble technique is used to improve performance in general, but the current work specifically addresses decreasing the hyperparameter tuning effort. Furthermore, our approach targets on-line learning on a single robotic system, and does not require running multiple simulators in parallel. Although the idea is generic, the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient was the model chosen, being a representative deep learning actor-critic method with good performance in continuous action settings but known high variance. We compare our online weighted q-ensemble approach to q-average ensemble strategies addressed in literature using alternate policy training, as well as online training, demonstrating the advantage of the new approach in eliminating hyperparameter tuning. The applicability to real-world systems was validated in common robotic benchmark environments: the bipedal robot half cheetah and the swimmer. Online Weighted Q-Ensemble presented overall lower variance and superior results when compared with q-average ensembles using randomized parameterizations.
abstract_zh: 强化学习是学习机器人控制的一种有前途的范例，允许在不需要动力学模型的情况下学习复杂的控制策略。然而，即使是最先进的算法也很难调整以获得最佳性能。我们建议采用多个强化学习代理的集合，每个代理都有一组不同的超参数，以及一种在线选择性能最佳的集合的机制。在文献中，集成技术通常用于提高性能，但当前的工作专门解决了减少超参数调整工作的问题。此外，我们的方法针对单个机器人系统上的在线学习，不需要并行运行多个模拟器。尽管这个想法很通用，但选择了深度确定性策略梯度模型，它是一种具有代表性的深度学习行动者批评家方法，在连续动作设置中具有良好的性能，但已知方差较高。我们使用替代策略训练以及在线训练将在线加权 q 集成方法与文献中提出的 q 平均集成策略进行比较，证明了新方法在消除超参数调整方面的优势。对现实系统的适用性在常见的机器人基准环境中得到了验证：双足机器人半猎豹和游泳者。与使用随机参数化的 q 平均集成相比，在线加权 Q 集成总体上呈现出较低的方差和优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线加权Q集成方法，通过集成多个不同超参数的强化学习代理，减少深度强化学习中的超参数调优工作。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法超参数调优困难，传统集成方法需并行模拟器且未针对性降低调优负担，本文旨在开发无需并行模拟器的在线集成策略以简化调优流程。
AI.method: 基于DDPG算法构建多个不同超参数的代理，采用在线加权Q值集成机制动态选择最优超参数组合，与传统Q平均集成策略进行对比验证。
AI.result: 在Half-Cheetah和Swimmer机器人基准测试中，该方法相较随机参数化Q平均集成展现出更低方差和更优性能，有效减少了超参数调优需求。
AI.conclusion: 在线加权Q集成方法通过动态超参数选择机制，在保持性能的同时显著降低强化学习调优复杂度，适用于实际机器人系统部署。

We compare our online weighted q-ensemble approach to q-average ensemble strategies addressed in literature using alternate policy training, as well as online training, demonstrating the advantage of the new approach in eliminating hyperparameter tuning. The applicability to real-world systems was validated in common robotic benchmark environments: the bipedal robot half cheetah and the swimmer. Online Weighted Q-Ensemble presented overall lower variance and superior results when compared with q-average ensembles using randomized parameterizations. 强化学习是学习机器人控制的一种有前途的范例，允许在不需要动力学模型的情况下学习复杂的控制策略。然而，即使是最先进的算法也很难调整以获得最佳性能。我们建议采用多个强化学习代理的集合，每个代理都有一组不同的超参数，以及一种在线选择性能最佳的集合的机制。在文献中，集成技术通常用于提高性能，但当前的工作专门解决了减少超参数调整工作的问题。此外，我们的方法针对单个机器人系统上的在线学习，不需要并行运行多个模拟器。尽管这个想法很通用，但选择了深度确定性策略梯度模型，它是一种具有代表性的深度学习行动者批评家方法，在连续动作设置中具有良好的性能，但已知方差较高。我们使用替代策略训练以及在线训练将在线加权 q 集成方法与文献中提出的 q 平均集成策略进行比较，证明了新方法在消除超参数调整方面的优势。对现实系统的适用性在常见的机器人基准环境中得到了验证：双足机器人半猎豹和游泳者。与使用随机参数化的 q 平均集成相比，在线加权 Q 集成总体上呈现出较低的方差和优异的结果。 本文提出一种在线加权Q集成方法，通过集成多个不同超参数的强化学习代理，减少深度强化学习中的超参数调优工作。 Renata Garcia,Wouter Caarls cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Ho Hin Lee,Shunxing Bao,Yuankai Huo,Bennett A. Landman
title: 3D UX-Net: A Large Kernel Volumetric ConvNet Modernizing Hierarchical Transformer for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 3D UX-Net：用于医学图像分割的大型内核体积ConvNet现代化分层变压器
abstract: The recent 3D medical ViTs (e.g., SwinUNETR) achieve the state-of-the-art performances on several 3D volumetric data benchmarks, including 3D medical image segmentation. Hierarchical transformers (e.g., Swin Transformers) reintroduced several ConvNet priors and further enhanced the practical viability of adapting volumetric segmentation in 3D medical datasets. The effectiveness of hybrid approaches is largely credited to the large receptive field for non-local self-attention and the large number of model parameters. In this work, we propose a lightweight volumetric ConvNet, termed 3D UX-Net, which adapts the hierarchical transformer using ConvNet modules for robust volumetric segmentation. Specifically, we revisit volumetric depth-wise convolutions with large kernel size (e.g. starting from $7\times7\times7$) to enable the larger global receptive fields, inspired by Swin Transformer. We further substitute the multi-layer perceptron (MLP) in Swin Transformer blocks with pointwise depth convolutions and enhance model performances with fewer normalization and activation layers, thus reducing the number of model parameters. 3D UX-Net competes favorably with current SOTA transformers (e.g. SwinUNETR) using three challenging public datasets on volumetric brain and abdominal imaging: 1) MICCAI Challenge 2021 FLARE, 2) MICCAI Challenge 2021 FeTA, and 3) MICCAI Challenge 2022 AMOS. 3D UX-Net consistently outperforms SwinUNETR with improvement from 0.929 to 0.938 Dice (FLARE2021) and 0.867 to 0.874 Dice (Feta2021). We further evaluate the transfer learning capability of 3D UX-Net with AMOS2022 and demonstrates another improvement of $2.27\%$ Dice (from 0.880 to 0.900). The source code with our proposed model are available at https://github.com/MASILab/3DUX-Net.
summary: The recent 3D medical ViTs (e.g., SwinUNETR) achieve the state-of-the-art performances on several 3D volumetric data benchmarks, including 3D medical image segmentation. Hierarchical transformers (e.g., Swin Transformers) reintroduced several ConvNet priors and further enhanced the practical viability of adapting volumetric segmentation in 3D medical datasets. The effectiveness of hybrid approaches is largely credited to the large receptive field for non-local self-attention and the large number of model parameters. In this work, we propose a lightweight volumetric ConvNet, termed 3D UX-Net, which adapts the hierarchical transformer using ConvNet modules for robust volumetric segmentation. Specifically, we revisit volumetric depth-wise convolutions with large kernel size (e.g. starting from $7\times7\times7$) to enable the larger global receptive fields, inspired by Swin Transformer. We further substitute the multi-layer perceptron (MLP) in Swin Transformer blocks with pointwise depth convolutions and enhance model performances with fewer normalization and activation layers, thus reducing the number of model parameters. 3D UX-Net competes favorably with current SOTA transformers (e.g. SwinUNETR) using three challenging public datasets on volumetric brain and abdominal imaging: 1) MICCAI Challenge 2021 FLARE, 2) MICCAI Challenge 2021 FeTA, and 3) MICCAI Challenge 2022 AMOS. 3D UX-Net consistently outperforms SwinUNETR with improvement from 0.929 to 0.938 Dice (FLARE2021) and 0.867 to 0.874 Dice (Feta2021). We further evaluate the transfer learning capability of 3D UX-Net with AMOS2022 and demonstrates another improvement of $2.27\%$ Dice (from 0.880 to 0.900). The source code with our proposed model are available at https://github.com/MASILab/3DUX-Net.
abstract_zh: 最近的 3D 医学 ViT（例如 SwinUNETR）在多个 3D 体积数据基准上实现了最先进的性能，包括 3D 医学图像分割。分层变压器（例如 Swin Transformers）重新引入了几个 ConvNet 先验，并进一步增强了在 3D 医学数据集中采用体积分割的实际可行性。混合方法的有效性很大程度上归功于非局部自注意力的大感受野和大量的模型参数。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种轻量级体积 ConvNet，称为 3D UX-Net，它使用 ConvNet 模块调整分层变压器以实现稳健的体积分割。具体来说，受 Swin Transformer 的启发，我们重新审视具有大内核尺寸的体积深度卷积（例如从 $7\times7\times7$ 开始），以实现更大的全局感受野。我们进一步用逐点深度卷积替代 Swin Transformer 块中的多层感知器（MLP），并通过更少的归一化和激活层来增强模型性能，从而减少模型参数的数量。 3D UX-Net 在体积大脑和腹部成像方面使用三个具有挑战性的公共数据集，与当前的 SOTA Transformer（例如 SwinUNETR）展开竞争：1) MICCAI Challenge 2021 FLARE、2) MICCAI Challenge 2021 FeTA 和 3) MICCAI Challenge 2022 AMOS。 3D UX-Net 的性能始终优于 SwinUNETR，Dice 从 0.929 提高到 0.938 Dice (FLARE2021)，Dice 从 0.867 提高到 0.874 Dice (Feta2021)。我们进一步使用 AMOS2022 评估 3D UX-Net 的迁移学习能力，并展示了 $2.27\%$ Dice 的另一个改进（从 0.880 到 0.900）。我们提出的模型的源代码可在 https://github.com/MASILab/3DUX-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级3D卷积神经网络3D UX-Net，通过结合大核卷积和改进的Transformer结构，用于提升医学图像分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有3D视觉Transformer（如SwinUNETR）在医学图像分割中表现优异，但其参数量大且计算成本高。本文旨在设计更高效的卷积网络，在保持性能的同时减少参数和计算量。
AI.method: 采用大核深度卷积（如7×7×7）模拟Transformer的全局感受野，用点卷积替代MLP模块，并减少归一化与激活层数量，构建轻量级3D卷积网络。
AI.result: 在FLARE2021、Feta2021和AMOS2022三个医学数据集上，3D UX-Net分别较SwinUNETR提升Dice系数0.929→0.938、0.867→0.874，并在AMOS2022上通过迁移学习进一步提升2.27%。
AI.conclusion: 3D UX-Net通过优化卷积结构实现了比现有Transformer更优的分割性能与效率，为医学图像分割提供了轻量化解决方案。

authors_text: Xiatao Sun,Mingyan Zhou,Zhijun Zhuang,Shuo Yang,Johannes Betz,Rahul Mangharam
title: A Benchmark Comparison of Imitation Learning-based Control Policies for Autonomous Racing
title_zh: 基于模仿学习的自动赛车控制策略的基准比较
abstract: Autonomous racing with scaled race cars has gained increasing attention as an effective approach for developing perception, planning and control algorithms for safe autonomous driving at the limits of the vehicle's handling. To train agile control policies for autonomous racing, learning-based approaches largely utilize reinforcement learning, albeit with mixed results. In this study, we benchmark a variety of imitation learning policies for racing vehicles that are applied directly or for bootstrapping reinforcement learning both in simulation and on scaled real-world environments. We show that interactive imitation learning techniques outperform traditional imitation learning methods and can greatly improve the performance of reinforcement learning policies by bootstrapping thanks to its better sample efficiency. Our benchmarks provide a foundation for future research on autonomous racing using Imitation Learning and Reinforcement Learning.
summary: Autonomous racing with scaled race cars has gained increasing attention as an effective approach for developing perception, planning and control algorithms for safe autonomous driving at the limits of the vehicle's handling. To train agile control policies for autonomous racing, learning-based approaches largely utilize reinforcement learning, albeit with mixed results. In this study, we benchmark a variety of imitation learning policies for racing vehicles that are applied directly or for bootstrapping reinforcement learning both in simulation and on scaled real-world environments. We show that interactive imitation learning techniques outperform traditional imitation learning methods and can greatly improve the performance of reinforcement learning policies by bootstrapping thanks to its better sample efficiency. Our benchmarks provide a foundation for future research on autonomous racing using Imitation Learning and Reinforcement Learning.
abstract_zh: 规模化赛车的自动驾驶赛车作为一种开发感知、规划和控制算法的有效方法，在车辆操控极限下实现安全自动驾驶，受到越来越多的关注。为了训练自动驾驶赛车的敏捷控制策略，基于学习的方法主要利用强化学习，尽管结果好坏参半。在这项研究中，我们对赛车的各种模仿学习策略进行了基准测试，这些策略直接应用于模拟和规模化的现实世界环境中或用于引导强化学习。我们表明，交互式模仿学习技术优于传统模仿学习方法，并且由于其更好的样本效率，可以通过引导极大地提高强化学习策略的性能。我们的基准为未来使用模仿学习和强化学习的自动驾驶赛车研究奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文对比了基于模仿学习的控制策略在自动驾驶赛车中的性能，评估其在模拟和真实环境中的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在自动驾驶赛车中效果不稳定，需探索更高效的模仿学习方法以提升控制策略性能。
AI.method: 通过基准测试比较多种模仿学习策略，直接应用于赛车控制或作为强化学习的引导方法，并在仿真与实体环境中验证。
AI.result: 交互式模仿学习技术优于传统方法，能显著提升强化学习策略的样本效率与性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为自动驾驶赛车领域中模仿学习与强化学习的结合应用提供了实验基础与方向指引。

In this study, we benchmark a variety of imitation learning policies for racing vehicles that are applied directly or for bootstrapping reinforcement learning both in simulation and on scaled real-world environments. We show that interactive imitation learning techniques outperform traditional imitation learning methods and can greatly improve the performance of reinforcement learning policies by bootstrapping thanks to its better sample efficiency. Our benchmarks provide a foundation for future research on autonomous racing using Imitation Learning and Reinforcement Learning. 规模化赛车的自动驾驶赛车作为一种开发感知、规划和控制算法的有效方法，在车辆操控极限下实现安全自动驾驶，受到越来越多的关注。为了训练自动驾驶赛车的敏捷控制策略，基于学习的方法主要利用强化学习，尽管结果好坏参半。在这项研究中，我们对赛车的各种模仿学习策略进行了基准测试，这些策略直接应用于模拟和规模化的现实世界环境中或用于引导强化学习。我们表明，交互式模仿学习技术优于传统模仿学习方法，并且由于其更好的样本效率，可以通过引导极大地提高强化学习策略的性能。我们的基准为未来使用模仿学习和强化学习的自动驾驶赛车研究奠定了基础。 本文对比了基于模仿学习的控制策略在自动驾驶赛车中的性能，评估其在模拟和真实环境中的效果。 Xiatao Sun,Mingyan Zhou,Zhijun Zhuang,Shuo Yang,Johannes Betz,Rahul Mangharam cs.RO

authors_text: Snehal Bhayani,Viktor Larsson,Torsten Sattler,Janne Heikkila,Zuzana Kukelova
title: Partially calibrated semi-generalized pose from hybrid point correspondences
title_zh: 根据混合点对应关系部分校准的半广义姿态
abstract: In this paper we study the problem of estimating the semi-generalized pose of a partially calibrated camera, i.e., the pose of a perspective camera with unknown focal length w.r.t. a generalized camera, from a hybrid set of 2D-2D and 2D-3D point correspondences. We study all possible camera configurations within the generalized camera system. To derive practical solvers to previously unsolved challenging configurations, we test different parameterizations as well as different solving strategies based on the state-of-the-art methods for generating efficient polynomial solvers. We evaluate the three most promising solvers, i.e., the H51f solver with five 2D-2D correspondences and one 2D-3D correspondence viewed by the same camera inside generalized camera, the H32f solver with three 2D-2D and two 2D-3D correspondences, and the H13f solver with one 2D-2D and three 2D-3D correspondences, on synthetic and real data. We show that in the presence of noise in the 3D points these solvers provide better estimates than the corresponding absolute pose solvers.
summary: In this paper we study the problem of estimating the semi-generalized pose of a partially calibrated camera, i.e., the pose of a perspective camera with unknown focal length w.r.t. a generalized camera, from a hybrid set of 2D-2D and 2D-3D point correspondences. We study all possible camera configurations within the generalized camera system. To derive practical solvers to previously unsolved challenging configurations, we test different parameterizations as well as different solving strategies based on the state-of-the-art methods for generating efficient polynomial solvers. We evaluate the three most promising solvers, i.e., the H51f solver with five 2D-2D correspondences and one 2D-3D correspondence viewed by the same camera inside generalized camera, the H32f solver with three 2D-2D and two 2D-3D correspondences, and the H13f solver with one 2D-2D and three 2D-3D correspondences, on synthetic and real data. We show that in the presence of noise in the 3D points these solvers provide better estimates than the corresponding absolute pose solvers.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了估计部分校准相机的半广义姿态的问题，即焦距未知的透视相机的姿态。广义相机，来自 2D-2D 和 2D-​​3D 点对应的混合集。我们研究通用相机系统中所有可能的相机配置。为了针对以前未解决的具有挑战性的配置导出实用的求解器，我们基于生成高效多项式求解器的最先进方法测试了不同的参数化以及不同的求解策略。我们在合成数据和真实数据上评估了三种最有前途的求解器，即具有 5 个 2D-2D 对应关系和 1 个 2D-3D 对应关系的 H51f 求解器（由通用相机内的同一相机查看）、具有 3 个 2D-2D 和 2 个 2D-3D 对应关系的 H32f 求解器以及具有 1 个 2D-2D 和 3 个 2D-3D 对应关系的 H13f 求解器。我们表明，在 3D 点存在噪声的情况下，这些解算器比相应的绝对位姿解算器提供更好的估计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从混合的2D-2D和2D-3D点对应关系中估计部分校准相机的半广义姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理部分校准相机在广义相机系统中的复杂配置，需开发高效求解器以应对噪声环境下的挑战性场景。
AI.method: 通过测试不同参数化方式及求解策略，基于多项式求解器生成技术，提出并评估三种关键求解器（H51f/H32f/H13f）。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提求解器在3D点存在噪声时，较传统绝对姿态求解器能提供更准确的姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为部分校准相机在混合对应关系下的半广义姿态估计提供了有效解决方案。

title: Few-shot Text Classification with Dual Contrastive Consistency
title_zh: 具有双重对比一致性的少样本文本分类
abstract: In this paper, we explore how to utilize pre-trained language model to perform few-shot text classification where only a few annotated examples are given for each class. Since using traditional cross-entropy loss to fine-tune language model under this scenario causes serious overfitting and leads to sub-optimal generalization of model, we adopt supervised contrastive learning on few labeled data and consistency-regularization on vast unlabeled data. Moreover, we propose a novel contrastive consistency to further boost model performance and refine sentence representation. After conducting extensive experiments on four datasets, we demonstrate that our model (FTCC) can outperform state-of-the-art methods and has better robustness.
summary: In this paper, we explore how to utilize pre-trained language model to perform few-shot text classification where only a few annotated examples are given for each class. Since using traditional cross-entropy loss to fine-tune language model under this scenario causes serious overfitting and leads to sub-optimal generalization of model, we adopt supervised contrastive learning on few labeled data and consistency-regularization on vast unlabeled data. Moreover, we propose a novel contrastive consistency to further boost model performance and refine sentence representation. After conducting extensive experiments on four datasets, we demonstrate that our model (FTCC) can outperform state-of-the-art methods and has better robustness.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索如何利用预训练的语言模型来执行少镜头文本分类，其中每个类别仅给出一些带注释的示例。由于在这种情况下使用传统的交叉熵损失来微调语言模型会导致严重的过拟合并导致模型的泛化效果不佳，因此我们对少量标记数据采用监督对比学习，对大量未标记数据采用一致性正则化。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的对比一致性，以进一步提高模型性能并细化句子表示。在对四个数据集进行广泛的实验后，我们证明我们的模型（FTCC）可以超越最先进的方法并且具有更好的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用预训练语言模型在少量标注样本的情况下进行文本分类，提出双对比一致性方法提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失在少样本场景下易导致模型过拟合，泛化能力不足，需探索更有效的学习策略。
AI.method: 结合监督对比学习处理标注数据，一致性正则化处理未标注数据，并提出新型对比一致性机制优化句子表示。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实验表明，所提FTCC模型优于现有方法，且具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 双对比一致性方法有效缓解少样本分类难题，通过联合优化标注与未标注数据提升模型性能。

title: Reasoning about Complex Networks: A Logic Programming Approach
title_zh: 复杂网络的推理：逻辑编程方法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1301.0302
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1301.0302
abstract: Reasoning about complex networks has in recent years become an important topic of study due to its many applications: the adoption of commercial products, spread of disease, the diffusion of an idea, etc. In this paper, we present the MANCaLog language, a formalism based on logic programming that satisfies a set of desiderata proposed in previous work as recommendations for the development of approaches to reasoning in complex networks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first formalism that satisfies all such criteria. We first focus on algorithms for finding minimal models (on which multi-attribute analysis can be done), and then on how this formalism can be applied in certain real world scenarios. Towards this end, we study the problem of deciding group membership in social networks: given a social network and a set of groups where group membership of only some of the individuals in the network is known, we wish to determine a degree of membership for the remaining group-individual pairs. We develop a prototype implementation that we use to obtain experimental results on two real world datasets, including a current social network of criminal gangs in a major U.S.\ city. We then show how the assignment of degree of membership to nodes in this case allows for a better understanding of the criminal gang problem when combined with other social network mining techniques -- including detection of sub-groups and identification of core group members -- which would not be possible without further identification of additional group members.
summary: Reasoning about complex networks has in recent years become an important topic of study due to its many applications: the adoption of commercial products, spread of disease, the diffusion of an idea, etc. In this paper, we present the MANCaLog language, a formalism based on logic programming that satisfies a set of desiderata proposed in previous work as recommendations for the development of approaches to reasoning in complex networks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first formalism that satisfies all such criteria. We first focus on algorithms for finding minimal models (on which multi-attribute analysis can be done), and then on how this formalism can be applied in certain real world scenarios. Towards this end, we study the problem of deciding group membership in social networks: given a social network and a set of groups where group membership of only some of the individuals in the network is known, we wish to determine a degree of membership for the remaining group-individual pairs. We develop a prototype implementation that we use to obtain experimental results on two real world datasets, including a current social network of criminal gangs in a major U.S.\ city. We then show how the assignment of degree of membership to nodes in this case allows for a better understanding of the criminal gang problem when combined with other social network mining techniques -- including detection of sub-groups and identification of core group members -- which would not be possible without further identification of additional group members.
abstract_zh: 近年来，复杂网络的推理因其许多应用而成为一个重要的研究课题：商业产品的采用、疾病的传播、思想的传播等。在本文中，我们提出了 MANCaLog 语言，这是一种基于逻辑编程的形式主义，它满足了之前工作中提出的一系列需求，作为复杂网络推理方法开发的建议。据我们所知，这是第一个满足所有这些标准的形式主义。我们首先关注寻找最小模型的算法（可以在其上进行多属性分析），然后讨论如何将这种形式应用于某些现实世界场景。为此，我们研究了决定社交网络中的群体成员资格的问题：给定一个社交网络和一组群组，其中网络中仅某些个人的群组成员身份是已知的，我们希望确定剩余的群体-个人对的成员资格程度。我们开发了一个原型实现，用于获取两个现实世界数据集的实验结果，包括美国主要城市当前犯罪团伙的社交网络。然后，我们展示了在这种情况下，当与其他社交网络挖掘技术（包括检测子组和识别核心组成员）相结合时，如何将本例中的节点成员资格分配给更好地理解犯罪团伙问题，如果不进一步识别其他组成员，这是不可能实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于逻辑编程的MANCaLog语言，用于解决复杂网络中的推理问题，特别是在社交网络群体成员资格判定中的应用。
AI.motivation: 复杂网络推理在商业、疾病传播等领域有广泛应用，但现有方法难以满足多属性分析和群体成员判定的需求，需一种符合特定标准的形式化方法。
AI.method: 开发MANCaLog语言，基于逻辑编程实现极小模型算法，并应用于社交网络群体成员资格判定，结合原型系统在真实数据集（如犯罪团伙网络）中验证。
AI.result: 成功构建原型系统，在犯罪团伙等真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，结合子群检测等技术可提升对复杂网络问题的分析能力。
AI.conclusion: MANCaLog是首个满足所有设计标准的复杂网络推理形式化方法，为现实场景中的群体成员判定与网络分析提供了新工具。

search_text: Reasoning about Complex Networks: A Logic Programming Approach 复杂网络的推理：逻辑编程方法 Reasoning about complex networks has in recent years become an important topic of study due to its many applications: the adoption of commercial products, spread of disease, the diffusion of an idea, etc. In this paper, we present the MANCaLog language, a formalism based on logic programming that satisfies a set of desiderata proposed in previous work as recommendations for the development of approaches to reasoning in complex networks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first formalism that satisfies all such criteria. We first focus on algorithms for finding minimal models (on which multi-attribute analysis can be done), and then on how this formalism can be applied in certain real world scenarios. Towards this end, we study the problem of deciding group membership in social networks: given a social network and a set of groups where group membership of only some of the individuals in the network is known, we wish to determine a degree of membership for the remaining group-individual pairs. We develop a prototype implementation that we use to obtain experimental results on two real world datasets, including a current social network of criminal gangs in a major U.S.\ city. We then show how the assignment of degree of membership to nodes in this case allows for a better understanding of the criminal gang problem when combined with other social network mining techniques -- including detection of sub-groups and identification of core group members -- which would not be possible without further identification of additional group members. 近年来，复杂网络的推理因其许多应用而成为一个重要的研究课题：商业产品的采用、疾病的传播、思想的传播等。在本文中，我们提出了 MANCaLog 语言，这是一种基于逻辑编程的形式主义，它满足了之前工作中提出的一系列需求，作为复杂网络推理方法开发的建议。据我们所知，这是第一个满足所有这些标准的形式主义。我们首先关注寻找最小模型的算法（可以在其上进行多属性分析），然后讨论如何将这种形式应用于某些现实世界场景。为此，我们研究了决定社交网络中的群体成员资格的问题：给定一个社交网络和一组群组，其中网络中仅某些个人的群组成员身份是已知的，我们希望确定剩余的群体-个人对的成员资格程度。我们开发了一个原型实现，用于获取两个现实世界数据集的实验结果，包括美国主要城市当前犯罪团伙的社交网络。然后，我们展示了在这种情况下，当与其他社交网络挖掘技术（包括检测子组和识别核心组成员）相结合时，如何将本例中的节点成员资格分配给更好地理解犯罪团伙问题，如果不进一步识别其他组成员，这是不可能实现的。 本文提出一种基于逻辑编程的MANCaLog语言，用于解决复杂网络中的推理问题，特别是在社交网络群体成员资格判定中的应用。 Paulo Shakarian,Gerardo I. Simari,Devon Callahan cs.AI

title: Graph Attention Network for Camera Relocalization on Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 用于动态场景上相机重定位的图注意网络
abstract: We devise a graph attention network-based approach for learning a scene triangle mesh representation in order to estimate an image camera position in a dynamic environment. Previous approaches built a scene-dependent model that explicitly or implicitly embeds the structure of the scene. They use convolution neural networks or decision trees to establish 2D/3D-3D correspondences. Such a mapping overfits the target scene and does not generalize well to dynamic changes in the environment. Our work introduces a novel approach to solve the camera relocalization problem by using the available triangle mesh. Our 3D-3D matching framework consists of three blocks: (1) a graph neural network to compute the embedding of mesh vertices, (2) a convolution neural network to compute the embedding of grid cells defined on the RGB-D image, and (3) a neural network model to establish the correspondence between the two embeddings. These three components are trained end-to-end. To predict the final pose, we run the RANSAC algorithm to generate camera pose hypotheses, and we refine the prediction using the point-cloud representation. Our approach significantly improves the camera pose accuracy of the state-of-the-art method from $0.358$ to $0.506$ on the RIO10 benchmark for dynamic indoor camera relocalization.
summary: We devise a graph attention network-based approach for learning a scene triangle mesh representation in order to estimate an image camera position in a dynamic environment. Previous approaches built a scene-dependent model that explicitly or implicitly embeds the structure of the scene. They use convolution neural networks or decision trees to establish 2D/3D-3D correspondences. Such a mapping overfits the target scene and does not generalize well to dynamic changes in the environment. Our work introduces a novel approach to solve the camera relocalization problem by using the available triangle mesh. Our 3D-3D matching framework consists of three blocks: (1) a graph neural network to compute the embedding of mesh vertices, (2) a convolution neural network to compute the embedding of grid cells defined on the RGB-D image, and (3) a neural network model to establish the correspondence between the two embeddings. These three components are trained end-to-end. To predict the final pose, we run the RANSAC algorithm to generate camera pose hypotheses, and we refine the prediction using the point-cloud representation. Our approach significantly improves the camera pose accuracy of the state-of-the-art method from $0.358$ to $0.506$ on the RIO10 benchmark for dynamic indoor camera relocalization.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种基于图注意网络的方法来学习场景三角形网格表示，以便估计动态环境中的图像摄像机位置。以前的方法构建了一个与场景相关的模型，显式或隐式地嵌入场景的结构。他们使用卷积神经网络或决策树来建立 2D/3D-3D 对应关系。这种映射过度拟合目标场景，并且不能很好地泛化到环境的动态变化。我们的工作引入了一种使用可用的三角形网格来解决相机重定位问题的新颖方法。我们的 3D-3D 匹配框架由三个模块组成：(1) 一个图神经网络，用于计算网格顶点的嵌入；(2) 一个卷积神经网络，用于计算 RGB-D 图像上定义的网格单元的嵌入；(3) 一个神经网络模型，用于建立两个嵌入之间的对应关系。这三个组件是端到端训练的。为了预测最终姿势，我们运行 RANSAC 算法来生成相机姿势假设，并使用点云表示来完善预测。在动态室内摄像机重定位的 RIO10 基准上，我们的方法将最先进方法的摄像机姿态精度从 0.358 美元显着提高到 0.506 美元。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图注意力网络的方法，用于动态场景中的相机重定位，通过学习场景三角网格表示来估计图像相机位置。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖场景特定模型，通过卷积神经网络或决策树建立对应关系，但容易过拟合目标场景，难以适应动态环境变化。
AI.method: 设计包含三个模块的3D-3D匹配框架：1) 图神经网络计算网格顶点嵌入；2) 卷积神经网络计算RGB-D图像网格单元嵌入；3) 神经网络建立双嵌入对应关系。端到端训练后结合RANSAC算法和点云优化预测相机位姿。
AI.result: 在RIO10动态室内相机重定位基准测试中，将相机位姿精度从0.358提升至0.506，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过三角网格表示和图注意力机制有效解决了动态场景相机重定位问题，验证了模型对环境变化的鲁棒性和优越性能。

title: Implicit Bias of Large Depth Networks: a Notion of Rank for Nonlinear Functions
title_zh: 大深度网络的隐式偏差：非线性函数的秩概念
abstract: We show that the representation cost of fully connected neural networks with homogeneous nonlinearities - which describes the implicit bias in function space of networks with $L_2$-regularization or with losses such as the cross-entropy - converges as the depth of the network goes to infinity to a notion of rank over nonlinear functions. We then inquire under which conditions the global minima of the loss recover the `true' rank of the data: we show that for too large depths the global minimum will be approximately rank 1 (underestimating the rank); we then argue that there is a range of depths which grows with the number of datapoints where the true rank is recovered. Finally, we discuss the effect of the rank of a classifier on the topology of the resulting class boundaries and show that autoencoders with optimal nonlinear rank are naturally denoising.
summary: We show that the representation cost of fully connected neural networks with homogeneous nonlinearities - which describes the implicit bias in function space of networks with $L_2$-regularization or with losses such as the cross-entropy - converges as the depth of the network goes to infinity to a notion of rank over nonlinear functions. We then inquire under which conditions the global minima of the loss recover the `true' rank of the data: we show that for too large depths the global minimum will be approximately rank 1 (underestimating the rank); we then argue that there is a range of depths which grows with the number of datapoints where the true rank is recovered. Finally, we discuss the effect of the rank of a classifier on the topology of the resulting class boundaries and show that autoencoders with optimal nonlinear rank are naturally denoising.
abstract_zh: 我们表明，具有同质非线性的全连接神经网络的表示成本（描述了具有 $L_2$ 正则化或交叉熵等损失的网络函数空间中的隐式偏差）随着网络深度趋于无穷大而收敛到非线性函数的秩概念。然后，我们询问在哪些条件下损失的全局最小值恢复数据的“真实”排名：我们表明，对于太大的深度，全局最小值将大约为排名 1（低估排名）；然后我们认为，存在一个深度范围，该范围随着恢复真实排名的数据点的数量而增长。最后，我们讨论了分类器的秩对所得类边界的拓扑的影响，并表明具有最佳非线性秩的自动编码器自然是去噪的。

AI.tldr: 研究深度神经网络的隐式偏差与非线性函数秩的关系，分析网络深度对表示能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解深度网络在函数空间中的隐式偏差，探索其如何通过深度调整模型表示能力以避免秩低估问题。
AI.method: 通过分析全连接网络的表示成本，研究深度趋于无穷时的秩收敛性，并探讨不同深度下损失函数最小值与真实秩的关系。
AI.result: 深度增加使表示成本收敛于非线性秩，过深网络会低估秩，但存在随数据量增长的深度范围可恢复真实秩；最优秩的自编码器具有天然去噪能力。
AI.conclusion: 网络深度与秩恢复存在非单调关系，需控制深度以避免低估，同时最优秩结构对分类边界拓扑和去噪有直接影响。

motivation: 理解深度网络在函数空间中的隐式偏差，探索其如何通过深度调整模型表示能力以避免秩低估问题。

result: 深度增加使表示成本收敛于非线性秩，过深网络会低估秩，但存在随数据量增长的深度范围可恢复真实秩；最优秩的自编码器具有天然去噪能力。
conclusion: 网络深度与秩恢复存在非单调关系，需控制深度以避免低估，同时最优秩结构对分类边界拓扑和去噪有直接影响。
search_text: Implicit Bias of Large Depth Networks: a Notion of Rank for Nonlinear Functions 大深度网络的隐式偏差：非线性函数的秩概念 We show that the representation cost of fully connected neural networks with homogeneous nonlinearities - which describes the implicit bias in function space of networks with $L_2$-regularization or with losses such as the cross-entropy - converges as the depth of the network goes to infinity to a notion of rank over nonlinear functions. We then inquire under which conditions the global minima of the loss recover the `true' rank of the data: we show that for too large depths the global minimum will be approximately rank 1 (underestimating the rank); we then argue that there is a range of depths which grows with the number of datapoints where the true rank is recovered. Finally, we discuss the effect of the rank of a classifier on the topology of the resulting class boundaries and show that autoencoders with optimal nonlinear rank are naturally denoising. 我们表明，具有同质非线性的全连接神经网络的表示成本（描述了具有 $L_2$ 正则化或交叉熵等损失的网络函数空间中的隐式偏差）随着网络深度趋于无穷大而收敛到非线性函数的秩概念。然后，我们询问在哪些条件下损失的全局最小值恢复数据的“真实”排名：我们表明，对于太大的深度，全局最小值将大约为排名 1（低估排名）；然后我们认为，存在一个深度范围，该范围随着恢复真实排名的数据点的数量而增长。最后，我们讨论了分类器的秩对所得类边界的拓扑的影响，并表明具有最佳非线性秩的自动编码器自然是去噪的。 研究深度神经网络的隐式偏差与非线性函数秩的关系，分析网络深度对表示能力的影响。 Arthur Jacot stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kumail Alhamoud,Hasan Abed Al Kader Hammoud,Motasem Alfarra,Bernard Ghanem
title: Generalizability of Adversarial Robustness Under Distribution Shifts
title_zh: 分布变化下对抗鲁棒性的普遍性
abstract: Recent progress in empirical and certified robustness promises to deliver reliable and deployable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Despite that success, most existing evaluations of DNN robustness have been done on images sampled from the same distribution on which the model was trained. However, in the real world, DNNs may be deployed in dynamic environments that exhibit significant distribution shifts. In this work, we take a first step towards thoroughly investigating the interplay between empirical and certified adversarial robustness on one hand and domain generalization on another. To do so, we train robust models on multiple domains and evaluate their accuracy and robustness on an unseen domain. We observe that: (1) both empirical and certified robustness generalize to unseen domains, and (2) the level of generalizability does not correlate well with input visual similarity, measured by the FID between source and target domains. We also extend our study to cover a real-world medical application, in which adversarial augmentation significantly boosts the generalization of robustness with minimal effect on clean data accuracy.
summary: Recent progress in empirical and certified robustness promises to deliver reliable and deployable Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Despite that success, most existing evaluations of DNN robustness have been done on images sampled from the same distribution on which the model was trained. However, in the real world, DNNs may be deployed in dynamic environments that exhibit significant distribution shifts. In this work, we take a first step towards thoroughly investigating the interplay between empirical and certified adversarial robustness on one hand and domain generalization on another. To do so, we train robust models on multiple domains and evaluate their accuracy and robustness on an unseen domain. We observe that: (1) both empirical and certified robustness generalize to unseen domains, and (2) the level of generalizability does not correlate well with input visual similarity, measured by the FID between source and target domains. We also extend our study to cover a real-world medical application, in which adversarial augmentation significantly boosts the generalization of robustness with minimal effect on clean data accuracy.
abstract_zh: 最近在经验和经过认证的稳健性方面取得的进展有望提供可靠且可部署的深度神经网络 (DNN)。尽管取得了成功，但大多数现有的 DNN 鲁棒性评估都是针对从模型训练的同一分布中采样的图像进行的。然而，在现实世界中，DNN 可能部署在表现出显着分布变化的动态环境中。在这项工作中，我们迈出了第一步，全面调查经验和经过认证的对抗鲁棒性与领域泛化之间的相互作用。为此，我们在多个领域训练鲁棒模型，并在看不见的领域评估它们的准确性和鲁棒性。我们观察到：（1）经验稳健性和经过认证的稳健性都可以推广到未见过的领域，（2）普遍性水平与输入视觉相似性（通过源域和目标域之间的 FID 来衡量）没有很好的相关性。我们还将我们的研究扩展到现实世界的医疗应用，其中对抗性增强显着提高了鲁棒性的泛化性，同时对干净数据准确性的影响最小。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了对抗鲁棒性在分布偏移下的泛化能力，通过在多个领域训练鲁棒模型并评估其在未见过领域的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗鲁棒性评估多基于训练分布，但实际部署中神经网络可能面临显著分布偏移，需探究鲁棒性与领域泛化的关联。
AI.method: 在多个领域训练鲁棒模型，评估其在未见过领域的表现；通过FID度量领域间视觉相似性，并扩展至医疗应用验证对抗增强的效果。
AI.result: 对抗鲁棒性（经验与认证）可泛化至新领域，但泛化程度与FID度量的视觉相似性关联较弱；医疗场景中对抗增强显著提升鲁棒性且对干净数据影响小。
AI.conclusion: 对抗鲁棒性具备跨领域泛化能力，但其泛化性不依赖视觉相似性，对抗增强为实际应用（如医疗）提供有效鲁棒性提升方案。

title: Summarizing text to embed qualitative data into visualizations
title_zh: 总结文本以将定性数据嵌入到可视化中
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, accepted at NLVIZ 2022: Exploring Research Opportunities for Natural Language, Text, and Data Visualization
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, accepted at NLVIZ 2022: Exploring Research Opportunities for Natural Language, Text, and Data Visualization
abstract: Qualitative data can be conveyed with strings of text. Fitting longer text into visualizations requires a) space to place the text inside the visualization; and b) appropriate text to fit the space available. For quantitative visualizations, space is available in area marks; or within visualization layouts where the marks have an implied space (e.g. bar charts). For qualitative visualizations, space is defined in common text layouts such as prose paragraphs. To fit text within these layouts is a function for emerging NLP capabilities such as summarization.
summary: Qualitative data can be conveyed with strings of text. Fitting longer text into visualizations requires a) space to place the text inside the visualization; and b) appropriate text to fit the space available. For quantitative visualizations, space is available in area marks; or within visualization layouts where the marks have an implied space (e.g. bar charts). For qualitative visualizations, space is defined in common text layouts such as prose paragraphs. To fit text within these layouts is a function for emerging NLP capabilities such as summarization.
abstract_zh: 定性数据可以通过文本字符串来传达。将较长的文本放入可视化中需要 a) 在可视化中放置文本的空间； b) 适合可用空间的适当文本。对于定量可视化，区域标记中有可用空间；或者在标记具有隐含空间的可视化布局中（例如条形图）。对于定性可视化，空间是在常见的文本布局（例如散文段落）中定义的。让文本适合这些布局是新兴 NLP 功能（例如摘要）的一项功能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过文本摘要技术将定性数据嵌入到可视化中。
AI.motivation: 定性数据通常以长文本形式存在，而可视化布局空间有限，需解决文本与空间的适配问题。
AI.method: 利用自然语言处理（NLP）的摘要技术，将长文本压缩为适合可视化布局的短文本。
AI.result: 提出通过文本摘要有效适配定性数据在可视化中的展示方法。
AI.conclusion: 文本摘要技术能有效解决定性数据在可视化中的空间限制问题，促进数据呈现的清晰性与可读性。

authors_text: David F. Fouhey,Richard E. L. Higgins,Spiro K. Antiochos,Graham Barnes,Marc L. DeRosa,J. Todd Hoeksema,K. D. Leka,Yang Liu,Peter W. Schuck,Tamas I. Gombosi
title: Large-Scale Spatial Cross-Calibration of Hinode/SOT-SP and SDO/HMI
title_zh: Hinode/SOT-SP 和 SDO/HMI 的大规模空间交叉校准
abstract: We investigate the cross-calibration of the Hinode/SOT-SP and SDO/HMI instrument meta-data, specifically the correspondence of the scaling and pointing information. Accurate calibration of these datasets gives the correspondence needed by inter-instrument studies and learning-based magnetogram systems, and is required for physically-meaningful photospheric magnetic field vectors. We approach the problem by robustly fitting geometric models on correspondences between images from each instrument's pipeline. This technique is common in computer vision, but several critical details are required when using scanning slit spectrograph data like Hinode/SOT-SP. We apply this technique to data spanning a decade of the Hinode mission. Our results suggest corrections to the published Level 2 Hinode/SOT-SP data. First, an analysis on approximately 2,700 scans suggests that the reported pixel size in Hinode/SOT-SP Level 2 data is incorrect by around 1%. Second, analysis of over 12,000 scans show that the pointing information is often incorrect by dozens of arcseconds with a strong bias. Regression of these corrections indicates that thermal effects have caused secular and cyclic drift in Hinode/SOT-SP pointing data over its mission. We offer two solutions. First, direct co-alignment with SDO/HMI data via our procedure can improve alignments for many Hinode/SOT-SP scans. Second, since the pointing errors are predictable, simple post-hoc corrections can substantially improve the pointing. We conclude by illustrating the impact of this updated calibration on derived physical data products needed for research and interpretation. Among other things, our results suggest that the pointing errors induce a hemispheric bias in estimates of radial current density.
summary: We investigate the cross-calibration of the Hinode/SOT-SP and SDO/HMI instrument meta-data, specifically the correspondence of the scaling and pointing information. Accurate calibration of these datasets gives the correspondence needed by inter-instrument studies and learning-based magnetogram systems, and is required for physically-meaningful photospheric magnetic field vectors. We approach the problem by robustly fitting geometric models on correspondences between images from each instrument's pipeline. This technique is common in computer vision, but several critical details are required when using scanning slit spectrograph data like Hinode/SOT-SP. We apply this technique to data spanning a decade of the Hinode mission. Our results suggest corrections to the published Level 2 Hinode/SOT-SP data. First, an analysis on approximately 2,700 scans suggests that the reported pixel size in Hinode/SOT-SP Level 2 data is incorrect by around 1%. Second, analysis of over 12,000 scans show that the pointing information is often incorrect by dozens of arcseconds with a strong bias. Regression of these corrections indicates that thermal effects have caused secular and cyclic drift in Hinode/SOT-SP pointing data over its mission. We offer two solutions. First, direct co-alignment with SDO/HMI data via our procedure can improve alignments for many Hinode/SOT-SP scans. Second, since the pointing errors are predictable, simple post-hoc corrections can substantially improve the pointing. We conclude by illustrating the impact of this updated calibration on derived physical data products needed for research and interpretation. Among other things, our results suggest that the pointing errors induce a hemispheric bias in estimates of radial current density.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 Hinode/SOT-SP 和 SDO/HMI 仪器元数据的交叉校准，特别是缩放和指向信息的对应关系。这些数据集的精确校准提供了仪器间研究和基于学习的磁图系统所需的对应关系，并且是具有物理意义的光球磁场矢量所需要的。我们通过对每个仪器管道的图像之间的对应关系稳健地拟合几何模型来解决这个问题。这种技术在计算机视觉中很常见，但在使用 Hinode/SOT-SP 等扫描狭缝光谱仪数据时需要几个关键细节。我们将这种技术应用于 Hinode 任务十年的数据。我们的结果建议对已发布的 2 级 Hinode/SOT-SP 数据进行修正。首先，对大约 2,700 次扫描的分析表明 Hinode/SOT-SP 2 级数据中报告的像素大小不正确，误差约为 1%。其次，对超过 12,000 次扫描的分析表明，指向信息通常有数十角秒的误差，并且存在很大的偏差。这些修正的回归表明热效应导致了 Hinode/SOT-SP 指向数据在其任务中的长期和循环漂移。我们提供两种解决方案。首先，通过我们的程序直接与 SDO/HMI 数据共同对准可以改善许多 Hinode/SOT-SP 扫描的对准。其次，由于指向误差是可预测的，简单的事后修正可以显着改善指向。最后，我们说明了这种更新的校准对研究和解释所需的派生物理数据产品的影响。除其他外，我们的结果表明，指向误差会导致径向电流密度估计中的半球偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Hinode/SOT-SP与SDO/HMI仪器元数据的跨校准，重点解决缩放和指向信息的对应关系问题。
AI.motivation: 准确校准两个数据集对于跨仪器研究和基于学习的磁图系统至关重要，且是获得物理意义的光球磁场矢量的前提。
AI.method: 通过稳健拟合两个仪器流水线图像之间的几何模型，结合计算机视觉技术并针对扫描狭缝光谱仪数据进行关键细节调整。
AI.result: 发现Hinode/SOT-SP二级数据的像素尺寸存在约1%误差，指向信息存在数十角秒偏差且存在系统性偏倚，热效应导致长期和周期性漂移。
AI.conclusion: 校准改进可提升Hinode/SOT-SP数据对齐精度，后处理修正能显著改善指向误差，且修正后的校准揭示了径向电流密度估计中的半球偏倚问题。

search_text: Large-Scale Spatial Cross-Calibration of Hinode/SOT-SP and SDO/HMI Hinode/SOT-SP 和 SDO/HMI 的大规模空间交叉校准 We investigate the cross-calibration of the Hinode/SOT-SP and SDO/HMI instrument meta-data, specifically the correspondence of the scaling and pointing information. Accurate calibration of these datasets gives the correspondence needed by inter-instrument studies and learning-based magnetogram systems, and is required for physically-meaningful photospheric magnetic field vectors. We approach the problem by robustly fitting geometric models on correspondences between images from each instrument's pipeline. This technique is common in computer vision, but several critical details are required when using scanning slit spectrograph data like Hinode/SOT-SP. We apply this technique to data spanning a decade of the Hinode mission. Our results suggest corrections to the published Level 2 Hinode/SOT-SP data. First, an analysis on approximately 2,700 scans suggests that the reported pixel size in Hinode/SOT-SP Level 2 data is incorrect by around 1%. Second, analysis of over 12,000 scans show that the pointing information is often incorrect by dozens of arcseconds with a strong bias. Regression of these corrections indicates that thermal effects have caused secular and cyclic drift in Hinode/SOT-SP pointing data over its mission. We offer two solutions. First, direct co-alignment with SDO/HMI data via our procedure can improve alignments for many Hinode/SOT-SP scans. Second, since the pointing errors are predictable, simple post-hoc corrections can substantially improve the pointing. We conclude by illustrating the impact of this updated calibration on derived physical data products needed for research and interpretation. Among other things, our results suggest that the pointing errors induce a hemispheric bias in estimates of radial current density. 我们研究了 Hinode/SOT-SP 和 SDO/HMI 仪器元数据的交叉校准，特别是缩放和指向信息的对应关系。这些数据集的精确校准提供了仪器间研究和基于学习的磁图系统所需的对应关系，并且是具有物理意义的光球磁场矢量所需要的。我们通过对每个仪器管道的图像之间的对应关系稳健地拟合几何模型来解决这个问题。这种技术在计算机视觉中很常见，但在使用 Hinode/SOT-SP 等扫描狭缝光谱仪数据时需要几个关键细节。我们将这种技术应用于 Hinode 任务十年的数据。我们的结果建议对已发布的 2 级 Hinode/SOT-SP 数据进行修正。首先，对大约 2,700 次扫描的分析表明 Hinode/SOT-SP 2 级数据中报告的像素大小不正确，误差约为 1%。其次，对超过 12,000 次扫描的分析表明，指向信息通常有数十角秒的误差，并且存在很大的偏差。这些修正的回归表明热效应导致了 Hinode/SOT-SP 指向数据在其任务中的长期和循环漂移。我们提供两种解决方案。首先，通过我们的程序直接与 SDO/HMI 数据共同对准可以改善许多 Hinode/SOT-SP 扫描的对准。其次，由于指向误差是可预测的，简单的事后修正可以显着改善指向。最后，我们说明了这种更新的校准对研究和解释所需的派生物理数据产品的影响。除其他外，我们的结果表明，指向误差会导致径向电流密度估计中的半球偏差。 本文研究Hinode/SOT-SP与SDO/HMI仪器元数据的跨校准，重点解决缩放和指向信息的对应关系问题。 David F.
