title: Guided Unsupervised Learning by Subaperture Decomposition for Ocean SAR Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于海洋 SAR 图像检索的子孔径分解引导无监督学习
abstract: Spaceborne synthetic aperture radar (SAR) can provide accurate images of the ocean surface roughness day-or-night in nearly all weather conditions, being an unique asset for many geophysical applications. Considering the huge amount of data daily acquired by satellites, automated techniques for physical features extraction are needed. Even if supervised deep learning methods attain state-of-the-art results, they require great amount of labeled data, which are difficult and excessively expensive to acquire for ocean SAR imagery. To this end, we use the subaperture decomposition (SD) algorithm to enhance the unsupervised learning retrieval on the ocean surface, empowering ocean researchers to search into large ocean databases. We empirically prove that SD improve the retrieval precision with over 20% for an unsupervised transformer auto-encoder network. Moreover, we show that SD brings important performance boost when Doppler centroid images are used as input data, leading the way to new unsupervised physics guided retrieval algorithms.
summary: Spaceborne synthetic aperture radar (SAR) can provide accurate images of the ocean surface roughness day-or-night in nearly all weather conditions, being an unique asset for many geophysical applications. Considering the huge amount of data daily acquired by satellites, automated techniques for physical features extraction are needed. Even if supervised deep learning methods attain state-of-the-art results, they require great amount of labeled data, which are difficult and excessively expensive to acquire for ocean SAR imagery. To this end, we use the subaperture decomposition (SD) algorithm to enhance the unsupervised learning retrieval on the ocean surface, empowering ocean researchers to search into large ocean databases. We empirically prove that SD improve the retrieval precision with over 20% for an unsupervised transformer auto-encoder network. Moreover, we show that SD brings important performance boost when Doppler centroid images are used as input data, leading the way to new unsupervised physics guided retrieval algorithms.
abstract_zh: 星载合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 可以在几乎所有天气条件下昼夜提供海洋表面粗糙度的准确图像，是许多地球物理应用的独特资产。考虑到卫星每天获取的大量数据，需要用于物理特征提取的自动化技术。即使有监督的深度学习方法取得了最先进的结果，它们也需要大量的标记数据，而这些数据对于海洋 SAR 图像来说获取起来非常困难且过于昂贵。为此，我们使用子孔径分解（SD）算法来增强海洋表面的无监督学习检索，使海洋研究人员能够搜索大型海洋数据库。我们凭经验证明，SD 将无监督 Transformer 自动编码器网络的检索精度提高了 20% 以上。此外，我们表明，当使用多普勒质心图像作为输入数据时，SD 带来了重要的性能提升，从而引领了新的无监督物理引导检索算法的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子孔径分解的引导无监督学习方法，用于提高海洋SAR图像检索的精度。
AI.motivation: 由于海洋SAR图像数据量庞大，且获取标注数据成本高昂，传统的监督学习方法难以满足需求，因此需要一种高效的无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 本文采用子孔径分解（SD）算法，结合无监督的Transformer自编码器网络，以增强无监督学习在海洋表面SAR图像检索中的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用SD算法后，无监督Transformer自编码器网络的检索精度提升了20%以上，并且在使用多普勒中心图像作为输入时，性能进一步提高。
AI.conclusion: 子孔径分解算法能够有效提升无监督学习在海洋SAR图像检索中的性能，为未来开发新的物理引导无监督检索算法提供了方向。

title: Multimodal analogs to infer humanities visualization requirements
title_zh: 多模态类比推断人文可视化需求
comment: 6 pages, 11 figures. Visualization for Digital Humanities 2022
comments: 6 pages, 11 figures. Visualization for Digital Humanities 2022
abstract: Gaps and requirements for multi-modal interfaces for humanities can be explored by observing the configuration of real-world environments and the tasks of visitors within them compared to digital environments. Examples include stores, museums, galleries, and stages with tasks similar to visualization tasks such as overview, zoom and detail; multi-dimensional reduction; collaboration; and comparison; with real-world environments offering much richer interactions. Some of these capabilities exist with the technology and visualization research, but not routinely available in implementations.
summary: Gaps and requirements for multi-modal interfaces for humanities can be explored by observing the configuration of real-world environments and the tasks of visitors within them compared to digital environments. Examples include stores, museums, galleries, and stages with tasks similar to visualization tasks such as overview, zoom and detail; multi-dimensional reduction; collaboration; and comparison; with real-world environments offering much richer interactions. Some of these capabilities exist with the technology and visualization research, but not routinely available in implementations.
abstract_zh: 通过观察现实世界环境的配置以及与数字环境相比的访问者在其中的任务，可以探索人文学科多模式界面的差距和要求。示例包括商店、博物馆、画廊和舞台，其任务类似于可视化任务，例如概述、缩放和细节；多维还原；合作;和比较；与现实世界的环境提供更丰富的交互。其中一些功能存在于技术和可视化研究中，但在实现中通常不可用。

AI.tldr: 通过分析现实环境中的多模态交互，推断人文学科可视化需求以改进数字环境的多模态接口设计。
AI.motivation: 现实环境（如博物馆）提供比数字环境更丰富的多模态交互体验，但现有技术未能在数字可视化中常规应用这些能力。
AI.method: 比较现实环境与数字环境的配置及任务需求，分析多模态交互的差异并提取可视化需求。
AI.result: 识别出现实环境中的多维交互能力（如协作、对比）可为数字人文可视化提供改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 需借鉴现实环境的多模态交互模式，提升数字人文可视化工具的交互丰富性与实用性。

tldr: 通过分析现实环境中的多模态交互，推断人文学科可视化需求以改进数字环境的多模态接口设计。
motivation: 现实环境（如博物馆）提供比数字环境更丰富的多模态交互体验，但现有技术未能在数字可视化中常规应用这些能力。
method: 比较现实环境与数字环境的配置及任务需求，分析多模态交互的差异并提取可视化需求。
result: 识别出现实环境中的多维交互能力（如协作、对比）可为数字人文可视化提供改进方向。
conclusion: 需借鉴现实环境的多模态交互模式，提升数字人文可视化工具的交互丰富性与实用性。
search_text: Multimodal analogs to infer humanities visualization requirements 多模态类比推断人文可视化需求 Gaps and requirements for multi-modal interfaces for humanities can be explored by observing the configuration of real-world environments and the tasks of visitors within them compared to digital environments. Examples include stores, museums, galleries, and stages with tasks similar to visualization tasks such as overview, zoom and detail; multi-dimensional reduction; collaboration; and comparison; with real-world environments offering much richer interactions. Some of these capabilities exist with the technology and visualization research, but not routinely available in implementations. 通过观察现实世界环境的配置以及与数字环境相比的访问者在其中的任务，可以探索人文学科多模式界面的差距和要求。示例包括商店、博物馆、画廊和舞台，其任务类似于可视化任务，例如概述、缩放和细节；多维还原；合作;和比较；与现实世界的环境提供更丰富的交互。其中一些功能存在于技术和可视化研究中，但在实现中通常不可用。 通过分析现实环境中的多模态交互，推断人文学科可视化需求以改进数字环境的多模态接口设计。 Richard Brath cs.HC

authors_text: Alexander C. Li,Alexei A. Efros,Deepak Pathak
title: Understanding Collapse in Non-Contrastive Siamese Representation Learning
title_zh: 理解非对比连体表征学习中的崩溃
comment: Published at ECCV 2022. Project page at https://alexanderli.com/noncontrastive-ssl/
comments: Published at ECCV 2022. Project page at https://alexanderli.com/noncontrastive-ssl/
abstract: Contrastive methods have led a recent surge in the performance of self-supervised representation learning (SSL). Recent methods like BYOL or SimSiam purportedly distill these contrastive methods down to their essence, removing bells and whistles, including the negative examples, that do not contribute to downstream performance. These "non-contrastive" methods work surprisingly well without using negatives even though the global minimum lies at trivial collapse. We empirically analyze these non-contrastive methods and find that SimSiam is extraordinarily sensitive to dataset and model size. In particular, SimSiam representations undergo partial dimensional collapse if the model is too small relative to the dataset size. We propose a metric to measure the degree of this collapse and show that it can be used to forecast the downstream task performance without any fine-tuning or labels. We further analyze architectural design choices and their effect on the downstream performance. Finally, we demonstrate that shifting to a continual learning setting acts as a regularizer and prevents collapse, and a hybrid between continual and multi-epoch training can improve linear probe accuracy by as many as 18 percentage points using ResNet-18 on ImageNet. Our project page is at https://alexanderli.com/noncontrastive-ssl/.
summary: Contrastive methods have led a recent surge in the performance of self-supervised representation learning (SSL). Recent methods like BYOL or SimSiam purportedly distill these contrastive methods down to their essence, removing bells and whistles, including the negative examples, that do not contribute to downstream performance. These "non-contrastive" methods work surprisingly well without using negatives even though the global minimum lies at trivial collapse. We empirically analyze these non-contrastive methods and find that SimSiam is extraordinarily sensitive to dataset and model size. In particular, SimSiam representations undergo partial dimensional collapse if the model is too small relative to the dataset size. We propose a metric to measure the degree of this collapse and show that it can be used to forecast the downstream task performance without any fine-tuning or labels. We further analyze architectural design choices and their effect on the downstream performance. Finally, we demonstrate that shifting to a continual learning setting acts as a regularizer and prevents collapse, and a hybrid between continual and multi-epoch training can improve linear probe accuracy by as many as 18 percentage points using ResNet-18 on ImageNet. Our project page is at https://alexanderli.com/noncontrastive-ssl/.
abstract_zh: 对比方法最近导致自监督表示学习（SSL）的性能激增。据称，最近的 BYOL 或 SimSiam 等方法将这些对比方法提炼为本质，消除了对下游性能没有贡献的附加功能，包括负面示例。这些“非对比”方法在不使用负数的情况下效果出人意料地好，即使全局最小值处于微不足道的崩溃状态。我们对这些非对比方法进行了实证分析，发现 SimSiam 对数据集和模型大小异常敏感。特别是，如果模型相对于数据集大小太小，SimSiam 表示会经历部分维度崩溃。我们提出了一个指标来衡量这种崩溃的程度，并表明它可以用来预测下游任务的性能，而无需任何微调或标签。我们进一步分析架构设计选择及其对下游性能的影响。最后，我们证明，转向持续学习设置可以充当正则化器并防止崩溃，并且使用 ImageNet 上的 ResNet-18，连续训练和多历元训练之间的混合可以将线性探测精度提高多达 18 个百分点。我们的项目页面位于 https://alexanderli.com/noncontrastive-ssl/。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非对比Siamese表示学习中的崩溃现象，并提出了评估和防止崩溃的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管非对比方法如SimSiam在自监督表示学习中表现出色，但它们在模型和数据集规模不匹配时容易出现部分维度崩溃，影响下游任务性能。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种衡量崩溃程度的指标，并分析了架构设计对下游任务的影响，同时引入持续学习作为正则化方法以防止崩溃。
AI.result: 实验表明，SimSiam对数据集和模型规模高度敏感，使用持续学习与多轮训练结合的方法可提升线性探针准确率高达18个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 非对比方法的性能受模型规模和训练策略影响显著，持续学习可有效防止崩溃并提升下游任务表现。

authors_text: Benjia Zhou,Pichao Wang,Jun Wan,Yanyan Liang,Fan Wang
title: Effective Vision Transformer Training: A Data-Centric Perspective
title_zh: 有效的视觉变压器培训：以数据为中心的视角
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have shown promising performance compared with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), but the training of ViTs is much harder than CNNs. In this paper, we define several metrics, including Dynamic Data Proportion (DDP) and Knowledge Assimilation Rate (KAR), to investigate the training process, and divide it into three periods accordingly: formation, growth and exploration. In particular, at the last stage of training, we observe that only a tiny portion of training examples is used to optimize the model. Given the data-hungry nature of ViTs, we thus ask a simple but important question: is it possible to provide abundant ``effective'' training examples at EVERY stage of training? To address this issue, we need to address two critical questions, \ie, how to measure the ``effectiveness'' of individual training examples, and how to systematically generate enough number of ``effective'' examples when they are running out. To answer the first question, we find that the ``difficulty'' of training samples can be adopted as an indicator to measure the ``effectiveness'' of training samples. To cope with the second question, we propose to dynamically adjust the ``difficulty'' distribution of the training data in these evolution stages. To achieve these two purposes, we propose a novel data-centric ViT training framework to dynamically measure the ``difficulty'' of training samples and generate ``effective'' samples for models at different training stages. Furthermore, to further enlarge the number of ``effective'' samples and alleviate the overfitting problem in the late training stage of ViTs, we propose a patch-level erasing strategy dubbed PatchErasing. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed data-centric ViT training framework and techniques.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have shown promising performance compared with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), but the training of ViTs is much harder than CNNs. In this paper, we define several metrics, including Dynamic Data Proportion (DDP) and Knowledge Assimilation Rate (KAR), to investigate the training process, and divide it into three periods accordingly: formation, growth and exploration. In particular, at the last stage of training, we observe that only a tiny portion of training examples is used to optimize the model. Given the data-hungry nature of ViTs, we thus ask a simple but important question: is it possible to provide abundant ``effective'' training examples at EVERY stage of training? To address this issue, we need to address two critical questions, \ie, how to measure the ``effectiveness'' of individual training examples, and how to systematically generate enough number of ``effective'' examples when they are running out. To answer the first question, we find that the ``difficulty'' of training samples can be adopted as an indicator to measure the ``effectiveness'' of training samples. To cope with the second question, we propose to dynamically adjust the ``difficulty'' distribution of the training data in these evolution stages. To achieve these two purposes, we propose a novel data-centric ViT training framework to dynamically measure the ``difficulty'' of training samples and generate ``effective'' samples for models at different training stages. Furthermore, to further enlarge the number of ``effective'' samples and alleviate the overfitting problem in the late training stage of ViTs, we propose a patch-level erasing strategy dubbed PatchErasing. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed data-centric ViT training framework and techniques.
abstract_zh: 与卷积神经网络（CNN）相比，视觉变换器（ViT）表现出了良好的性能，但 ViT 的训练比 CNN 困难得多。在本文中，我们定义了动态数据比例（DDP）和知识同化率（KAR）等几个指标来研究训练过程，并将其分为三个阶段：形成期、成长期和探索期。特别是，在训练的最后阶段，我们观察到只有一小部分训练示例用于优化模型。鉴于 ViT 的数据需求本质，我们提出一个简单但重要的问题：是否有可能在训练的每个阶段提供丰富的“有效”训练示例？为了解决这个问题，我们需要解决两个关键问题，即如何衡量单个训练样本的“有效性”，以及如何在样本用完时系统地生成足够数量的“有效”样本。针对第一个问题，我们发现训练样本的“难度”可以作为衡量训练样本“有效性”的指标。为了解决第二个问题，我们建议在这些演化阶段动态调整训练数据的“难度”分布。为了实现这两个目的，我们提出了一种新颖的以数据为中心的 ViT 训练框架，以动态测量训练样本的“难度”，并为不同训练阶段的模型生成“有效”样本。此外，为了进一步扩大“有效”样本的数量并缓解 ViT 后期训练阶段的过拟合问题，我们提出了一种称为 PatchErasing 的补丁级擦除策略。大量实验证明了所提出的以数据为中心的 ViT 训练框架和技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文从数据视角出发，提出了一种改进视觉Transformer（ViT）训练效果的框架，通过动态调整训练数据难度分布和生成有效样本以解决ViT训练困难的问题。
AI.motivation: ViT相比CNN需要更多数据且训练难度更高，传统方法难以有效利用数据，导致训练后期样本效率低下和过拟合问题。
AI.method: 定义动态数据比例（DDP）和知识吸收率（KAR）指标划分训练阶段，提出基于样本难度的动态调整策略及PatchErasing方法，生成有效样本并优化数据分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，该数据驱动框架显著提升了ViT训练效率和模型性能，有效缓解了训练后期过拟合问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据视角优化训练过程，提出的框架为ViT训练提供了系统性解决方案，验证了动态调整数据难度和生成有效样本的重要性。

To achieve these two purposes, we propose a novel data-centric ViT training framework to dynamically measure the ``difficulty'' of training samples and generate ``effective'' samples for models at different training stages. Furthermore, to further enlarge the number of ``effective'' samples and alleviate the overfitting problem in the late training stage of ViTs, we propose a patch-level erasing strategy dubbed PatchErasing. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed data-centric ViT training framework and techniques. 与卷积神经网络（CNN）相比，视觉变换器（ViT）表现出了良好的性能，但 ViT 的训练比 CNN 困难得多。在本文中，我们定义了动态数据比例（DDP）和知识同化率（KAR）等几个指标来研究训练过程，并将其分为三个阶段：形成期、成长期和探索期。特别是，在训练的最后阶段，我们观察到只有一小部分训练示例用于优化模型。鉴于 ViT 的数据需求本质，我们提出一个简单但重要的问题：是否有可能在训练的每个阶段提供丰富的“有效”训练示例？为了解决这个问题，我们需要解决两个关键问题，即如何衡量单个训练样本的“有效性”，以及如何在样本用完时系统地生成足够数量的“有效”样本。针对第一个问题，我们发现训练样本的“难度”可以作为衡量训练样本“有效性”的指标。为了解决第二个问题，我们建议在这些演化阶段动态调整训练数据的“难度”分布。为了实现这两个目的，我们提出了一种新颖的以数据为中心的 ViT 训练框架，以动态测量训练样本的“难度”，并为不同训练阶段的模型生成“有效”样本。此外，为了进一步扩大“有效”样本的数量并缓解 ViT 后期训练阶段的过拟合问题，我们提出了一种称为 PatchErasing 的补丁级擦除策略。大量实验证明了所提出的以数据为中心的 ViT 训练框架和技术的有效性。 本文从数据视角出发，提出了一种改进视觉Transformer（ViT）训练效果的框架，通过动态调整训练数据难度分布和生成有效样本以解决ViT训练困难的问题。 Benjia Zhou,Pichao Wang,Jun Wan,Yanyan Liang,Fan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Andrew Drozdov,Nathanael Schärli,Ekin Akyürek,Nathan Scales,Xinying Song,Xinyun Chen,Olivier Bousquet,Denny Zhou
title: Compositional Semantic Parsing with Large Language Models
title_zh: 大型语言模型的组合语义解析
abstract: Humans can reason compositionally when presented with new tasks. Previous research shows that appropriate prompting techniques enable large language models (LLMs) to solve artificial compositional generalization tasks such as SCAN. In this work, we identify additional challenges in more realistic semantic parsing tasks with larger vocabulary and refine these prompting techniques to address them. Our best method is based on least-to-most prompting: it decomposes the problem using prompting-based syntactic parsing, then uses this decomposition to select appropriate exemplars and to sequentially generate the semantic parse. This method allows us to set a new state of the art for CFQ while requiring only 1% of the training data used by traditional approaches. Due to the general nature of our approach, we expect similar efforts will lead to new results in other tasks and domains, especially for knowledge-intensive applications.

Previous research shows that appropriate prompting techniques enable large language models (LLMs) to solve artificial compositional generalization tasks such as SCAN. In this work, we identify additional challenges in more realistic semantic parsing tasks with larger vocabulary and refine these prompting techniques to address them. Our best method is based on least-to-most prompting: it decomposes the problem using prompting-based syntactic parsing, then uses this decomposition to select appropriate exemplars and to sequentially generate the semantic parse. This method allows us to set a new state of the art for CFQ while requiring only 1% of the training data used by traditional approaches. Due to the general nature of our approach, we expect similar efforts will lead to new results in other tasks and domains, especially for knowledge-intensive applications.
abstract_zh: 当面临新任务时，人类可以进行组合推理。先前的研究表明，适当的提示技术使大型语言模型（LLM）能够解决人工组合泛化任务，例如 SCAN。在这项工作中，我们确定了具有更大词汇量的更现实的语义解析任务中的额外挑战，并改进了这些提示技术来解决这些挑战。我们最好的方法是基于从最少到最多的提示：它使用基于提示的句法解析来分解问题，然后使用这种分解来选择适当的范例并顺序生成语义解析。这种方法使我们能够为 CFQ 设置新的技术水平，同时只需要传统方法使用的 1% 的训练数据。由于我们方法的一般性质，我们预计类似的努力将在其他任务和领域产生新的结果，特别是对于知识密集型应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用大语言模型改进组合语义解析任务，提出新的提示技术以应对更现实的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有提示技术难以处理现实语义解析任务中的大词汇量和复杂性，需改进方法以提高效果。
AI.method: 基于最少到最多提示法，通过句法解析分解问题，选择示例并逐步生成语义解析。
AI.result: 在CFQ任务中达到新最先进水平，仅需传统方法1%的训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 该通用方法有望在其他知识密集型任务中取得突破性成果。

title: Dilated Neighborhood Attention Transformer
title_zh: 扩大的邻里注意力变压器
comment: Large results were updated according to the new checkpoint. We open-source our project at https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer
comments: Large results were updated according to the new checkpoint. We open-source our project at https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Neighborhood-Attention-Transformer
abstract: Transformers are quickly becoming one of the most heavily applied deep learning architectures across modalities, domains, and tasks. In vision, on top of ongoing efforts into plain transformers, hierarchical transformers have also gained significant attention, thanks to their performance and easy integration into existing frameworks. These models typically employ localized attention mechanisms, such as the sliding-window Neighborhood Attention (NA) or Swin Transformer's Shifted Window Self Attention. While effective at reducing self attention's quadratic complexity, local attention weakens two of the most desirable properties of self attention: long range inter-dependency modeling, and global receptive field. In this paper, we introduce Dilated Neighborhood Attention (DiNA), a natural, flexible and efficient extension to NA that can capture more global context and expand receptive fields exponentially at no additional cost. NA's local attention and DiNA's sparse global attention complement each other, and therefore we introduce Dilated Neighborhood Attention Transformer (DiNAT), a new hierarchical vision transformer built upon both. DiNAT variants enjoy significant improvements over strong baselines such as NAT, Swin, and ConvNeXt. Our large model is faster and ahead of its Swin counterpart by 1.6% box AP in COCO object detection, 1.4% mask AP in COCO instance segmentation, and 1.4% mIoU in ADE20K semantic segmentation. Paired with new frameworks, our large variant is the new state of the art panoptic segmentation model on COCO (58.5 PQ) and ADE20K (49.4 PQ), and instance segmentation model on Cityscapes (45.1 AP) and ADE20K (35.4 AP) (no extra data). It also matches the state of the art specialized semantic segmentation models on ADE20K (58.1 mIoU), and ranks second on Cityscapes (84.5 mIoU) (no extra data).

In vision, on top of ongoing efforts into plain transformers, hierarchical transformers have also gained significant attention, thanks to their performance and easy integration into existing frameworks. NA's local attention and DiNA's sparse global attention complement each other, and therefore we introduce Dilated Neighborhood Attention Transformer (DiNAT), a new hierarchical vision transformer built upon both. Our large model is faster and ahead of its Swin counterpart by 1.6% box AP in COCO object detection, 1.4% mask AP in COCO instance segmentation, and 1.4% mIoU in ADE20K semantic segmentation. Paired with new frameworks, our large variant is the new state of the art panoptic segmentation model on COCO (58.5 PQ) and ADE20K (49.4 PQ), and instance segmentation model on Cityscapes (45.1 AP) and ADE20K (35.4 AP) (no extra data). It also matches the state of the art specialized semantic segmentation models on ADE20K (58.1 mIoU), and ranks second on Cityscapes (84.5 mIoU) (no extra data).
abstract_zh: Transformer 正迅速成为跨模式、领域和任务应用最广泛的深度学习架构之一。在愿景中，除了对普通变压器的持续努力之外，分层变压器也因其性能和易于集成到现有框架中而获得了极大的关注。这些模型通常采用局部注意力机制，例如滑动窗口 Neighborhood Attention (NA) 或 Swin Transformer 的 Shifted Window Self Attention。虽然局部注意力可以有效降低自注意力的二次复杂度，但它削弱了自注意力的两个最理想的属性：远程相互依赖建模和全局感受野。在本文中，我们介绍了扩张邻域注意力（DiNA），这是对 NA 的一种自然、灵活且高效的扩展，可以捕获更多全局上下文并以指数方式扩展感受野，而无需额外成本。 NA 的局部注意力和 DiNA 的稀疏全局注意力相辅相成，因此我们引入了 Dilated Neighborhood Attention Transformer (DiNAT)，这是一种基于两者的新型分层视觉转换器。 DiNAT 变体相对于 NAT、Swin 和 ConvNeXt 等强基线有显着改进。我们的大型模型速度更快，并且在 COCO 对象检测中领先 Swin 模型 1.6%，在 COCO 实例分割中领先 1.4% 的掩模 AP，在 ADE20K 语义分割中领先 1.4% mIoU。与新框架配合使用，我们的大型变体是 COCO (58.5 PQ) 和 ADE20K (49.4 PQ) 上最新的全景分割模型，以及 Cityscapes (45.1 AP) 和 ADE20K (35.4 AP) 上的实例分割模型（无额外数据）。它还与 ADE20K 上最先进的专用语义分割模型（58.1 mIoU）相匹配，并在 Cityscapes 上排名第二（84.5 mIoU）（无额外数据）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的层次化视觉Transformer模型DiNAT，通过引入稀疏全局注意力机制DiNA来扩展感受野并提升长距离依赖建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有局部注意力机制（如滑动窗口或移位窗口）虽能降低计算复杂度，但削弱了Transformer的长距离依赖建模能力和全局感受野，限制了性能表现。
AI.method: 设计稀疏全局注意力机制DiNA，在保持计算成本不变的前提下指数级扩展感受野；结合局部注意力与DiNA构建层次化视觉Transformer DiNAT，通过分层结构实现多尺度特征融合。
AI.result: 在COCO目标检测、ADE20K语义分割等任务中，DiNAT大模型相较Swin等基线提升1.4%-1.6%，在全景分割和实例分割任务中达到SOTA，且无需额外数据。
AI.conclusion: DiNAT通过有效结合局部与稀疏全局注意力机制，在保持效率的同时显著提升了视觉Transformer的全局建模能力，为多任务视觉模型提供了新思路。

title: REST: REtrieve & Self-Train for generative action recognition
title_zh: 休息：检索和自我训练以进行生成动作识别
abstract: This work is on training a generative action/video recognition model whose output is a free-form action-specific caption describing the video (rather than an action class label). A generative approach has practical advantages like producing more fine-grained and human-readable output, and being naturally open-world. To this end, we propose to adapt a pre-trained generative Vision & Language (V&L) Foundation Model for video/action recognition. While recently there have been a few attempts to adapt V&L models trained with contrastive learning (e.g. CLIP) for video/action, to the best of our knowledge, we propose the very first method that sets outs to accomplish this goal for a generative model. We firstly show that direct fine-tuning of a generative model to produce action classes suffers from severe overfitting. To alleviate this, we introduce REST, a training framework consisting of two key components: an unsupervised method for adapting the generative model to action/video by means of pseudo-caption generation and Self-training, i.e. without using any action-specific labels; (b) a Retrieval approach based on CLIP for discovering a diverse set of pseudo-captions for each video to train the model. Importantly, we show that both components are necessary to obtain high accuracy. We evaluate REST on the problem of zero-shot action recognition where we show that our approach is very competitive when compared to contrastive learning-based methods. Code will be made available.

A generative approach has practical advantages like producing more fine-grained and human-readable output, and being naturally open-world. To this end, we propose to adapt a pre-trained generative Vision & Language (V&L) Foundation Model for video/action recognition. Importantly, we show that both components are necessary to obtain high accuracy. abstract_zh: 这项工作是关于训练生成动作/视频识别模型，其输出是描述视频的自由格式的动作特定标题（而不是动作类标签）。生成方法具有实际优势，例如产生更细粒度和人类可读的输出，并且自然是开放世界的。为此，我们建议采用预先训练的生成视觉和语言（V＆L）基础模型来进行视频/动作识别。虽然最近有一些尝试将通过对比学习（例如 CLIP）训练的 V&L 模型应用于视频/动作，但据我们所知，我们提出了第一个方法来实现生成模型的这一目标。我们首先表明，直接微调生成模型来生成动作类会遭受严重的过度拟合。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了 REST，这是一个由两个关键组件组成的训练框架：一种无监督方法，通过伪字幕生成和自我训练使生成模型适应动作/视频，即不使用任何特定于动作的标签； (b) 基于 CLIP 的检索方法，用于为每个视频发现一组不同的伪字幕来训练模型。重要的是，我们证明这两个组件都是获得高精度所必需的。我们在零样本动作识别问题上评估 REST，结果表明，与基于学习的对比方法相比，我们的方法非常有竞争力。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REST框架，通过生成式模型实现无需人工标注的动作视频识别，输出自由形式的动作描述而非类别标签。
AI.motivation: 传统动作识别依赖人工标注类别标签，存在开放世界适应性差、输出不够细粒度等问题。现有对比学习模型（如CLIP）难以直接适配生成式模型，需探索新方法。
AI.method: REST包含两部分：1）无监督伪字幕生成与自训练，无需动作标签；2）基于CLIP的检索方法为每个视频生成多样化伪字幕。两个组件协同提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在零样本动作识别任务中，REST性能与对比学习方法相当，验证了生成式模型在开放场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: REST证明了生成式模型可通过伪字幕自训练实现高质量动作识别，为开放世界视频理解提供新思路，代码将开源。

title: Optimistic MLE -- A Generic Model-based Algorithm for Partially Observable Sequential Decision Making
title_zh: 乐观 MLE——一种基于通用模型的部分可观察序列决策算法
abstract: This paper introduces a simple efficient learning algorithms for general sequential decision making. The algorithm combines Optimism for exploration with Maximum Likelihood Estimation for model estimation, which is thus named OMLE. We prove that OMLE learns the near-optimal policies of an enormously rich class of sequential decision making problems in a polynomial number of samples. This rich class includes not only a majority of known tractable model-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) problems (such as tabular MDPs, factored MDPs, low witness rank problems, tabular weakly-revealing/observable POMDPs and multi-step decodable POMDPs), but also many new challenging RL problems especially in the partially observable setting that were not previously known to be tractable. Notably, the new problems addressed by this paper include (1) observable POMDPs with continuous observation and function approximation, where we achieve the first sample complexity that is completely independent of the size of observation space; (2) well-conditioned low-rank sequential decision making problems (also known as Predictive State Representations (PSRs)), which include and generalize all known tractable POMDP examples under a more intrinsic representation; (3) general sequential decision making problems under SAIL condition, which unifies our existing understandings of model-based RL in both fully observable and partially observable settings. SAIL condition is identified by this paper, which can be viewed as a natural generalization of Bellman/witness rank to address partial observability. This paper also presents a reward-free variant of OMLE algorithm, which learns approximate dynamic models that enable the computation of near-optimal policies for all reward functions simultaneously.
summary: This paper introduces a simple efficient learning algorithms for general sequential decision making. The algorithm combines Optimism for exploration with Maximum Likelihood Estimation for model estimation, which is thus named OMLE. We prove that OMLE learns the near-optimal policies of an enormously rich class of sequential decision making problems in a polynomial number of samples. This rich class includes not only a majority of known tractable model-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) problems (such as tabular MDPs, factored MDPs, low witness rank problems, tabular weakly-revealing/observable POMDPs and multi-step decodable POMDPs), but also many new challenging RL problems especially in the partially observable setting that were not previously known to be tractable. Notably, the new problems addressed by this paper include (1) observable POMDPs with continuous observation and function approximation, where we achieve the first sample complexity that is completely independent of the size of observation space; (2) well-conditioned low-rank sequential decision making problems (also known as Predictive State Representations (PSRs)), which include and generalize all known tractable POMDP examples under a more intrinsic representation; (3) general sequential decision making problems under SAIL condition, which unifies our existing understandings of model-based RL in both fully observable and partially observable settings. SAIL condition is identified by this paper, which can be viewed as a natural generalization of Bellman/witness rank to address partial observability. This paper also presents a reward-free variant of OMLE algorithm, which learns approximate dynamic models that enable the computation of near-optimal policies for all reward functions simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于一般顺序决策的简单有效的学习算法。该算法结合了用于探索的乐观主义和用于模型估计的最大似然估计，因此被命名为 OMLE。我们证明 OMLE 可以在多项式数量的样本中学习大量序列决策问题的近乎最优策略。这个丰富的类别不仅包括大多数已知的基于模型的强化学习 (RL) 问题（例如表格 MDP、分解 MDP、低见证等级问题、表格弱揭示/可观察 POMDP 和多步可解码 POMDP），而且还包括许多新的具有挑战性的 RL 问题，特别是在部分可观察设置中，这些问题以前不知道是可处理的。值得注意的是，本文解决的新问题包括（1）具有连续观测和函数逼近的可观测POMDP，其中我们实现了完全独立于观测空间大小的第一个样本复杂度； (2) 条件良好的低秩顺序决策问题（也称为预测状态表示（PSR）），其中包括并概括了在更内在的表示下所有已知的易处理的 POMDP 示例； (3) SAIL条件下的一般顺序决策问题，它统一了我们对完全可观察和部分可观察设置中基于模型的强化学习的现有理解。本文确定了 SAIL 条件，可以将其视为贝尔曼/见证等级的自然概括，以解决部分可观察性问题。本文还提出了 OMLE 算法的无奖励变体，该算法学习近似动态模型，从而能够同时计算所有奖励函数的接近最优策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OMLE的基于模型的算法，用于解决部分可观测的序贯决策问题，结合乐观探索与最大似然估计。
AI.motivation: 现有模型基于强化学习方法在部分可观测场景下存在样本复杂度高、难以处理连续观测空间等局限，需设计通用高效算法以应对更广泛的问题类。
AI.method: OMLE算法通过乐观探索策略与最大似然估计结合，构建动态模型并证明其能在多项式样本内学习近似最优策略，适用于连续观测、低秩序贯决策及SAIL条件问题。
AI.result: OMLE首次实现了与观测空间大小无关的样本复杂度，覆盖了包括连续观测POMDP、低秩PSR及SAIL条件下的序贯决策问题，并提出了无奖励变体以统一处理所有奖励函数。
AI.conclusion: OMLE为部分可观测序贯决策提供了通用高效解决方案，通过SAIL条件统一了全可观测与部分可观测场景的模型基于RL理解，推动了该领域理论边界。

SAIL condition is identified by this paper, which can be viewed as a natural generalization of Bellman/witness rank to address partial observability. title: Partially Observable RL with B-Stability: Unified Structural Condition and Sharp Sample-Efficient Algorithms
title_zh: 具有 B 稳定性的部分可观测 RL：统一的结构条件和尖锐的样本效率算法
abstract: Partial Observability -- where agents can only observe partial information about the true underlying state of the system -- is ubiquitous in real-world applications of Reinforcement Learning (RL). Theoretically, learning a near-optimal policy under partial observability is known to be hard in the worst case due to an exponential sample complexity lower bound. Recent work has identified several tractable subclasses that are learnable with polynomial samples, such as Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) with certain revealing or decodability conditions. However, this line of research is still in its infancy, where (1) unified structural conditions enabling sample-efficient learning are lacking; (2) existing sample complexities for known tractable subclasses are far from sharp; and (3) fewer sample-efficient algorithms are available than in fully observable RL. This paper advances all three aspects above for Partially Observable RL in the general setting of Predictive State Representations (PSRs). First, we propose a natural and unified structural condition for PSRs called \emph{B-stability}. B-stable PSRs encompasses the vast majority of known tractable subclasses such as weakly revealing POMDPs, low-rank future-sufficient POMDPs, decodable POMDPs, and regular PSRs. Next, we show that any B-stable PSR can be learned with polynomial samples in relevant problem parameters. When instantiated in the aforementioned subclasses, our sample complexities improve substantially over the current best ones. Finally, our results are achieved by three algorithms simultaneously: Optimistic Maximum Likelihood Estimation, Estimation-to-Decisions, and Model-Based Optimistic Posterior Sampling. The latter two algorithms are new for sample-efficient learning of POMDPs/PSRs.
summary: Partial Observability -- where agents can only observe partial information about the true underlying state of the system -- is ubiquitous in real-world applications of Reinforcement Learning (RL). Theoretically, learning a near-optimal policy under partial observability is known to be hard in the worst case due to an exponential sample complexity lower bound. Recent work has identified several tractable subclasses that are learnable with polynomial samples, such as Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) with certain revealing or decodability conditions. However, this line of research is still in its infancy, where (1) unified structural conditions enabling sample-efficient learning are lacking; (2) existing sample complexities for known tractable subclasses are far from sharp; and (3) fewer sample-efficient algorithms are available than in fully observable RL. This paper advances all three aspects above for Partially Observable RL in the general setting of Predictive State Representations (PSRs). First, we propose a natural and unified structural condition for PSRs called \emph{B-stability}. B-stable PSRs encompasses the vast majority of known tractable subclasses such as weakly revealing POMDPs, low-rank future-sufficient POMDPs, decodable POMDPs, and regular PSRs. Next, we show that any B-stable PSR can be learned with polynomial samples in relevant problem parameters. When instantiated in the aforementioned subclasses, our sample complexities improve substantially over the current best ones. Finally, our results are achieved by three algorithms simultaneously: Optimistic Maximum Likelihood Estimation, Estimation-to-Decisions, and Model-Based Optimistic Posterior Sampling. The latter two algorithms are new for sample-efficient learning of POMDPs/PSRs.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察性——代理只能观察有关系统真实底层状态的部分信息——在强化学习（RL）的现实应用中无处不在。从理论上讲，由于指数样本复杂度下限，在最坏的情况下，在部分可观察性下学习接近最优的策略是很困难的。最近的工作已经确定了几个可通过多项式样本学习的易于处理的子类，例如具有某些揭示或可解码条件的部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）。然而，这方面的研究仍处于起步阶段，（1）缺乏样本高效学习的统一结构条件； (2) 已知易处理子类的现有样本复杂性远非尖锐； (3) 与完全可观察的强化学习相比，可用的样本效率算法更少。本文在预测状态表示（PSR）的一般设置中推进了部分可观察强化学习的上述所有三个方面。首先，我们提出了 PSR 的自然且统一的结构条件，称为 \emph{B-stability}。 B 稳定 PSR 涵盖绝大多数已知的易处理子类，例如弱揭示 POMDP、低秩未来充足 POMDP、可解码 POMDP 和常规 PSR。接下来，我们证明任何 B 稳定 PSR 都可以通过相关问题参数中的多项式样本来学习。当在上述子类中实例化时，我们的样本复杂度比当前最好的样本复杂度有了显着提高。最后，我们的结果是通过三种算法同时实现的：乐观最大似然估计、估计到决策和基于模型的乐观后验采样。后两种算法对于 POMDP/PSR 的样本高效学习来说是新的。

AI.tldr: 本文针对部分可观测强化学习（POMDP/PSR）中的样本效率问题，提出统一的B稳定性条件及高效算法。
AI.motivation: 部分可观测环境下的强化学习存在样本复杂度指数级增长的理论下限，现有可学习子类缺乏统一结构条件且样本复杂度不精确。
AI.method: 提出B稳定性作为PSR的统一结构条件，并设计三种算法：乐观最大似然估计、估计到决策、基于模型的乐观后验抽样。
AI.result: 证明B稳定PSR可多项式样本学习，子类样本复杂度显著优于现有结果，提出两种新型高效算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过B稳定性条件和算法设计，系统性解决了部分可观测RL的样本效率问题，推动该领域理论与方法的进展。

authors_text: Ben Poole,Ajay Jain,Jonathan T. Barron,Ben Mildenhall
title: DreamFusion: Text-to-3D using 2D Diffusion
title_zh: DreamFusion：使用 2D 扩散将文本转为 3D
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in text-to-image synthesis have been driven by diffusion models trained on billions of image-text pairs. Adapting this approach to 3D synthesis would require large-scale datasets of labeled 3D data and efficient architectures for denoising 3D data, neither of which currently exist. In this work, we circumvent these limitations by using a pretrained 2D text-to-image diffusion model to perform text-to-3D synthesis. We introduce a loss based on probability density distillation that enables the use of a 2D diffusion model as a prior for optimization of a parametric image generator. Using this loss in a DeepDream-like procedure, we optimize a randomly-initialized 3D model (a Neural Radiance Field, or NeRF) via gradient descent such that its 2D renderings from random angles achieve a low loss. The resulting 3D model of the given text can be viewed from any angle, relit by arbitrary illumination, or composited into any 3D environment. Our approach requires no 3D training data and no modifications to the image diffusion model, demonstrating the effectiveness of pretrained image diffusion models as priors.
summary: Recent breakthroughs in text-to-image synthesis have been driven by diffusion models trained on billions of image-text pairs. Adapting this approach to 3D synthesis would require large-scale datasets of labeled 3D data and efficient architectures for denoising 3D data, neither of which currently exist. In this work, we circumvent these limitations by using a pretrained 2D text-to-image diffusion model to perform text-to-3D synthesis. We introduce a loss based on probability density distillation that enables the use of a 2D diffusion model as a prior for optimization of a parametric image generator. Using this loss in a DeepDream-like procedure, we optimize a randomly-initialized 3D model (a Neural Radiance Field, or NeRF) via gradient descent such that its 2D renderings from random angles achieve a low loss. The resulting 3D model of the given text can be viewed from any angle, relit by arbitrary illumination, or composited into any 3D environment. Our approach requires no 3D training data and no modifications to the image diffusion model, demonstrating the effectiveness of pretrained image diffusion models as priors.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像合成的最新突破是由数十亿图像文本对训练的扩散模型推动的。使这种方法适应 3D 合成需要大规模的标记 3D 数据数据集和用于去噪 3D 数据的高效架构，而这两者目前都不存在。在这项工作中，我们通过使用预训练的 2D 文本到图像扩散模型来执行文本到 3D 合成，从而规避了这些限制。我们引入了基于概率密度蒸馏的损失，该损失使得能够使用二维扩散模型作为参数图像生成器优化的先验。在类似 DeepDream 的过程中使用这种损失，我们通过梯度下降优化随机初始化的 3D 模型（神经辐射场，或 NeRF），使其从随机角度进行的 2D 渲染实现低损失。给定文本的最终 3D 模型可以从任何角度查看、通过任意照明重新点亮或合成到任何 3D 环境中。我们的方法不需要 3D 训练数据，也不需要对图像扩散模型进行修改，证明了预训练图像扩散模型作为先验的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D训练数据的文本到3D生成方法，通过预训练的2D扩散模型优化神经辐射场（NeRF）实现3D合成。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成方法受限于缺乏大规模标注3D数据集及高效的3D去噪架构，而2D扩散模型在文本到图像生成中已取得突破。
AI.method: 设计基于概率密度蒸馏的损失函数，利用预训练2D扩散模型作为先验，通过梯度下降优化随机初始化的NeRF参数，使多视角渲染图像损失最小化。
AI.result: 生成的3D模型支持任意视角观察、光照重定向及环境合成，无需3D训练数据且不修改原2D扩散模型。
AI.conclusion: 预训练图像扩散模型可作为有效先验，为文本到3D生成提供新思路，突破传统3D数据依赖限制。

Our approach requires no 3D training data and no modifications to the image diffusion model, demonstrating the effectiveness of pretrained image diffusion models as priors. 文本到图像合成的最新突破是由数十亿图像文本对训练的扩散模型推动的。使这种方法适应 3D 合成需要大规模的标记 3D 数据数据集和用于去噪 3D 数据的高效架构，而这两者目前都不存在。在这项工作中，我们通过使用预训练的 2D 文本到图像扩散模型来执行文本到 3D 合成，从而规避了这些限制。我们引入了基于概率密度蒸馏的损失，该损失使得能够使用二维扩散模型作为参数图像生成器优化的先验。在类似 DeepDream 的过程中使用这种损失，我们通过梯度下降优化随机初始化的 3D 模型（神经辐射场，或 NeRF），使其从随机角度进行的 2D 渲染实现低损失。给定文本的最终 3D 模型可以从任何角度查看、通过任意照明重新点亮或合成到任何 3D 环境中。我们的方法不需要 3D 训练数据，也不需要对图像扩散模型进行修改，证明了预训练图像扩散模型作为先验的有效性。 本文提出一种无需3D训练数据的文本到3D生成方法，通过预训练的2D扩散模型优化神经辐射场（NeRF）实现3D合成。 Ben Poole,Ajay Jain,Jonathan T. Barron,Ben Mildenhall cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: Stop Wasting My Time! Saving Days of ImageNet and BERT Training with Latest Weight Averaging
title_zh: 别再浪费我的时间了！使用最新的权重平均节省 ImageNet 和 BERT 训练的时间
abstract: Training vision or language models on large datasets can take days, if not weeks. We show that averaging the weights of the k latest checkpoints, each collected at the end of an epoch, can speed up the training progression in terms of loss and accuracy by dozens of epochs, corresponding to time savings up to ~68 and ~30 GPU hours when training a ResNet50 on ImageNet and RoBERTa-Base model on WikiText-103, respectively. We also provide the code and model checkpoint trajectory to reproduce the results and facilitate research on reusing historical weights for faster convergence.
summary: Training vision or language models on large datasets can take days, if not weeks. We show that averaging the weights of the k latest checkpoints, each collected at the end of an epoch, can speed up the training progression in terms of loss and accuracy by dozens of epochs, corresponding to time savings up to ~68 and ~30 GPU hours when training a ResNet50 on ImageNet and RoBERTa-Base model on WikiText-103, respectively. We also provide the code and model checkpoint trajectory to reproduce the results and facilitate research on reusing historical weights for faster convergence.
abstract_zh: 在大型数据集上训练视觉或语言模型可能需要几天甚至几周的时间。我们表明，对 k 个最新检查点（每个检查点在一个 epoch 结束时收集）的权重进行平均，可以将损失和准确度方面的训练进度加快数十个 epoch，相当于在 ImageNet 上训练 ResNet50 和在 WikiText-103 上训练 RoBERTa-Base 模型时分别节省高达约 68 和约 30 个 GPU 小时的时间。我们还提供代码和模型检查点轨迹来重现结果并促进重用历史权重以实现更快收敛的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过平均最新权重来加速深度学习模型训练，节省ImageNet和BERT训练时间。
AI.motivation: 训练大型视觉或语言模型耗时数日甚至数周，亟需提升训练效率的方法。
AI.method: 在每个epoch结束时收集k个最新检查点，通过平均这些检查点的权重加速训练收敛。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上训练ResNet50节省约68 GPU小时，在WikiText-103上训练RoBERTa-Base节省约30 GPU小时。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著减少训练时间，提供代码和检查点轨迹以促进历史权重复用研究。

title: Parameter-Conditioned Reachable Sets for Updating Safety Assurances Online
title_zh: 用于在线更新安全保证的参数条件可达集
abstract: Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability analysis is a powerful tool for analyzing the safety of autonomous systems. However, the provided safety assurances are often predicated on the assumption that once deployed, the system or its environment does not evolve. Online, however, an autonomous system might experience changes in system dynamics, control authority, external disturbances, and/or the surrounding environment, requiring updated safety assurances. Rather than restarting the safety analysis from scratch, which can be time-consuming and often intractable to perform online, we propose to compute \textit{parameter-conditioned} reachable sets. Assuming expected system and environment changes can be parameterized, we treat these parameters as virtual states in the system and leverage recent advances in high-dimensional reachability analysis to solve the corresponding reachability problem offline. This results in a family of reachable sets that is parameterized by the environment and system factors. Online, as these factors change, the system can simply query the corresponding safety function from this family to ensure system safety, enabling a real-time update of the safety assurances. Through various simulation studies, we demonstrate the capability of our approach in maintaining system safety despite the system and environment evolution.
summary: Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability analysis is a powerful tool for analyzing the safety of autonomous systems. However, the provided safety assurances are often predicated on the assumption that once deployed, the system or its environment does not evolve. Online, however, an autonomous system might experience changes in system dynamics, control authority, external disturbances, and/or the surrounding environment, requiring updated safety assurances. Rather than restarting the safety analysis from scratch, which can be time-consuming and often intractable to perform online, we propose to compute \textit{parameter-conditioned} reachable sets. Assuming expected system and environment changes can be parameterized, we treat these parameters as virtual states in the system and leverage recent advances in high-dimensional reachability analysis to solve the corresponding reachability problem offline. This results in a family of reachable sets that is parameterized by the environment and system factors. Online, as these factors change, the system can simply query the corresponding safety function from this family to ensure system safety, enabling a real-time update of the safety assurances. Through various simulation studies, we demonstrate the capability of our approach in maintaining system safety despite the system and environment evolution.
abstract_zh: Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) 可达性分析是分析自主系统安全性的强大工具。然而，所提供的安全保证通常基于这样的假设：一旦部署，系统或其环境就不会发生变化。然而，在网上，自主系统可能会经历系统动力学、控制权限、外部干扰和/或周围环境的变化，需要更新的安全保证。我们建议计算 \textit{参数条件}可达集，而不是从头开始重新启动安全分析，这可能非常耗时且通常难以在线执行。假设预期的系统和环境变化可以参数化，我们将这些参数视为系统中的虚拟状态，并利用高维可达性分析的最新进展来离线解决相应的可达性问题。这会产生一系列由环境和系统因素参数化的可达集。在线上，当这些因素发生变化时，系统可以简单地查询该家族相应的安全功能来确保系统安全，从而实现安全保障的实时更新。通过各种模拟研究，我们展示了我们的方法在系统和环境不断演变的情况下维持系统安全的能力。

AI.tldr: 提出参数条件可达集方法，在线更新自主系统的安全保证
AI.motivation: 传统安全分析假设系统和环境不变，但实际中系统动态、控制权限等可能变化，需实时更新安全保证，而传统方法在线重新分析耗时且不可行
AI.method: 将系统和环境变化参数化为虚拟状态，利用高维可达性分析离线计算参数化可达集，实现在线快速查询
AI.result: 通过仿真验证方法在系统和环境变化下能有效维护安全
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法可实现实时安全保证更新，适用于动态系统和环境变化场景

authors_text: Adrien Bennetot,Gianni Franchi,Javier Del Ser,Raja Chatila,Natalia Diaz-Rodriguez
title: Greybox XAI: a Neural-Symbolic learning framework to produce interpretable predictions for image classification
title_zh: Greybox XAI：一种神经符号学习框架，用于为图像分类生成可解释的预测
abstract: Although Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have great generalization and prediction capabilities, their functioning does not allow a detailed explanation of their behavior. Opaque deep learning models are increasingly used to make important predictions in critical environments, and the danger is that they make and use predictions that cannot be justified or legitimized. Several eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods that separate explanations from machine learning models have emerged, but have shortcomings in faithfulness to the model actual functioning and robustness. As a result, there is a widespread agreement on the importance of endowing Deep Learning models with explanatory capabilities so that they can themselves provide an answer to why a particular prediction was made. First, we address the problem of the lack of universal criteria for XAI by formalizing what an explanation is. We also introduced a set of axioms and definitions to clarify XAI from a mathematical perspective. Finally, we present the Greybox XAI, a framework that composes a DNN and a transparent model thanks to the use of a symbolic Knowledge Base (KB). We extract a KB from the dataset and use it to train a transparent model (i.e., a logistic regression). An encoder-decoder architecture is trained on RGB images to produce an output similar to the KB used by the transparent model. Once the two models are trained independently, they are used compositionally to form an explainable predictive model. We show how this new architecture is accurate and explainable in several datasets.
summary: Although Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have great generalization and prediction capabilities, their functioning does not allow a detailed explanation of their behavior. Opaque deep learning models are increasingly used to make important predictions in critical environments, and the danger is that they make and use predictions that cannot be justified or legitimized. Several eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods that separate explanations from machine learning models have emerged, but have shortcomings in faithfulness to the model actual functioning and robustness. As a result, there is a widespread agreement on the importance of endowing Deep Learning models with explanatory capabilities so that they can themselves provide an answer to why a particular prediction was made. First, we address the problem of the lack of universal criteria for XAI by formalizing what an explanation is. We also introduced a set of axioms and definitions to clarify XAI from a mathematical perspective. Finally, we present the Greybox XAI, a framework that composes a DNN and a transparent model thanks to the use of a symbolic Knowledge Base (KB). We extract a KB from the dataset and use it to train a transparent model (i.e., a logistic regression). An encoder-decoder architecture is trained on RGB images to produce an output similar to the KB used by the transparent model. Once the two models are trained independently, they are used compositionally to form an explainable predictive model. We show how this new architecture is accurate and explainable in several datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有强大的泛化和预测能力，但其功能无法详细解释其行为。不透明的深度学习模型越来越多地用于在关键环境中做出重要预测，其危险在于它们做出和使用的预测是不合理或合法的。已经出现了几种将解释与机器学习模型分开的可解释人工智能（XAI）方法，但在忠实于模型实际功能和鲁棒性方面存在缺陷。因此，人们普遍认为赋予深度学习模型解释能力的重要性，以便它们本身可以提供为什么做出特定预测的答案。首先，我们通过形式化解释来解决 XAI 缺乏通用标准的问题。我们还引入了一组公理和定义，从数学角度阐明 XAI。最后，我们提出了 Greybox XAI，这是一个通过使用符号知识库 (KB) 来组成 DNN 和透明模型的框架。我们从数据集中提取 KB 并用它来训练透明模型（即逻辑回归）。编码器-解码器架构在 RGB 图像上进行训练，以产生与透明模型使用的 KB 类似的输出。一旦两个模型被独立训练，它们就会被组合起来形成一个可解释的预测模型。我们展示了这种新架构如何在多个数据集中准确且可解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Greybox XAI框架，通过结合深度神经网络与透明模型，生成可解释的图像分类预测。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽具强大预测能力，但其黑箱特性导致预测结果难以解释，存在关键应用中的信任风险。现有XAI方法在忠实性和鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 构建神经符号学习框架，从数据集中提取符号知识库（KB）训练透明模型（逻辑回归），同时训练编码器-解码器生成与KB兼容的图像特征，组合两模型实现可解释预测。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了该框架在保持高准确性的同时，能够提供符合实际模型行为的可解释预测。
AI.conclusion: Greybox XAI通过融合神经网络与符号系统，有效提升了深度学习模型的可解释性，为可信AI提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出Greybox XAI框架，通过结合深度神经网络与透明模型，生成可解释的图像分类预测。
motivation: 深度学习模型虽具强大预测能力，但其黑箱特性导致预测结果难以解释，存在关键应用中的信任风险。现有XAI方法在忠实性和鲁棒性方面存在不足。
method: 构建神经符号学习框架，从数据集中提取符号知识库（KB）训练透明模型（逻辑回归），同时训练编码器-解码器生成与KB兼容的图像特征，组合两模型实现可解释预测。
result: 在多个数据集上验证了该框架在保持高准确性的同时，能够提供符合实际模型行为的可解释预测。
conclusion: Greybox XAI通过融合神经网络与符号系统，有效提升了深度学习模型的可解释性，为可信AI提供了新思路。
search_text: Greybox XAI: a Neural-Symbolic learning framework to produce interpretable predictions for image classification Greybox XAI：一种神经符号学习框架，用于为图像分类生成可解释的预测 Although Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have great generalization and prediction capabilities, their functioning does not allow a detailed explanation of their behavior. Opaque deep learning models are increasingly used to make important predictions in critical environments, and the danger is that they make and use predictions that cannot be justified or legitimized. Several eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods that separate explanations from machine learning models have emerged, but have shortcomings in faithfulness to the model actual functioning and robustness. As a result, there is a widespread agreement on the importance of endowing Deep Learning models with explanatory capabilities so that they can themselves provide an answer to why a particular prediction was made. First, we address the problem of the lack of universal criteria for XAI by formalizing what an explanation is. We also introduced a set of axioms and definitions to clarify XAI from a mathematical perspective. Finally, we present the Greybox XAI, a framework that composes a DNN and a transparent model thanks to the use of a symbolic Knowledge Base (KB). We extract a KB from the dataset and use it to train a transparent model (i.e., a logistic regression). An encoder-decoder architecture is trained on RGB images to produce an output similar to the KB used by the transparent model. Once the two models are trained independently, they are used compositionally to form an explainable predictive model. We show how this new architecture is accurate and explainable in several datasets. 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有强大的泛化和预测能力，但其功能无法详细解释其行为。不透明的深度学习模型越来越多地用于在关键环境中做出重要预测，其危险在于它们做出和使用的预测是不合理或合法的。已经出现了几种将解释与机器学习模型分开的可解释人工智能（XAI）方法，但在忠实于模型实际功能和鲁棒性方面存在缺陷。因此，人们普遍认为赋予深度学习模型解释能力的重要性，以便它们本身可以提供为什么做出特定预测的答案。首先，我们通过形式化解释来解决 XAI 缺乏通用标准的问题。我们还引入了一组公理和定义，从数学角度阐明 XAI。最后，我们提出了 Greybox XAI，这是一个通过使用符号知识库 (KB) 来组成 DNN 和透明模型的框架。我们从数据集中提取 KB 并用它来训练透明模型（即逻辑回归）。编码器-解码器架构在 RGB 图像上进行训练，以产生与透明模型使用的 KB 类似的输出。一旦两个模型被独立训练，它们就会被组合起来形成一个可解释的预测模型。我们展示了这种新架构如何在多个数据集中准确且可解释。 本文提出Greybox XAI框架，通过结合深度神经网络与透明模型，生成可解释的图像分类预测。 Adrien Bennetot,Gianni Franchi,Javier Del Ser,Raja Chatila,Natalia Diaz-Rodriguez cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Deep Unfolding for Iterative Stripe Noise Removal
title_zh: 深度展开迭代条纹噪声消除
comment: Accepted in the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) track of the 2022 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (IEEE WCCI 2022)
comments: Accepted in the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) track of the 2022 IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence (IEEE WCCI 2022)
abstract: The non-uniform photoelectric response of infrared imaging systems results in fixed-pattern stripe noise being superimposed on infrared images, which severely reduces image quality. As the applications of degraded infrared images are limited, it is crucial to effectively preserve original details. Existing image destriping methods struggle to concurrently remove all stripe noise artifacts, preserve image details and structures, and balance real-time performance. In this paper we propose a novel algorithm for destriping degraded images, which takes advantage of neighbouring column signal correlation to remove independent column stripe noise. This is achieved through an iterative deep unfolding algorithm where the estimated noise of one network iteration is used as input to the next iteration. This progression substantially reduces the search space of possible function approximations, allowing for efficient training on larger datasets. The proposed method allows for a more precise estimation of stripe noise to preserve scene details more accurately. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms existing destriping methods on artificially corrupted images on both quantitative and qualitative assessments.

abstract_zh: 红外成像系统的光电响应不均匀，导致红外图像上叠加固定图案条纹噪声，严重降低图像质量。由于退化红外图像的应用受到限制，有效保留原始细节至关重要。现有的图像去条纹方法很难同时消除所有条纹噪声伪影、保留图像细节和结构以及平衡实时性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的去条纹退化图像算法，该算法利用相邻列信号相关性来去除独立的列条纹噪声。这是通过迭代深度展开算法实现的，其中一次网络迭代的估计噪声用作下一次迭代的输入。这种进展大大减少了可能的函数近似的搜索空间，从而允许对更大的数据集进行有效的训练。所提出的方法允许更精确地估计条纹噪声，以更准确地保留场景细节。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的模型在定量和定性评估方面都优于人工损坏图像的现有去条纹方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度展开的迭代算法，用于去除红外图像中的固定模式条纹噪声，同时保留图像细节。
AI.motivation: 现有去条纹方法难以同时消除所有噪声、保留图像细节并平衡实时性，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用相邻列信号相关性，通过迭代深度展开算法，将前一次迭代的噪声估计作为下一次输入，缩小函数逼近搜索空间。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在人工污染图像上优于现有方法，定量和定性评估均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过迭代深度展开有效去除条纹噪声，兼顾细节保留与计算效率，具有实际应用价值。

title: Hyperspectral Remote Sensing Benchmark Database for Oil Spill Detection with an Isolation Forest-Guided Unsupervised Detector
title_zh: 使用隔离森林引导无监督探测器进行溢油检测的高光谱遥感基准数据库
abstract: Oil spill detection has attracted increasing attention in recent years since marine oil spill accidents severely affect environments, natural resources, and the lives of coastal inhabitants. Hyperspectral remote sensing images provide rich spectral information which is beneficial for the monitoring of oil spills in complex ocean scenarios. However, most of the existing approaches are based on supervised and semi-supervised frameworks to detect oil spills from hyperspectral images (HSIs), which require a huge amount of effort to annotate a certain number of high-quality training sets. In this study, we make the first attempt to develop an unsupervised oil spill detection method based on isolation forest for HSIs. First, considering that the noise level varies among different bands, a noise variance estimation method is exploited to evaluate the noise level of different bands, and the bands corrupted by severe noise are removed. Second, kernel principal component analysis (KPCA) is employed to reduce the high dimensionality of the HSIs. Then, the probability of each pixel belonging to one of the classes of seawater and oil spills is estimated with the isolation forest, and a set of pseudo-labeled training samples is automatically produced using the clustering algorithm on the detected probability. Finally, an initial detection map can be obtained by performing the support vector machine (SVM) on the dimension-reduced data, and then, the initial detection result is further optimized with the extended random walker (ERW) model so as to improve the detection accuracy of oil spills. Experiments on airborne hyperspectral oil spill data (HOSD) created by ourselves demonstrate that the proposed method obtains superior detection performance with respect to other state-of-the-art detection approaches.
summary: Oil spill detection has attracted increasing attention in recent years since marine oil spill accidents severely affect environments, natural resources, and the lives of coastal inhabitants. Hyperspectral remote sensing images provide rich spectral information which is beneficial for the monitoring of oil spills in complex ocean scenarios. However, most of the existing approaches are based on supervised and semi-supervised frameworks to detect oil spills from hyperspectral images (HSIs), which require a huge amount of effort to annotate a certain number of high-quality training sets. In this study, we make the first attempt to develop an unsupervised oil spill detection method based on isolation forest for HSIs. First, considering that the noise level varies among different bands, a noise variance estimation method is exploited to evaluate the noise level of different bands, and the bands corrupted by severe noise are removed. Second, kernel principal component analysis (KPCA) is employed to reduce the high dimensionality of the HSIs. Then, the probability of each pixel belonging to one of the classes of seawater and oil spills is estimated with the isolation forest, and a set of pseudo-labeled training samples is automatically produced using the clustering algorithm on the detected probability. Finally, an initial detection map can be obtained by performing the support vector machine (SVM) on the dimension-reduced data, and then, the initial detection result is further optimized with the extended random walker (ERW) model so as to improve the detection accuracy of oil spills. Experiments on airborne hyperspectral oil spill data (HOSD) created by ourselves demonstrate that the proposed method obtains superior detection performance with respect to other state-of-the-art detection approaches.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于海上溢油事故严重影响环境、自然资源和沿海居民的生活，溢油检测越来越受到人们的关注。高光谱遥感图像提供丰富的光谱信息，有利于复杂海洋场景下的溢油监测。然而，大多数现有方法都是基于监督和半监督框架来从高光谱图像（HSI）中检测石油泄漏，这需要付出巨大的努力来注释一定数量的高质量训练集。在本研究中，我们首次尝试开发一种基于 HSI 隔离森林的无监督溢油检测方法。首先，考虑到不同频段的噪声水平存在差异，采用噪声方差估计方法来评估不同频段的噪声水平，并去除被严重噪声破坏的频段。其次，采用核主成分分析（KPCA）来降低 HSI 的高维数。然后，利用隔离森林估计每个像素属于海水和石油泄漏类别之一的概率，并根据检测到的概率使用聚类算法自动生成一组伪标记训练样本。最后，对降维数据进行支持向量机（SVM）得到初始检测图，然后利用扩展随机游走（ERW）模型进一步优化初始检测结果，从而提高溢油检测精度。对我们自己创建的机载高光谱溢油数据（HOSD）进行的实验表明，所提出的方法相对于其他最先进的检测方法获得了优越的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 开发基于隔离森林的无监督高光谱油污检测方法
AI.motivation: 现有油污检测方法依赖监督学习需大量标注数据，而实际中获取高质量标注集成本高昂且困难
AI.method: 1. 基于噪声方差估计去除高噪声波段 2. 采用KPCA降维 3. 利用隔离森林估计像素类别概率生成伪标签 4. SVM初步检测后通过ERW模型优化结果
AI.result: 在自制的高光谱油污数据集(HOSD)实验中，检测性能优于现有先进方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督方法有效解决了标注数据依赖问题，在油污检测任务中展现出优越性

Then, the probability of each pixel belonging to one of the classes of seawater and oil spills is estimated with the isolation forest, and a set of pseudo-labeled training samples is automatically produced using the clustering algorithm on the detected probability. Finally, an initial detection map can be obtained by performing the support vector machine (SVM) on the dimension-reduced data, and then, the initial detection result is further optimized with the extended random walker (ERW) model so as to improve the detection accuracy of oil spills. Experiments on airborne hyperspectral oil spill data (HOSD) created by ourselves demonstrate that the proposed method obtains superior detection performance with respect to other state-of-the-art detection approaches. 近年来，由于海上溢油事故严重影响环境、自然资源和沿海居民的生活，溢油检测越来越受到人们的关注。高光谱遥感图像提供丰富的光谱信息，有利于复杂海洋场景下的溢油监测。然而，大多数现有方法都是基于监督和半监督框架来从高光谱图像（HSI）中检测石油泄漏，这需要付出巨大的努力来注释一定数量的高质量训练集。在本研究中，我们首次尝试开发一种基于 HSI 隔离森林的无监督溢油检测方法。首先，考虑到不同频段的噪声水平存在差异，采用噪声方差估计方法来评估不同频段的噪声水平，并去除被严重噪声破坏的频段。其次，采用核主成分分析（KPCA）来降低 HSI 的高维数。然后，利用隔离森林估计每个像素属于海水和石油泄漏类别之一的概率，并根据检测到的概率使用聚类算法自动生成一组伪标记训练样本。最后，对降维数据进行支持向量机（SVM）得到初始检测图，然后利用扩展随机游走（ERW）模型进一步优化初始检测结果，从而提高溢油检测精度。对我们自己创建的机载高光谱溢油数据（HOSD）进行的实验表明，所提出的方法相对于其他最先进的检测方法获得了优越的检测性能。 开发基于隔离森林的无监督高光谱油污检测方法 Puhong Duan,Xudong Kang,Pedram Ghamisi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Andreas Spruck,Maximiliane Hawesch,Anatol Maier,Christian Riess,Jürgen Seiler,André Kaup
title: 3D Rendering Framework for Data Augmentation in Optical Character Recognition
title_zh: 用于光学字符识别中数据增强的 3D 渲染框架
comment: IEEE International Symposium on Signals, Circuits and Systems (ISSCS), 1-4, July 2021
comments: IEEE International Symposium on Signals, Circuits and Systems (ISSCS), 1-4, July 2021
abstract: In this paper, we propose a data augmentation framework for Optical Character Recognition (OCR). The proposed framework is able to synthesize new viewing angles and illumination scenarios, effectively enriching any available OCR dataset. Its modular structure allows to be modified to match individual user requirements. The framework enables to comfortably scale the enlargement factor of the available dataset. Furthermore, the proposed method is not restricted to single frame OCR but can also be applied to video OCR. We demonstrate the performance of our framework by augmenting a 15% subset of the common Brno Mobile OCR dataset. Our proposed framework is capable of leveraging the performance of OCR applications especially for small datasets. Applying the proposed method, improvements of up to 2.79 percentage points in terms of Character Error Rate (CER), and up to 7.88 percentage points in terms of Word Error Rate (WER) are achieved on the subset. Especially the recognition of challenging text lines can be improved. The CER may be decreased by up to 14.92 percentage points and the WER by up to 18.19 percentage points for this class. Moreover, we are able to achieve smaller error rates when training on the 15% subset augmented with the proposed method than on the original non-augmented full dataset.

The proposed framework is able to synthesize new viewing angles and illumination scenarios, effectively enriching any available OCR dataset. Furthermore, the proposed method is not restricted to single frame OCR but can also be applied to video OCR. We demonstrate the performance of our framework by augmenting a 15% subset of the common Brno Mobile OCR dataset. Our proposed framework is capable of leveraging the performance of OCR applications especially for small datasets. Applying the proposed method, improvements of up to 2.79 percentage points in terms of Character Error Rate (CER), and up to 7.88 percentage points in terms of Word Error Rate (WER) are achieved on the subset. Especially the recognition of challenging text lines can be improved. The CER may be decreased by up to 14.92 percentage points and the WER by up to 18.19 percentage points for this class. Moreover, we are able to achieve smaller error rates when training on the 15% subset augmented with the proposed method than on the original non-augmented full dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光学字符识别（OCR）的数据增强框架。所提出的框架能够综合新的视角和照明场景，有效地丰富任何可用的 OCR 数据集。其模块化结构允许进行修改以满足个别用户的需求。该框架能够轻松地缩放可用数据集的放大系数。此外，所提出的方法不仅限于单帧OCR，还可以应用于视频OCR。我们通过扩充常见 Brno Mobile OCR 数据集的 15% 子集来展示我们框架的性能。我们提出的框架能够利用 OCR 应用程序的性能，尤其是对于小型数据集。应用所提出的方法，该子集的字符错误率 (CER) 提高了 2.79 个百分点，字错误率 (WER) 提高了 7.88 个百分点。尤其是对具有挑战性的文本行的识别可以得到改善。该班级的 CER 最多可降低 14.92 个百分点，WER 最多可降低 18.19 个百分点。此外，与原始非增强完整数据集相比，在使用所提出的方法增强的 15% 子集上进行训练时，我们能够实现更小的错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于光学字符识别（OCR）的数据增强框架，通过合成新的视角和光照场景来扩充数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR数据集规模有限，尤其在小数据集和复杂文本行识别中表现不足，需通过数据增强提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于模块化3D渲染技术，生成多样化的视角和光照条件，支持单帧和视频OCR，并可自定义调整数据扩增比例。
AI.result: 在Brno Mobile OCR数据集15%子集上，字符错误率（CER）最高降低14.92%，词错误率（WER）最高降低18.19%，且增强后子集性能优于原始完整数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升OCR在小数据集和复杂场景下的表现，具有良好的扩展性和实用性。

title: Transfer Learning with Pretrained Remote Sensing Transformers
title_zh: 使用预训练遥感变压器进行迁移学习
comment: Draft of manuscript that is being prepared for IEEE TGRS
comments: Draft of manuscript that is being prepared for IEEE TGRS
abstract: Although the remote sensing (RS) community has begun to pretrain transformers (intended to be fine-tuned on RS tasks), it is unclear how these models perform under distribution shifts. Here, we pretrain a new RS transformer--called SatViT-V2--on 1.3 million satellite-derived RS images, then fine-tune it (along with five other models) to investigate how it performs on distributions not seen during training. We split an expertly labeled land cover dataset into 14 datasets based on source biome. We train each model on each biome separately and test them on all other biomes. In all, this amounts to 1638 biome transfer experiments. After fine-tuning, we find that SatViT-V2 outperforms SatViT-V1 by 3.1% on in-distribution (matching biomes) and 2.8% on out-of-distribution (mismatching biomes) data. Additionally, we find that initializing fine-tuning from the linear probed solution (i.e., leveraging LPFT [1]) improves SatViT-V2's performance by another 1.2% on in-distribution and 2.4% on out-of-distribution data. Next, we find that pretrained RS transformers are better calibrated under distribution shifts than non-pretrained models and leveraging LPFT results in further improvements in model calibration. Lastly, we find that five measures of distribution shift are moderately correlated with biome transfer performance. We share code and pretrained model weights. (https://github.com/antofuller/SatViT)
summary: Although the remote sensing (RS) community has begun to pretrain transformers (intended to be fine-tuned on RS tasks), it is unclear how these models perform under distribution shifts. Here, we pretrain a new RS transformer--called SatViT-V2--on 1.3 million satellite-derived RS images, then fine-tune it (along with five other models) to investigate how it performs on distributions not seen during training. We split an expertly labeled land cover dataset into 14 datasets based on source biome. We train each model on each biome separately and test them on all other biomes. In all, this amounts to 1638 biome transfer experiments. After fine-tuning, we find that SatViT-V2 outperforms SatViT-V1 by 3.1% on in-distribution (matching biomes) and 2.8% on out-of-distribution (mismatching biomes) data. Additionally, we find that initializing fine-tuning from the linear probed solution (i.e., leveraging LPFT [1]) improves SatViT-V2's performance by another 1.2% on in-distribution and 2.4% on out-of-distribution data. Next, we find that pretrained RS transformers are better calibrated under distribution shifts than non-pretrained models and leveraging LPFT results in further improvements in model calibration. Lastly, we find that five measures of distribution shift are moderately correlated with biome transfer performance. We share code and pretrained model weights. (https://github.com/antofuller/SatViT)
abstract_zh: 尽管遥感 (RS) 社区已经开始预训练 Transformer（旨在对 RS 任务进行微调），但尚不清楚这些模型在分布变化下的表现如何。在这里，我们在 130 万张卫星衍生的 RS 图像上预训练了一个新的 RS 变压器（称为 SatViT-V2），然后对其（以及其他五个模型）进行微调，以研究它在训练期间未见的分布上的表现。我们根据源生物群系将经过专业标记的土地覆盖数据集分成 14 个数据集。我们分别在每个生物群落上训练每个模型，并在所有其他生物群落上测试它们。总共，这相当于 1638 次生物群落转移实验。经过微调后，我们发现 SatViT-V2 在分布内（匹配生物群落）数据上比 SatViT-V1 好 3.1%，在分布外（不匹配生物群落）数据上比 SatViT-V1 好 2.8%。此外，我们发现从线性探测解决方案进行初始化微调（即利用 LPFT [1]）可将 SatViT-V2 的分布内数据性能再提高 1.2%，分布外数据性能提高 2.4%。接下来，我们发现预训练的 RS 变压器在分布变化下比非预训练的模型能够更好地校准，并且利用 LPFT 可以进一步改进模型校准。最后，我们发现分布转移的五种衡量标准与生物群落转移性能适度相关。我们共享代码和预训练的模型权重。 （https://github.com/antofuller/SatViT）

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练遥感Transformer模型（SatViT-V2）在分布偏移下的迁移学习性能，并通过大量生物群区数据集进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 尽管遥感领域开始预训练Transformer模型，但其在分布偏移场景下的性能仍不明确，需验证模型的泛化能力及迁移学习策略的有效性。
AI.method: 预训练SatViT-V2模型并基于14个生物群区数据集进行迁移实验，通过分 biome 训练与测试的1638次实验，结合线性探针微调（LPFT）策略评估模型性能。
AI.result: SatViT-V2在同分布和异分布数据上分别优于前代模型3.1%和2.8%，结合LPFT后进一步提升1.2%和2.4%；预训练模型校准效果更优，分布偏移指标与迁移性能中度相关。
AI.conclusion: 预训练遥感Transformer结合LPFT策略能有效提升跨分布场景的迁移性能，且模型校准能力优于非预训练模型，为遥感领域迁移学习提供新思路。

Next, we find that pretrained RS transformers are better calibrated under distribution shifts than non-pretrained models and leveraging LPFT results in further improvements in model calibration. Lastly, we find that five measures of distribution shift are moderately correlated with biome transfer performance. We share code and pretrained model weights. (https://github.com/antofuller/SatViT) 尽管遥感 (RS) 社区已经开始预训练 Transformer（旨在对 RS 任务进行微调），但尚不清楚这些模型在分布变化下的表现如何。在这里，我们在 130 万张卫星衍生的 RS 图像上预训练了一个新的 RS 变压器（称为 SatViT-V2），然后对其（以及其他五个模型）进行微调，以研究它在训练期间未见的分布上的表现。我们根据源生物群系将经过专业标记的土地覆盖数据集分成 14 个数据集。我们分别在每个生物群落上训练每个模型，并在所有其他生物群落上测试它们。总共，这相当于 1638 次生物群落转移实验。经过微调后，我们发现 SatViT-V2 在分布内（匹配生物群落）数据上比 SatViT-V1 好 3.1%，在分布外（不匹配生物群落）数据上比 SatViT-V1 好 2.8%。此外，我们发现从线性探测解决方案进行初始化微调（即利用 LPFT [1]）可将 SatViT-V2 的分布内数据性能再提高 1.2%，分布外数据性能提高 2.4%。接下来，我们发现预训练的 RS 变压器在分布变化下比非预训练的模型能够更好地校准，并且利用 LPFT 可以进一步改进模型校准。最后，我们发现分布转移的五种衡量标准与生物群落转移性能适度相关。我们共享代码和预训练的模型权重。 （https://github.com/antofuller/SatViT） 本文研究了预训练遥感Transformer模型（SatViT-V2）在分布偏移下的迁移学习性能，并通过大量生物群区数据集进行实验验证。 Anthony Fuller,Koreen Millard,James R. Green cs.CV

authors_text: Mariia Gladkova,Nikita Korobov,Nikolaus Demmel,Aljoša Ošep,Laura Leal-Taixé,Daniel Cremers
title: DirectTracker: 3D Multi-Object Tracking Using Direct Image Alignment and Photometric Bundle Adjustment
title_zh: DirectTracker：使用直接图像对齐和光度束调整的 3D 多对象跟踪
comment: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2022
comments: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2022
abstract: Direct methods have shown excellent performance in the applications of visual odometry and SLAM. In this work we propose to leverage their effectiveness for the task of 3D multi-object tracking. To this end, we propose DirectTracker, a framework that effectively combines direct image alignment for the short-term tracking and sliding-window photometric bundle adjustment for 3D object detection. Object proposals are estimated based on the sparse sliding-window pointcloud and further refined using an optimization-based cost function that carefully combines 3D and 2D cues to ensure consistency in image and world space. We propose to evaluate 3D tracking using the recently introduced higher-order tracking accuracy (HOTA) metric and the generalized intersection over union similarity measure to mitigate the limitations of the conventional use of intersection over union for the evaluation of vision-based trackers. We perform evaluation on the KITTI Tracking benchmark for the Car class and show competitive performance in tracking objects both in 2D and 3D.
summary: Direct methods have shown excellent performance in the applications of visual odometry and SLAM. In this work we propose to leverage their effectiveness for the task of 3D multi-object tracking. To this end, we propose DirectTracker, a framework that effectively combines direct image alignment for the short-term tracking and sliding-window photometric bundle adjustment for 3D object detection. Object proposals are estimated based on the sparse sliding-window pointcloud and further refined using an optimization-based cost function that carefully combines 3D and 2D cues to ensure consistency in image and world space. We propose to evaluate 3D tracking using the recently introduced higher-order tracking accuracy (HOTA) metric and the generalized intersection over union similarity measure to mitigate the limitations of the conventional use of intersection over union for the evaluation of vision-based trackers. We perform evaluation on the KITTI Tracking benchmark for the Car class and show competitive performance in tracking objects both in 2D and 3D.
abstract_zh: 直接方法在视觉里程计和 SLAM 的应用中表现出了优异的性能。在这项工作中，我们建议利用它们的有效性来完成 3D 多对象跟踪任务。为此，我们提出了 DirectTracker，这是一个有效结合用于短期跟踪的直接图像对齐和用于 3D 对象检测的滑动窗口光度束调整的框架。对象提案基于稀疏滑动窗口点云进行估计，并使用基于优化的成本函数进一步细化，该函数仔细结合 3D 和 2D 线索以确保图像和世界空间的一致性。我们建议使用最近引入的高阶跟踪精度（HOTA）度量和广义交集相似性度量来评估 3D 跟踪，以减轻传统使用交集并集来评估基于视觉的跟踪器的局限性。我们对 Car 类的 KITTI 跟踪基准进行了评估，并在 2D 和 3D 跟踪对象方面展示了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DirectTracker框架，结合直接图像对齐和光度捆绑调整技术，实现高效的3D多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 直接方法在视觉里程计和SLAM中表现优异，但尚未充分应用于3D多目标跟踪任务，需探索其在该领域的有效性。
AI.method: 通过直接图像对齐实现短期跟踪，结合滑动窗口光度捆绑调整进行3D目标检测，利用稀疏点云生成目标提案并优化融合3D/2D线索的成本函数。
AI.result: 在KITTI Tracking基准测试中，针对车辆类别在2D和3D跟踪任务中均取得具有竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: DirectTracker验证了直接方法在3D多目标跟踪中的有效性，所采用的HOTA和广义IOU指标能更全面评估视觉跟踪器性能。

authors_text: Piotr Mirowski,Kory W. Mathewson,Jaylen Pittman,Richard Evans
title: Co-Writing Screenplays and Theatre Scripts with Language Models: An Evaluation by Industry Professionals
title_zh: 使用语言模型共同创作剧本和戏剧剧本：行业专业人士的评估
abstract: Language models are increasingly attracting interest from writers. However, such models lack long-range semantic coherence, limiting their usefulness for longform creative writing. We address this limitation by applying language models hierarchically, in a system we call Dramatron. By building structural context via prompt chaining, Dramatron can generate coherent scripts and screenplays complete with title, characters, story beats, location descriptions, and dialogue. We illustrate Dramatron's usefulness as an interactive co-creative system with a user study of 15 theatre and film industry professionals. Participants co-wrote theatre scripts and screenplays with Dramatron and engaged in open-ended interviews. We report critical reflections both from our interviewees and from independent reviewers who watched stagings of the works to illustrate how both Dramatron and hierarchical text generation could be useful for human-machine co-creativity. Finally, we discuss the suitability of Dramatron for co-creativity, ethical considerations -- including plagiarism and bias -- and participatory models for the design and deployment of such tools.
summary: Language models are increasingly attracting interest from writers. However, such models lack long-range semantic coherence, limiting their usefulness for longform creative writing. We address this limitation by applying language models hierarchically, in a system we call Dramatron. By building structural context via prompt chaining, Dramatron can generate coherent scripts and screenplays complete with title, characters, story beats, location descriptions, and dialogue. We illustrate Dramatron's usefulness as an interactive co-creative system with a user study of 15 theatre and film industry professionals. Participants co-wrote theatre scripts and screenplays with Dramatron and engaged in open-ended interviews. We report critical reflections both from our interviewees and from independent reviewers who watched stagings of the works to illustrate how both Dramatron and hierarchical text generation could be useful for human-machine co-creativity. Finally, we discuss the suitability of Dramatron for co-creativity, ethical considerations -- including plagiarism and bias -- and participatory models for the design and deployment of such tools.
abstract_zh: 语言模型越来越引起作家的兴趣。然而，此类模型缺乏远程语义连贯性，限制了它们在长篇创意写作中的实用性。我们通过在称为 Dramatron 的系统中分层应用语言模型来解决此限制。通过提示链构建结构上下文，Dramatron 可以生成连贯的脚本和剧本，包括标题、角色、故事节奏、地点描述和对话。我们通过对 15 名戏剧和电影行业专业人士的用户研究来说明 Dramatron 作为交互式共同创作系统的实用性。参与者与戏剧演员共同撰写戏剧剧本和剧本，并进行开放式采访。我们报告了受访者和观看作品演出的独立评论家的批判性反思，以说明戏剧和分层文本生成如何有助于人机协同创造力。最后，我们讨论了 Dramatron 对共同创造力、道德考虑（包括剽窃和偏见）的适用性，以及设计和部署此类工具的参与模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层语言模型系统Dramatron，用于辅助剧本和戏剧脚本创作，并通过行业专业人士评估其协作效果。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在长文本创作中存在语义连贯性不足的问题，难以满足剧本等长篇创作需求。
AI.method: 构建分层语言模型Dramatron，通过提示链生成剧本结构（标题、角色、情节等），结合用户研究和独立评审验证效果。
AI.result: 用户研究显示Dramatron能有效辅助创作，参与者和评审认可其潜力，同时揭示了剽窃、偏见等伦理问题。
AI.conclusion: 分层生成技术可提升人机协作创作效率，但需重视伦理风险并采用参与式设计优化工具开发。

authors_text: Samuel McDermott,Richard Bowman,Kerrianne Harrington,William Wadsworth,Pietro Cicuta
title: Controlling and scripting laboratory hardware with open-source, intuitive interfaces: OpenFlexure Voice Control and OpenFlexure Blockly
title_zh: 使用开源、直观的界面控制和编写实验室硬件脚本：OpenFlexure Voice Control 和 OpenFlexure Blockly
abstract: Making user interaction with laboratory equipment more convenient and intuitive should promote experimental work and help researchers to complete their tasks efficiently. The most common form of interaction in current instrumentation is either direct tactile, with buttons and knobs, or interfaced through a computer, using a mouse and keyboard. Scripting is another function typical of smart and automated laboratory equipment, yet users are currently required to learn bespoke programming languages and libraries for individual pieces of equipment. In this paper, we present two open-source, novel and intuitive ways of interacting with and scripting laboratory equipment. We choose the OpenFlexure family of microscopes as our exemplar, due to their open-source nature and smart control system. Firstly, we demonstrate 'OpenFlexure Voice Control' to enable users to control the microscope hands-free. Secondly, we present 'OpenFlexure Blockly' which uses the Blockly Visual Programming Language to enable users to easily create scripts for the microscope, using a drag and drop web interface. We explain the design choices when developing these tools, and discuss more typical use cases and more general applications.
summary: Making user interaction with laboratory equipment more convenient and intuitive should promote experimental work and help researchers to complete their tasks efficiently. The most common form of interaction in current instrumentation is either direct tactile, with buttons and knobs, or interfaced through a computer, using a mouse and keyboard. Scripting is another function typical of smart and automated laboratory equipment, yet users are currently required to learn bespoke programming languages and libraries for individual pieces of equipment. In this paper, we present two open-source, novel and intuitive ways of interacting with and scripting laboratory equipment. We choose the OpenFlexure family of microscopes as our exemplar, due to their open-source nature and smart control system. Firstly, we demonstrate 'OpenFlexure Voice Control' to enable users to control the microscope hands-free. Secondly, we present 'OpenFlexure Blockly' which uses the Blockly Visual Programming Language to enable users to easily create scripts for the microscope, using a drag and drop web interface. We explain the design choices when developing these tools, and discuss more typical use cases and more general applications.
abstract_zh: 让用户与实验室设备的交互更加方便和直观，应该会促进实验工作并帮助研究人员高效地完成任务。当前仪器中最常见的交互形式是使用按钮和旋钮的直接触觉，或者使用鼠标和键盘通过计算机进行交互。脚本编写是智能和自动化实验室设备的另一个典型功能，但用户目前需要学习针对各个设备的定制编程语言和库。在本文中，我们提出了两种与实验室设备交互和编写脚本的开源、新颖且直观的方式。我们选择 OpenFlexure 系列显微镜作为示例，因为它们的开源特性和智能控制系统。首先，我们演示“OpenFlexure 语音控制”，使用户能够免提控制显微镜。其次，我们推出“OpenFlexure Blockly”，它使用 Blockly 可视化编程语言，使用户能够使用拖放 Web 界面轻松创建显微镜脚本。我们解释了开发这些工具时的设计选择，并讨论了更典型的用例和更通用的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了两种开源工具：OpenFlexure Voice Control和OpenFlexure Blockly，旨在通过语音控制和可视化编程界面提升实验室设备的操作便捷性。
AI.motivation: 当前实验室设备交互方式依赖物理按钮或编程语言，存在操作不便和学习门槛高的问题，需更直观的交互方式提升实验效率。
AI.method: 以开源显微镜OpenFlexure为案例，开发语音控制模块实现免手持操作，并基于Blockly可视化编程语言构建拖拽式脚本编辑界面。
AI.result: 成功实现语音控制功能和可视化编程工具，用户无需编程即可控制显微镜，并通过案例验证了工具在实验自动化中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 开源工具通过降低交互门槛和编程复杂度，为实验室设备操作提供了更高效、直观的解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。
