title: Digital and Physical Face Attacks: Reviewing and One Step Further
title_zh: 数字和物理人脸攻击：回顾并进一步
abstract: With the rapid progress over the past five years, face authentication has become the most pervasive biometric recognition method. Thanks to the high-accuracy recognition performance and user-friendly usage, automatic face recognition (AFR) has exploded into a plethora of practical applications over device unlocking, checking-in, and financial payment. In spite of the tremendous success of face authentication, a variety of face presentation attacks (FPA), such as print attacks, replay attacks, and 3D mask attacks, have raised pressing mistrust concerns. Besides physical face attacks, face videos/images are vulnerable to a wide variety of digital attack techniques launched by malicious hackers, causing potential menace to the public at large. Due to the unrestricted access to enormous digital face images/videos and disclosed easy-to-use face manipulation tools circulating on the internet, non-expert attackers without any prior professional skills are able to readily create sophisticated fake faces, leading to numerous dangerous applications such as financial fraud, impersonation, and identity theft. This survey aims to build the integrity of face forensics by providing thorough analyses of existing literature and highlighting the issues requiring further attention. In this paper, we first comprehensively survey both physical and digital face attack types and datasets. Then, we review the latest and most advanced progress on existing counter-attack methodologies and highlight their current limits. Moreover, we outline possible future research directions for existing and upcoming challenges in the face forensics community. Finally, the necessity of joint physical and digital face attack detection has been discussed, which has never been studied in previous surveys.
summary: With the rapid progress over the past five years, face authentication has become the most pervasive biometric recognition method. Thanks to the high-accuracy recognition performance and user-friendly usage, automatic face recognition (AFR) has exploded into a plethora of practical applications over device unlocking, checking-in, and financial payment. In spite of the tremendous success of face authentication, a variety of face presentation attacks (FPA), such as print attacks, replay attacks, and 3D mask attacks, have raised pressing mistrust concerns. Besides physical face attacks, face videos/images are vulnerable to a wide variety of digital attack techniques launched by malicious hackers, causing potential menace to the public at large. Due to the unrestricted access to enormous digital face images/videos and disclosed easy-to-use face manipulation tools circulating on the internet, non-expert attackers without any prior professional skills are able to readily create sophisticated fake faces, leading to numerous dangerous applications such as financial fraud, impersonation, and identity theft. This survey aims to build the integrity of face forensics by providing thorough analyses of existing literature and highlighting the issues requiring further attention. In this paper, we first comprehensively survey both physical and digital face attack types and datasets. Then, we review the latest and most advanced progress on existing counter-attack methodologies and highlight their current limits. Moreover, we outline possible future research directions for existing and upcoming challenges in the face forensics community. Finally, the necessity of joint physical and digital face attack detection has been discussed, which has never been studied in previous surveys.
abstract_zh: 经过过去五年的快速发展，人脸认证已成为最普遍的生物识别方法。凭借高精度的识别性能和人性化的使用方式，自动人脸识别（AFR）已在设备解锁、签到和金融支付等方面爆发出大量的实际应用。尽管人脸认证取得了巨大成功，但各种人脸呈现攻击（FPA），例如打印攻击、重放攻击和 3D 面具攻击，引起了紧迫的不信任担忧。除了物理人脸攻击外，人脸视频/图像还容易受到恶意黑客发起的各种数字攻击技术的影响，对广大公众造成潜在威胁。由于可以不受限制地访问大量数字人脸图像/视频以及在互联网上传播的公开的易于使用的人脸操纵工具，没有任何专业技能的非专家攻击者能够轻松创建复杂的假人脸，从而导致许多危险的应用，例如金融欺诈、冒充和身份盗窃。这项调查旨在通过对现有文献进行彻底分析并强调需要进一步关注的问题来建立人脸取证的完整性。在本文中，我们首先全面调查物理和数字人脸攻击类型和数据集。然后，我们回顾了现有反击方法的最新和最先进的进展，并强调了它们当前的局限性。此外，我们针对面部取证界现有和即将面临的挑战概述了未来可能的研究方向。最后，讨论了联合物理和数字人脸攻击检测的必要性，这在之前的调查中从未被研究过。

AI.tldr: 本文综述物理与数字面部攻击类型及检测方法，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 面部认证技术广泛应用但面临物理攻击（如3D面具）和数字攻击（如深度伪造）的威胁，现有研究缺乏对两者联合检测的系统分析。
AI.method: 全面调研物理/数字攻击类型及数据集，分析现有反攻击技术局限性，并提出未来研究方向与联合检测必要性。
AI.result: 系统梳理攻击分类与数据集，总结现有检测方法不足，强调物理-数字联合检测的迫切性及研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 需加强物理与数字攻击的协同检测研究，未来应关注跨模态攻击分析与鲁棒性算法设计。

method: 全面调研物理/数字攻击类型及数据集，分析现有反攻击技术局限性，并提出未来研究方向与联合检测必要性。
result: 系统梳理攻击分类与数据集，总结现有检测方法不足，强调物理-数字联合检测的迫切性及研究空白。
conclusion: 需加强物理与数字攻击的协同检测研究，未来应关注跨模态攻击分析与鲁棒性算法设计。
search_text: Digital and Physical Face Attacks: Reviewing and One Step Further 数字和物理人脸攻击：回顾并进一步 With the rapid progress over the past five years, face authentication has become the most pervasive biometric recognition method. Thanks to the high-accuracy recognition performance and user-friendly usage, automatic face recognition (AFR) has exploded into a plethora of practical applications over device unlocking, checking-in, and financial payment. In spite of the tremendous success of face authentication, a variety of face presentation attacks (FPA), such as print attacks, replay attacks, and 3D mask attacks, have raised pressing mistrust concerns. Besides physical face attacks, face videos/images are vulnerable to a wide variety of digital attack techniques launched by malicious hackers, causing potential menace to the public at large. Due to the unrestricted access to enormous digital face images/videos and disclosed easy-to-use face manipulation tools circulating on the internet, non-expert attackers without any prior professional skills are able to readily create sophisticated fake faces, leading to numerous dangerous applications such as financial fraud, impersonation, and identity theft. This survey aims to build the integrity of face forensics by providing thorough analyses of existing literature and highlighting the issues requiring further attention. In this paper, we first comprehensively survey both physical and digital face attack types and datasets. Then, we review the latest and most advanced progress on existing counter-attack methodologies and highlight their current limits. Moreover, we outline possible future research directions for existing and upcoming challenges in the face forensics community. Finally, the necessity of joint physical and digital face attack detection has been discussed, which has never been studied in previous surveys. 经过过去五年的快速发展，人脸认证已成为最普遍的生物识别方法。凭借高精度的识别性能和人性化的使用方式，自动人脸识别（AFR）已在设备解锁、签到和金融支付等方面爆发出大量的实际应用。尽管人脸认证取得了巨大成功，但各种人脸呈现攻击（FPA），例如打印攻击、重放攻击和 3D 面具攻击，引起了紧迫的不信任担忧。除了物理人脸攻击外，人脸视频/图像还容易受到恶意黑客发起的各种数字攻击技术的影响，对广大公众造成潜在威胁。由于可以不受限制地访问大量数字人脸图像/视频以及在互联网上传播的公开的易于使用的人脸操纵工具，没有任何专业技能的非专家攻击者能够轻松创建复杂的假人脸，从而导致许多危险的应用，例如金融欺诈、冒充和身份盗窃。这项调查旨在通过对现有文献进行彻底分析并强调需要进一步关注的问题来建立人脸取证的完整性。在本文中，我们首先全面调查物理和数字人脸攻击类型和数据集。然后，我们回顾了现有反击方法的最新和最先进的进展，并强调了它们当前的局限性。此外，我们针对面部取证界现有和即将面临的挑战概述了未来可能的研究方向。最后，讨论了联合物理和数字人脸攻击检测的必要性，这在之前的调查中从未被研究过。 本文综述物理与数字面部攻击类型及检测方法，并探讨未来研究方向。 Chenqi Kong,Shiqi Wang,Haoliang Li cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Majid Nasiri,Ali Cheraghian,Townim Faisal Chowdhury,Sahar Ahmadi,Morteza Saberi,Shafin Rahman
title: Prompt-guided Scene Generation for 3D Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于 3D 零样本学习的快速引导场景生成
abstract: Zero-shot learning on 3D point cloud data is a related underexplored problem compared to its 2D image counterpart. 3D data brings new challenges for ZSL due to the unavailability of robust pre-trained feature extraction models. To address this problem, we propose a prompt-guided 3D scene generation and supervision method that augments 3D data to learn the network better, exploring the complex interplay of seen and unseen objects. First, we merge point clouds of two 3D models in certain ways described by a prompt. The prompt acts like the annotation describing each 3D scene. Later, we perform contrastive learning to train our proposed architecture in an end-to-end manner. We argue that 3D scenes can relate objects more efficiently than single objects because popular language models (like BERT) can achieve high performance when objects appear in a context. Our proposed prompt-guided scene generation method encapsulates data augmentation and prompt-based annotation/captioning to improve 3D ZSL performance. We have achieved state-of-the-art ZSL and generalized ZSL performance on synthetic (ModelNet40, ModelNet10) and real-scanned (ScanOjbectNN) 3D object datasets.
summary: Zero-shot learning on 3D point cloud data is a related underexplored problem compared to its 2D image counterpart. 3D data brings new challenges for ZSL due to the unavailability of robust pre-trained feature extraction models. To address this problem, we propose a prompt-guided 3D scene generation and supervision method that augments 3D data to learn the network better, exploring the complex interplay of seen and unseen objects. First, we merge point clouds of two 3D models in certain ways described by a prompt. The prompt acts like the annotation describing each 3D scene. Later, we perform contrastive learning to train our proposed architecture in an end-to-end manner. We argue that 3D scenes can relate objects more efficiently than single objects because popular language models (like BERT) can achieve high performance when objects appear in a context. Our proposed prompt-guided scene generation method encapsulates data augmentation and prompt-based annotation/captioning to improve 3D ZSL performance. We have achieved state-of-the-art ZSL and generalized ZSL performance on synthetic (ModelNet40, ModelNet10) and real-scanned (ScanOjbectNN) 3D object datasets.
abstract_zh: 与 2D 图像对应物相比，3D 点云数据的零样本学习是一个相关的未充分研究的问题。由于缺乏鲁棒的预训练特征提取模型，3D 数据给 ZSL 带来了新的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种提示引导的 3D 场景生成和监督方法，该方法可以增强 3D 数据以更好地学习网络，探索可见和不可见对象的复杂相互作用。首先，我们按照提示描述的特定方式合并两个 3D 模型的点云。提示的作用类似于描述每个 3D 场景的注释。随后，我们进行对比学习，以端到端的方式训练我们提出的架构。我们认为 3D 场景可以比单个对象更有效地关联对象，因为当对象出现在上下文中时，流行的语言模型（如 BERT）可以实现高性能。我们提出的提示引导场景生成方法封装了数据增强和基于提示的注释/字幕，以提高 3D ZSL 性能。我们在合成（ModelNet40、ModelNet10）和真实扫描（ScanOjbectNN）3D 对象数据集上实现了最先进的 ZSL 和广义 ZSL 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示的3D场景生成方法，用于提升3D零样本学习（ZSL）性能。
AI.motivation: 3D点云数据的零样本学习因缺乏鲁棒的预训练特征提取模型而面临挑战，传统方法难以有效利用场景上下文信息。
AI.method: 通过提示指导合并两个3D模型的点云生成场景数据，结合对比学习进行端到端训练，利用语言模型上下文优势提升特征学习。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40/10和ScanObjectNN数据集上取得SOTA的ZSL和广义ZSL性能。
AI.conclusion: 场景级提示生成方法能有效捕捉物体间关系，通过上下文增强提升3D零样本学习效果。

authors_text: Hyungjin Chung,Jeongsol Kim,Michael T. Mccann,Marc L. Klasky,Jong Chul Ye
title: Diffusion Posterior Sampling for General Noisy Inverse Problems
title_zh: 一般噪声逆问题的扩散后采样
abstract: Diffusion models have been recently studied as powerful generative inverse problem solvers, owing to their high quality reconstructions and the ease of combining existing iterative solvers. However, most works focus on solving simple linear inverse problems in noiseless settings, which significantly under-represents the complexity of real-world problems. In this work, we extend diffusion solvers to efficiently handle general noisy (non)linear inverse problems via approximation of the posterior sampling. Interestingly, the resulting posterior sampling scheme is a blended version of diffusion sampling with the manifold constrained gradient without a strict measurement consistency projection step, yielding a more desirable generative path in noisy settings compared to the previous studies. Our method demonstrates that diffusion models can incorporate various measurement noise statistics such as Gaussian and Poisson, and also efficiently handle noisy nonlinear inverse problems such as Fourier phase retrieval and non-uniform deblurring. Code available at https://github.com/DPS2022/diffusion-posterior-sampling
summary: Diffusion models have been recently studied as powerful generative inverse problem solvers, owing to their high quality reconstructions and the ease of combining existing iterative solvers. However, most works focus on solving simple linear inverse problems in noiseless settings, which significantly under-represents the complexity of real-world problems. In this work, we extend diffusion solvers to efficiently handle general noisy (non)linear inverse problems via approximation of the posterior sampling. Interestingly, the resulting posterior sampling scheme is a blended version of diffusion sampling with the manifold constrained gradient without a strict measurement consistency projection step, yielding a more desirable generative path in noisy settings compared to the previous studies. Our method demonstrates that diffusion models can incorporate various measurement noise statistics such as Gaussian and Poisson, and also efficiently handle noisy nonlinear inverse problems such as Fourier phase retrieval and non-uniform deblurring. Code available at https://github.com/DPS2022/diffusion-posterior-sampling
abstract_zh: 由于扩散模型的高质量重建和易于组合现有迭代求解器，扩散模型最近被研究为强大的生成逆问题求解器。然而，大多数工作都专注于在无噪声环境中解决简单的线性逆问题，这大大低估了现实世界问题的复杂性。在这项工作中，我们扩展了扩散求解器，通过后验采样的近似来有效地处理一般的噪声（非线性）线性逆问题。有趣的是，所得的后验采样方案是扩散采样与流形约束梯度的混合版本，没有严格的测量一致性投影步骤，与之前的研究相比，在噪声环境中产生了更理想的生成路径。我们的方法表明，扩散模型可以结合各种测量噪声统计数据，例如高斯和泊松，并且还可以有效处理噪声非线性逆问题，例如傅立叶相位检索和非均匀去模糊。代码可在 https://github.com/DPS2022/diffusion-posterior-sampling 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的后验采样方法（DPS），用于解决一般噪声下的（非）线性逆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注无噪声简单线性逆问题，无法反映真实场景的复杂性，需扩展扩散模型以处理噪声环境下的逆问题。
AI.method: 通过近似后验采样，结合扩散采样与流形约束梯度，无需严格测量一致性投影步骤，实现噪声环境下的生成路径优化。
AI.result: 方法支持高斯和泊松噪声统计，有效处理傅里叶相位恢复和非均匀去模糊等非线性逆问题，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型可通过后验采样方法有效解决噪声逆问题，在生成路径上优于现有研究。

title: A canonical correlation-based framework for performance analysis of radio access networks
title_zh: 用于无线接入网络性能分析的基于规范相关性的框架
abstract: Data driven optimization and machine learning based performance diagnostics of radio access networks entails significant challenges arising not only from the nature of underlying data sources but also due to complex spatio-temporal relationships and interdependencies between cells due to user mobility and varying traffic patterns. We discuss how to study these configuration and performance management data sets and identify relationships between cells in terms of key performance indicators using multivariate analysis. To this end, we leverage a novel framework based on canonical correlation analysis (CCA), which is a highly effective method for not only dimensionality reduction but also for analyzing relationships across different sets of multivariate data. As a case study, we discuss energy saving use-case based on cell shutdown in commercial cellular networks, where we apply CCA to analyze the impact of capacity cell shutdown on the KPIs of coverage cell in the same sector. Data from LTE Network is used to analyzed example case. We conclude that CCA is a viable approach for identifying key relationships not only between network planning and configuration data, but also dynamic performance data, paving the way for endeavors such as dimensionality reduction, performance analysis, and root cause analysis for performance diagnostics.
summary: Data driven optimization and machine learning based performance diagnostics of radio access networks entails significant challenges arising not only from the nature of underlying data sources but also due to complex spatio-temporal relationships and interdependencies between cells due to user mobility and varying traffic patterns. We discuss how to study these configuration and performance management data sets and identify relationships between cells in terms of key performance indicators using multivariate analysis. To this end, we leverage a novel framework based on canonical correlation analysis (CCA), which is a highly effective method for not only dimensionality reduction but also for analyzing relationships across different sets of multivariate data. As a case study, we discuss energy saving use-case based on cell shutdown in commercial cellular networks, where we apply CCA to analyze the impact of capacity cell shutdown on the KPIs of coverage cell in the same sector. Data from LTE Network is used to analyzed example case. We conclude that CCA is a viable approach for identifying key relationships not only between network planning and configuration data, but also dynamic performance data, paving the way for endeavors such as dimensionality reduction, performance analysis, and root cause analysis for performance diagnostics.
abstract_zh: 无线接入网络的数据驱动优化和基于机器学习的性能诊断带来了重大挑战，这不仅来自底层数据源的性质，而且还由于用户移动性和变化的流量模式导致的复杂的时空关系和小区之间的相互依赖性。我们讨论如何研究这些配置和性能管理数据集，并使用多元分析确定关键性能指标方面单元之间的关系。为此，我们利用基于典型相关分析（CCA）的新颖框架，它不仅是一种高效的降维方法，而且还可以分析不同多变量数据集之间的关系。作为案例研究，我们讨论了商业蜂窝网络中基于小区关闭的节能用例，其中我们应用 CCA 来分析容量小区关闭对同一扇区内覆盖小区 KPI 的影响。来自 LTE 网络的数据用于分析示例案例。我们得出的结论是，CCA 是一种可行的方法，不仅可以识别网络规划和配置数据之间的关键关系，还可以识别动态性能数据之间的关键关系，为诸如降维、性能分析和性能诊断根本原因分析等工作铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于典型相关分析（CCA）的框架，用于分析无线接入网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于数据来源的性质和复杂的时空关系，数据驱动的优化和基于机器学习的性能诊断面临挑战，因此需要一种有效的方法来分析网络配置和性能数据。
AI.method: 本文采用典型相关分析（CCA）方法，用于分析不同多变量数据集之间的关系，并通过LTE网络数据进行案例研究。
AI.result: CCA能够有效识别网络规划配置数据与动态性能数据之间的关键关系，并成功应用于分析关闭容量小区对覆盖小区KPI的影响。
AI.conclusion: CCA是一种可行的方法，可用于网络性能诊断中的降维、性能分析和根本原因分析，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: A canonical correlation-based framework for performance analysis of radio access networks 用于无线接入网络性能分析的基于规范相关性的框架 Data driven optimization and machine learning based performance diagnostics of radio access networks entails significant challenges arising not only from the nature of underlying data sources but also due to complex spatio-temporal relationships and interdependencies between cells due to user mobility and varying traffic patterns. We discuss how to study these configuration and performance management data sets and identify relationships between cells in terms of key performance indicators using multivariate analysis. To this end, we leverage a novel framework based on canonical correlation analysis (CCA), which is a highly effective method for not only dimensionality reduction but also for analyzing relationships across different sets of multivariate data. As a case study, we discuss energy saving use-case based on cell shutdown in commercial cellular networks, where we apply CCA to analyze the impact of capacity cell shutdown on the KPIs of coverage cell in the same sector. Data from LTE Network is used to analyzed example case. We conclude that CCA is a viable approach for identifying key relationships not only between network planning and configuration data, but also dynamic performance data, paving the way for endeavors such as dimensionality reduction, performance analysis, and root cause analysis for performance diagnostics. 无线接入网络的数据驱动优化和基于机器学习的性能诊断带来了重大挑战，这不仅来自底层数据源的性质，而且还由于用户移动性和变化的流量模式导致的复杂的时空关系和小区之间的相互依赖性。我们讨论如何研究这些配置和性能管理数据集，并使用多元分析确定关键性能指标方面单元之间的关系。为此，我们利用基于典型相关分析（CCA）的新颖框架，它不仅是一种高效的降维方法，而且还可以分析不同多变量数据集之间的关系。作为案例研究，我们讨论了商业蜂窝网络中基于小区关闭的节能用例，其中我们应用 CCA 来分析容量小区关闭对同一扇区内覆盖小区 KPI 的影响。来自 LTE 网络的数据用于分析示例案例。我们得出的结论是，CCA 是一种可行的方法，不仅可以识别网络规划和配置数据之间的关键关系，还可以识别动态性能数据之间的关键关系，为诸如降维、性能分析和性能诊断根本原因分析等工作铺平道路。 本文提出了一种基于典型相关分析（CCA）的框架，用于分析无线接入网络的性能。 Furqan Ahmed,Muhammad Zeeshan Asghar,Jyri Hämäläinen cs.NI,cs.AI

title: Towards Equalised Odds as Fairness Metric in Academic Performance Prediction
title_zh: 将均等赔率作为学业成绩预测中的公平指标
comment: FATED'22: 2nd Workshop on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency in Educational Data. July 2022. Durham, England
comments: FATED'22: 2nd Workshop on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency in Educational Data. July 2022. Durham, England
abstract: The literature for fairness-aware machine learning knows a plethora of different fairness notions. It is however wellknown, that it is impossible to satisfy all of them, as certain notions contradict each other. In this paper, we take a closer look at academic performance prediction (APP) systems and try to distil which fairness notions suit this task most. For this, we scan recent literature proposing guidelines as to which fairness notion to use and apply these guidelines onto APP. Our findings suggest equalised odds as most suitable notion for APP, based on APP's WYSIWYG worldview as well as potential long-term improvements for the population.
summary: The literature for fairness-aware machine learning knows a plethora of different fairness notions. It is however wellknown, that it is impossible to satisfy all of them, as certain notions contradict each other. In this paper, we take a closer look at academic performance prediction (APP) systems and try to distil which fairness notions suit this task most. For this, we scan recent literature proposing guidelines as to which fairness notion to use and apply these guidelines onto APP. Our findings suggest equalised odds as most suitable notion for APP, based on APP's WYSIWYG worldview as well as potential long-term improvements for the population.
abstract_zh: 有关公平感知机器学习的文献了解大量不同的公平概念。然而众所周知，不可能满足所有这些要求，因为某些概念相互矛盾。在本文中，我们仔细研究了学业成绩预测（APP）系统，并尝试提炼出最适合这项任务的公平概念。为此，我们浏览了最近的文献，提出了关于使用哪种公平概念的指南，并将这些指南应用到 APP 上。我们的研究结果表明，基于 APP 所见即所得的世界观以及对人口的潜在长期改善，均等赔率是最适合 APP 的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨在学术成绩预测系统中，哪种公平性指标最为适用，并确定平等机会为最优选择。
AI.motivation: 由于不同公平性概念之间存在矛盾，无法同时满足，因此需要针对学术成绩预测任务选择最合适的公平性指标，以确保预测的公平性。
AI.method: 通过分析近期文献中提出的公平性指标选择指南，并将其应用于学术成绩预测系统，评估不同指标的适用性。
AI.result: 研究发现，平等机会（Equalised Odds）是学术成绩预测中最适合的公平性指标，因其符合系统的WYSIWYG世界观并有助于长期改进。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为，平等机会在学术成绩预测中能有效平衡公平性与准确性，是实现长期公平改进的合理选择。

authors_text: Shivam Sharma,Mohd Khizir Siddiqui,Md. Shad Akhtar,Tanmoy Chakraborty
title: Domain-aware Self-supervised Pre-training for Label-Efficient Meme Analysis
title_zh: 用于标签高效模因分析的领域感知自我监督预训练
comment: Accepted at AACL-IJCNLP 2022 main conference. 9 Pages (main content); 6 Figures; 5 Tables and an Appendix
comments: Accepted at AACL-IJCNLP 2022 main conference. 9 Pages (main content); 6 Figures; 5 Tables and an Appendix
abstract: Existing self-supervised learning strategies are constrained to either a limited set of objectives or generic downstream tasks that predominantly target uni-modal applications. This has isolated progress for imperative multi-modal applications that are diverse in terms of complexity and domain-affinity, such as meme analysis. Here, we introduce two self-supervised pre-training methods, namely Ext-PIE-Net and MM-SimCLR that (i) employ off-the-shelf multi-modal hate-speech data during pre-training and (ii) perform self-supervised learning by incorporating multiple specialized pretext tasks, effectively catering to the required complex multi-modal representation learning for meme analysis. We experiment with different self-supervision strategies, including potential variants that could help learn rich cross-modality representations and evaluate using popular linear probing on the Hateful Memes task. The proposed solutions strongly compete with the fully supervised baseline via label-efficient training while distinctly outperforming them on all three tasks of the Memotion challenge with 0.18%, 23.64%, and 0.93% performance gain, respectively. Further, we demonstrate the generalizability of the proposed solutions by reporting competitive performance on the HarMeme task. Finally, we empirically establish the quality of the learned representations by analyzing task-specific learning, using fewer labeled training samples, and arguing that the complexity of the self-supervision strategy and downstream task at hand are correlated. Our efforts highlight the requirement of better multi-modal self-supervision methods involving specialized pretext tasks for efficient fine-tuning and generalizable performance.
summary: Existing self-supervised learning strategies are constrained to either a limited set of objectives or generic downstream tasks that predominantly target uni-modal applications. This has isolated progress for imperative multi-modal applications that are diverse in terms of complexity and domain-affinity, such as meme analysis. Here, we introduce two self-supervised pre-training methods, namely Ext-PIE-Net and MM-SimCLR that (i) employ off-the-shelf multi-modal hate-speech data during pre-training and (ii) perform self-supervised learning by incorporating multiple specialized pretext tasks, effectively catering to the required complex multi-modal representation learning for meme analysis. We experiment with different self-supervision strategies, including potential variants that could help learn rich cross-modality representations and evaluate using popular linear probing on the Hateful Memes task. The proposed solutions strongly compete with the fully supervised baseline via label-efficient training while distinctly outperforming them on all three tasks of the Memotion challenge with 0.18%, 23.64%, and 0.93% performance gain, respectively. Further, we demonstrate the generalizability of the proposed solutions by reporting competitive performance on the HarMeme task. Finally, we empirically establish the quality of the learned representations by analyzing task-specific learning, using fewer labeled training samples, and arguing that the complexity of the self-supervision strategy and downstream task at hand are correlated. Our efforts highlight the requirement of better multi-modal self-supervision methods involving specialized pretext tasks for efficient fine-tuning and generalizable performance.
abstract_zh: 现有的自我监督学习策略要么局限于一组有限的目标，要么局限于主要针对单模态应用的通用下游任务。这使得复杂性和领域亲和力各不相同的命令式多模式应用程序（例如模因分析）取得了独立的进展。在这里，我们介绍了两种自监督预训练方法，即 Ext-PIE-Net 和 MM-SimCLR，它们（i）在预训练期间采用现成的多模态仇恨言论数据；（ii）通过合并多个专门的借口任务来执行自监督学习，有效满足模因分析所需的复杂多模态表示学习。我们尝试了不同的自我监督策略，包括可以帮助学习丰富的跨模态表示的潜在变体，并使用流行的线性探测对可恨模因任务进行评估。所提出的解决方案通过标签高效的训练与完全监督的基线进行强有力的竞争，同时在 Memotion 挑战的所有三项任务上明显优于它们，分别获得了 0.18%、23.64% 和 0.93% 的性能增益。此外，我们通过报告 HarMeme 任务的竞争表现来证明所提出的解决方案的普遍性。最后，我们通过分析特定于任务的学习，使用较少的标记训练样本，并论证自我监督策略的复杂性和手头的下游任务是相关的，凭经验确定学习表征的质量。我们的努力强调了对更好的多模式自我监督方法的需求，涉及专门的借口任务，以实现高效的微调和可推广的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种自监督预训练方法Ext-PIE-Net和MM-SimCLR，用于解决标签高效且复杂的多模态网络迷因分析问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法受限于单一目标或通用下游任务，难以满足多模态应用（如迷因分析）对复杂领域适应性的需求。
AI.method: 利用现成的多模态仇恨言论数据进行预训练，并设计多种专业化预训练任务，学习跨模态表征以提升迷因分析性能。
AI.result: 在Memotion挑战赛的三个任务中分别超越全监督基线0.18%、23.64%和0.93%，并在HarMeme任务中展现良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 复杂自监督策略与下游任务的相关性显著，需通过领域自适应的预训练任务提升多模态模型的高效微调与泛化能力。

motivation: 现有自监督学习方法受限于单一目标或通用下游任务，难以满足多模态应用（如迷因分析）对复杂领域适应性的需求。
method: 利用现成的多模态仇恨言论数据进行预训练，并设计多种专业化预训练任务，学习跨模态表征以提升迷因分析性能。
result: 在Memotion挑战赛的三个任务中分别超越全监督基线0.18%、23.64%和0.93%，并在HarMeme任务中展现良好泛化能力。
conclusion: 复杂自监督策略与下游任务的相关性显著，需通过领域自适应的预训练任务提升多模态模型的高效微调与泛化能力。
search_text: Domain-aware Self-supervised Pre-training for Label-Efficient Meme Analysis 用于标签高效模因分析的领域感知自我监督预训练 Existing self-supervised learning strategies are constrained to either a limited set of objectives or generic downstream tasks that predominantly target uni-modal applications. This has isolated progress for imperative multi-modal applications that are diverse in terms of complexity and domain-affinity, such as meme analysis. Here, we introduce two self-supervised pre-training methods, namely Ext-PIE-Net and MM-SimCLR that (i) employ off-the-shelf multi-modal hate-speech data during pre-training and (ii) perform self-supervised learning by incorporating multiple specialized pretext tasks, effectively catering to the required complex multi-modal representation learning for meme analysis. We experiment with different self-supervision strategies, including potential variants that could help learn rich cross-modality representations and evaluate using popular linear probing on the Hateful Memes task. The proposed solutions strongly compete with the fully supervised baseline via label-efficient training while distinctly outperforming them on all three tasks of the Memotion challenge with 0.18%, 23.64%, and 0.93% performance gain, respectively. Further, we demonstrate the generalizability of the proposed solutions by reporting competitive performance on the HarMeme task. Finally, we empirically establish the quality of the learned representations by analyzing task-specific learning, using fewer labeled training samples, and arguing that the complexity of the self-supervision strategy and downstream task at hand are correlated. Our efforts highlight the requirement of better multi-modal self-supervision methods involving specialized pretext tasks for efficient fine-tuning and generalizable performance. 现有的自我监督学习策略要么局限于一组有限的目标，要么局限于主要针对单模态应用的通用下游任务。这使得复杂性和领域亲和力各不相同的命令式多模式应用程序（例如模因分析）取得了独立的进展。在这里，我们介绍了两种自监督预训练方法，即 Ext-PIE-Net 和 MM-SimCLR，它们（i）在预训练期间采用现成的多模态仇恨言论数据；（ii）通过合并多个专门的借口任务来执行自监督学习，有效满足模因分析所需的复杂多模态表示学习。我们尝试了不同的自我监督策略，包括可以帮助学习丰富的跨模态表示的潜在变体，并使用流行的线性探测对可恨模因任务进行评估。所提出的解决方案通过标签高效的训练与完全监督的基线进行强有力的竞争，同时在 Memotion 挑战的所有三项任务上明显优于它们，分别获得了 0.18%、23.64% 和 0.93% 的性能增益。此外，我们通过报告 HarMeme 任务的竞争表现来证明所提出的解决方案的普遍性。最后，我们通过分析特定于任务的学习，使用较少的标记训练样本，并论证自我监督策略的复杂性和手头的下游任务是相关的，凭经验确定学习表征的质量。我们的努力强调了对更好的多模式自我监督方法的需求，涉及专门的借口任务，以实现高效的微调和可推广的性能。 本文提出两种自监督预训练方法Ext-PIE-Net和MM-SimCLR，用于解决标签高效且复杂的多模态网络迷因分析问题。 Shivam Sharma,Mohd Khizir Siddiqui,Md. Shad Akhtar,Tanmoy Chakraborty cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.MM

title: A dichotomy for succinct representations of homomorphisms
title_zh: 同态简洁表示的二分法
comment: 24 pages, 2 figures, full version of paper accepted for ICALP 2023
comments: 24 pages, 2 figures, full version of paper accepted for ICALP 2023
abstract: The task of computing homomorphisms between two finite relational structures $\mathcal{A}$ and $\mathcal{B}$ is a well-studied question with numerous applications. Since the set $\operatorname{Hom}(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{B})$ of all homomorphisms may be very large having a method of representing it in a succinct way, especially one which enables us to perform efficient enumeration and counting, could be extremely useful. One simple yet powerful way of doing so is to decompose $\operatorname{Hom}(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{B})$ using union and Cartesian product. Such data structures, called d-representations, have been introduced by Olteanu and Zavodny in the context of database theory. Their results also imply that if the treewidth of the left-hand side structure $\mathcal{A}$ is bounded, then a d-representation of polynomial size can be found in polynomial time. We show that for structures of bounded arity this is optimal: if the treewidth is unbounded then there are instances where the size of any d-representation is superpolynomial. Along the way we develop tools for proving lower bounds on the size of d-representations, in particular we define a notion of reduction suitable for this context and prove an almost tight lower bound on the size of d-representations of all $k$-cliques in a graph.
summary: The task of computing homomorphisms between two finite relational structures $\mathcal{A}$ and $\mathcal{B}$ is a well-studied question with numerous applications. Since the set $\operatorname{Hom}(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{B})$ of all homomorphisms may be very large having a method of representing it in a succinct way, especially one which enables us to perform efficient enumeration and counting, could be extremely useful. One simple yet powerful way of doing so is to decompose $\operatorname{Hom}(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{B})$ using union and Cartesian product. Such data structures, called d-representations, have been introduced by Olteanu and Zavodny in the context of database theory. Their results also imply that if the treewidth of the left-hand side structure $\mathcal{A}$ is bounded, then a d-representation of polynomial size can be found in polynomial time. We show that for structures of bounded arity this is optimal: if the treewidth is unbounded then there are instances where the size of any d-representation is superpolynomial. Along the way we develop tools for proving lower bounds on the size of d-representations, in particular we define a notion of reduction suitable for this context and prove an almost tight lower bound on the size of d-representations of all $k$-cliques in a graph.
abstract_zh: 计算两个有限关系结构 $\mathcal{A}$ 和 $\mathcal{B}$ 之间的同态任务是一个经过充分研究的问题，具有许多应用。由于所有同态的集合 $\operatorname{Hom}(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{B})$ 可能非常大，因此拥有一种以简洁的方式表示它的方法，特别是使我们能够执行有效的枚举和计数的方法，可能非常有用。一种简单而强大的方法是使用并集和笛卡尔积分解 $\operatorname{Hom}(\mathcal{A},\mathcal{B})$。这种称为 d-表示的数据结构是由 Olteanu 和 Zavodny 在数据库理论的背景下引入的。他们的结果还意味着，如果左侧结构 $\mathcal{A}$ 的树宽有界，则可以在多项式时间内找到多项式大小的 d 表示。我们证明，对于有界数量的结构，这是最优的：如果树宽是无界的，那么在某些情况下，任何 d 表示的大小都是超多项式的。在此过程中，我们开发了用于证明 d 表示大小下限的工具，特别是我们定义了适合这种情况的约简概念，并证明了图中所有 $k$ 派系的 d 表示大小的几乎严格的下界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有限关系结构间同态的简洁表示方法，特别是通过d-表示（d-representations）的分解方式，并探讨了其复杂度与结构树宽的关系。
AI.motivation: 同态计算在数据库等领域有广泛应用，但当同态集合极大时，需高效枚举和计数方法。d-表示提供了一种分解手段，但其复杂度边界尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析结构的树宽，结合d-表示的分解特性，定义了适用于该场景的约简方法，并证明了k-团的d-表示下界。
AI.result: 证明了当且仅当结构树宽有界时，d-表示的规模为多项式级；否则存在实例需超多项式规模的d-表示。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为同态问题的简洁表示提供了复杂度二分法，明确了树宽在决定表示效率中的关键作用。

authors_text: Karin Stacke,Indrani Bhattacharya,Justin R. Tse,James D. Brooks,Geoffrey A. Sonn,Mirabela Rusu
title: Correlated Feature Aggregation by Region Helps Distinguish Aggressive from Indolent Clear Cell Renal Cell Carcinoma Subtypes on CT
title_zh: 按区域聚合相关特征有助于在 CT 上区分侵袭性透明细胞肾细胞癌亚型和惰性透明细胞肾细胞癌亚型
abstract: Renal cell carcinoma (RCC) is a common cancer that varies in clinical behavior. Indolent RCC is often low-grade without necrosis and can be monitored without treatment. Aggressive RCC is often high-grade and can cause metastasis and death if not promptly detected and treated. While most kidney cancers are detected on CT scans, grading is based on histology from invasive biopsy or surgery. Determining aggressiveness on CT images is clinically important as it facilitates risk stratification and treatment planning. This study aims to use machine learning methods to identify radiology features that correlate with features on pathology to facilitate assessment of cancer aggressiveness on CT images instead of histology. This paper presents a novel automated method, Correlated Feature Aggregation By Region (CorrFABR), for classifying aggressiveness of clear cell RCC by leveraging correlations between radiology and corresponding unaligned pathology images. CorrFABR consists of three main steps: (1) Feature Aggregation where region-level features are extracted from radiology and pathology images, (2) Fusion where radiology features correlated with pathology features are learned on a region level, and (3) Prediction where the learned correlated features are used to distinguish aggressive from indolent clear cell RCC using CT alone as input. Thus, during training, CorrFABR learns from both radiology and pathology images, but during inference, CorrFABR will distinguish aggressive from indolent clear cell RCC using CT alone, in the absence of pathology images. CorrFABR improved classification performance over radiology features alone, with an increase in binary classification F1-score from 0.68 (0.04) to 0.73 (0.03). This demonstrates the potential of incorporating pathology disease characteristics for improved classification of aggressiveness of clear cell RCC on CT images.

This paper presents a novel automated method, Correlated Feature Aggregation By Region (CorrFABR), for classifying aggressiveness of clear cell RCC by leveraging correlations between radiology and corresponding unaligned pathology images. CorrFABR consists of three main steps: (1) Feature Aggregation where region-level features are extracted from radiology and pathology images, (2) Fusion where radiology features correlated with pathology features are learned on a region level, and (3) Prediction where the learned correlated features are used to distinguish aggressive from indolent clear cell RCC using CT alone as input. Thus, during training, CorrFABR learns from both radiology and pathology images, but during inference, CorrFABR will distinguish aggressive from indolent clear cell RCC using CT alone, in the absence of pathology images. abstract_zh: 肾细胞癌（RCC）是一种临床行为各异的常见癌症。惰性肾细胞癌通常是低级别的，没有坏死，无需治疗即可监测。侵袭性肾细胞癌通常是高级别的，如果不及时发现和治疗，可能会导致转移和死亡。虽然大多数肾癌是通过 CT 扫描检测到的，但分级是基于侵入性活检或手术的组织学。确定 CT 图像的侵袭性在临床上很重要，因为它有助于风险分层和治疗计划。本研究旨在利用机器学习方法来识别与病理学特征相关的放射学特征，以促进通过 CT 图像而不是组织学评估癌症侵袭性。本文提出了一种新颖的自动化方法，即按区域相关特征聚合 (CorrFABR)，通过利用放射学和相应的未对齐病理图像之间的相关性对透明细胞肾细胞癌的侵袭性进行分类。 CorrFABR 包含三个主要步骤：(1) 特征聚合，从放射学和病理学图像中提取区域级特征；(2) 融合，在区域级学习与病理学特征相关的放射学特征；(3) 预测，其中仅使用 CT 作为输入，使用学习到的相关特征来区分侵袭性和惰性透明细胞 RCC。因此，在训练期间，CorrFABR 从放射学和病理学图像中学习，但在推理过程中，CorrFABR 将在没有病理学图像的情况下仅使用 CT 区分侵袭性和惰性透明细胞 RCC。 CorrFABR 改进了单独放射学特征的分类性能，二元分类 F1 分数从 0.68 (0.04) 增加到 0.73 (0.03)。这证明了结合病理学疾病特征来改进 CT 图像上透明细胞肾细胞癌侵袭性分类的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域相关特征聚合的新方法CorrFABR，通过结合CT影像与病理图像特征，区分透明细胞肾癌的侵袭性和惰性亚型。
AI.motivation: 肾癌的分级依赖于侵入性活检的组织学分析，而CT影像无法直接评估肿瘤侵袭性。需开发非侵入性方法通过CT影像预测肿瘤恶性程度，以指导临床风险分层和治疗决策。
AI.method: CorrFABR包含三个步骤：1）从CT和病理图像中提取区域级特征；2）在区域层面学习CT特征与病理特征的关联性；3）仅使用CT影像输入进行侵袭性分类。训练阶段结合CT与病理图像，推理阶段仅依赖CT。
AI.result: CorrFABR将二分类F1分数从0.68（0.04）提升至0.73（0.03），表明融合病理特征可提升CT影像分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合病理特征信息，CT影像可更准确区分肾癌侵袭性亚型，为无创肿瘤分级提供新方法。

search_text: Correlated Feature Aggregation by Region Helps Distinguish Aggressive from Indolent Clear Cell Renal Cell Carcinoma Subtypes on CT 按区域聚合相关特征有助于在 CT 上区分侵袭性透明细胞肾细胞癌亚型和惰性透明细胞肾细胞癌亚型 Renal cell carcinoma (RCC) is a common cancer that varies in clinical behavior. Indolent RCC is often low-grade without necrosis and can be monitored without treatment. Aggressive RCC is often high-grade and can cause metastasis and death if not promptly detected and treated. While most kidney cancers are detected on CT scans, grading is based on histology from invasive biopsy or surgery. Determining aggressiveness on CT images is clinically important as it facilitates risk stratification and treatment planning. This study aims to use machine learning methods to identify radiology features that correlate with features on pathology to facilitate assessment of cancer aggressiveness on CT images instead of histology. This paper presents a novel automated method, Correlated Feature Aggregation By Region (CorrFABR), for classifying aggressiveness of clear cell RCC by leveraging correlations between radiology and corresponding unaligned pathology images. CorrFABR consists of three main steps: (1) Feature Aggregation where region-level features are extracted from radiology and pathology images, (2) Fusion where radiology features correlated with pathology features are learned on a region level, and (3) Prediction where the learned correlated features are used to distinguish aggressive from indolent clear cell RCC using CT alone as input. Thus, during training, CorrFABR learns from both radiology and pathology images, but during inference, CorrFABR will distinguish aggressive from indolent clear cell RCC using CT alone, in the absence of pathology images. CorrFABR improved classification performance over radiology features alone, with an increase in binary classification F1-score from 0.68 (0.04) to 0.73 (0.03). This demonstrates the potential of incorporating pathology disease characteristics for improved classification of aggressiveness of clear cell RCC on CT images. 肾细胞癌（RCC）是一种临床行为各异的常见癌症。惰性肾细胞癌通常是低级别的，没有坏死，无需治疗即可监测。侵袭性肾细胞癌通常是高级别的，如果不及时发现和治疗，可能会导致转移和死亡。虽然大多数肾癌是通过 CT 扫描检测到的，但分级是基于侵入性活检或手术的组织学。确定 CT 图像的侵袭性在临床上很重要，因为它有助于风险分层和治疗计划。本研究旨在利用机器学习方法来识别与病理学特征相关的放射学特征，以促进通过 CT 图像而不是组织学评估癌症侵袭性。本文提出了一种新颖的自动化方法，即按区域相关特征聚合 (CorrFABR)，通过利用放射学和相应的未对齐病理图像之间的相关性对透明细胞肾细胞癌的侵袭性进行分类。 CorrFABR 包含三个主要步骤：(1) 特征聚合，从放射学和病理学图像中提取区域级特征；(2) 融合，在区域级学习与病理学特征相关的放射学特征；(3) 预测，其中仅使用 CT 作为输入，使用学习到的相关特征来区分侵袭性和惰性透明细胞 RCC。因此，在训练期间，CorrFABR 从放射学和病理学图像中学习，但在推理过程中，CorrFABR 将在没有病理学图像的情况下仅使用 CT 区分侵袭性和惰性透明细胞 RCC。 CorrFABR 改进了单独放射学特征的分类性能，二元分类 F1 分数从 0.68 (0.04) 增加到 0.73 (0.03)。这证明了结合病理学疾病特征来改进 CT 图像上透明细胞肾细胞癌侵袭性分类的潜力。 本文提出一种基于区域相关特征聚合的新方法CorrFABR，通过结合CT影像与病理图像特征，区分透明细胞肾癌的侵袭性和惰性亚型。 Karin Stacke,Indrani Bhattacharya,Justin R. Tse,James D. Brooks,Geoffrey A. Sonn,Mirabela Rusu eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Backflipping with Miniature Quadcopters by Gaussian Process Based Control and Planning
title_zh: 通过基于高斯过程的控制和规划使用微型四轴飞行器进行后空翻
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology (2022)
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology (2022)
abstract: The paper proposes two control methods for performing a backflip maneuver with miniature quadcopters. First, an existing feedforward control approach is improved by finding the optimal sequence of motion primitives via Bayesian optimization, using a surrogate Gaussian Process model. To evaluate the cost function, the flip maneuver is performed repeatedly in a simulation environment. The second method is based on closed-loop control and it consists of two main steps: first a novel robust, adaptive controller is designed to provide reliable reference tracking even in case of model uncertainties. The controller is constructed by augmenting the nominal model of the drone with a Gaussian Process that is trained by using measurement data. Second, an efficient trajectory planning algorithm is proposed, which designs feasible trajectories for the flip maneuver by using only quadratic programming. The two approaches are analyzed in simulations and in real experiments using Bitcraze Crazyflie 2.1 quadcopters.
summary: The paper proposes two control methods for performing a backflip maneuver with miniature quadcopters. First, an existing feedforward control approach is improved by finding the optimal sequence of motion primitives via Bayesian optimization, using a surrogate Gaussian Process model. To evaluate the cost function, the flip maneuver is performed repeatedly in a simulation environment. The second method is based on closed-loop control and it consists of two main steps: first a novel robust, adaptive controller is designed to provide reliable reference tracking even in case of model uncertainties. The controller is constructed by augmenting the nominal model of the drone with a Gaussian Process that is trained by using measurement data. Second, an efficient trajectory planning algorithm is proposed, which designs feasible trajectories for the flip maneuver by using only quadratic programming. The two approaches are analyzed in simulations and in real experiments using Bitcraze Crazyflie 2.1 quadcopters.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了两种使用微型四轴飞行器执行后空翻机动的控制方法。首先，通过使用代理高斯过程模型通过贝叶斯优化找到运动原语的最佳序列，改进了现有的前馈控制方法。为了评估成本函数，在模拟环境中重复执行翻转操作。第二种方法基于闭环控制，由两个主要步骤组成：首先，设计一种新颖的鲁棒自适应控制器，即使在模型不确定的情况下也能提供可靠的参考跟踪。该控制器是通过使用测量数据训练的高斯过程来增强无人机的标称模型而构建的。其次，提出了一种有效的轨迹规划算法，该算法仅使用二次规划来设计翻转机动的可行轨迹。使用 Bitcraze Crazyflie 2.1 四轴飞行器在模拟和实际实验中对这两种方法进行了分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于高斯过程的控制与规划方法，实现微型四旋翼无人机的后空翻动作。
AI.motivation: 后空翻是复杂动态动作，传统控制方法难以应对模型不确定性及高效轨迹规划需求。
AI.method: 改进前馈控制通过贝叶斯优化选择运动原语序列，并设计闭环控制方法，包含高斯过程增强的自适应控制器与二次规划轨迹规划算法。
AI.result: 两种方法在仿真与Bitcraze Crazyflie 2.1无人机实验证明有效，实现可靠后空翻控制。
AI.conclusion: 基于高斯过程的控制与规划方法为复杂无人机动作提供了鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

title: Factor Graph Fusion of Raw GNSS Sensing with IMU and Lidar for Precise Robot Localization without a Base Station
title_zh: 原始 GNSS 传感与 IMU 和激光雷达的因子图融合，无需基站即可实现精确的机器人定位
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, accompanying video: https://youtu.be/55BLjt6ce1Y, accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, accompanying video: https://youtu.be/55BLjt6ce1Y, accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Accurate localization is a core component of a robot's navigation system. To this end, global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) can provide absolute measurements outdoors and, therefore, eliminate long-term drift. However, fusing GNSS data with other sensor data is not trivial, especially when a robot moves between areas with and without sky view. We propose a robust approach that tightly fuses raw GNSS receiver data with inertial measurements and, optionally, lidar observations for precise and smooth mobile robot localization. A factor graph with two types of GNSS factors is proposed. First, factors based on pseudoranges, which allow for global localization on Earth. Second, factors based on carrier phases, which enable highly accurate relative localization, which is useful when other sensing modalities are challenged. Unlike traditional differential GNSS, this approach does not require a connection to a base station. On a public urban driving dataset, our approach achieves accuracy comparable to a state-of-the-art algorithm that fuses visual inertial odometry with GNSS data -- despite our approach not using the camera, just inertial and GNSS data. We also demonstrate the robustness of our approach using data from a car and a quadruped robot moving in environments with little sky visibility, such as a forest. The accuracy in the global Earth frame is still 1-2 m, while the estimated trajectories are discontinuity-free and smooth. We also show how lidar measurements can be tightly integrated. We believe this is the first system that fuses raw GNSS observations (as opposed to fixes) with lidar in a factor graph.
summary: Accurate localization is a core component of a robot's navigation system. To this end, global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) can provide absolute measurements outdoors and, therefore, eliminate long-term drift. However, fusing GNSS data with other sensor data is not trivial, especially when a robot moves between areas with and without sky view. We propose a robust approach that tightly fuses raw GNSS receiver data with inertial measurements and, optionally, lidar observations for precise and smooth mobile robot localization. A factor graph with two types of GNSS factors is proposed. First, factors based on pseudoranges, which allow for global localization on Earth. Second, factors based on carrier phases, which enable highly accurate relative localization, which is useful when other sensing modalities are challenged. Unlike traditional differential GNSS, this approach does not require a connection to a base station. On a public urban driving dataset, our approach achieves accuracy comparable to a state-of-the-art algorithm that fuses visual inertial odometry with GNSS data -- despite our approach not using the camera, just inertial and GNSS data. We also demonstrate the robustness of our approach using data from a car and a quadruped robot moving in environments with little sky visibility, such as a forest. The accuracy in the global Earth frame is still 1-2 m, while the estimated trajectories are discontinuity-free and smooth. We also show how lidar measurements can be tightly integrated. We believe this is the first system that fuses raw GNSS observations (as opposed to fixes) with lidar in a factor graph.
abstract_zh: 精确定位是机器人导航系统的核心组成部分。为此，全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 可以在户外提供绝对测量，从而消除长期漂移。然而，将 GNSS 数据与其他传感器数据融合并非易事，尤其是当机器人在有天空视野和无天空视野的区域之间移动时。我们提出了一种稳健的方法，将原始 GNSS 接收器数据与惯性测量和可选的激光雷达观测紧密融合，以实现精确、平稳的移动机器人定位。提出了具有两种 GNSS 因子的因子图。首先，基于伪距的因素，允许在地球上进行全球定位。其次，基于载波相位的因素可以实现高精度的相对定位，这在其他传感方式受到挑战时非常有用。与传统的差分 GNSS 不同，这种方法不需要连接到基站。在公共城市驾驶数据集上，我们的方法实现的精度可与将视觉惯性里程计与 GNSS 数据融合的最先进算法相媲美 - 尽管我们的方法不使用相机，仅使用惯性和 GNSS 数据。我们还使用汽车和四足机器人在天空能见度较低的环境（例如森林）中移动的数据来证明我们方法的稳健性。全球地球坐标系中的精度仍然为 1-2 m，而估计的轨迹是无间断且平滑的。我们还展示了如何紧密集成激光雷达测量。我们相信这是第一个将原始 GNSS 观测结果（而不是修复）与因子图中的激光雷达融合的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需基站的因子图方法，通过融合原始GNSS数据、IMU和LiDAR实现机器人精准定位。
AI.motivation: 传统GNSS与多传感器融合在遮挡环境下存在挑战，且依赖基站的差分GNSS无法满足无基站场景需求。
AI.method: 构建包含伪距因子（实现全局定位）和载波相位因子（实现高精度相对定位）的双因子图，融合原始GNSS观测数据与IMU/LiDAR数据，无需基站支持。
AI.result: 在城市驾驶数据集和森林等低天空可见度环境中，定位精度达1-2米，轨迹平滑连续，且不依赖视觉数据即可达到视觉惯性里程计+GNSS的先进算法水平。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现原始GNSS观测与LiDAR在因子图中的紧耦合，为无基站场景下的机器人高精度定位提供了鲁棒解决方案。

search_text: Factor Graph Fusion of Raw GNSS Sensing with IMU and Lidar for Precise Robot Localization without a Base Station 原始 GNSS 传感与 IMU 和激光雷达的因子图融合，无需基站即可实现精确的机器人定位 Accurate localization is a core component of a robot's navigation system. To this end, global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) can provide absolute measurements outdoors and, therefore, eliminate long-term drift. However, fusing GNSS data with other sensor data is not trivial, especially when a robot moves between areas with and without sky view. We propose a robust approach that tightly fuses raw GNSS receiver data with inertial measurements and, optionally, lidar observations for precise and smooth mobile robot localization. A factor graph with two types of GNSS factors is proposed. First, factors based on pseudoranges, which allow for global localization on Earth. Second, factors based on carrier phases, which enable highly accurate relative localization, which is useful when other sensing modalities are challenged. Unlike traditional differential GNSS, this approach does not require a connection to a base station. On a public urban driving dataset, our approach achieves accuracy comparable to a state-of-the-art algorithm that fuses visual inertial odometry with GNSS data -- despite our approach not using the camera, just inertial and GNSS data. We also demonstrate the robustness of our approach using data from a car and a quadruped robot moving in environments with little sky visibility, such as a forest. The accuracy in the global Earth frame is still 1-2 m, while the estimated trajectories are discontinuity-free and smooth. We also show how lidar measurements can be tightly integrated. We believe this is the first system that fuses raw GNSS observations (as opposed to fixes) with lidar in a factor graph. 精确定位是机器人导航系统的核心组成部分。为此，全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 可以在户外提供绝对测量，从而消除长期漂移。然而，将 GNSS 数据与其他传感器数据融合并非易事，尤其是当机器人在有天空视野和无天空视野的区域之间移动时。我们提出了一种稳健的方法，将原始 GNSS 接收器数据与惯性测量和可选的激光雷达观测紧密融合，以实现精确、平稳的移动机器人定位。提出了具有两种 GNSS 因子的因子图。首先，基于伪距的因素，允许在地球上进行全球定位。其次，基于载波相位的因素可以实现高精度的相对定位，这在其他传感方式受到挑战时非常有用。与传统的差分 GNSS 不同，这种方法不需要连接到基站。在公共城市驾驶数据集上，我们的方法实现的精度可与将视觉惯性里程计与 GNSS 数据融合的最先进算法相媲美 - 尽管我们的方法不使用相机，仅使用惯性和 GNSS 数据。我们还使用汽车和四足机器人在天空能见度较低的环境（例如森林）中移动的数据来证明我们方法的稳健性。全球地球坐标系中的精度仍然为 1-2 m，而估计的轨迹是无间断且平滑的。我们还展示了如何紧密集成激光雷达测量。我们相信这是第一个将原始 GNSS 观测结果（而不是修复）与因子图中的激光雷达融合的系统。 本文提出一种无需基站的因子图方法，通过融合原始GNSS数据、IMU和LiDAR实现机器人精准定位。 Jonas Beuchert,Marco Camurri,Maurice Fallon cs.RO

authors_text: Adam Goldbraikh,Netanell Avisdris,Carla M. Pugh,Shlomi Laufer
title: Bounded Future MS-TCN++ for surgical gesture recognition
title_zh: 用于手术手势识别的 Bounded Future MS-TCN++
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, Accepted to ECCV-MCV
comments: 17 pages, 7 figures, 1 table, Accepted to ECCV-MCV
abstract: In recent times there is a growing development of video based applications for surgical purposes. Part of these applications can work offline after the end of the procedure, other applications must react immediately. However, there are cases where the response should be done during the procedure but some delay is acceptable. In the literature, the online-offline performance gap is known. Our goal in this study was to learn the performance-delay trade-off and design an MS-TCN++-based algorithm that can utilize this trade-off. To this aim, we used our open surgery simulation data-set containing 96 videos of 24 participants that perform a suturing task on a variable tissue simulator. In this study, we used video data captured from the side view. The Networks were trained to identify the performed surgical gestures. The naive approach is to reduce the MS-TCN++ depth, as a result, the receptive field is reduced, and also the number of required future frames is also reduced. We showed that this method is sub-optimal, mainly in the small delay cases. The second method was to limit the accessible future in each temporal convolution. This way, we have flexibility in the network design and as a result, we achieve significantly better performance than in the naive approach.
summary: In recent times there is a growing development of video based applications for surgical purposes. Part of these applications can work offline after the end of the procedure, other applications must react immediately. However, there are cases where the response should be done during the procedure but some delay is acceptable. In the literature, the online-offline performance gap is known. Our goal in this study was to learn the performance-delay trade-off and design an MS-TCN++-based algorithm that can utilize this trade-off. To this aim, we used our open surgery simulation data-set containing 96 videos of 24 participants that perform a suturing task on a variable tissue simulator. In this study, we used video data captured from the side view. The Networks were trained to identify the performed surgical gestures. The naive approach is to reduce the MS-TCN++ depth, as a result, the receptive field is reduced, and also the number of required future frames is also reduced. We showed that this method is sub-optimal, mainly in the small delay cases. The second method was to limit the accessible future in each temporal convolution. This way, we have flexibility in the network design and as a result, we achieve significantly better performance than in the naive approach.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用于手术目的的基于视频的应用程序不断发展。这些应用程序中的一部分可以在程序结束后离线工作，其他应用程序必须立即做出反应。然而，在某些情况下，应在程序期间进行响应，但一些延迟是可以接受的。在文献中，线上线下的性能差距是众所周知的。我们在本研究中的目标是了解性能与延迟的权衡，并设计一种可以利用这种权衡的基于 MS-TCN++ 的算法。为此，我们使用了开放式手术模拟数据集，其中包含 24 名参与者的 96 个视频，这些参与者在可变组织模拟器上执行缝合任务。在本研究中，我们使用从侧视图捕获的视频数据。网络经过训练可以识别所执行的手术手势。最简单的方法是减少 MS-TCN++ 深度，从而减少感受野，并且所需的未来帧数也减少。我们表明这种方法不是最优的，主要是在小延迟的情况下。第二种方法是限制每个时间卷积中可访问的未来。这样，我们的网络设计就具有灵活性，因此，我们获得了比简单方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MS-TCN++的算法，用于在手术过程中识别手术手势，并在性能与延迟之间进行权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频应用在手术中需要实时或离线处理，但有时需要在手术过程中接受一定的延迟。本文旨在研究性能与延迟之间的权衡，并设计一种能够利用这种权衡的算法。
AI.method: 作者使用了一个包含96个视频的手术模拟数据集，训练网络识别手术手势。他们尝试了两种方法：减少MS-TCN++的深度以及限制每个时间卷积中可访问的未来帧数。
AI.result: 与简单的方法相比，限制每个时间卷积中可访问的未来帧数的方法在小延迟情况下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过限制时间卷积中未来帧的访问，可以在网络设计上获得更大的灵活性，从而在性能和延迟之间实现更优的权衡。

authors_text: Xian Wang,Xiaoyu Mo,Mingming Fan,Lik-Hang Lee,Bertram E. Shi,Pan Hui
title: Reducing Stress and Anxiety in the Metaverse: A Systematic Review of Meditation, Mindfulness and Virtual Reality
title_zh: 减轻虚拟世界中的压力和焦虑：冥想、正念和虚拟现实的系统回顾
abstract: Meditation, or mindfulness, is widely used to improve mental health. With the emergence of Virtual Reality technology, many studies have provided evidence that meditation with VR can bring health benefits. However, to our knowledge, there are no guidelines and comprehensive reviews in the literature on how to conduct such research in virtual reality. In order to understand the role of VR technology in meditation and future research opportunities, we conducted a systematic literature review in the IEEE and ACM databases. Our process yielded 19 eligible papers and we conducted a structured analysis. We understand the state-of-art of meditation type, design consideration and VR and technology through these papers and conclude research opportunities and challenges for the future.
summary: Meditation, or mindfulness, is widely used to improve mental health. With the emergence of Virtual Reality technology, many studies have provided evidence that meditation with VR can bring health benefits. However, to our knowledge, there are no guidelines and comprehensive reviews in the literature on how to conduct such research in virtual reality. In order to understand the role of VR technology in meditation and future research opportunities, we conducted a systematic literature review in the IEEE and ACM databases. Our process yielded 19 eligible papers and we conducted a structured analysis. We understand the state-of-art of meditation type, design consideration and VR and technology through these papers and conclude research opportunities and challenges for the future.
abstract_zh: 冥想或正念被广泛用于改善心理健康。随着虚拟现实技术的出现，许多研究提供了证据表明虚拟现实冥想可以带来健康益处。然而，据我们所知，文献中没有关于如何在虚拟现实中进行此类研究的指南和全面的评论。为了了解 VR 技术在冥想中的作用以及未来的研究机会，我们在 IEEE 和 ACM 数据库中进行了系统的文献综述。我们的流程产生了 19 篇合格论文，并进行了结构化分析。通过这些论文，我们了解冥想类型、设计考虑以及 VR 和技术的最新水平，并总结未来的研究机会和挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述分析虚拟现实技术在冥想中的应用，以减少压力和焦虑，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管VR冥想被证明有效，但缺乏系统指南和综述，需明确其应用现状及未来研究方向。
AI.method: 通过IEEE和ACM数据库进行系统文献综述，筛选并分析19篇相关论文，总结设计考虑因素与技术应用。
AI.result: 总结了VR冥想的现状、设计要素及技术应用，指出现有研究的不足及未来研究机会与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需关注VR冥想的标准化设计、技术优化及长期效果验证，以提升其在减压和焦虑管理中的应用价值。

title: Increasing Model Generalizability for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 提高无监督领域适应的模型通用性
comment: Presented 2022 Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents
comments: Presented 2022 Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents
abstract: A dominant approach for addressing unsupervised domain adaptation is to map data points for the source and the target domains into an embedding space which is modeled as the output-space of a shared deep encoder. The encoder is trained to make the embedding space domain-agnostic to make a source-trained classifier generalizable on the target domain. A secondary mechanism to improve UDA performance further is to make the source domain distribution more compact to improve model generalizability. We demonstrate that increasing the interclass margins in the embedding space can help to develop a UDA algorithm with improved performance. We estimate the internally learned multi-modal distribution for the source domain, learned as a result of pretraining, and use it to increase the interclass class separation in the source domain to reduce the effect of domain shift. We demonstrate that using our approach leads to improved model generalizability on four standard benchmark UDA image classification datasets and compares favorably against exiting methods.
summary: A dominant approach for addressing unsupervised domain adaptation is to map data points for the source and the target domains into an embedding space which is modeled as the output-space of a shared deep encoder. The encoder is trained to make the embedding space domain-agnostic to make a source-trained classifier generalizable on the target domain. A secondary mechanism to improve UDA performance further is to make the source domain distribution more compact to improve model generalizability. We demonstrate that increasing the interclass margins in the embedding space can help to develop a UDA algorithm with improved performance. We estimate the internally learned multi-modal distribution for the source domain, learned as a result of pretraining, and use it to increase the interclass class separation in the source domain to reduce the effect of domain shift. We demonstrate that using our approach leads to improved model generalizability on four standard benchmark UDA image classification datasets and compares favorably against exiting methods.
abstract_zh: 解决无监督域适应的主要方法是将源域和目标域的数据点映射到嵌入空间，该嵌入空间被建模为共享深度编码器的输出空间。编码器经过训练，使嵌入空间与域无关，从而使源训练的分类器可在目标域上推广。进一步提高 UDA 性能的第二个机制是使源域分布更加紧凑，以提高模型的泛化性。我们证明，增加嵌入空间中的类间裕度有助于开发性能提高的 UDA 算法。我们估计源域的内部学习多模态分布（作为预训练的结果而学习），并使用它来增加源域中的类间类分离，以减少域转移的影响。我们证明，使用我们的方法可以提高四个标准基准 UDA 图像分类数据集上的模型通用性，并且与现有方法相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进无监督领域自适应（UDA）模型泛化能力的方法，通过增强嵌入空间中的类间分离来减少领域偏移影响。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法依赖于共享编码器生成领域无关的嵌入空间，但源域分布的多模态特性可能导致类间混淆，限制了模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 在预训练后估计源域的多模态分布，通过最大化类间边距调整嵌入空间，增强源域类别分离度以缓解领域偏移。
AI.result: 在四个标准UDA图像分类数据集上，该方法在模型泛化性能上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化嵌入空间的类间结构，可有效提升无监督领域自适应的模型泛化能力。

search_text: Increasing Model Generalizability for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 提高无监督领域适应的模型通用性 A dominant approach for addressing unsupervised domain adaptation is to map data points for the source and the target domains into an embedding space which is modeled as the output-space of a shared deep encoder. The encoder is trained to make the embedding space domain-agnostic to make a source-trained classifier generalizable on the target domain. A secondary mechanism to improve UDA performance further is to make the source domain distribution more compact to improve model generalizability. We demonstrate that increasing the interclass margins in the embedding space can help to develop a UDA algorithm with improved performance. We estimate the internally learned multi-modal distribution for the source domain, learned as a result of pretraining, and use it to increase the interclass class separation in the source domain to reduce the effect of domain shift. We demonstrate that using our approach leads to improved model generalizability on four standard benchmark UDA image classification datasets and compares favorably against exiting methods. 解决无监督域适应的主要方法是将源域和目标域的数据点映射到嵌入空间，该嵌入空间被建模为共享深度编码器的输出空间。编码器经过训练，使嵌入空间与域无关，从而使源训练的分类器可在目标域上推广。进一步提高 UDA 性能的第二个机制是使源域分布更加紧凑，以提高模型的泛化性。我们证明，增加嵌入空间中的类间裕度有助于开发性能提高的 UDA 算法。我们估计源域的内部学习多模态分布（作为预训练的结果而学习），并使用它来增加源域中的类间类分离，以减少域转移的影响。我们证明，使用我们的方法可以提高四个标准基准 UDA 图像分类数据集上的模型通用性，并且与现有方法相比具有优势。 本文提出一种改进无监督领域自适应（UDA）模型泛化能力的方法，通过增强嵌入空间中的类间分离来减少领域偏移影响。 Mohammad Rostami cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Ivan Chuprov,Dmitry Efremenko,Jiexing Gao,Pavel Anisimov,Viacheslav Zemlyakov
title: Scaling transformation of the multimode nonlinear Schrödinger equation for physics-informed neural networks
title_zh: 物理信息神经网络的多模非线性薛定谔方程的标度变换
abstract: Single-mode optical fibers (SMFs) have become the backbone of modern communication systems. However, their throughput is expected to reach its theoretical limit in the nearest future. Utilization of multimode fibers (MMFs) is considered as one of the most promising solutions rectifying this capacity crunch. Nevertheless, differential equations describing light propagation in MMFs are a way more sophisticated than those for SMFs, which makes numerical modelling of MMF-based systems computationally demanding and impractical for the most part of realistic scenarios. Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are known to outperform conventional numerical approaches in various domains and have been successfully applied to the nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLSE) describing light propagation in SMFs. A comprehensive study on application of PINN to the multimode NLSE (MMNLSE) is still lacking though. To the best of our knowledge, this paper is the first to deploy the paradigm of PINN for MMNLSE and to demonstrate that a straightforward implementation of PINNs by analogy with NLSE does not work out. We pinpoint all issues hindering PINN convergence and introduce a novel scaling transformation for the zero-order dispersion coefficient that makes PINN capture all relevant physical effects. Our simulations reveal good agreement with the split-step Fourier (SSF) method and extend numerically attainable propagation lengths up to several hundred meters. All major limitations are also highlighted.
summary: Single-mode optical fibers (SMFs) have become the backbone of modern communication systems. However, their throughput is expected to reach its theoretical limit in the nearest future. Utilization of multimode fibers (MMFs) is considered as one of the most promising solutions rectifying this capacity crunch. Nevertheless, differential equations describing light propagation in MMFs are a way more sophisticated than those for SMFs, which makes numerical modelling of MMF-based systems computationally demanding and impractical for the most part of realistic scenarios. Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are known to outperform conventional numerical approaches in various domains and have been successfully applied to the nonlinear Schrödinger equation (NLSE) describing light propagation in SMFs. A comprehensive study on application of PINN to the multimode NLSE (MMNLSE) is still lacking though. To the best of our knowledge, this paper is the first to deploy the paradigm of PINN for MMNLSE and to demonstrate that a straightforward implementation of PINNs by analogy with NLSE does not work out. We pinpoint all issues hindering PINN convergence and introduce a novel scaling transformation for the zero-order dispersion coefficient that makes PINN capture all relevant physical effects. Our simulations reveal good agreement with the split-step Fourier (SSF) method and extend numerically attainable propagation lengths up to several hundred meters. All major limitations are also highlighted.
abstract_zh: 单模光纤 (SMF) 已成为现代通信系统的支柱。然而，它们的吞吐量预计将在不久的将来达到其理论极限。多模光纤 (MMF) 的使用被认为是解决容量紧缩问题的最有前途的解决方案之一。然而，描述 MMF 中光传播的微分方程比 SMF 中的微分方程更加复杂，这使得基于 MMF 的系统的数值建模计算要求较高，并且对于大多数现实场景来说是不切实际的。众所周知，物理信息神经网络 (PINN) 在各个领域都优于传统数值方法，并且已成功应用于描述 SMF 中光传播的非线性薛定谔方程 (NLSE)。但目前仍缺乏对 PINN 在多模 NLSE (MMNLSE) 中应用的全面研究。据我们所知，本文是第一篇为 MMNLSE 部署 PINN 范式的论文，并证明通过与 NLSE 类比直接实现 PINN 是行不通的。我们查明了阻碍 PINN 收敛的所有问题，并为零阶色散系数引入了一种新颖的缩放变换，使 PINN 捕获所有相关的物理效应。我们的模拟表明与分步傅里叶（SSF）方法有很好的一致性，并将数值上可达到的传播长度扩展到数百米。还强调了所有主要限制。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将物理信息神经网络（PINN）应用于多模非线性薛定谔方程（MMNLSE）的可行性，并提出了一种缩放变换方法以解决其收敛问题。
AI.motivation: 单模光纤的传输容量接近极限，多模光纤虽具潜力但数值模拟复杂度高，传统方法难以处理MMNLSE，需探索高效替代方案。
AI.method: 通过分析PINN在MMNLSE中的收敛障碍，提出对零阶色散系数进行缩放变换，并调整网络结构以准确捕捉物理效应。
AI.result: 模拟结果与分步傅里叶法一致，数值计算的传播距离扩展至数百米，同时明确了方法的主要局限性。
AI.conclusion: 首次将PINN应用于MMNLSE，缩放变换有效解决了收敛问题，验证了该方法的潜力，但需进一步克服现有限制。

title: Tensor-Based Sketching Method for the Low-Rank Approximation of Data Streams
title_zh: 用于数据流低阶近似的基于张量的草图方法
abstract: Low-rank approximation in data streams is a fundamental and significant task in computing science, machine learning and statistics. Multiple streaming algorithms have emerged over years and most of them are inspired by randomized algorithms, more specifically, sketching methods. However, many algorithms are not able to leverage information of data streams and consequently suffer from low accuracy. Existing data-driven methods improve accuracy but the training cost is expensive in practice. In this paper, from a subspace perspective, we propose a tensor-based sketching method for low-rank approximation of data streams. The proposed algorithm fully exploits the structure of data streams and obtains quasi-optimal sketching matrices by performing tensor decomposition on training data. A series of experiments are carried out and show that the proposed tensor-based method can be more accurate and much faster than the previous work.
summary: Low-rank approximation in data streams is a fundamental and significant task in computing science, machine learning and statistics. Multiple streaming algorithms have emerged over years and most of them are inspired by randomized algorithms, more specifically, sketching methods. However, many algorithms are not able to leverage information of data streams and consequently suffer from low accuracy. Existing data-driven methods improve accuracy but the training cost is expensive in practice. In this paper, from a subspace perspective, we propose a tensor-based sketching method for low-rank approximation of data streams. The proposed algorithm fully exploits the structure of data streams and obtains quasi-optimal sketching matrices by performing tensor decomposition on training data. A series of experiments are carried out and show that the proposed tensor-based method can be more accurate and much faster than the previous work.
abstract_zh: 数据流中的低秩近似是计算科学、机器学习和统计学中的一项基本且重要的任务。多年来已经出现了多种流算法，其中大多数都受到随机算法的启发，更具体地说，是草图方法。然而，许多算法无法利用数据流的信息，因此精度较低。现有的数据驱动方法提高了准确性，但实践中训练成本昂贵。在本文中，从子空间的角度来看，我们提出了一种基于张量的草图方法，用于数据流的低秩近似。该算法充分利用数据流的结构，通过对训练数据进行张量分解来获得准最优草图矩阵。一系列的实验表明，所提出的基于张量的方法比以前的工作更准确、更快。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于张量的草图方法，用于提高数据流低秩近似的准确性和效率
AI.motivation: 现有方法在准确率或训练成本上存在不足，需更高效且准确的解决方案
AI.method: 通过张量分解在训练数据上生成准最优草图矩阵，充分利用数据流结构
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确性和速度上优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 基于张量的草图方法能有效提升数据流低秩近似的性能

In this paper, from a subspace perspective, we propose a tensor-based sketching method for low-rank approximation of data streams. The proposed algorithm fully exploits the structure of data streams and obtains quasi-optimal sketching matrices by performing tensor decomposition on training data. A series of experiments are carried out and show that the proposed tensor-based method can be more accurate and much faster than the previous work. 数据流中的低秩近似是计算科学、机器学习和统计学中的一项基本且重要的任务。多年来已经出现了多种流算法，其中大多数都受到随机算法的启发，更具体地说，是草图方法。然而，许多算法无法利用数据流的信息，因此精度较低。现有的数据驱动方法提高了准确性，但实践中训练成本昂贵。在本文中，从子空间的角度来看，我们提出了一种基于张量的草图方法，用于数据流的低秩近似。该算法充分利用数据流的结构，通过对训练数据进行张量分解来获得准最优草图矩阵。一系列的实验表明，所提出的基于张量的方法比以前的工作更准确、更快。 提出一种基于张量的草图方法，用于提高数据流低秩近似的准确性和效率 Cuiyu Liu,Chuanfu Xiao,Mingshuo Ding,Chao Yang cs.DS

title: Compressed Gastric Image Generation Based on Soft-Label Dataset Distillation for Medical Data Sharing
title_zh: 基于软标签数据集蒸馏的压缩胃图像生成用于医疗数据共享
comment: Published as a journal paper at Elsevier CMPB
comments: Published as a journal paper at Elsevier CMPB
abstract: Background and objective: Sharing of medical data is required to enable the cross-agency flow of healthcare information and construct high-accuracy computer-aided diagnosis systems. However, the large sizes of medical datasets, the massive amount of memory of saved deep convolutional neural network (DCNN) models, and patients' privacy protection are problems that can lead to inefficient medical data sharing. Therefore, this study proposes a novel soft-label dataset distillation method for medical data sharing. Methods: The proposed method distills valid information of medical image data and generates several compressed images with different data distributions for anonymous medical data sharing. Furthermore, our method can extract essential weights of DCNN models to reduce the memory required to save trained models for efficient medical data sharing. Results: The proposed method can compress tens of thousands of images into several soft-label images and reduce the size of a trained model to a few hundredths of its original size. The compressed images obtained after distillation have been visually anonymized; therefore, they do not contain the private information of the patients. Furthermore, we can realize high-detection performance with a small number of compressed images. Conclusions: The experimental results show that the proposed method can improve the efficiency and security of medical data sharing.

abstract_zh: 背景和目标：需要共享医疗数据，以实现医疗信息的跨机构流动并构建高精度计算机辅助诊断系统。然而，庞大的医疗数据集、保存的深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）模型的大量内存以及患者的隐私保护等问题可能导致医疗数据共享效率低下。因此，本研究提出了一种用于医疗数据共享的新型软标签数据集蒸馏方法。方法：该方法提取医学图像数据的有效信息，并生成多个具有不同数据分布的压缩图像，用于匿名医学数据共享。此外，我们的方法可以提取 DCNN 模型的基本权重，以减少保存训练模型所需的内存，从而实现高效的医疗数据共享。结果：所提出的方法可以将数万张图像压缩为多个软标签图像，并将训练模型的尺寸减小到原始尺寸的百分之几。蒸馏后获得的压缩图像已被视觉匿名化；因此，它们不包含患者的私人信息。此外，我们可以用少量的压缩图像实现高检测性能。结论：实验结果表明，该方法能够提高医疗数据共享的效率和安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于软标签数据集蒸馏的压缩胃部图像生成方法，以提升医疗数据共享的效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据共享面临数据集体积庞大、深度学习模型存储占用高及患者隐私保护等挑战，需寻求高效且安全的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过软标签数据集蒸馏技术提取医疗图像关键信息，生成不同分布的压缩图像，并提取深度卷积神经网络的核心权重以减小模型体积。
AI.result: 可将数万张图像压缩为数张软标签图像，模型体积缩小至原大小的百分之一以下，压缩图像实现视觉匿名化且保持高检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明该方法有效提升了医疗数据共享的效率与隐私保护水平，为跨机构医疗信息流通提供可行方案。

title: An Equal-Size Hard EM Algorithm for Diverse Dialogue Generation
title_zh: 用于生成多样化对话的等尺寸硬EM算法
abstract: Open-domain dialogue systems aim to interact with humans through natural language texts in an open-ended fashion. Despite the recent success of super large dialogue systems such as ChatGPT, using medium-to-small-sized dialogue systems remains the common practice as they are more lightweight and accessible; however, generating diverse dialogue responses is challenging, especially with smaller models. In this work, we propose an Equal-size Hard Expectation--Maximization (EqHard-EM) algorithm to train a multi-decoder model for diverse dialogue generation. Our algorithm assigns a sample to a decoder in a hard manner and additionally imposes an equal-assignment constraint to ensure that all decoders are well-trained. We provide detailed theoretical analysis to justify our approach. Further, experiments on two large-scale open-domain dialogue datasets verify that our EqHard-EM algorithm generates high-quality diverse responses.
summary: Open-domain dialogue systems aim to interact with humans through natural language texts in an open-ended fashion. Despite the recent success of super large dialogue systems such as ChatGPT, using medium-to-small-sized dialogue systems remains the common practice as they are more lightweight and accessible; however, generating diverse dialogue responses is challenging, especially with smaller models. In this work, we propose an Equal-size Hard Expectation--Maximization (EqHard-EM) algorithm to train a multi-decoder model for diverse dialogue generation. Our algorithm assigns a sample to a decoder in a hard manner and additionally imposes an equal-assignment constraint to ensure that all decoders are well-trained. We provide detailed theoretical analysis to justify our approach. Further, experiments on two large-scale open-domain dialogue datasets verify that our EqHard-EM algorithm generates high-quality diverse responses.
abstract_zh: 开放域对话系统旨在以开放的方式通过自然语言文本与人类进行交互。尽管ChatGPT等超大型对话系统最近取得了成功，但使用中小型对话系统仍然是常见的做法，因为它们更轻量级且易于访问；然而，生成多样化的对话响应具有挑战性，尤其是对于较小的模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种等大小硬期望最大化（EqHard-EM）算法来训练用于多样化对话生成的多解码器模型。我们的算法以硬性方式将样本分配给解码器，并额外施加平等分配约束以确保所有解码器都经过良好训练。我们提供详细的理论分析来证明我们的方法的合理性。此外，对两个大规模开放域对话数据集的实验验证了我们的 EqHard-EM 算法可以生成高质量的多样化响应。

AI.tldr: 提出一种等大小硬EM算法（EqHard-EM）来训练多解码器模型，以生成高质量且多样的对话回复。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型对话系统（如ChatGPT）表现出色，但中等至小型模型因更轻量和易用而更常见，但这些模型在生成多样化对话回复方面存在挑战，亟需改进方法。
AI.method: 提出等大小硬EM（EqHard-EM）算法，通过硬分配样本到多个解码器并施加等分配约束，确保各解码器均衡训练，从而提升多样性生成能力。
AI.result: 在两个大规模开放域对话数据集上的实验表明，EqHard-EM算法能有效生成高质量且多样化的对话回复。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了小型模型生成多样化对话的难题，为轻量级对话系统提供了理论支持和实用方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Manas Gupta,Efe Camci,Vishandi Rudy Keneta,Abhishek Vaidyanathan,Ritwik Kanodia,Chuan-Sheng Foo,Wu Min,Lin Jie
title: Is Complexity Required for Neural Network Pruning? A Case Study on Global Magnitude Pruning
title_zh: 神经网络剪枝是否需要复杂性？全局幅度剪枝的案例研究
abstract: Pruning neural networks has become popular in the last decade when it was shown that a large number of weights can be safely removed from modern neural networks without compromising accuracy. Numerous pruning methods have been proposed since, each claiming to be better than prior art, however, at the cost of increasingly complex pruning methodologies. These methodologies include utilizing importance scores, getting feedback through back-propagation or having heuristics-based pruning rules amongst others. In this work, we question whether this pattern of introducing complexity is really necessary to achieve better pruning results. We benchmark these SOTA techniques against a simple pruning baseline, namely, Global Magnitude Pruning (Global MP), that ranks weights in order of their magnitudes and prunes the smallest ones. Surprisingly, we find that vanilla Global MP performs very well against the SOTA techniques. When considering sparsity-accuracy trade-off, Global MP performs better than all SOTA techniques at all sparsity ratios. When considering FLOPs-accuracy trade-off, some SOTA techniques outperform Global MP at lower sparsity ratios, however, Global MP starts performing well at high sparsity ratios and performs very well at extremely high sparsity ratios. Moreover, we find that a common issue that many pruning algorithms run into at high sparsity rates, namely, layer-collapse, can be easily fixed in Global MP. We explore why layer collapse occurs in networks and how it can be mitigated in Global MP by utilizing a technique called Minimum Threshold. We showcase the above findings on various models (WRN-28-8, ResNet-32, ResNet-50, MobileNet-V1 and FastGRNN) and multiple datasets (CIFAR-10, ImageNet and HAR-2). Code is available at https://github.com/manasgupta-1/GlobalMP.

We showcase the above findings on various models (WRN-28-8, ResNet-32, ResNet-50, MobileNet-V1 and FastGRNN) and multiple datasets (CIFAR-10, ImageNet and HAR-2). Code is available at https://github.com/manasgupta-1/GlobalMP.
abstract_zh: 剪枝神经网络在过去十年中变得流行，当时研究表明可以安全地从现代神经网络中删除大量权重而不影响准确性。此后，人们提出了多种修剪方法，每种方法都声称比现有技术更好，但代价是修剪方法日益复杂。这些方法包括利用重要性分数、通过反向传播获取反馈或采用基于启发式的修剪规则等。在这项工作中，我们质疑这种引入复杂性的模式是否真的有必要获得更好的修剪结果。我们将这些 SOTA 技术与一个简单的修剪基线（即全局幅度修剪（Global MP））进行基准测试，该基线按权重的大小顺序排列权重并修剪最小的权重。令人惊讶的是，我们发现普通 Global MP 相对于 SOTA 技术表现得非常好。在考虑稀疏性与准确性的权衡时，Global MP 在所有稀疏率下都比所有 SOTA 技术表现更好。当考虑 FLOPs 与准确性的权衡时，一些 SOTA 技术在较低的稀疏率下优于 Global MP，然而，Global MP 在高稀疏率下开始表现良好，并且在极高的稀疏率下表现非常好。此外，我们发现许多剪枝算法在高稀疏率下遇到的一个常见问题，即层崩溃，可以在 Global MP 中轻松解决。我们探讨了为什么网络中会发生层崩溃，以及如何利用称为“最小阈值”的技术在 Global MP 中减轻层崩溃。我们展示了在各种模型（WRN-28-8、ResNet-32、ResNet-50、MobileNet-V1 和 FastGRNN）和多个数据集（CIFAR-10、ImageNet 和 HAR-2）上的上述发现。代码可在 https://github.com/manasgupta-1/GlobalMP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了神经网络剪枝是否需要复杂方法，通过对比全局幅度剪枝（Global MP）与现有复杂剪枝技术的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法为提升效果引入了复杂机制（如重要性评分、反向传播反馈等），但作者质疑这种复杂性是否必要。
AI.method: 以Global MP为基准，对比其与多种先进剪枝技术在不同稀疏率下的性能，并通过最小阈值技术解决层坍塌问题。
AI.result: Global MP在稀疏性-精度权衡中优于所有SOTA方法；在极高稀疏率下表现显著，且能有效避免层坍塌问题。
AI.conclusion: 复杂剪枝方法并非必需，简单全局幅度剪枝在多数场景下表现更优，且易于实现与优化。
